title: Efficient Progressive High Dynamic Range Image Restoration via Attention and Alignment Network
title_zh: 通过注意力和对齐网络进行高效渐进式高动态范围图像恢复
abstract: HDR is an important part of computational photography technology. In this paper, we propose a lightweight neural network called Efficient Attention-and-alignment-guided Progressive Network (EAPNet) for the challenge NTIRE 2022 HDR Track 1 and Track 2. We introduce a multi-dimensional lightweight encoding module to extract features. Besides, we propose Progressive Dilated U-shape Block (PDUB) that can be a progressive plug-and-play module for dynamically tuning MAccs and PSNR. Finally, we use fast and low-power feature-align module to deal with misalignment problem in place of the time-consuming Deformable Convolutional Network (DCN). The experiments show that our method achieves about 20 times compression on MAccs with better mu-PSNR and PSNR compared to the state-of-the-art method. We got the second place of both two tracks during the testing phase. Figure1. shows the visualized result of NTIRE 2022 HDR challenge.
summary: HDR is an important part of computational photography technology. In this paper, we propose a lightweight neural network called Efficient Attention-and-alignment-guided Progressive Network (EAPNet) for the challenge NTIRE 2022 HDR Track 1 and Track 2. We introduce a multi-dimensional lightweight encoding module to extract features. Besides, we propose Progressive Dilated U-shape Block (PDUB) that can be a progressive plug-and-play module for dynamically tuning MAccs and PSNR. Finally, we use fast and low-power feature-align module to deal with misalignment problem in place of the time-consuming Deformable Convolutional Network (DCN). The experiments show that our method achieves about 20 times compression on MAccs with better mu-PSNR and PSNR compared to the state-of-the-art method. We got the second place of both two tracks during the testing phase. Figure1. shows the visualized result of NTIRE 2022 HDR challenge.
abstract_zh: HDR是计算摄影技术的重要组成部分。在本文中，我们针对 NTIRE 2022 HDR Track 1 和 Track 2 挑战提出了一种名为 Efficient Attention-and-alignment-guided Progressive Network (EAPNet) 的轻量级神经网络。我们引入了多维轻量级编码模块来提取特征。此外，我们提出了渐进式扩张 U 形块（PDUB），它可以作为渐进式即插即用模块，用于动态调整 MAccs 和 PSNR。最后，我们使用快速且低功耗的特征对齐模块来代替耗时的可变形卷积网络（DCN）来处理未对齐问题。实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在 MAccs 上实现了约 20 倍的压缩，具有更好的 mu-PSNR 和 PSNR。我们在测试阶段获得了两条赛道的第二名。图1.显示 NTIRE 2022 HDR 挑战赛的可视化结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级神经网络EAPNet，用于高效渐进式高动态范围（HDR）图像修复，针对NTIRE 2022 HDR挑战赛的两个赛道进行优化。
AI.motivation: 现有HDR图像修复方法存在计算复杂度高、效率低或对齐效果差的问题，需设计轻量化且高效的网络结构以提升性能。
AI.method: 设计多维轻量编码模块提取特征，引入渐进式空洞U形块（PDUB）动态调整MAccs和PSNR，并采用快速低功耗特征对齐模块替代DCN解决对齐问题。
AI.result: 在NTIRE 2022 HDR挑战赛中，方法在MAccs上实现约20倍压缩，mu-PSNR和PSNR优于现有方法，获得两个赛道第二名。
AI.conclusion: EAPNet通过模块化设计有效平衡了HDR修复的效率与质量，为轻量化HDR处理提供了可行方案。

title: Does Interference Exist When Training a Once-For-All Network?
title_zh: 训练一次性网络时是否存在干扰？
comment: Accepted to CVPR Embedded Vision Workshop 2022
comments: Accepted to CVPR Embedded Vision Workshop 2022
abstract: The Once-For-All (OFA) method offers an excellent pathway to deploy a trained neural network model into multiple target platforms by utilising the supernet-subnet architecture. Once trained, a subnet can be derived from the supernet (both architecture and trained weights) and deployed directly to the target platform with little to no retraining or fine-tuning. To train the subnet population, OFA uses a novel training method called Progressive Shrinking (PS) which is designed to limit the negative impact of interference during training. It is believed that higher interference during training results in lower subnet population accuracies. In this work we take a second look at this interference effect. Surprisingly, we find that interference mitigation strategies do not have a large impact on the overall subnet population performance. Instead, we find the subnet architecture selection bias during training to be a more important aspect. To show this, we propose a simple-yet-effective method called Random Subnet Sampling (RSS), which does not have mitigation on the interference effect. Despite no mitigation, RSS is able to produce a better performing subnet population than PS in four small-to-medium-sized datasets; suggesting that the interference effect does not play a pivotal role in these datasets. Due to its simplicity, RSS provides a $1.9\times$ reduction in training times compared to PS. A $6.1\times$ reduction can also be achieved with a reasonable drop in performance when the number of RSS training epochs are reduced. Code available at https://github.com/Jordan-HS/RSS-Interference-CVPRW2022.
summary: The Once-For-All (OFA) method offers an excellent pathway to deploy a trained neural network model into multiple target platforms by utilising the supernet-subnet architecture. Once trained, a subnet can be derived from the supernet (both architecture and trained weights) and deployed directly to the target platform with little to no retraining or fine-tuning. To train the subnet population, OFA uses a novel training method called Progressive Shrinking (PS) which is designed to limit the negative impact of interference during training. It is believed that higher interference during training results in lower subnet population accuracies. In this work we take a second look at this interference effect. Surprisingly, we find that interference mitigation strategies do not have a large impact on the overall subnet population performance. Instead, we find the subnet architecture selection bias during training to be a more important aspect. To show this, we propose a simple-yet-effective method called Random Subnet Sampling (RSS), which does not have mitigation on the interference effect. Despite no mitigation, RSS is able to produce a better performing subnet population than PS in four small-to-medium-sized datasets; suggesting that the interference effect does not play a pivotal role in these datasets. Due to its simplicity, RSS provides a $1.9\times$ reduction in training times compared to PS. A $6.1\times$ reduction can also be achieved with a reasonable drop in performance when the number of RSS training epochs are reduced. Code available at https://github.com/Jordan-HS/RSS-Interference-CVPRW2022.
abstract_zh: Once-For-All (OFA) 方法提供了一种利用超网-子网架构将经过训练的神经网络模型部署到多个目标平台的绝佳途径。经过训练后，子网可以从超网（架构和训练权重）派生出来，并直接部署到目标平台，几乎不需要重新训练或微调。为了训练子网群体，OFA 使用了一种称为渐进收缩 (PS) 的新颖训练方法，该方法旨在限制训练期间干扰的负面影响。据信，训练期间较高的干扰会导致子网总体精度较低。在这项工作中，我们再次审视这种干扰效应。令人惊讶的是，我们发现干扰缓解策略对整体子网群体性能没有很大影响。相反，我们发现训练期间的子网架构选择偏差是一个更重要的方面。为了证明这一点，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，称为随机子网采样（RSS），该方法不能减轻干扰效应。尽管没有采取任何缓解措施，RSS 仍能够在四个中小型数据集中生成比 PS 性能更好的子网群体；这表明干扰效应在这些数据集中并没有发挥关键作用。由于其简单性，与 PS 相比，RSS 的训练时间减少了 1.9 倍。当 RSS 训练周期数减少时，性能也可以合理下降，从而实现 $6.1\times$ 的减少。代码可在 https://github.com/Jordan-HS/RSS-Interference-CVPRW2022 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在训练Once-For-All网络时是否存在干扰效应，并提出了一种新的随机子网采样方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有方法通过渐进式收缩（PS）减少训练中的干扰，但作者质疑干扰是否是影响子网性能的主要因素，并试图寻找更高效的训练策略。
AI.method: 提出随机子网采样（RSS）方法，无需干扰缓解机制，通过随机选择子网架构进行训练。
AI.result: RSS在四个中小数据集上优于PS，训练时间减少1.9倍；减少训练轮数时性能仅小幅下降，时间减少达6.1倍。
AI.conclusion: 干扰效应并非决定性因素，子网架构选择偏差更为关键，RSS因简单高效成为更优方案。

title: Interventional Multi-Instance Learning with Deconfounded Instance-Level Prediction
title_zh: 具有去混杂实例级预测的介入性多实例学习
abstract: When applying multi-instance learning (MIL) to make predictions for bags of instances, the prediction accuracy of an instance often depends on not only the instance itself but also its context in the corresponding bag. From the viewpoint of causal inference, such bag contextual prior works as a confounder and may result in model robustness and interpretability issues. Focusing on this problem, we propose a novel interventional multi-instance learning (IMIL) framework to achieve deconfounded instance-level prediction. Unlike traditional likelihood-based strategies, we design an Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm based on causal intervention, providing a robust instance selection in the training phase and suppressing the bias caused by the bag contextual prior. Experiments on pathological image analysis demonstrate that our IMIL method substantially reduces false positives and outperforms state-of-the-art MIL methods.
summary: When applying multi-instance learning (MIL) to make predictions for bags of instances, the prediction accuracy of an instance often depends on not only the instance itself but also its context in the corresponding bag. From the viewpoint of causal inference, such bag contextual prior works as a confounder and may result in model robustness and interpretability issues. Focusing on this problem, we propose a novel interventional multi-instance learning (IMIL) framework to achieve deconfounded instance-level prediction. Unlike traditional likelihood-based strategies, we design an Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm based on causal intervention, providing a robust instance selection in the training phase and suppressing the bias caused by the bag contextual prior. Experiments on pathological image analysis demonstrate that our IMIL method substantially reduces false positives and outperforms state-of-the-art MIL methods.
abstract_zh: 当应用多实例学习（MIL）对实例包进行预测时，实例的预测精度通常不仅取决于实例本身，还取决于其在相应包中的上下文。从因果推理的角度来看，这种包上下文先验会产生混杂因素，并可能导致模型的鲁棒性和可解释性问题。针对这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的介入性多实例学习（IMIL）框架来实现去混杂的实例级预测。与传统的基于似然的策略不同，我们设计了一种基于因果干预的期望最大化（EM）算法，在训练阶段提供鲁棒的实例选择，并抑制由包上下文先验引起的偏差。病理图像分析实验表明，我们的 IMIL 方法大大减少了误报，并且优于最先进的 MIL 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种去混淆的实例级预测框架，用于改进多实例学习（MIL）中的预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 在多实例学习中，实例预测易受其所在袋子上下文的影响，导致模型鲁棒性和可解释性问题。
AI.method: 设计基于因果干预的期望最大化（EM）算法，通过干预训练阶段的实例选择以抑制袋子上下文带来的偏差。
AI.result: 在病理图像分析实验中，该方法显著减少假阳性，优于现有最先进的MIL方法。

search_text: Interventional Multi-Instance Learning with Deconfounded Instance-Level Prediction 具有去混杂实例级预测的介入性多实例学习 When applying multi-instance learning (MIL) to make predictions for bags of instances, the prediction accuracy of an instance often depends on not only the instance itself but also its context in the corresponding bag. From the viewpoint of causal inference, such bag contextual prior works as a confounder and may result in model robustness and interpretability issues. Focusing on this problem, we propose a novel interventional multi-instance learning (IMIL) framework to achieve deconfounded instance-level prediction. Unlike traditional likelihood-based strategies, we design an Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm based on causal intervention, providing a robust instance selection in the training phase and suppressing the bias caused by the bag contextual prior. Experiments on pathological image analysis demonstrate that our IMIL method substantially reduces false positives and outperforms state-of-the-art MIL methods. 当应用多实例学习（MIL）对实例包进行预测时，实例的预测精度通常不仅取决于实例本身，还取决于其在相应包中的上下文。从因果推理的角度来看，这种包上下文先验会产生混杂因素，并可能导致模型的鲁棒性和可解释性问题。针对这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的介入性多实例学习（IMIL）框架来实现去混杂的实例级预测。与传统的基于似然的策略不同，我们设计了一种基于因果干预的期望最大化（EM）算法，在训练阶段提供鲁棒的实例选择，并抑制由包上下文先验引起的偏差。病理图像分析实验表明，我们的 IMIL 方法大大减少了误报，并且优于最先进的 MIL 方法。 本文提出了一种去混淆的实例级预测框架，用于改进多实例学习（MIL）中的预测准确性。 Tiancheng Lin,Hongteng Xu,Canqian Yang,Yi Xu cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Longguang Wang,Yulan Guo,Yingqian Wang,Juncheng Li,Shuhang Gu,Radu Timofte
title: NTIRE 2022 Challenge on Stereo Image Super-Resolution: Methods and Results
title_zh: NTIRE 2022 立体图像超分辨率挑战：方法和结果
abstract: In this paper, we summarize the 1st NTIRE challenge on stereo image super-resolution (restoration of rich details in a pair of low-resolution stereo images) with a focus on new solutions and results. This challenge has 1 track aiming at the stereo image super-resolution problem under a standard bicubic degradation. In total, 238 participants were successfully registered, and 21 teams competed in the final testing phase. Among those participants, 20 teams successfully submitted results with PSNR (RGB) scores better than the baseline. This challenge establishes a new benchmark for stereo image SR.
summary: In this paper, we summarize the 1st NTIRE challenge on stereo image super-resolution (restoration of rich details in a pair of low-resolution stereo images) with a focus on new solutions and results. This challenge has 1 track aiming at the stereo image super-resolution problem under a standard bicubic degradation. In total, 238 participants were successfully registered, and 21 teams competed in the final testing phase. Among those participants, 20 teams successfully submitted results with PSNR (RGB) scores better than the baseline. This challenge establishes a new benchmark for stereo image SR.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们总结了第一届 NTIRE 立体图像超分辨率挑战（恢复一对低分辨率立体图像中的丰富细节），重点介绍新的解决方案和结果。该挑战赛有 1 个赛道，针对标准双三次退化下的立体图像超分辨率问题。共有238名参赛者成功报名，21支队伍进入最终测试阶段。在这些参与者中，20 个团队成功提交了 PSNR (RGB) 分数优于基线的结果。这一挑战为立体图像超分辨率树立了新的基准。

AI.tldr: 总结首次立体图像超分辨率挑战赛的新方法与结果
AI.motivation: 推动立体图像超分辨率领域发展，促进新方法提出并建立新基准
AI.method: 汇总各参赛团队提出的多种超分辨率技术方案
AI.result: 20支队伍提交结果优于基线，确立新基准
AI.conclusion: 挑战赛推动了技术进步，验证了有效方法，为未来研究提供方向

authors_text: Zhaoxin Fan,Yulin He,Zhicheng Wang,Kejian Wu,Hongyan Liu,Jun He
title: Reconstruction-Aware Prior Distillation for Semi-supervised Point Cloud Completion
title_zh: 用于半监督点云完成的重建感知事先蒸馏
abstract: Real-world sensors often produce incomplete, irregular, and noisy point clouds, making point cloud completion increasingly important. However, most existing completion methods rely on large paired datasets for training, which is labor-intensive. This paper proposes RaPD, a novel semi-supervised point cloud completion method that reduces the need for paired datasets. RaPD utilizes a two-stage training scheme, where a deep semantic prior is learned in stage 1 from unpaired complete and incomplete point clouds, and a semi-supervised prior distillation process is introduced in stage 2 to train a completion network using only a small number of paired samples. Additionally, a self-supervised completion module is introduced to improve performance using unpaired incomplete point clouds. Experiments on multiple datasets show that RaPD outperforms previous methods in both homologous and heterologous scenarios.
summary: Real-world sensors often produce incomplete, irregular, and noisy point clouds, making point cloud completion increasingly important. However, most existing completion methods rely on large paired datasets for training, which is labor-intensive. This paper proposes RaPD, a novel semi-supervised point cloud completion method that reduces the need for paired datasets. RaPD utilizes a two-stage training scheme, where a deep semantic prior is learned in stage 1 from unpaired complete and incomplete point clouds, and a semi-supervised prior distillation process is introduced in stage 2 to train a completion network using only a small number of paired samples. Additionally, a self-supervised completion module is introduced to improve performance using unpaired incomplete point clouds. Experiments on multiple datasets show that RaPD outperforms previous methods in both homologous and heterologous scenarios.
abstract_zh: 现实世界的传感器通常会产生不完整、不规则且有噪声的点云，这使得点云补全变得越来越重要。然而，大多数现有的完成方法依赖于大型配对数据集进行训练，这是劳动密集型的。本文提出了 RaPD，一种新颖的半监督点云补全方法，可减少对配对数据集的需求。 RaPD 采用两阶段训练方案，其中在第 1 阶段从未配对的完整和不完整点云中学习深度语义先验，并在第 2 阶段引入半监督先验蒸馏过程，仅使用少量配对样本来训练完成网络。此外，还引入了自监督完成模块，以使用不成对的不完整点云来提高性能。在多个数据集上的实验表明，RaPD 在同源和异源场景中都优于以前的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种半监督点云补全方法，减少对配对数据集的依赖
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖大量配对数据集，耗时耗力，需减少对配对数据的依赖
AI.method: 采用两阶段训练：阶段1从未配对数据学习语义先验，阶段2用少量配对样本进行半监督蒸馏，并引入自监督模块提升性能
AI.result: 在多个数据集上优于现有方法，适用于同源和异源场景
AI.conclusion: RaPD有效减少对配对数据依赖，提升点云补全效果

title: Robustness Testing of Data and Knowledge Driven Anomaly Detection in Cyber-Physical Systems
title_zh: 网络物理系统中数据和知识驱动的异常检测的鲁棒性测试
comment: 8 pages, 10 figures, to appear in the 5th IEEE/IFIP DSN Workshop on Dependable and Secure Machine Learning (DSN-DSML)
comments: 8 pages, 10 figures, to appear in the 5th IEEE/IFIP DSN Workshop on Dependable and Secure Machine Learning (DSN-DSML)
abstract: The growing complexity of Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) and challenges in ensuring safety and security have led to the increasing use of deep learning methods for accurate and scalable anomaly detection. However, machine learning (ML) models often suffer from low performance in predicting unexpected data and are vulnerable to accidental or malicious perturbations. Although robustness testing of deep learning models has been extensively explored in applications such as image classification and speech recognition, less attention has been paid to ML-driven safety monitoring in CPS. This paper presents the preliminary results on evaluating the robustness of ML-based anomaly detection methods in safety-critical CPS against two types of accidental and malicious input perturbations, generated using a Gaussian-based noise model and the Fast Gradient Sign Method (FGSM). We test the hypothesis of whether integrating the domain knowledge (e.g., on unsafe system behavior) with the ML models can improve the robustness of anomaly detection without sacrificing accuracy and transparency. Experimental results with two case studies of Artificial Pancreas Systems (APS) for diabetes management show that ML-based safety monitors trained with domain knowledge can reduce on average up to 54.2% of robustness error and keep the average F1 scores high while improving transparency.
summary: The growing complexity of Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) and challenges in ensuring safety and security have led to the increasing use of deep learning methods for accurate and scalable anomaly detection. However, machine learning (ML) models often suffer from low performance in predicting unexpected data and are vulnerable to accidental or malicious perturbations. Although robustness testing of deep learning models has been extensively explored in applications such as image classification and speech recognition, less attention has been paid to ML-driven safety monitoring in CPS. This paper presents the preliminary results on evaluating the robustness of ML-based anomaly detection methods in safety-critical CPS against two types of accidental and malicious input perturbations, generated using a Gaussian-based noise model and the Fast Gradient Sign Method (FGSM). We test the hypothesis of whether integrating the domain knowledge (e.g., on unsafe system behavior) with the ML models can improve the robustness of anomaly detection without sacrificing accuracy and transparency. Experimental results with two case studies of Artificial Pancreas Systems (APS) for diabetes management show that ML-based safety monitors trained with domain knowledge can reduce on average up to 54.2% of robustness error and keep the average F1 scores high while improving transparency.
abstract_zh: 网络物理系统 (CPS) 日益复杂，以及确保安全和保障方面的挑战导致越来越多地使用深度学习方法来进行准确且可扩展的异常检测。然而，机器学习 (ML) 模型在预测意外数据方面通常表现不佳，并且容易受到意外或恶意扰动。尽管深度学习模型的鲁棒性测试已在图像分类和语音识别等应用中得到广泛探索，但对 CPS 中 ML 驱动的安全监控的关注较少。本文介绍了评估安全关键型 CPS 中基于机器学习的异常检测方法针对两种类型的意外和恶意输入扰动的鲁棒性的初步结果，这些扰动是使用基于高斯的噪声模型和快速梯度符号法 (FGSM) 生成的。我们测试了以下假设：将领域知识（例如，不安全的系统行为）与机器学习模型相集成是否可以在不牺牲准确性和透明度的情况下提高异常检测的鲁棒性。用于糖尿病管理的人工胰腺系统 (APS) 的两个案例研究的实验结果表明，经过领域知识训练的基于 ML 的安全监测器可以平均减少高达 54.2% 的鲁棒性误差，并保持平均 F1 分数较高，同时提高透明度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在关键安全的网络物理系统（CPS）中，结合领域知识的机器学习（ML）异常检测方法对数据扰动的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 随着CPS复杂性的增加，传统ML模型在面对意外或恶意数据扰动时表现脆弱，而现有鲁棒性测试研究多集中于图像分类等领域，缺乏对CPS安全监控的针对性分析。
AI.method: 通过高斯噪声模型和FGSM方法生成两类扰动，测试集成领域知识（如系统不安全行为）的ML模型在人工胰腺系统（APS）案例中的鲁棒性表现。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合领域知识的ML模型可平均减少54.2%的鲁棒性误差，同时保持高F1分数并提升透明度。
AI.conclusion: 领域知识的整合能有效增强CPS中ML异常检测的鲁棒性，且不牺牲检测精度与模型可解释性。

ai_content_json.method: 通过高斯噪声模型和FGSM方法生成两类扰动，测试集成领域知识（如系统不安全行为）的ML模型在人工胰腺系统（APS）案例中的鲁棒性表现。
ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，结合领域知识的ML模型可平均减少54.2%的鲁棒性误差，同时保持高F1分数并提升透明度。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 领域知识的整合能有效增强CPS中ML异常检测的鲁棒性，且不牺牲检测精度与模型可解释性。

search_text: Robustness Testing of Data and Knowledge Driven Anomaly Detection in Cyber-Physical Systems 网络物理系统中数据和知识驱动的异常检测的鲁棒性测试 The growing complexity of Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) and challenges in ensuring safety and security have led to the increasing use of deep learning methods for accurate and scalable anomaly detection. However, machine learning (ML) models often suffer from low performance in predicting unexpected data and are vulnerable to accidental or malicious perturbations. Although robustness testing of deep learning models has been extensively explored in applications such as image classification and speech recognition, less attention has been paid to ML-driven safety monitoring in CPS. This paper presents the preliminary results on evaluating the robustness of ML-based anomaly detection methods in safety-critical CPS against two types of accidental and malicious input perturbations, generated using a Gaussian-based noise model and the Fast Gradient Sign Method (FGSM). We test the hypothesis of whether integrating the domain knowledge (e.g., on unsafe system behavior) with the ML models can improve the robustness of anomaly detection without sacrificing accuracy and transparency. Experimental results with two case studies of Artificial Pancreas Systems (APS) for diabetes management show that ML-based safety monitors trained with domain knowledge can reduce on average up to 54.2% of robustness error and keep the average F1 scores high while improving transparency. 网络物理系统 (CPS) 日益复杂，以及确保安全和保障方面的挑战导致越来越多地使用深度学习方法来进行准确且可扩展的异常检测。然而，机器学习 (ML) 模型在预测意外数据方面通常表现不佳，并且容易受到意外或恶意扰动。尽管深度学习模型的鲁棒性测试已在图像分类和语音识别等应用中得到广泛探索，但对 CPS 中 ML 驱动的安全监控的关注较少。本文介绍了评估安全关键型 CPS 中基于机器学习的异常检测方法针对两种类型的意外和恶意输入扰动的鲁棒性的初步结果，这些扰动是使用基于高斯的噪声模型和快速梯度符号法 (FGSM) 生成的。我们测试了以下假设：将领域知识（例如，不安全的系统行为）与机器学习模型相集成是否可以在不牺牲准确性和透明度的情况下提高异常检测的鲁棒性。用于糖尿病管理的人工胰腺系统 (APS) 的两个案例研究的实验结果表明，经过领域知识训练的基于 ML 的安全监测器可以平均减少高达 54.2% 的鲁棒性误差，并保持平均 F1 分数较高，同时提高透明度。 本文研究了在关键安全的网络物理系统（CPS）中，结合领域知识的机器学习（ML）异常检测方法对数据扰动的鲁棒性。 Xugui Zhou,Maxfield Kouzel,Homa Alemzadeh cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Counting and enumerating optimum cut sets for hypergraph $k$-partitioning problems for fixed $k$
title_zh: 计算和枚举超图 $k$ 的最佳割集 - 固定 $k$ 的划分问题
comment: Accepted to ICALP'22. Claims 2.2, 2.3, 2.4, and 2.5 in this work are similar to the claims in the proof of a structural theorem in arXiv: 2110.14815. Since the hypothesis of the theorem in this work is different from that of the theorem in arXiv: 2110.14815, complete proofs of these claims are presented. The usage of these claims in this work is also different from the usage in arXiv: 2110.14815. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.14815
comments: Accepted to ICALP'22. Claims 2.2, 2.3, 2.4, and 2.5 in this work are similar to the claims in the proof of a structural theorem in arXiv: 2110.14815. Since the hypothesis of the theorem in this work is different from that of the theorem in arXiv: 2110.14815, complete proofs of these claims are presented. The usage of these claims in this work is also different from the usage in arXiv: 2110.14815. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.14815
abstract: We consider the problem of enumerating optimal solutions for two hypergraph $k$-partitioning problems -- namely, Hypergraph-$k$-Cut and Minmax-Hypergraph-$k$-Partition. The input in hypergraph $k$-partitioning problems is a hypergraph $G=(V, E)$ with positive hyperedge costs along with a fixed positive integer $k$. The goal is to find a partition of $V$ into $k$ non-empty parts $(V_1, V_2, \ldots, V_k)$ -- known as a $k$-partition -- so as to minimize an objective of interest. 1. If the objective of interest is the maximum cut value of the parts, then the problem is known as Minmax-Hypergraph-$k$-Partition. A subset of hyperedges is a minmax-$k$-cut-set if it is the subset of hyperedges crossing an optimum $k$-partition for Minmax-Hypergraph-$k$-Partition. 2. If the objective of interest is the total cost of hyperedges crossing the $k$-partition, then the problem is known as Hypergraph-$k$-Cut. A subset of hyperedges is a min-$k$-cut-set if it is the subset of hyperedges crossing an optimum $k$-partition for Hypergraph-$k$-Cut. We give the first polynomial bound on the number of minmax-$k$-cut-sets and a polynomial-time algorithm to enumerate all of them in hypergraphs for every fixed $k$. Our technique is strong enough to also enable an $n^{O(k)}p$-time deterministic algorithm to enumerate all min-$k$-cut-sets in hypergraphs, thus improving on the previously known $n^{O(k^2)}p$-time deterministic algorithm, where $n$ is the number of vertices and $p$ is the size of the hypergraph. The correctness analysis of our enumeration approach relies on a structural result that is a strong and unifying generalization of known structural results for Hypergraph-$k$-Cut and Minmax-Hypergraph-$k$-Partition. We believe that our structural result is likely to be of independent interest in the theory of hypergraphs (and graphs).
summary: We consider the problem of enumerating optimal solutions for two hypergraph $k$-partitioning problems -- namely, Hypergraph-$k$-Cut and Minmax-Hypergraph-$k$-Partition. The input in hypergraph $k$-partitioning problems is a hypergraph $G=(V, E)$ with positive hyperedge costs along with a fixed positive integer $k$. The goal is to find a partition of $V$ into $k$ non-empty parts $(V_1, V_2, \ldots, V_k)$ -- known as a $k$-partition -- so as to minimize an objective of interest. 1. If the objective of interest is the maximum cut value of the parts, then the problem is known as Minmax-Hypergraph-$k$-Partition. A subset of hyperedges is a minmax-$k$-cut-set if it is the subset of hyperedges crossing an optimum $k$-partition for Minmax-Hypergraph-$k$-Partition. 2. If the objective of interest is the total cost of hyperedges crossing the $k$-partition, then the problem is known as Hypergraph-$k$-Cut. A subset of hyperedges is a min-$k$-cut-set if it is the subset of hyperedges crossing an optimum $k$-partition for Hypergraph-$k$-Cut. We give the first polynomial bound on the number of minmax-$k$-cut-sets and a polynomial-time algorithm to enumerate all of them in hypergraphs for every fixed $k$. Our technique is strong enough to also enable an $n^{O(k)}p$-time deterministic algorithm to enumerate all min-$k$-cut-sets in hypergraphs, thus improving on the previously known $n^{O(k^2)}p$-time deterministic algorithm, where $n$ is the number of vertices and $p$ is the size of the hypergraph. The correctness analysis of our enumeration approach relies on a structural result that is a strong and unifying generalization of known structural results for Hypergraph-$k$-Cut and Minmax-Hypergraph-$k$-Partition. We believe that our structural result is likely to be of independent interest in the theory of hypergraphs (and graphs).
abstract_zh: 我们考虑枚举两个超图 $k$ 分区问题的最佳解决方案的问题，即 Hypergraph-$k$-Cut 和 Minmax-Hypergraph-$k$-Partition。超图 $k$ 划分问题中的输入是超图 $G=(V, E)$，具有正超边成本以及固定正整数 $k$。目标是找到将 $V$ 划分为 $k$ 个非空部分 $(V_1, V_2, \ldots, V_k)$（称为 $k$ 分区），以便最小化感兴趣的目标。 1. 如果感兴趣的目标是部分的最大切割值，则该问题称为 Minmax-Hypergraph-$k$-Partition。如果超边的子集是跨越 Minmax-Hypergraph-$k$-分区的最佳 $k$-分区的超边子集，则它是 minmax-$k$-割集。 2. 如果感兴趣的目标是穿过 $k$ 分区的超边的总成本，则该问题称为 Hypergraph-$k$-Cut。如果超边的子集是跨越 Hypergraph-$k$-Cut 的最佳 $k$-分区的超边子集，则它是 min-$k$-cut-set。我们给出了 minmax-$k$ 割集数量的第一个多项式界限，以及多项式时间算法，以针对每个固定的 $k$ 在超图中枚举所有这些。我们的技术足够强大，还可以使 $n^{O(k)}p$ 时间确定性算法枚举超图中所有 min-$k$ 割集，从而改进先前已知的 $n^{O(k^2)}p$ 时间确定性算法，其中 $n$ 是顶点数量，$p$ 是超图的大小。我们的枚举方法的正确性分析依赖于结构结果，该结构结果是 Hypergraph-$k$-Cut 和 Minmax-Hypergraph-$k$-Partition 的已知结构结果的强大且统一的概括。我们相信我们的结构结果可能对超图（和图）理论具有独立的意义。

AI.tldr: 本文研究超图k划分问题的最优割集计数与枚举方法，针对Hypergraph-k-Cut和Minmax-Hypergraph-k-Partition两种问题提出多项式时间算法。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在处理超图k划分问题时存在时间复杂度高、无法有效枚举所有最优解的局限性，需寻找更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过构建统一的结构化理论，结合多项式时间算法设计，改进了传统枚举方法并降低了时间复杂度。
AI.result: 首次给出minmax-k-割集的多项式数量界，并实现多项式时间枚举；同时将min-k-割集的枚举时间复杂度从n^{O(k²)}p改进为n^{O(k)}p。
AI.conclusion: 提出的结构化理论具有独立理论价值，为超图划分问题提供了通用框架，可能推动相关领域算法优化。

authors_text: Sangli Teng,William Clark,Anthony Bloch,Ram Vasudevan,Maani Ghaffari
title: Lie Algebraic Cost Function Design for Control on Lie Groups
title_zh: 李群控制的李代数成本函数设计
abstract: This paper presents a control framework on Lie groups by designing the control objective in its Lie algebra. Control on Lie groups is challenging due to its nonlinear nature and difficulties in system parameterization. Existing methods to design the control objective on a Lie group and then derive the gradient for controller design are non-trivial and can result in slow convergence in tracking control. We show that with a proper left-invariant metric, setting the gradient of the cost function as the tracking error in the Lie algebra leads to a quadratic Lyapunov function that enables globally exponential convergence. In the PD control case, we show that our controller can maintain an exponential convergence rate even when the initial error is approaching $π$ in SO(3). We also show the merit of this proposed framework in trajectory optimization. The proposed cost function enables the iterative Linear Quadratic Regulator (iLQR) to converge much faster than the Differential Dynamic Programming (DDP) with a well-adopted cost function when the initial trajectory is poorly initialized on SO(3).
summary: This paper presents a control framework on Lie groups by designing the control objective in its Lie algebra. Control on Lie groups is challenging due to its nonlinear nature and difficulties in system parameterization. Existing methods to design the control objective on a Lie group and then derive the gradient for controller design are non-trivial and can result in slow convergence in tracking control. We show that with a proper left-invariant metric, setting the gradient of the cost function as the tracking error in the Lie algebra leads to a quadratic Lyapunov function that enables globally exponential convergence. In the PD control case, we show that our controller can maintain an exponential convergence rate even when the initial error is approaching $π$ in SO(3). We also show the merit of this proposed framework in trajectory optimization. The proposed cost function enables the iterative Linear Quadratic Regulator (iLQR) to converge much faster than the Differential Dynamic Programming (DDP) with a well-adopted cost function when the initial trajectory is poorly initialized on SO(3).
abstract_zh: 本文通过设计李代数中的控制目标，提出了李群的控制框架。由于其非线性性质和系统参数化的困难，对李群的控制具有挑战性。现有的在李群上设计控制目标然后导出控制器设计梯度的方法并不简单，并且可能导致跟踪控制收敛缓慢。我们证明，通过适当的左不变度量，将成本函数的梯度设置为李代数中的跟踪误差会产生二次李亚普诺夫函数，该函数能够实现全局指数收敛。在 PD 控制案例中，我们表明，即使初始误差接近 SO(3) 中的 $π$，我们的控制器也可以保持指数收敛速度。我们还展示了该框架在轨迹优化方面的优点。当初始轨迹在 SO(3) 上初始化不佳时，所提出的成本函数使迭代线性二次调节器 (iLQR) 能够比具有广泛采用的成本函数的微分动态规划 (DDP) 收敛得更快。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于李代数的代价函数设计方法，用于在李群上的控制问题，以实现全局指数收敛和轨迹优化。
AI.motivation: 李群上的控制因非线性特性和参数化困难而具有挑战性，现有方法在收敛速度和跟踪控制上存在不足。
AI.method: 通过引入左不变度量，将代价函数的梯度定义为李代数中的跟踪误差，构建二次李雅普诺夫函数，并应用于PD控制与轨迹优化中的迭代线性二次调节器（iLQR）。
AI.result: 控制器在SO(3)中初始误差接近π时仍保持指数收敛，且iLQR在轨迹优化中比差分动态规划（DDP）收敛更快。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了李群上的控制与优化问题，显著提升了收敛速度与鲁棒性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于李代数的代价函数设计方法，用于在李群上的控制问题，以实现全局指数收敛和轨迹优化。
ai_content.motivation: 李群上的控制因非线性特性和参数化困难而具有挑战性，现有方法在收敛速度和跟踪控制上存在不足。
ai_content.method: 通过引入左不变度量，将代价函数的梯度定义为李代数中的跟踪误差，构建二次李雅普诺夫函数，并应用于PD控制与轨迹优化中的迭代线性二次调节器（iLQR）。
ai_content.result: 控制器在SO(3)中初始误差接近π时仍保持指数收敛，且iLQR在轨迹优化中比差分动态规划（DDP）收敛更快。
ai_content.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了李群上的控制与优化问题，显著提升了收敛速度与鲁棒性。

search_text: Lie Algebraic Cost Function Design for Control on Lie Groups 李群控制的李代数成本函数设计 This paper presents a control framework on Lie groups by designing the control objective in its Lie algebra. Control on Lie groups is challenging due to its nonlinear nature and difficulties in system parameterization. Existing methods to design the control objective on a Lie group and then derive the gradient for controller design are non-trivial and can result in slow convergence in tracking control. We show that with a proper left-invariant metric, setting the gradient of the cost function as the tracking error in the Lie algebra leads to a quadratic Lyapunov function that enables globally exponential convergence. In the PD control case, we show that our controller can maintain an exponential convergence rate even when the initial error is approaching $π$ in SO(3). We also show the merit of this proposed framework in trajectory optimization. The proposed cost function enables the iterative Linear Quadratic Regulator (iLQR) to converge much faster than the Differential Dynamic Programming (DDP) with a well-adopted cost function when the initial trajectory is poorly initialized on SO(3). 本文通过设计李代数中的控制目标，提出了李群的控制框架。由于其非线性性质和系统参数化的困难，对李群的控制具有挑战性。现有的在李群上设计控制目标然后导出控制器设计梯度的方法并不简单，并且可能导致跟踪控制收敛缓慢。我们证明，通过适当的左不变度量，将成本函数的梯度设置为李代数中的跟踪误差会产生二次李亚普诺夫函数，该函数能够实现全局指数收敛。在 PD 控制案例中，我们表明，即使初始误差接近 SO(3) 中的 $π$，我们的控制器也可以保持指数收敛速度。我们还展示了该框架在轨迹优化方面的优点。当初始轨迹在 SO(3) 上初始化不佳时，所提出的成本函数使迭代线性二次调节器 (iLQR) 能够比具有广泛采用的成本函数的微分动态规划 (DDP) 收敛得更快。 本文提出了一种基于李代数的代价函数设计方法，用于在李群上的控制问题，以实现全局指数收敛和轨迹优化。 Sangli Teng,William Clark,Anthony Bloch,Ram Vasudevan,Maani Ghaffari math.OC,cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Yunwen Zhou,Abhishek Kar,Eric Turner,Adarsh Kowdle,Chao X. Guo,Ryan C. DuToit,Konstantine Tsotsos
title: Learned Monocular Depth Priors in Visual-Inertial Initialization
title_zh: 视觉惯性初始化中学习的单眼深度先验
comment: to be published in 2022 European Conference on Computer Vision
comments: to be published in 2022 European Conference on Computer Vision
abstract: Visual-inertial odometry (VIO) is the pose estimation backbone for most AR/VR and autonomous robotic systems today, in both academia and industry. However, these systems are highly sensitive to the initialization of key parameters such as sensor biases, gravity direction, and metric scale. In practical scenarios where high-parallax or variable acceleration assumptions are rarely met (e.g. hovering aerial robot, smartphone AR user not gesticulating with phone), classical visual-inertial initialization formulations often become ill-conditioned and/or fail to meaningfully converge. In this paper we target visual-inertial initialization specifically for these low-excitation scenarios critical to in-the-wild usage. We propose to circumvent the limitations of classical visual-inertial structure-from-motion (SfM) initialization by incorporating a new learning-based measurement as a higher-level input. We leverage learned monocular depth images (mono-depth) to constrain the relative depth of features, and upgrade the mono-depths to metric scale by jointly optimizing for their scales and shifts. Our experiments show a significant improvement in problem conditioning compared to a classical formulation for visual-inertial initialization, and demonstrate significant accuracy and robustness improvements relative to the state-of-the-art on public benchmarks, particularly under low-excitation scenarios. We further extend this improvement to implementation within an existing odometry system to illustrate the impact of our improved initialization method on resulting tracking trajectories.
summary: Visual-inertial odometry (VIO) is the pose estimation backbone for most AR/VR and autonomous robotic systems today, in both academia and industry. However, these systems are highly sensitive to the initialization of key parameters such as sensor biases, gravity direction, and metric scale. In practical scenarios where high-parallax or variable acceleration assumptions are rarely met (e.g. hovering aerial robot, smartphone AR user not gesticulating with phone), classical visual-inertial initialization formulations often become ill-conditioned and/or fail to meaningfully converge. In this paper we target visual-inertial initialization specifically for these low-excitation scenarios critical to in-the-wild usage. We propose to circumvent the limitations of classical visual-inertial structure-from-motion (SfM) initialization by incorporating a new learning-based measurement as a higher-level input. We leverage learned monocular depth images (mono-depth) to constrain the relative depth of features, and upgrade the mono-depths to metric scale by jointly optimizing for their scales and shifts. Our experiments show a significant improvement in problem conditioning compared to a classical formulation for visual-inertial initialization, and demonstrate significant accuracy and robustness improvements relative to the state-of-the-art on public benchmarks, particularly under low-excitation scenarios. We further extend this improvement to implementation within an existing odometry system to illustrate the impact of our improved initialization method on resulting tracking trajectories.
abstract_zh: 视觉惯性里程计 (VIO) 是当今学术界和工业界大多数 AR/VR 和自主机器人系统的姿态估计支柱。然而，这些系统对传感器偏差、重力方向和公制尺度等关键参数的初始化高度敏感。在很少满足高视差或可变加速度假设的实际场景中（例如悬停的空中机器人、智能手机 AR 用户不使用手机做手势），经典的视觉惯性初始化公式通常会变得病态和/或无法有意义地收敛。在本文中，我们专门针对这些对野外使用至关重要的低激励场景进行视觉惯性初始化。我们建议通过将新的基于学习的测量作为更高级别的输入来规避经典视觉惯性运动结构（SfM）初始化的局限性。我们利用学习到的单目深度图像（单深度）来约束特征的相对深度，并通过联合优化其尺度和位移将单深度升级到公制尺度。我们的实验表明，与视觉惯性初始化的经典公式相比，问题调节有了显着改进，并且相对于公共基准的最新技术，特别是在低激励场景下，证明了准确性和鲁棒性的显着改进。我们进一步将这种改进扩展到现有里程计系统中的实现，以说明改进的初始化方法对生成的跟踪轨迹的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用学习到的单目深度先验信息，改进视觉惯性里程计（VIO）在低激发场景下的初始化方法。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉惯性初始化方法在低激发场景（如无人机悬停、手机AR用户未手势操作）下易失效，导致参数估计不稳定。
AI.method: 通过引入学习得到的单目深度图像作为高层输入，约束特征相对深度，并联合优化深度尺度与偏移量以提升初始化效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，相比经典方法，新方法在问题条件性和鲁棒性上显著提升，并在公开基准测试中优于现有技术，尤其在低激发场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了低激发场景下的VIO初始化难题，提升了实际应用中的跟踪精度与稳定性。

authors_text: Aoi Otani,Ryota Hashiguchi,Kazuki Omi,Norishige Fukushima,Toru Tamaki
title: Performance Evaluation of Action Recognition Models on Low Quality Videos
title_zh: 低质量视频上动作识别模型的性能评估
abstract: In the design of action recognition models, the quality of videos is an important issue; however, the trade-off between the quality and performance is often ignored. In general, action recognition models are trained on high-quality videos, hence it is not known how the model performance degrades when tested on low-quality videos, and how much the quality of training videos affects the performance. The issue of video quality is important, however, it has not been studied so far. The goal of this study is to show the trade-off between the performance and the quality of training and test videos by quantitative performance evaluation of several action recognition models for transcoded videos in different qualities. First, we show how the video quality affects the performance of pre-trained models. We transcode the original validation videos of Kinetics400 by changing quality control parameters of JPEG (compression strength) and H.264/AVC (CRF). Then we use the transcoded videos to validate the pre-trained models. Second, we show how the models perform when trained on transcoded videos. We transcode the original training videos of Kinetics400 by changing the quality parameters of JPEG and H.264/AVC. Then we train the models on the transcoded training videos and validate them with the original and transcoded validation videos. Experimental results with JPEG transcoding show that there is no severe performance degradation (up to -1.5%) for compression strength smaller than 70 where no quality degradation is visually observed, and for larger than 80 the performance degrades linearly with respect to the quality index. Experiments with H.264/AVC transcoding show that there is no significant performance loss (up to -1%) with CRF30 while the total size of video files is reduced to 30%.
summary: In the design of action recognition models, the quality of videos is an important issue; however, the trade-off between the quality and performance is often ignored. In general, action recognition models are trained on high-quality videos, hence it is not known how the model performance degrades when tested on low-quality videos, and how much the quality of training videos affects the performance. The issue of video quality is important, however, it has not been studied so far. The goal of this study is to show the trade-off between the performance and the quality of training and test videos by quantitative performance evaluation of several action recognition models for transcoded videos in different qualities. First, we show how the video quality affects the performance of pre-trained models. We transcode the original validation videos of Kinetics400 by changing quality control parameters of JPEG (compression strength) and H.264/AVC (CRF). Then we use the transcoded videos to validate the pre-trained models. Second, we show how the models perform when trained on transcoded videos. We transcode the original training videos of Kinetics400 by changing the quality parameters of JPEG and H.264/AVC. Then we train the models on the transcoded training videos and validate them with the original and transcoded validation videos. Experimental results with JPEG transcoding show that there is no severe performance degradation (up to -1.5%) for compression strength smaller than 70 where no quality degradation is visually observed, and for larger than 80 the performance degrades linearly with respect to the quality index. Experiments with H.264/AVC transcoding show that there is no significant performance loss (up to -1%) with CRF30 while the total size of video files is reduced to 30%.
abstract_zh: 在动作识别模型的设计中，视频的质量是一个重要的问题；然而，质量和性能之间的权衡常常被忽视。一般来说，动作识别模型是在高质量视频上训练的，因此不知道在低质量视频上测试时模型性能如何下降，以及训练视频的质量对性能有多大影响。视频质量问题很重要，但迄今为止尚未得到研究。本研究的目的是通过对不同质量的转码视频的几种动作识别模型的定量性能评估来展示训练和测试视频的性能与质量之间的权衡。首先，我们展示视频质量如何影响预训练模型的性能。我们通过改变JPEG（压缩强度）和H.264/AVC（CRF）的质量控制参数对Kinetics400的原始验证视频进行转码。然后我们使用转码后的视频来验证预训练的模型。其次，我们展示了模型在转码视频上训练时的表现。我们通过改变JPEG和H.264/AVC的质量参数对Kinetics400的原始训练视频进行转码。然后，我们在转码后的训练视频上训练模型，并使用原始和转码后的验证视频对其进行验证。 JPEG 转码的实验结果表明，压缩强度小于 70 时，没有严重的性能下降（高达 -1.5%），在视觉上观察不到质量下降；而对于大于 80 的情况，性能相对于质量指数呈线性下降。 H.264/AVC 转码实验表明，CRF30 没有显着的性能损失（高达 -1%），同时视频文件的总大小减小至 30%。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了不同视频质量对动作识别模型性能的影响，通过量化分析训练和测试视频质量与模型性能之间的权衡关系。
AI.motivation: 现有动作识别模型通常在高质量视频上训练，但视频质量对模型性能的影响尚未被系统研究，尤其在低质量视频场景下的表现缺乏明确结论。
AI.method: 通过改变JPEG压缩强度和H.264/AVC的CRF参数，将Kinetics400数据集的训练和验证视频转码为不同质量版本，分别测试预训练模型在低质量视频上的表现，并训练新模型以分析质量对性能的影响。
AI.result: JPEG压缩强度低于70时性能下降不明显（最大-1.5%），高于80时性能随质量指数线性下降；H.264/AVC使用CRF30时性能损失不超过1%，且视频体积减少至30%。
AI.conclusion: 适度降低视频质量对模型性能影响有限，但过低质量会导致显著性能下降，建议在实际应用中平衡视频质量和存储成本。

search_text: Performance Evaluation of Action Recognition Models on Low Quality Videos 低质量视频上动作识别模型的性能评估 In the design of action recognition models, the quality of videos is an important issue; however, the trade-off between the quality and performance is often ignored. In general, action recognition models are trained on high-quality videos, hence it is not known how the model performance degrades when tested on low-quality videos, and how much the quality of training videos affects the performance. The issue of video quality is important, however, it has not been studied so far. The goal of this study is to show the trade-off between the performance and the quality of training and test videos by quantitative performance evaluation of several action recognition models for transcoded videos in different qualities. First, we show how the video quality affects the performance of pre-trained models. We transcode the original validation videos of Kinetics400 by changing quality control parameters of JPEG (compression strength) and H.264/AVC (CRF). Then we use the transcoded videos to validate the pre-trained models. Second, we show how the models perform when trained on transcoded videos. We transcode the original training videos of Kinetics400 by changing the quality parameters of JPEG and H.264/AVC. Then we train the models on the transcoded training videos and validate them with the original and transcoded validation videos. Experimental results with JPEG transcoding show that there is no severe performance degradation (up to -1.5%) for compression strength smaller than 70 where no quality degradation is visually observed, and for larger than 80 the performance degrades linearly with respect to the quality index. Experiments with H.264/AVC transcoding show that there is no significant performance loss (up to -1%) with CRF30 while the total size of video files is reduced to 30%. 在动作识别模型的设计中，视频的质量是一个重要的问题；然而，质量和性能之间的权衡常常被忽视。一般来说，动作识别模型是在高质量视频上训练的，因此不知道在低质量视频上测试时模型性能如何下降，以及训练视频的质量对性能有多大影响。视频质量问题很重要，但迄今为止尚未得到研究。本研究的目的是通过对不同质量的转码视频的几种动作识别模型的定量性能评估来展示训练和测试视频的性能与质量之间的权衡。首先，我们展示视频质量如何影响预训练模型的性能。我们通过改变JPEG（压缩强度）和H.264/AVC（CRF）的质量控制参数对Kinetics400的原始验证视频进行转码。然后我们使用转码后的视频来验证预训练的模型。其次，我们展示了模型在转码视频上训练时的表现。我们通过改变JPEG和H.264/AVC的质量参数对Kinetics400的原始训练视频进行转码。然后，我们在转码后的训练视频上训练模型，并使用原始和转码后的验证视频对其进行验证。 JPEG 转码的实验结果表明，压缩强度小于 70 时，没有严重的性能下降（高达 -1.5%），在视觉上观察不到质量下降；而对于大于 80 的情况，性能相对于质量指数呈线性下降。 H.264/AVC 转码实验表明，CRF30 没有显着的性能损失（高达 -1%），同时视频文件的总大小减小至 30%。 该论文评估了不同视频质量对动作识别模型性能的影响，通过量化分析训练和测试视频质量与模型性能之间的权衡关系。 Aoi Otani,Ryota Hashiguchi,Kazuki Omi,Norishige Fukushima,Toru Tamaki cs.CV

title: Computational Adaptation of XR Interfaces Through Interaction Simulation
title_zh: 通过交互模拟对 XR 接口进行计算调整
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, 1 table. CHI 2022 Workshop on Computational Approaches for Understanding, Generating, and Adapting User Interfaces
comments: 5 pages, 1 figure, 1 table. CHI 2022 Workshop on Computational Approaches for Understanding, Generating, and Adapting User Interfaces
abstract: Adaptive and intelligent user interfaces have been proposed as a critical component of a successful extended reality (XR) system. In particular, a predictive system can make inferences about a user and provide them with task-relevant recommendations or adaptations. However, we believe such adaptive interfaces should carefully consider the overall \emph{cost} of interactions to better address uncertainty of predictions. In this position paper, we discuss a computational approach to adapt XR interfaces, with the goal of improving user experience and performance. Our novel model, applied to menu selection tasks, simulates user interactions by considering both cognitive and motor costs. In contrast to greedy algorithms that adapt based on predictions alone, our model holistically accounts for costs and benefits of adaptations towards adapting the interface and providing optimal recommendations to the user.
summary: Adaptive and intelligent user interfaces have been proposed as a critical component of a successful extended reality (XR) system. In particular, a predictive system can make inferences about a user and provide them with task-relevant recommendations or adaptations. However, we believe such adaptive interfaces should carefully consider the overall \emph{cost} of interactions to better address uncertainty of predictions. In this position paper, we discuss a computational approach to adapt XR interfaces, with the goal of improving user experience and performance. Our novel model, applied to menu selection tasks, simulates user interactions by considering both cognitive and motor costs. In contrast to greedy algorithms that adapt based on predictions alone, our model holistically accounts for costs and benefits of adaptations towards adapting the interface and providing optimal recommendations to the user.
abstract_zh: 自适应和智能用户界面已被提议作为成功的扩展现实 (XR) 系统的关键组件。特别是，预测系统可以对用户进行推断，并向他们提供与任务相关的建议或调整。然而，我们认为这种自适应界面应该仔细考虑交互的整体 \emph{cost}，以更好地解决预测的不确定性。在这篇立场文件中，我们讨论了一种适应 XR 界面的计算方法，目标是改善用户体验和性能。我们的新颖模型应用于菜单选择任务，通过考虑认知和运动成本来模拟用户交互。与仅基于预测进行适应的贪婪算法相比，我们的模型整体考虑了适应的成本和收益，以适应界面并为用户提供最佳建议。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过交互模拟优化XR界面自适应的计算方法，综合考虑认知与运动成本以提升用户体验。
AI.motivation: 现有自适应界面过度依赖预测而忽视交互成本，导致预测不确定性问题，需更全面的适应策略。
AI.method: 构建考虑认知与运动成本的交互模拟模型，应用于菜单选择任务，权衡适应成本与收益优化推荐。
AI.result: 模型验证了综合成本考量的适应方法可有效提升XR界面的推荐质量与用户性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 交互成本驱动的自适应方法能显著增强XR系统用户体验，为未来智能界面设计提供新方向。

authors_text: Asif Mirza,Amin Shafiee,Sanmitra Banerjee,Krishnendu Chakrabarty,Sudeep Pasricha,Mahdi Nikdast
title: Characterization and Optimization of Integrated Silicon-Photonic Neural Networks under Fabrication-Process Variations
title_zh: 制造工艺变化下集成硅光子神经网络的表征和优化
abstract: Silicon-photonic neural networks (SPNNs) have emerged as promising successors to electronic artificial intelligence (AI) accelerators by offering orders of magnitude lower latency and higher energy efficiency. Nevertheless, the underlying silicon photonic devices in SPNNs are sensitive to inevitable fabrication-process variations (FPVs) stemming from optical lithography imperfections. Consequently, the inferencing accuracy in an SPNN can be highly impacted by FPVs -- e.g., can drop to below 10% -- the impact of which is yet to be fully studied. In this paper, we, for the first time, model and explore the impact of FPVs in the waveguide width and silicon-on-insulator (SOI) thickness in coherent SPNNs that use Mach-Zehnder Interferometers (MZIs). Leveraging such models, we propose a novel variation-aware, design-time optimization solution to improve MZI tolerance to different FPVs in SPNNs. Simulation results for two example SPNNs of different scales under realistic and correlated FPVs indicate that the optimized MZIs can improve the inferencing accuracy by up to 93.95% for the MNIST handwritten digit dataset -- considered as an example in this paper -- which corresponds to a <0.5% accuracy loss compared to the variation-free case. The proposed one-time optimization method imposes low area overhead, and hence is applicable even to resource-constrained designs
summary: Silicon-photonic neural networks (SPNNs) have emerged as promising successors to electronic artificial intelligence (AI) accelerators by offering orders of magnitude lower latency and higher energy efficiency. Nevertheless, the underlying silicon photonic devices in SPNNs are sensitive to inevitable fabrication-process variations (FPVs) stemming from optical lithography imperfections. Consequently, the inferencing accuracy in an SPNN can be highly impacted by FPVs -- e.g., can drop to below 10% -- the impact of which is yet to be fully studied. In this paper, we, for the first time, model and explore the impact of FPVs in the waveguide width and silicon-on-insulator (SOI) thickness in coherent SPNNs that use Mach-Zehnder Interferometers (MZIs). Leveraging such models, we propose a novel variation-aware, design-time optimization solution to improve MZI tolerance to different FPVs in SPNNs. Simulation results for two example SPNNs of different scales under realistic and correlated FPVs indicate that the optimized MZIs can improve the inferencing accuracy by up to 93.95% for the MNIST handwritten digit dataset -- considered as an example in this paper -- which corresponds to a <0.5% accuracy loss compared to the variation-free case. The proposed one-time optimization method imposes low area overhead, and hence is applicable even to resource-constrained designs
abstract_zh: 硅光子神经网络 (SPNN) 已成为电子人工智能 (AI) 加速器的有希望的继任者，可提供数量级的更低延迟和更高能源效率。然而，SPNN 中的底层硅光子器件对光学光刻缺陷造成的不可避免的制造工艺变化 (FPV) 很敏感。因此，SPNN 中的推理精度可能会受到 FPV 的严重影响——例如，可能会下降到 10% 以下——其影响尚未得到充分研究。在本文中，我们首次模拟并探索了 FPV 对使用马赫-曾德干涉仪 (MZI) 的相干 SPNN 中波导宽度和绝缘体上硅 (SOI) 厚度的影响。利用此类模型，我们提出了一种新颖的变化感知、设计时优化解决方案，以提高 MZI 对 SPNN 中不同 FPV 的容忍度。在真实且相关的 FPV 下两个不同尺度的 SPNN 示例的仿真结果表明，优化的 MZI 可以将 MNIST 手写数字数据集的推理精度提高高达 93.95%（本文以本文为例），与无变异情况相比，精度损失小于 0.5%。所提出的一次性优化方法具有较低的面积开销，因此甚至适用于资源受限的设计

AI.tldr: 本文研究了硅光子神经网络（SPNN）在制造工艺波动下的性能影响，并提出了一种优化方法以提高其推理准确性。
AI.motivation: 硅光子神经网络（SPNN）因低延迟和高能效被视为电子AI加速器的潜在替代方案，但其器件对制造工艺波动（FPVs）敏感，导致推理精度显著下降，亟需解决。
AI.method: 首次建模分析波导宽度和SOI厚度波动对相干SPNN中马赫-曾德尔干涉仪（MZI）的影响，并提出一种设计时的变异感知优化方案以提升MZI对FPVs的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集上的仿真表明，优化后的MZI使推理精度提升最高达93.95%（相比无变异情况仅损失<0.5%），且面积开销极低。
AI.conclusion: 该一次性优化方法有效缓解FPVs对SPNN的影响，适用于资源受限场景，为硅光子AI芯片的鲁棒设计提供可行方案。

search_text: Characterization and Optimization of Integrated Silicon-Photonic Neural Networks under Fabrication-Process Variations 制造工艺变化下集成硅光子神经网络的表征和优化 Silicon-photonic neural networks (SPNNs) have emerged as promising successors to electronic artificial intelligence (AI) accelerators by offering orders of magnitude lower latency and higher energy efficiency. Nevertheless, the underlying silicon photonic devices in SPNNs are sensitive to inevitable fabrication-process variations (FPVs) stemming from optical lithography imperfections. Consequently, the inferencing accuracy in an SPNN can be highly impacted by FPVs -- e.g., can drop to below 10% -- the impact of which is yet to be fully studied. In this paper, we, for the first time, model and explore the impact of FPVs in the waveguide width and silicon-on-insulator (SOI) thickness in coherent SPNNs that use Mach-Zehnder Interferometers (MZIs). Leveraging such models, we propose a novel variation-aware, design-time optimization solution to improve MZI tolerance to different FPVs in SPNNs. Simulation results for two example SPNNs of different scales under realistic and correlated FPVs indicate that the optimized MZIs can improve the inferencing accuracy by up to 93.95% for the MNIST handwritten digit dataset -- considered as an example in this paper -- which corresponds to a <0.5% accuracy loss compared to the variation-free case. The proposed one-time optimization method imposes low area overhead, and hence is applicable even to resource-constrained designs 硅光子神经网络 (SPNN) 已成为电子人工智能 (AI) 加速器的有希望的继任者，可提供数量级的更低延迟和更高能源效率。然而，SPNN 中的底层硅光子器件对光学光刻缺陷造成的不可避免的制造工艺变化 (FPV) 很敏感。因此，SPNN 中的推理精度可能会受到 FPV 的严重影响——例如，可能会下降到 10% 以下——其影响尚未得到充分研究。在本文中，我们首次模拟并探索了 FPV 对使用马赫-曾德干涉仪 (MZI) 的相干 SPNN 中波导宽度和绝缘体上硅 (SOI) 厚度的影响。利用此类模型，我们提出了一种新颖的变化感知、设计时优化解决方案，以提高 MZI 对 SPNN 中不同 FPV 的容忍度。在真实且相关的 FPV 下两个不同尺度的 SPNN 示例的仿真结果表明，优化的 MZI 可以将 MNIST 手写数字数据集的推理精度提高高达 93.95%（本文以本文为例），与无变异情况相比，精度损失小于 0.5%。所提出的一次性优化方法具有较低的面积开销，因此甚至适用于资源受限的设计 本文研究了硅光子神经网络（SPNN）在制造工艺波动下的性能影响，并提出了一种优化方法以提高其推理准确性。 Asif Mirza,Amin Shafiee,Sanmitra Banerjee,Krishnendu Chakrabarty,Sudeep Pasricha,Mahdi Nikdast cs.ET,cs.NE

authors_text: Pha Nguyen,Kha Gia Quach,Chi Nhan Duong,Ngan Le,Xuan-Bac Nguyen,Khoa Luu
title: Multi-Camera Multiple 3D Object Tracking on the Move for Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: 自动驾驶汽车移动中的多摄像头多 3D 物体跟踪
abstract: The development of autonomous vehicles provides an opportunity to have a complete set of camera sensors capturing the environment around the car. Thus, it is important for object detection and tracking to address new challenges, such as achieving consistent results across views of cameras. To address these challenges, this work presents a new Global Association Graph Model with Link Prediction approach to predict existing tracklets location and link detections with tracklets via cross-attention motion modeling and appearance re-identification. This approach aims at solving issues caused by inconsistent 3D object detection. Moreover, our model exploits to improve the detection accuracy of a standard 3D object detector in the nuScenes detection challenge. The experimental results on the nuScenes dataset demonstrate the benefits of the proposed method to produce SOTA performance on the existing vision-based tracking dataset.
summary: The development of autonomous vehicles provides an opportunity to have a complete set of camera sensors capturing the environment around the car. Thus, it is important for object detection and tracking to address new challenges, such as achieving consistent results across views of cameras. To address these challenges, this work presents a new Global Association Graph Model with Link Prediction approach to predict existing tracklets location and link detections with tracklets via cross-attention motion modeling and appearance re-identification. This approach aims at solving issues caused by inconsistent 3D object detection. Moreover, our model exploits to improve the detection accuracy of a standard 3D object detector in the nuScenes detection challenge. The experimental results on the nuScenes dataset demonstrate the benefits of the proposed method to produce SOTA performance on the existing vision-based tracking dataset.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车的发展提供了一个机会，让一整套摄像头传感器捕捉汽车周围的环境。因此，对象检测和跟踪应对新的挑战非常重要，例如在摄像机视图中实现一致的结果。为了解决这些挑战，这项工作提出了一种新的具有链接预测方法的全局关联图模型，通过交叉注意运动建模和外观重新识别来预测现有轨迹位置和链接检测。该方法旨在解决 3D 对象检测不一致引起的问题。此外，我们的模型在 nuScenes 检测挑战中提高了标准 3D 对象检测器的检测精度。 nuScenes 数据集上的实验结果证明了所提出的方法在现有基于视觉的跟踪数据集上产生 SOTA 性能的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多摄像头的三维多目标跟踪方法，旨在解决自动驾驶车辆在不同摄像头视角下的一致性跟踪问题。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆依赖多摄像头传感器获取环境信息，但不同视角下的目标检测和跟踪存在不一致性，需提升跨视角跟踪的准确性与稳定性。
AI.method: 设计了全局关联图模型与链接预测方法，结合跨注意力运动建模和外观重识别技术，将检测结果与轨迹片段关联，同时优化标准三维检测器的精度。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上的实验表明，该方法在现有视觉跟踪数据集上达到了最先进的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了多摄像头三维目标跟踪中的视角一致性难题，为自动驾驶的环境感知提供了更可靠的技术支持。

authors_text: Md Rashad Al Hasan Rony,Ricardo Usbeck,Jens Lehmann
title: DialoKG: Knowledge-Structure Aware Task-Oriented Dialogue Generation
title_zh: DialoKG：知识结构感知的面向任务的对话生成
comment: Accepted by the North American Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics (NAACL) 2022
comments: Accepted by the North American Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics (NAACL) 2022
abstract: Task-oriented dialogue generation is challenging since the underlying knowledge is often dynamic and effectively incorporating knowledge into the learning process is hard. It is particularly challenging to generate both human-like and informative responses in this setting. Recent research primarily focused on various knowledge distillation methods where the underlying relationship between the facts in a knowledge base is not effectively captured. In this paper, we go one step further and demonstrate how the structural information of a knowledge graph can improve the system's inference capabilities. Specifically, we propose DialoKG, a novel task-oriented dialogue system that effectively incorporates knowledge into a language model. Our proposed system views relational knowledge as a knowledge graph and introduces (1) a structure-aware knowledge embedding technique, and (2) a knowledge graph-weighted attention masking strategy to facilitate the system selecting relevant information during the dialogue generation. An empirical evaluation demonstrates the effectiveness of DialoKG over state-of-the-art methods on several standard benchmark datasets.
summary: Task-oriented dialogue generation is challenging since the underlying knowledge is often dynamic and effectively incorporating knowledge into the learning process is hard. It is particularly challenging to generate both human-like and informative responses in this setting. Recent research primarily focused on various knowledge distillation methods where the underlying relationship between the facts in a knowledge base is not effectively captured. In this paper, we go one step further and demonstrate how the structural information of a knowledge graph can improve the system's inference capabilities. Specifically, we propose DialoKG, a novel task-oriented dialogue system that effectively incorporates knowledge into a language model. Our proposed system views relational knowledge as a knowledge graph and introduces (1) a structure-aware knowledge embedding technique, and (2) a knowledge graph-weighted attention masking strategy to facilitate the system selecting relevant information during the dialogue generation. An empirical evaluation demonstrates the effectiveness of DialoKG over state-of-the-art methods on several standard benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 面向任务的对话生成具有挑战性，因为底层知识通常是动态的，并且很难将知识有效地融入到学习过程中。在这种环境下生成类似人类且信息丰富的响应尤其具有挑战性。最近的研究主要集中在各种知识蒸馏方法上，这些方法没有有效地捕获知识库中事实之间的潜在关系。在本文中，我们更进一步演示了知识图的结构信息如何提高系统的推理能力。具体来说，我们提出了 DialoKG，一种新颖的面向任务的对话系统，可以有效地将知识融入到语言模型中。我们提出的系统将关系知识视为知识图，并引入（1）结构感知知识嵌入技术，以及（2）知识图加权注意掩蔽策略，以促进系统在对话生成过程中选择相关信息。实证评估证明了 DialoKG 在多个标准基准数据集上优于最先进方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DialoKG系统，通过利用知识图谱的结构信息提升任务导向对话生成的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效捕捉知识库中事实间的关系，导致生成的回复不够自然且信息不足。
AI.method: 提出结构感知知识嵌入技术与知识图谱加权注意力掩码策略，将知识图谱结构信息融入对话生成过程。
AI.result: 在多个标准数据集上实验证明，DialoKG优于现有最先进方法，生成效果更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合知识图谱结构信息，DialoKG有效提升了任务导向对话系统的推理与生成能力。

title: What Makes Instruction Learning Hard? An Investigation and a New Challenge in a Synthetic Environment
title_zh: 是什么让教学学习变得困难？合成环境中的调查和新挑战
abstract: The instruction learning paradigm -- where a model learns to perform new tasks from task descriptions alone -- has become popular in general-purpose model research. The capabilities of large transformer models as instruction learners, however, remain poorly understood. We use a controlled synthetic environment to characterize such capabilities. Specifically, we use the task of deciding whether a given string matches a regular expression (viewed as an instruction) to identify properties of tasks, instructions, and instances that make instruction learning challenging. For instance, we find that our model, a fine-tuned T5-based text2text transformer, struggles with large regular languages, suggesting that less precise instructions are challenging for models. Additionally, instruction executions that require tracking longer contexts of prior steps are also more difficult. We use our findings to systematically construct a challenging instruction learning dataset, which we call Hard RegSet. Fine-tuning on Hard RegSet, our large transformer learns to correctly interpret only 65.6% of test instructions (with at least 90% accuracy), and 11%-24% of the instructions in out-of-distribution generalization settings. We propose Hard RegSet as a challenging instruction learning task, and a controlled environment for studying instruction learning.
summary: The instruction learning paradigm -- where a model learns to perform new tasks from task descriptions alone -- has become popular in general-purpose model research. The capabilities of large transformer models as instruction learners, however, remain poorly understood. We use a controlled synthetic environment to characterize such capabilities. Specifically, we use the task of deciding whether a given string matches a regular expression (viewed as an instruction) to identify properties of tasks, instructions, and instances that make instruction learning challenging. For instance, we find that our model, a fine-tuned T5-based text2text transformer, struggles with large regular languages, suggesting that less precise instructions are challenging for models. Additionally, instruction executions that require tracking longer contexts of prior steps are also more difficult. We use our findings to systematically construct a challenging instruction learning dataset, which we call Hard RegSet. Fine-tuning on Hard RegSet, our large transformer learns to correctly interpret only 65.6% of test instructions (with at least 90% accuracy), and 11%-24% of the instructions in out-of-distribution generalization settings. We propose Hard RegSet as a challenging instruction learning task, and a controlled environment for studying instruction learning.
abstract_zh: 指令学习范式（模型仅根据任务描述学习执行新任务）已在通用模型研究中变得流行。然而，大型变压器模型作为指令学习者的能力仍然知之甚少。我们使用受控合成环境来表征此类功能。具体来说，我们使用确定给定字符串是否与正则表达式（视为指令）匹配的任务来识别使指令学习具有挑战性的任务、指令和实例的属性。例如，我们发现我们的模型（一个经过微调的基于 T5 的 text2text 转换器）在处理大型常规语言时表现不佳，这表明不太精确的指令对模型来说具有挑战性。此外，需要跟踪先前步骤的较长上下文的指令执行也更加困难。我们利用我们的发现系统地构建了一个具有挑战性的指令学习数据集，我们称之为 Hard RegSet。在 Hard RegSet 上进行微调，我们的大型变压器仅学会正确解释 65.6% 的测试指令（至少 90% 的准确度），以及分布外泛化设置中 11%-24% 的指令。我们提出 Hard RegSet 作为一项具有挑战性的指令学习任务，以及用于研究指令学习的受控环境。

AI.tldr: 通过合成环境分析指令学习的难点，并构建挑战性数据集Hard RegSet以评估模型性能。
AI.motivation: 探讨大模型在指令学习中的能力限制，识别影响其性能的任务、指令和实例属性。
AI.method: 利用正则表达式匹配任务，分析模型处理复杂指令和长上下文的困难，构建Hard RegSet数据集。
AI.result: 模型在Hard RegSet测试集准确率仅为65.6%，分布外测试准确率下降11%-24%。
AI.conclusion: 提出Hard RegSet作为指令学习的挑战性任务，为研究指令学习提供可控环境。

search_text: What Makes Instruction Learning Hard? An Investigation and a New Challenge in a Synthetic Environment 是什么让教学学习变得困难？合成环境中的调查和新挑战 The instruction learning paradigm -- where a model learns to perform new tasks from task descriptions alone -- has become popular in general-purpose model research. The capabilities of large transformer models as instruction learners, however, remain poorly understood. We use a controlled synthetic environment to characterize such capabilities. Specifically, we use the task of deciding whether a given string matches a regular expression (viewed as an instruction) to identify properties of tasks, instructions, and instances that make instruction learning challenging. For instance, we find that our model, a fine-tuned T5-based text2text transformer, struggles with large regular languages, suggesting that less precise instructions are challenging for models. Additionally, instruction executions that require tracking longer contexts of prior steps are also more difficult. We use our findings to systematically construct a challenging instruction learning dataset, which we call Hard RegSet. Fine-tuning on Hard RegSet, our large transformer learns to correctly interpret only 65.6% of test instructions (with at least 90% accuracy), and 11%-24% of the instructions in out-of-distribution generalization settings. We propose Hard RegSet as a challenging instruction learning task, and a controlled environment for studying instruction learning. 指令学习范式（模型仅根据任务描述学习执行新任务）已在通用模型研究中变得流行。然而，大型变压器模型作为指令学习者的能力仍然知之甚少。我们使用受控合成环境来表征此类功能。具体来说，我们使用确定给定字符串是否与正则表达式（视为指令）匹配的任务来识别使指令学习具有挑战性的任务、指令和实例的属性。例如，我们发现我们的模型（一个经过微调的基于 T5 的 text2text 转换器）在处理大型常规语言时表现不佳，这表明不太精确的指令对模型来说具有挑战性。此外，需要跟踪先前步骤的较长上下文的指令执行也更加困难。我们利用我们的发现系统地构建了一个具有挑战性的指令学习数据集，我们称之为 Hard RegSet。在 Hard RegSet 上进行微调，我们的大型变压器仅学会正确解释 65.6% 的测试指令（至少 90% 的准确度），以及分布外泛化设置中 11%-24% 的指令。我们提出 Hard RegSet 作为一项具有挑战性的指令学习任务，以及用于研究指令学习的受控环境。 通过合成环境分析指令学习的难点，并构建挑战性数据集Hard RegSet以评估模型性能。 Matthew Finlayson,Kyle Richardson,Ashish Sabharwal,Peter Clark cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Multi-hop Question Answering
title_zh: 多跳问答
comment: Published at Foundations and Trends in Information Retrieval
comments: Published at Foundations and Trends in Information Retrieval
abstract: The task of Question Answering (QA) has attracted significant research interest for long. Its relevance to language understanding and knowledge retrieval tasks, along with the simple setting makes the task of QA crucial for strong AI systems. Recent success on simple QA tasks has shifted the focus to more complex settings. Among these, Multi-Hop QA (MHQA) is one of the most researched tasks over the recent years. In broad terms, MHQA is the task of answering natural language questions that involve extracting and combining multiple pieces of information and doing multiple steps of reasoning. An example of a multi-hop question would be "The Argentine PGA Championship record holder has won how many tournaments worldwide?". Answering the question would need two pieces of information: "Who is the record holder for Argentine PGA Championship tournaments?" and "How many tournaments did [Answer of Sub Q1] win?". The ability to answer multi-hop questions and perform multi step reasoning can significantly improve the utility of NLP systems. Consequently, the field has seen a surge with high quality datasets, models and evaluation strategies. The notion of 'multiple hops' is somewhat abstract which results in a large variety of tasks that require multi-hop reasoning. This leads to different datasets and models that differ significantly from each other and makes the field challenging to generalize and survey. We aim to provide a general and formal definition of the MHQA task, and organize and summarize existing MHQA frameworks. We also outline some best practices for building MHQA datasets. This book provides a systematic and thorough introduction as well as the structuring of the existing attempts to this highly interesting, yet quite challenging task.

abstract_zh: 问答（QA）任务长期以来引起了人们的广泛研究兴趣。它与语言理解和知识检索任务的相关性以及简单的设置使得 QA 任务对于强大的人工智能系统至关重要。最近在简单的 QA 任务上取得的成功已将重点转移到更复杂的设置上。其中，多跳质量保证（MHQA）是近年来研究最多的任务之一。从广义上讲，MHQA 是回答自然语言问题的任务，涉及提取和组合多条信息并进行多个推理步骤。多跳问题的一个例子是“阿根廷 PGA 锦标赛记录保持者赢得了全球多少场比赛？”。回答这个问题需要两条信息：“谁是阿根廷 PGA 锦标赛的纪录保持者？”和“[Sub Q1 的答案] 赢得了多少场比赛？”。回答多跳问题和执行多步推理的能力可以显着提高 NLP 系统的实用性。因此，该领域出现了高质量数据集、模型和评估策略的激增。 “多跳”的概念有些抽象，这导致需要多跳推理的任务种类繁多。这导致不同的数据集和模型彼此之间存在显着差异，并使该领域难以概括和调查。我们的目标是提供 MHQA 任务的通用且正式的定义，并组织和总结现有的 MHQA 框架。我们还概述了构建 MHQA 数据集的一些最佳实践。本书对这一非常有趣但又颇具挑战性的任务进行了系统而彻底的介绍，并构建了现有的尝试。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为多跳问答（MHQA）任务提供统一定义，整理现有框架并总结构建数据集的最佳实践。
AI.motivation: 多跳问答需要多步骤推理，但现有任务定义模糊、数据集和模型差异大，阻碍了领域内的通用性和研究进展。
AI.method: 通过系统综述现有研究，提出MHQA的正式定义，分类整理框架并分析数据集构建方法。
AI.result: 建立了MHQA任务的结构化分类体系，总结了主流方法与数据集设计原则。
AI.conclusion: 标准化MHQA任务定义和评估体系将推动更高效模型研发与跨领域应用。

authors_text: Bing Wang,Zhengdi Yu,Bo Yang,Jie Qin,Toby Breckon,Ling Shao,Niki Trigoni,Andrew Markham
title: RangeUDF: Semantic Surface Reconstruction from 3D Point Clouds
title_zh: RangeUDF：从 3D 点云重建语义表面
abstract: We present RangeUDF, a new implicit representation based framework to recover the geometry and semantics of continuous 3D scene surfaces from point clouds. Unlike occupancy fields or signed distance fields which can only model closed 3D surfaces, our approach is not restricted to any type of topology. Being different from the existing unsigned distance fields, our framework does not suffer from any surface ambiguity. In addition, our RangeUDF can jointly estimate precise semantics for continuous surfaces. The key to our approach is a range-aware unsigned distance function together with a surface-oriented semantic segmentation module. Extensive experiments show that RangeUDF clearly surpasses state-of-the-art approaches for surface reconstruction on four point cloud datasets. Moreover, RangeUDF demonstrates superior generalization capability across multiple unseen datasets, which is nearly impossible for all existing approaches.
summary: We present RangeUDF, a new implicit representation based framework to recover the geometry and semantics of continuous 3D scene surfaces from point clouds. Unlike occupancy fields or signed distance fields which can only model closed 3D surfaces, our approach is not restricted to any type of topology. Being different from the existing unsigned distance fields, our framework does not suffer from any surface ambiguity. In addition, our RangeUDF can jointly estimate precise semantics for continuous surfaces. The key to our approach is a range-aware unsigned distance function together with a surface-oriented semantic segmentation module. Extensive experiments show that RangeUDF clearly surpasses state-of-the-art approaches for surface reconstruction on four point cloud datasets. Moreover, RangeUDF demonstrates superior generalization capability across multiple unseen datasets, which is nearly impossible for all existing approaches.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 RangeUDF，一种新的基于隐式表示的框架，用于从点云恢复连续 3D 场景表面的几何和语义。与只能对闭合 3D 表面建模的占用场或有符号距离场不同，我们的方法不限于任何类型的拓扑。与现有的无符号距离场不同，我们的框架不会受到任何表面歧义的影响。此外，我们的 RangeUDF 可以联合估计连续表面的精确语义。我们方法的关键是范围感知的无符号距离函数以及面向表面的语义分割模块。大量实验表明，RangeUDF 明显超越了四个点云数据集上最先进的表面重建方法。此外，RangeUDF 在多个未见过的数据集上展示了卓越的泛化能力，这对于所有现有方法来说几乎是不可能的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RangeUDF框架，从3D点云中重建连续场景表面的几何结构和语义信息。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如占用字段或符号距离字段受限于封闭表面拓扑，且无法准确估计语义，需更通用的表面重建方案。
AI.method: 基于范围感知的无符号距离函数与表面导向的语义分割模块，联合优化几何重建与语义预测。
AI.result: 在四个点云数据集上优于现有方法，且在未见过的数据集上展现强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: RangeUDF解决了传统方法的拓扑限制与语义模糊问题，实现了更精确的表面重建与语义联合估计。

search_text: RangeUDF: Semantic Surface Reconstruction from 3D Point Clouds RangeUDF：从 3D 点云重建语义表面 We present RangeUDF, a new implicit representation based framework to recover the geometry and semantics of continuous 3D scene surfaces from point clouds. Unlike occupancy fields or signed distance fields which can only model closed 3D surfaces, our approach is not restricted to any type of topology. Being different from the existing unsigned distance fields, our framework does not suffer from any surface ambiguity. In addition, our RangeUDF can jointly estimate precise semantics for continuous surfaces. The key to our approach is a range-aware unsigned distance function together with a surface-oriented semantic segmentation module. Extensive experiments show that RangeUDF clearly surpasses state-of-the-art approaches for surface reconstruction on four point cloud datasets. Moreover, RangeUDF demonstrates superior generalization capability across multiple unseen datasets, which is nearly impossible for all existing approaches. 我们提出了 RangeUDF，一种新的基于隐式表示的框架，用于从点云恢复连续 3D 场景表面的几何和语义。与只能对闭合 3D 表面建模的占用场或有符号距离场不同，我们的方法不限于任何类型的拓扑。与现有的无符号距离场不同，我们的框架不会受到任何表面歧义的影响。此外，我们的 RangeUDF 可以联合估计连续表面的精确语义。我们方法的关键是范围感知的无符号距离函数以及面向表面的语义分割模块。大量实验表明，RangeUDF 明显超越了四个点云数据集上最先进的表面重建方法。此外，RangeUDF 在多个未见过的数据集上展示了卓越的泛化能力，这对于所有现有方法来说几乎是不可能的。 本文提出RangeUDF框架，从3D点云中重建连续场景表面的几何结构和语义信息。 Bing Wang,Zhengdi Yu,Bo Yang,Jie Qin,Toby Breckon,Ling Shao,Niki Trigoni,Andrew Markham cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.GR,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Miklos Ajtai,Vladimir Braverman,T. S. Jayram,Sandeep Silwal,Alec Sun,David P. Woodruff,Samson Zhou
title: The White-Box Adversarial Data Stream Model
title_zh: 白盒对抗数据流模型
abstract: We study streaming algorithms in the white-box adversarial model, where the stream is chosen adaptively by an adversary who observes the entire internal state of the algorithm at each time step. We show that nontrivial algorithms are still possible. We first give a randomized algorithm for the $L_1$-heavy hitters problem that outperforms the optimal deterministic Misra-Gries algorithm on long streams. If the white-box adversary is computationally bounded, we use cryptographic techniques to reduce the memory of our $L_1$-heavy hitters algorithm even further and to design a number of additional algorithms for graph, string, and linear algebra problems. The existence of such algorithms is surprising, as the streaming algorithm does not even have a secret key in this model, i.e., its state is entirely known to the adversary. One algorithm we design is for estimating the number of distinct elements in a stream with insertions and deletions achieving a multiplicative approximation and sublinear space; such an algorithm is impossible for deterministic algorithms. We also give a general technique that translates any two-player deterministic communication lower bound to a lower bound for {\it randomized} algorithms robust to a white-box adversary. In particular, our results show that for all $p\ge 0$, there exists a constant $C_p>1$ such that any $C_p$-approximation algorithm for $F_p$ moment estimation in insertion-only streams with a white-box adversary requires $Ω(n)$ space for a universe of size $n$. Similarly, there is a constant $C>1$ such that any $C$-approximation algorithm in an insertion-only stream for matrix rank requires $Ω(n)$ space with a white-box adversary. Our algorithmic results based on cryptography thus show a separation between computationally bounded and unbounded adversaries. (Abstract shortened to meet arXiv limits.)
summary: We study streaming algorithms in the white-box adversarial model, where the stream is chosen adaptively by an adversary who observes the entire internal state of the algorithm at each time step. We show that nontrivial algorithms are still possible. We first give a randomized algorithm for the $L_1$-heavy hitters problem that outperforms the optimal deterministic Misra-Gries algorithm on long streams. If the white-box adversary is computationally bounded, we use cryptographic techniques to reduce the memory of our $L_1$-heavy hitters algorithm even further and to design a number of additional algorithms for graph, string, and linear algebra problems. The existence of such algorithms is surprising, as the streaming algorithm does not even have a secret key in this model, i.e., its state is entirely known to the adversary. One algorithm we design is for estimating the number of distinct elements in a stream with insertions and deletions achieving a multiplicative approximation and sublinear space; such an algorithm is impossible for deterministic algorithms. We also give a general technique that translates any two-player deterministic communication lower bound to a lower bound for {\it randomized} algorithms robust to a white-box adversary. In particular, our results show that for all $p\ge 0$, there exists a constant $C_p>1$ such that any $C_p$-approximation algorithm for $F_p$ moment estimation in insertion-only streams with a white-box adversary requires $Ω(n)$ space for a universe of size $n$. Similarly, there is a constant $C>1$ such that any $C$-approximation algorithm in an insertion-only stream for matrix rank requires $Ω(n)$ space with a white-box adversary. Our algorithmic results based on cryptography thus show a separation between computationally bounded and unbounded adversaries. (Abstract shortened to meet arXiv limits.)
abstract_zh: 我们研究白盒对抗模型中的流算法，其中流由对手自适应地选择，对手在每个时间步观察算法的整个内部状态。我们证明了不平凡的算法仍然是可能的。我们首先给出一个针对 $L_1$-heavy hitters 问题的随机算法，该算法在长流上优于最优确定性 Misra-Gries 算法。如果白盒对手在计算上受到限制，我们将使用加密技术来进一步减少 $L_1$ 重量级算法的内存，并为图形、字符串和线性代数问题设计许多附加算法。这种算法的存在令人惊讶，因为流算法在该模型中甚至没有密钥，即对手完全知道其状态。我们设计的一种算法是通过插入和删除来估计流中不同元素的数量，从而实现乘法近似和次线性空间；对于确定性算法来说，这样的算法是不可能的。我们还给出了一种通用技术，将任何两人确定性通信下限转换为对白盒对手鲁棒的{\it randomization}算法的下限。特别是，我们的结果表明，对于所有 $p\ge 0$，存在一个常量 $C_p>1$，使得任何在具有白盒对手的仅插入流中用于 $F_p$ 矩估计的 $C_p$ 近似算法都需要 $Ω(n)$ 空间用于大小为 $n$ 的宇宙。类似地，存在一个常数 $C>1$，使得矩阵秩的仅插入流中的任何 $C$ 近似算法都需要 $Ω(n)$ 空间与白盒对手。因此，我们基于密码学的算法结果显示了计算有界和无界对手之间的区别。 （摘要已缩短以满足 arXiv 限制。）

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在白盒对抗模型下的流算法，其中对手可以观察算法的完整内部状态，提出了多种随机化算法并分析了其空间复杂度下界。
AI.motivation: 传统流算法在对抗性数据流中表现不佳，尤其当对手能完全观察算法状态时，需设计新的算法以应对这种强对抗环境。
AI.method: 提出随机化算法解决L1重 hitters 问题，结合密码学技术降低内存需求，并通过通信复杂度下界转化技术推导流算法的空间下界。
AI.result: 设计出优于确定性算法的L1重 hitters 算法，实现支持插入删除的流唯一元素估计，证明Fp矩估计和矩阵秩计算在白盒模型下需Ω(n)空间。
AI.conclusion: 密码学方法可区分计算受限与无限制对手，表明在强对抗模型下仍能设计有效流算法，揭示了计算复杂性与算法鲁棒性的内在联系。

authors_text: Niv Nayman,Avram Golbert,Asaf Noy,Tan Ping,Lihi Zelnik-Manor
title: Diverse Imagenet Models Transfer Better
title_zh: 多样化的 Imagenet 模型传输效果更好
abstract: A commonly accepted hypothesis is that models with higher accuracy on Imagenet perform better on other downstream tasks, leading to much research dedicated to optimizing Imagenet accuracy. Recently this hypothesis has been challenged by evidence showing that self-supervised models transfer better than their supervised counterparts, despite their inferior Imagenet accuracy. This calls for identifying the additional factors, on top of Imagenet accuracy, that make models transferable. In this work we show that high diversity of the features learnt by the model promotes transferability jointly with Imagenet accuracy. Encouraged by the recent transferability results of self-supervised models, we propose a method that combines self-supervised and supervised pretraining to generate models with both high diversity and high accuracy, and as a result high transferability. We demonstrate our results on several architectures and multiple downstream tasks, including both single-label and multi-label classification.
summary: A commonly accepted hypothesis is that models with higher accuracy on Imagenet perform better on other downstream tasks, leading to much research dedicated to optimizing Imagenet accuracy. Recently this hypothesis has been challenged by evidence showing that self-supervised models transfer better than their supervised counterparts, despite their inferior Imagenet accuracy. This calls for identifying the additional factors, on top of Imagenet accuracy, that make models transferable. In this work we show that high diversity of the features learnt by the model promotes transferability jointly with Imagenet accuracy. Encouraged by the recent transferability results of self-supervised models, we propose a method that combines self-supervised and supervised pretraining to generate models with both high diversity and high accuracy, and as a result high transferability. We demonstrate our results on several architectures and multiple downstream tasks, including both single-label and multi-label classification.
abstract_zh: 一个普遍接受的假设是，Imagenet 上精度较高的模型在其他下游任务上表现更好，从而导致大量研究致力于优化 Imagenet 精度。最近，这一假设受到了证据的挑战，证据表明，尽管 Imagenet 准确性较低，但自监督模型的传输效果优于监督模型。除了 Imagenet 准确性之外，这还需要确定使模型可迁移的其他因素。在这项工作中，我们表明，模型学习到的特征的高度多样性可以提高可迁移性和 Imagenet 的准确性。受最近自监督模型可迁移性结果的鼓舞，我们提出了一种结合自监督和监督预训练的方法，以生成具有高多样性和高精度的模型，从而具有高可迁移性。我们在多种架构和多个下游任务上展示了我们的结果，包括单标签和多标签分类。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了模型特征多样性对迁移性能的影响，并提出结合自监督与监督预训练的方法以提升模型在下游任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为ImageNet准确率高的模型迁移性更好，但自监督模型尽管准确率较低却表现出更好的迁移能力，因此需探索除准确率外影响迁移性的其他因素。
AI.method: 提出结合自监督与监督预训练的方法，生成兼具高特征多样性与高ImageNet准确率的模型，从而增强迁移能力。
AI.result: 在多种模型架构及多任务（包括单标签和多标签分类）上验证了所提方法的有效性，证明高多样性与高准确率共同提升迁移性能。
AI.conclusion: 特征多样性与ImageNet准确率共同促进模型迁移性，结合自监督与监督预训练的方法能有效提升模型在下游任务中的表现。
