In this work we show that high diversity of the features learnt by the model promotes transferability jointly with Imagenet accuracy. Encouraged by the recent transferability results of self-supervised models, we propose a method that combines self-supervised and supervised pretraining to generate models with both high diversity and high accuracy, and as a result high transferability. We demonstrate our results on several architectures and multiple downstream tasks, including both single-label and multi-label classification. 一个普遍接受的假设是，Imagenet 上精度较高的模型在其他下游任务上表现更好，从而导致大量研究致力于优化 Imagenet 精度。最近，这一假设受到了证据的挑战，证据表明，尽管 Imagenet 准确性较低，但自监督模型的传输效果优于监督模型。除了 Imagenet 准确性之外，这还需要确定使模型可迁移的其他因素。在这项工作中，我们表明，模型学习到的特征的高度多样性可以提高可迁移性和 Imagenet 的准确性。受最近自监督模型可迁移性结果的鼓舞，我们提出了一种结合自监督和监督预训练的方法，以生成具有高多样性和高精度的模型，从而具有高可迁移性。我们在多种架构和多个下游任务上展示了我们的结果，包括单标签和多标签分类。 本文研究了模型特征多样性对迁移性能的影响，并提出结合自监督与监督预训练的方法以提升模型在下游任务中的表现。 Niv Nayman,Avram Golbert,Asaf Noy,Tan Ping,Lihi Zelnik-Manor cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Patrick Zschech,Sven Weinzierl,Nico Hambauer,Sandra Zilker,Mathias Kraus
title: GAM(e) changer or not? An evaluation of interpretable machine learning models based on additive model constraints
title_zh: GAM(e) 转换器是否？基于加性模型约束的可解释机器学习模型的评估
comment: Preprint accepted for archival and presentation at the 30th European Conference on Information Systems (ECIS 2022)
comments: Preprint accepted for archival and presentation at the 30th European Conference on Information Systems (ECIS 2022)
abstract: The number of information systems (IS) studies dealing with explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) is currently exploding as the field demands more transparency about the internal decision logic of machine learning (ML) models. However, most techniques subsumed under XAI provide post-hoc-analytical explanations, which have to be considered with caution as they only use approximations of the underlying ML model. Therefore, our paper investigates a series of intrinsically interpretable ML models and discusses their suitability for the IS community. More specifically, our focus is on advanced extensions of generalized additive models (GAM) in which predictors are modeled independently in a non-linear way to generate shape functions that can capture arbitrary patterns but remain fully interpretable. In our study, we evaluate the prediction qualities of five GAMs as compared to six traditional ML models and assess their visual outputs for model interpretability. On this basis, we investigate their merits and limitations and derive design implications for further improvements.
summary: The number of information systems (IS) studies dealing with explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) is currently exploding as the field demands more transparency about the internal decision logic of machine learning (ML) models. However, most techniques subsumed under XAI provide post-hoc-analytical explanations, which have to be considered with caution as they only use approximations of the underlying ML model. Therefore, our paper investigates a series of intrinsically interpretable ML models and discusses their suitability for the IS community. More specifically, our focus is on advanced extensions of generalized additive models (GAM) in which predictors are modeled independently in a non-linear way to generate shape functions that can capture arbitrary patterns but remain fully interpretable. In our study, we evaluate the prediction qualities of five GAMs as compared to six traditional ML models and assess their visual outputs for model interpretability. On this basis, we investigate their merits and limitations and derive design implications for further improvements.
abstract_zh: 由于该领域要求机器学习 (ML) 模型的内部决策逻辑更加透明，因此涉及可解释人工智能 (XAI) 的信息系统 (IS) 研究数量目前呈爆炸式增长。然而，XAI 中包含的大多数技术都提供事后分析解释，必须谨慎考虑，因为它们仅使用底层 ML 模型的近似值。因此，我们的论文研究了一系列本质上可解释的机器学习模型，并讨论了它们对 IS 社区的适用性。更具体地说，我们的重点是广义加性模型（GAM）的高级扩展，其中预测变量以非线性方式独立建模，以生成可以捕获任意模式但保持完全可解释的形状函数。在我们的研究中，我们评估了 5 个 GAM 与 6 个传统 ML 模型的预测质量，并评估了它们的视觉输出的模型可解释性。在此基础上，我们研究了它们的优点和局限性，并得出进一步改进的设计含义。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了基于可加模型约束的可解释机器学习模型在信息系统领域的适用性，重点比较了广义可加模型（GAM）与传统机器学习模型的预测性能和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 随着对机器学习模型透明度需求的增加，现有可解释人工智能（XAI）技术多依赖事后近似解释，缺乏内在可解释性。本文旨在探索具有内在可解释性的模型（如GAM）在信息系统研究中的潜力。
AI.method: 通过实证研究，对比五种扩展的广义可加模型（GAM）与六种传统机器学习模型的预测性能，并分析其可视化输出的可解释性，探讨其优缺点及改进方向。
AI.result: 研究发现GAM在保持模型可解释性的同时具备良好的预测能力，但其非线性建模能力与传统模型相比存在一定局限性，需在复杂模式捕捉与解释性之间权衡。
AI.conclusion: GAM为信息系统领域提供了兼顾预测性能与模型透明度的可行方案，未来需进一步优化其灵活性与可扩展性以适应更复杂的应用场景。

authors_text: Christopher Hazard,Akshay Bhagat,Balarama Raju Buddharaju,Zhongtao Liu,Yunming Shao,Lu Lu,Sammy Omari,Henggang Cui
title: Importance is in your attention: agent importance prediction for autonomous driving
title_zh: 重要性在你的注意力中：自动驾驶的智能体重要性预测
abstract: Trajectory prediction is an important task in autonomous driving. State-of-the-art trajectory prediction models often use attention mechanisms to model the interaction between agents. In this paper, we show that the attention information from such models can also be used to measure the importance of each agent with respect to the ego vehicle's future planned trajectory. Our experiment results on the nuPlans dataset show that our method can effectively find and rank surrounding agents by their impact on the ego's plan.
summary: Trajectory prediction is an important task in autonomous driving. State-of-the-art trajectory prediction models often use attention mechanisms to model the interaction between agents. In this paper, we show that the attention information from such models can also be used to measure the importance of each agent with respect to the ego vehicle's future planned trajectory. Our experiment results on the nuPlans dataset show that our method can effectively find and rank surrounding agents by their impact on the ego's plan.
abstract_zh: 轨迹预测是自动驾驶中的一项重要任务。最先进的轨迹预测模型通常使用注意力机制来模拟代理之间的交互。在本文中，我们表明，来自此类模型的注意力信息也可用于衡量每个智能体对于自我车辆未来计划轨迹的重要性。我们在 nuPlans 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法可以有效地找到周围的智能体，并根据它们对自我计划的影响对其进行排名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的方法，用于预测自动驾驶场景中周围代理对自我车辆轨迹的重要性。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测模型虽使用注意力机制建模代理交互，但未充分挖掘注意力信息以量化各代理对自我车辆规划轨迹的影响，亟需一种有效评估周围代理重要性的方法。
AI.method: 通过分析注意力机制中的权重分布，提取各代理对自我车辆未来轨迹的影响程度，并据此计算重要性得分进行排序。
AI.result: 在nuPlans数据集上的实验验证了该方法能有效识别并按影响力排序关键周围代理。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法可有效利用注意力信息评估代理重要性，为自动驾驶决策提供依据。

authors_text: Jun Yue,Leyuan Fang,Pedram Ghamisi,Weiying Xie,Jun Li,Jocelyn Chanussot,Antonio J Plaza
title: Optical Remote Sensing Image Understanding with Weak Supervision: Concepts, Methods, and Perspectives
title_zh: 弱监督光学遥感图像理解：概念、方法和观点
abstract: In recent years, supervised learning has been widely used in various tasks of optical remote sensing image understanding, including remote sensing image classification, pixel-wise segmentation, change detection, and object detection. The methods based on supervised learning need a large amount of high-quality training data and their performance highly depends on the quality of the labels. However, in practical remote sensing applications, it is often expensive and time-consuming to obtain large-scale data sets with high-quality labels, which leads to a lack of sufficient supervised information. In some cases, only coarse-grained labels can be obtained, resulting in the lack of exact supervision. In addition, the supervised information obtained manually may be wrong, resulting in a lack of accurate supervision. Therefore, remote sensing image understanding often faces the problems of incomplete, inexact, and inaccurate supervised information, which will affect the breadth and depth of remote sensing applications. In order to solve the above-mentioned problems, researchers have explored various tasks in remote sensing image understanding under weak supervision. This paper summarizes the research progress of weakly supervised learning in the field of remote sensing, including three typical weakly supervised paradigms: 1) Incomplete supervision, where only a subset of training data is labeled; 2) Inexact supervision, where only coarse-grained labels of training data are given; 3) Inaccurate supervision, where the labels given are not always true on the ground.
summary: In recent years, supervised learning has been widely used in various tasks of optical remote sensing image understanding, including remote sensing image classification, pixel-wise segmentation, change detection, and object detection. The methods based on supervised learning need a large amount of high-quality training data and their performance highly depends on the quality of the labels. However, in practical remote sensing applications, it is often expensive and time-consuming to obtain large-scale data sets with high-quality labels, which leads to a lack of sufficient supervised information. In some cases, only coarse-grained labels can be obtained, resulting in the lack of exact supervision. In addition, the supervised information obtained manually may be wrong, resulting in a lack of accurate supervision. Therefore, remote sensing image understanding often faces the problems of incomplete, inexact, and inaccurate supervised information, which will affect the breadth and depth of remote sensing applications. In order to solve the above-mentioned problems, researchers have explored various tasks in remote sensing image understanding under weak supervision. This paper summarizes the research progress of weakly supervised learning in the field of remote sensing, including three typical weakly supervised paradigms: 1) Incomplete supervision, where only a subset of training data is labeled; 2) Inexact supervision, where only coarse-grained labels of training data are given; 3) Inaccurate supervision, where the labels given are not always true on the ground.
abstract_zh: 近年来，监督学习已广泛应用于光学遥感图像理解的各种任务，包括遥感图像分类、逐像素分割、变化检测和目标检测。基于监督学习的方法需要大量高质量的训练数据，其性能很大程度上取决于标签的质量。然而，在实际的遥感应用中，获取具有高质量标签的大规模数据集通常是昂贵且耗时的，这导致缺乏足够的监督信息。在某些情况下，只能获得粗粒度的标签，导致缺乏精确的监督。另外，人工获取的监管信息可能是错误的，导致监管缺乏准确度。因此，遥感图像理解常常面临监督信息不完整、不精确、不准确的问题，从而影响遥感应用的广度和深度。为了解决上述问题，研究人员探索了弱监督下遥感图像理解的各种任务。本文总结了遥感领域弱监督学习的研究进展，包括三种典型的弱监督范式：1）不完全监督，仅对训练数据的子集进行标记； 2）监督不精确，仅给出训练数据的粗粒度标签； 3）监管不准确，所给出的标签并不总是真实的。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了光学遥感图像理解中弱监督学习的研究进展，重点探讨了不完全监督、不精确监督和不准确监督三种范式。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习依赖大量高质量标注数据，但遥感应用中获取此类数据成本高且困难，导致监督信息不完整、不精确或不准确。
AI.method: 总结了遥感图像理解任务下的三种弱监督范式：1) 不完全监督（部分数据标注）；2) 不精确监督（粗粒度标签）；3) 不准确监督（可能存在错误的标签）。
AI.result: 系统梳理了弱监督学习在遥感图像分类、分割、变化检测等任务中的研究进展与方法框架。
AI.conclusion: 弱监督学习能有效缓解遥感领域标注数据不足的问题，为提升遥感图像理解的广度和深度提供了新方向。

search_text: Optical Remote Sensing Image Understanding with Weak Supervision: Concepts, Methods, and Perspectives 弱监督光学遥感图像理解：概念、方法和观点 In recent years, supervised learning has been widely used in various tasks of optical remote sensing image understanding, including remote sensing image classification, pixel-wise segmentation, change detection, and object detection. The methods based on supervised learning need a large amount of high-quality training data and their performance highly depends on the quality of the labels. However, in practical remote sensing applications, it is often expensive and time-consuming to obtain large-scale data sets with high-quality labels, which leads to a lack of sufficient supervised information. In some cases, only coarse-grained labels can be obtained, resulting in the lack of exact supervision. In addition, the supervised information obtained manually may be wrong, resulting in a lack of accurate supervision. Therefore, remote sensing image understanding often faces the problems of incomplete, inexact, and inaccurate supervised information, which will affect the breadth and depth of remote sensing applications. In order to solve the above-mentioned problems, researchers have explored various tasks in remote sensing image understanding under weak supervision. This paper summarizes the research progress of weakly supervised learning in the field of remote sensing, including three typical weakly supervised paradigms: 1) Incomplete supervision, where only a subset of training data is labeled; 2) Inexact supervision, where only coarse-grained labels of training data are given; 3) Inaccurate supervision, where the labels given are not always true on the ground. 近年来，监督学习已广泛应用于光学遥感图像理解的各种任务，包括遥感图像分类、逐像素分割、变化检测和目标检测。基于监督学习的方法需要大量高质量的训练数据，其性能很大程度上取决于标签的质量。然而，在实际的遥感应用中，获取具有高质量标签的大规模数据集通常是昂贵且耗时的，这导致缺乏足够的监督信息。在某些情况下，只能获得粗粒度的标签，导致缺乏精确的监督。另外，人工获取的监管信息可能是错误的，导致监管缺乏准确度。因此，遥感图像理解常常面临监督信息不完整、不精确、不准确的问题，从而影响遥感应用的广度和深度。为了解决上述问题，研究人员探索了弱监督下遥感图像理解的各种任务。本文总结了遥感领域弱监督学习的研究进展，包括三种典型的弱监督范式：1）不完全监督，仅对训练数据的子集进行标记； 2）监督不精确，仅给出训练数据的粗粒度标签； 3）监管不准确，所给出的标签并不总是真实的。 本文综述了光学遥感图像理解中弱监督学习的研究进展，重点探讨了不完全监督、不精确监督和不准确监督三种范式。 Jun Yue,Leyuan Fang,Pedram Ghamisi,Weiying Xie,Jun Li,Jocelyn Chanussot,Antonio J Plaza cs.CV

authors_text: Markus Klar,Florian Fischer,Arthur Fleig,Miroslav Bachinski,Jörg Müller
title: Simulating Interaction Movements via Model Predictive Control
title_zh: 通过模型预测控制模拟交互运动
comment: 34 pages, 17 figures, two appendices. Submitted to TOCHI
comments: 34 pages, 17 figures, two appendices. Submitted to TOCHI
abstract: We present a method to simulate movement in interaction with computers, using Model Predictive Control (MPC). The method starts from understanding interaction from an Optimal Feedback Control (OFC) perspective. We assume that users aim to minimize an internalized cost function, subject to the constraints imposed by the human body and the interactive system. In contrast to previous linear approaches used in HCI, MPC can compute optimal controls for nonlinear systems. This allows us to use state-of-the-art biomechanical models and handle nonlinearities that occur in almost any interactive system. Instead of torque actuation, our model employs second-order muscles acting directly at the joints. We compare three different cost functions and evaluate the simulated trajectories against user movements in a Fitts' Law type pointing study with four different interaction techniques. Our results show that the combination of distance, control, and joint acceleration cost matches individual users' movements best, and predicts movements with an accuracy that is within the between-user variance. To aid HCI researchers and designers, we introduce CFAT, a novel method to identify maximum voluntary torques in joint-actuated models based on experimental data, and give practical advice on how to simulate human movement for different users, interaction techniques, and tasks.
summary: We present a method to simulate movement in interaction with computers, using Model Predictive Control (MPC). The method starts from understanding interaction from an Optimal Feedback Control (OFC) perspective. We assume that users aim to minimize an internalized cost function, subject to the constraints imposed by the human body and the interactive system. In contrast to previous linear approaches used in HCI, MPC can compute optimal controls for nonlinear systems. This allows us to use state-of-the-art biomechanical models and handle nonlinearities that occur in almost any interactive system. Instead of torque actuation, our model employs second-order muscles acting directly at the joints. We compare three different cost functions and evaluate the simulated trajectories against user movements in a Fitts' Law type pointing study with four different interaction techniques. Our results show that the combination of distance, control, and joint acceleration cost matches individual users' movements best, and predicts movements with an accuracy that is within the between-user variance. To aid HCI researchers and designers, we introduce CFAT, a novel method to identify maximum voluntary torques in joint-actuated models based on experimental data, and give practical advice on how to simulate human movement for different users, interaction techniques, and tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用模型预测控制（MPC）来模拟与计算机交互的运动的方法。该方法首先从最优反馈控制 (OFC) 的角度理解交互。我们假设用户的目标是最小化内部成本函数，但受到人体和交互系统的限制。与之前在 HCI 中使用的线性方法相比，MPC 可以计算非线性系统的最优控制。这使我们能够使用最先进的生物力学模型并处理几乎所有交互系统中出现的非线性。我们的模型没有采用扭矩驱动，而是采用直接作用于关节的二阶肌肉。我们比较了三种不同的成本函数，并使用四种不同的交互技术评估了费茨定律类型指向研究中针对用户移动的模拟轨迹。我们的结果表明，距离、控制和关节加速成本的组合与单个用户的运动最匹配，并以用户间方差内的准确度预测运动。为了帮助 HCI 研究人员和设计人员，我们引入了 CFAT，这是一种基于实验数据确定关节驱动模型中最大自愿扭矩的新颖方法，并就如何模拟不同用户的人体运动、交互技术和任务提供实用建议。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模型预测控制（MPC）的方法，用于模拟人机交互中的运动行为。
AI.motivation: 传统线性方法难以处理人机交互中的非线性系统和复杂生物力学特性，需更精确的模拟方法以提升交互设计的科学性。
AI.method: 从最优反馈控制（OFC）视角出发，结合非线性生物力学模型与关节驱动的二阶肌肉模型，通过MPC计算最优控制策略，并比较三种成本函数以优化轨迹模拟。
AI.result: 距离、控制与关节加速度成本组合最贴合用户实际运动，预测精度处于用户间差异范围内；提出CFAT方法用于识别关节驱动模型的最大自愿扭矩。
AI.conclusion: MPC框架有效模拟了人机交互运动，CFAT方法为HCI研究提供了实用工具，未来可拓展至更多交互场景与用户群体。

search_text: Simulating Interaction Movements via Model Predictive Control 通过模型预测控制模拟交互运动 We present a method to simulate movement in interaction with computers, using Model Predictive Control (MPC). The method starts from understanding interaction from an Optimal Feedback Control (OFC) perspective. We assume that users aim to minimize an internalized cost function, subject to the constraints imposed by the human body and the interactive system. In contrast to previous linear approaches used in HCI, MPC can compute optimal controls for nonlinear systems. This allows us to use state-of-the-art biomechanical models and handle nonlinearities that occur in almost any interactive system. Instead of torque actuation, our model employs second-order muscles acting directly at the joints. We compare three different cost functions and evaluate the simulated trajectories against user movements in a Fitts' Law type pointing study with four different interaction techniques. Our results show that the combination of distance, control, and joint acceleration cost matches individual users' movements best, and predicts movements with an accuracy that is within the between-user variance. To aid HCI researchers and designers, we introduce CFAT, a novel method to identify maximum voluntary torques in joint-actuated models based on experimental data, and give practical advice on how to simulate human movement for different users, interaction techniques, and tasks. 我们提出了一种使用模型预测控制（MPC）来模拟与计算机交互的运动的方法。该方法首先从最优反馈控制 (OFC) 的角度理解交互。我们假设用户的目标是最小化内部成本函数，但受到人体和交互系统的限制。与之前在 HCI 中使用的线性方法相比，MPC 可以计算非线性系统的最优控制。这使我们能够使用最先进的生物力学模型并处理几乎所有交互系统中出现的非线性。我们的模型没有采用扭矩驱动，而是采用直接作用于关节的二阶肌肉。我们比较了三种不同的成本函数，并使用四种不同的交互技术评估了费茨定律类型指向研究中针对用户移动的模拟轨迹。我们的结果表明，距离、控制和关节加速成本的组合与单个用户的运动最匹配，并以用户间方差内的准确度预测运动。为了帮助 HCI 研究人员和设计人员，我们引入了 CFAT，这是一种基于实验数据确定关节驱动模型中最大自愿扭矩的新颖方法，并就如何模拟不同用户的人体运动、交互技术和任务提供实用建议。 本文提出一种基于模型预测控制（MPC）的方法，用于模拟人机交互中的运动行为。 Markus Klar,Florian Fischer,Arthur Fleig,Miroslav Bachinski,Jörg Müller cs.HC

title: Representation of short distances in structurally sparse graphs
title_zh: 结构稀疏图中短距离的表示
comment: 33 pages, no figures; v3: Added an improved approximation subject to VC-dimension constraints and an application for the approximation of distance domination and independence number
comments: 33 pages, no figures; v3: Added an improved approximation subject to VC-dimension constraints and an application for the approximation of distance domination and independence number
abstract: A partial orientation $\vec{H}$ of a graph $G$ is a weak $r$-guidance system if for any two vertices at distance at most $r$ in $G$, there exists a shortest path $P$ between them such that $\vec{H}$ directs all but one edge in $P$ towards this edge. In case $\vec{H}$ has bounded maximum outdegree, this gives an efficient representation of shortest paths of length at most $r$ in $G$. We show that graphs from many natural graph classes admit such weak guidance systems, and study the algorithmic aspects of this notion.
summary: A partial orientation $\vec{H}$ of a graph $G$ is a weak $r$-guidance system if for any two vertices at distance at most $r$ in $G$, there exists a shortest path $P$ between them such that $\vec{H}$ directs all but one edge in $P$ towards this edge. In case $\vec{H}$ has bounded maximum outdegree, this gives an efficient representation of shortest paths of length at most $r$ in $G$. We show that graphs from many natural graph classes admit such weak guidance systems, and study the algorithmic aspects of this notion.
abstract_zh: 图 $G$ 的部分方向 $\vec{H}$ 是一个弱 $r$ 引导系统，如果对于 $G$ 中距离不超过 $r$ 的任何两个顶点，它们之间存在一条最短路径 $P$，使得 $\vec{H}$ 将 $P$ 中除一条边以外的所有边都指向该边。如果 $\vec{H}$ 具有有界最大出度，则这给出了 $G$ 中长度至多 $r$ 的最短路径的有效表示。我们证明许多自然图类的图都承认这种弱指导系统，并研究了这个概念的算法方面。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用弱r指导系统高效表示结构稀疏图中短距离的最短路径。
AI.motivation: 在结构稀疏图中，高效表示和处理短距离最短路径对算法设计具有重要意义。
AI.method: 定义弱r指导系统并分析其在多种自然图类中的存在性，同时研究其算法特性。
AI.result: 证明许多自然图类存在有界出度的弱r指导系统，可有效表示长度至多r的最短路径。
AI.conclusion: 弱r指导系统为结构稀疏图的短路径表示提供了理论基础和算法潜力。

search_text: Representation of short distances in structurally sparse graphs 结构稀疏图中短距离的表示 A partial orientation $\vec{H}$ of a graph $G$ is a weak $r$-guidance system if for any two vertices at distance at most $r$ in $G$, there exists a shortest path $P$ between them such that $\vec{H}$ directs all but one edge in $P$ towards this edge. In case $\vec{H}$ has bounded maximum outdegree, this gives an efficient representation of shortest paths of length at most $r$ in $G$. We show that graphs from many natural graph classes admit such weak guidance systems, and study the algorithmic aspects of this notion. 图 $G$ 的部分方向 $\vec{H}$ 是一个弱 $r$ 引导系统，如果对于 $G$ 中距离不超过 $r$ 的任何两个顶点，它们之间存在一条最短路径 $P$，使得 $\vec{H}$ 将 $P$ 中除一条边以外的所有边都指向该边。如果 $\vec{H}$ 具有有界最大出度，则这给出了 $G$ 中长度至多 $r$ 的最短路径的有效表示。我们证明许多自然图类的图都承认这种弱指导系统，并研究了这个概念的算法方面。 本文研究如何利用弱r指导系统高效表示结构稀疏图中短距离的最短路径。 Zdeněk Dvořák cs.DS,math.CO

authors_text: Daniel Omeiza,Sule Anjomshoae,Helena Webb,Marina Jirotka,Lars Kunze
title: From Spoken Thoughts to Automated Driving Commentary: Predicting and Explaining Intelligent Vehicles' Actions
title_zh: 从口头想法到自动驾驶评论：预测和解释智能汽车的行为
comment: Presented in the 2022 IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium
comments: Presented in the 2022 IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium
abstract: In commentary driving, drivers verbalise their observations, assessments and intentions. By speaking out their thoughts, both learning and expert drivers are able to create a better understanding and awareness of their surroundings. In the intelligent vehicle context, automated driving commentary can provide intelligible explanations about driving actions, thereby assisting a driver or an end-user during driving operations in challenging and safety-critical scenarios. In this paper, we conducted a field study in which we deployed a research vehicle in an urban environment to obtain data. While collecting sensor data of the vehicle's surroundings, we obtained driving commentary from a driving instructor using the think-aloud protocol. We analysed the driving commentary and uncovered an explanation style; the driver first announces his observations, announces his plans, and then makes general remarks. He also makes counterfactual comments. We successfully demonstrated how factual and counterfactual natural language explanations that follow this style could be automatically generated using a transparent tree-based approach. Generated explanations for longitudinal actions (e.g., stop and move) were deemed more intelligible and plausible by human judges compared to lateral actions, such as lane changes. We discussed how our approach can be built on in the future to realise more robust and effective explainability for driver assistance as well as partial and conditional automation of driving functions.

abstract_zh: 在评论驾驶中，驾驶员用语言表达他们的观察、评估和意图。通过说出自己的想法，学习型驾驶员和专业驾驶员都能够更好地理解和认识周围的环境。在智能车辆背景下，自动驾驶评论可以提供有关驾驶行为的易于理解的解释，从而在具有挑战性和安全关键场景的驾驶操作期间为驾驶员或最终用户提供帮助。在本文中，我们进行了一项实地研究，在城市环境中部署了研究车辆来获取数据。在收集车辆周围环境的传感器数据时，我们使用有声思考协议从驾驶教练那里获得了驾驶评论。我们分析了驾驶评论并发现了一种解释风格；司机首先宣布他的观察结果，宣布他的计划，然后发表一般性评论。他还发表了反事实的评论。我们成功地演示了如何使用透明的基于树的方法自动生成遵循这种风格的事实和反事实自然语言解释。与横向动作（例如变道）相比，人类法官认为对纵向动作（例如停止和移动）生成的解释更容易理解、更合理。我们讨论了未来如何构建我们的方法，以实现更强大、更有效的驾驶员辅助解释性以及驾驶功能的部分和有条件自动化。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过分析驾驶评论，生成智能车辆在驾驶过程中的可解释性说明，以增强驾驶员对自动驾驶系统的理解和信任。
AI.motivation: 在复杂的驾驶场景中，提供清晰的驾驶说明可以帮助驾驶员更好地理解和信任自动驾驶系统，特别是在安全关键的情况下。
AI.method: 研究团队在城市环境中进行实地研究，采集车辆传感器数据和驾驶教练的口头评论，并通过基于树的透明方法自动生成事实和反事实的自然语言解释。
AI.result: 生成的纵向驾驶动作（如停止和移动）的解释被人类评估为更易理解和合理，而横向动作（如变道）的解释则相对不那么有效。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为未来的驾驶辅助系统和部分自动驾驶功能的可解释性提供了可行的路径，但仍需进一步改进以实现更强大和有效的解释能力。

title: Behind the Machine's Gaze: Neural Networks with Biologically-inspired Constraints Exhibit Human-like Visual Attention
title_zh: 机器凝视的背后：受生物学启发约束的神经网络表现出类似人类的视觉注意力
abstract: By and large, existing computational models of visual attention tacitly assume perfect vision and full access to the stimulus and thereby deviate from foveated biological vision. Moreover, modeling top-down attention is generally reduced to the integration of semantic features without incorporating the signal of a high-level visual tasks that have been shown to partially guide human attention. We propose the Neural Visual Attention (NeVA) algorithm to generate visual scanpaths in a top-down manner. With our method, we explore the ability of neural networks on which we impose a biologically-inspired foveated vision constraint to generate human-like scanpaths without directly training for this objective. The loss of a neural network performing a downstream visual task (i.e., classification or reconstruction) flexibly provides top-down guidance to the scanpath. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised human attention models in terms of similarity to human scanpaths. Additionally, the flexibility of the framework allows to quantitatively investigate the role of different tasks in the generated visual behaviors. Finally, we demonstrate the superiority of the approach in a novel experiment that investigates the utility of scanpaths in real-world applications, where imperfect viewing conditions are given.
summary: By and large, existing computational models of visual attention tacitly assume perfect vision and full access to the stimulus and thereby deviate from foveated biological vision. Moreover, modeling top-down attention is generally reduced to the integration of semantic features without incorporating the signal of a high-level visual tasks that have been shown to partially guide human attention. We propose the Neural Visual Attention (NeVA) algorithm to generate visual scanpaths in a top-down manner. With our method, we explore the ability of neural networks on which we impose a biologically-inspired foveated vision constraint to generate human-like scanpaths without directly training for this objective. The loss of a neural network performing a downstream visual task (i.e., classification or reconstruction) flexibly provides top-down guidance to the scanpath. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised human attention models in terms of similarity to human scanpaths. Additionally, the flexibility of the framework allows to quantitatively investigate the role of different tasks in the generated visual behaviors. Finally, we demonstrate the superiority of the approach in a novel experiment that investigates the utility of scanpaths in real-world applications, where imperfect viewing conditions are given.
abstract_zh: 总的来说，现有的视觉注意力计算模型默认假设完美的视觉和对刺激的完全访问，从而偏离了中心凹的生物视觉。此外，自上而下的注意力建模通常会简化为语义特征的集成，而不会合并已被证明可以部分引导人类注意力的高级视觉任务的信号。我们提出神经视觉注意（NeVA）算法以自上而下的方式生成视觉扫描路径。通过我们的方法，我们探索了神经网络的能力，在该神经网络上施加受生物学启发的注视点视觉约束，以生成类似人类的扫描路径，而无需直接为此目标进行训练。执行下游视觉任务（即分类或重建）的神经网络的丢失灵活地为扫描路径提供了自上而下的指导。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在与人类扫描路径的相似性方面优于最先进的无监督人类注意力模型。此外，该框架的灵活性允许定量研究不同任务在生成的视觉行为中的作用。最后，我们在一项新颖的实验中证明了该方法的优越性，该实验研究了扫描路径在现实世界应用中的实用性，其中给出了不完美的观看条件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为NeVA的算法，通过生物启发的视网膜约束，使神经网络生成类似人类的视觉扫描路径，无需直接训练该目标。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉注意力模型假设完美视觉且忽略生物视网膜特性，同时自上而下注意力建模未结合高层视觉任务信号，导致与人类视觉行为存在偏差。
AI.method: 在神经网络中施加生物启发的视网膜约束，利用下游任务（分类/重建）的损失作为自上而下指导，生成视觉扫描路径。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在生成人类样扫描路径上优于现有模型，且能定量分析不同任务对视觉行为的影响，在真实场景中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 生物启发约束的神经网络能有效模拟人类视觉注意力机制，为实际应用中的视觉行为研究提供新框架。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为NeVA的算法，通过生物启发的视网膜约束，使神经网络生成类似人类的视觉扫描路径，无需直接训练该目标。

Finally, we demonstrate the superiority of the approach in a novel experiment that investigates the utility of scanpaths in real-world applications, where imperfect viewing conditions are given. 总的来说，现有的视觉注意力计算模型默认假设完美的视觉和对刺激的完全访问，从而偏离了中心凹的生物视觉。此外，自上而下的注意力建模通常会简化为语义特征的集成，而不会合并已被证明可以部分引导人类注意力的高级视觉任务的信号。我们提出神经视觉注意（NeVA）算法以自上而下的方式生成视觉扫描路径。通过我们的方法，我们探索了神经网络的能力，在该神经网络上施加受生物学启发的注视点视觉约束，以生成类似人类的扫描路径，而无需直接为此目标进行训练。执行下游视觉任务（即分类或重建）的神经网络的丢失灵活地为扫描路径提供了自上而下的指导。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在与人类扫描路径的相似性方面优于最先进的无监督人类注意力模型。此外，该框架的灵活性允许定量研究不同任务在生成的视觉行为中的作用。最后，我们在一项新颖的实验中证明了该方法的优越性，该实验研究了扫描路径在现实世界应用中的实用性，其中给出了不完美的观看条件。 本文提出一种名为NeVA的算法，通过生物启发的视网膜约束，使神经网络生成类似人类的视觉扫描路径，无需直接训练该目标。 Leo Schwinn,Doina Precup,Björn Eskofier,Dario Zanca cs.CV,cs.AI

title: 4D-MultispectralNet: Multispectral Stereoscopic Disparity Estimation using Human Masks
title_zh: 4D-MultispectralNet：使用人类掩模的多光谱立体视差估计
abstract: Multispectral stereoscopy is an emerging field. A lot of work has been done in classical stereoscopy, but multispectral stereoscopy is not studied as frequently. This type of stereoscopy can be used in autonomous vehicles to complete the information given by RGB cameras. It helps to identify objects in the surroundings when the conditions are more difficult, such as in night scenes. This paper focuses on the RGB-LWIR spectrum. RGB-LWIR stereoscopy has the same challenges as classical stereoscopy, that is occlusions, textureless surfaces and repetitive patterns, plus specific ones related to the different modalities. Finding matches between two spectrums adds another layer of complexity. Color, texture and shapes are more likely to vary from a spectrum to another. To address this additional challenge, this paper focuses on estimating the disparity of people present in a scene. Given the fact that people's shape is captured in both RGB and LWIR, we propose a novel method that uses segmentation masks of the human in both spectrum and than concatenate them to the original images before the first layer of a Siamese Network. This method helps to improve the accuracy, particularly within the one pixel error range.
summary: Multispectral stereoscopy is an emerging field. A lot of work has been done in classical stereoscopy, but multispectral stereoscopy is not studied as frequently. This type of stereoscopy can be used in autonomous vehicles to complete the information given by RGB cameras. It helps to identify objects in the surroundings when the conditions are more difficult, such as in night scenes. This paper focuses on the RGB-LWIR spectrum. RGB-LWIR stereoscopy has the same challenges as classical stereoscopy, that is occlusions, textureless surfaces and repetitive patterns, plus specific ones related to the different modalities. Finding matches between two spectrums adds another layer of complexity. Color, texture and shapes are more likely to vary from a spectrum to another. To address this additional challenge, this paper focuses on estimating the disparity of people present in a scene. Given the fact that people's shape is captured in both RGB and LWIR, we propose a novel method that uses segmentation masks of the human in both spectrum and than concatenate them to the original images before the first layer of a Siamese Network. This method helps to improve the accuracy, particularly within the one pixel error range.
abstract_zh: 多光谱立体视觉是一个新兴领域。在经典立体视觉方面已经做了很多工作，但多光谱立体视觉的研究并不频繁。这种类型的立体视觉可用于自动驾驶汽车，以完成 RGB 摄像头给出的信息。当条件较为困难时（例如在夜景中），它有助于识别周围的物体。本文重点讨论 RGB-LWIR 光谱。 RGB-LWIR 立体视觉与经典立体视觉具有相同的挑战，即遮挡、无纹理表面和重复图案，以及与不同模式相关的特定挑战。寻找两个光谱之间的匹配又增加了一层复杂性。不同光谱的颜色、纹理和形状更有可能有所不同。为了解决这一额外的挑战，本文重点关注估计场景中人员的视差。鉴于人的形状是在 RGB 和 LWIR 中捕获的，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，该方法在两个光谱中使用人体的分割掩模，然后将它们连接到连体网络第一层之前的原始图像。该方法有助于提高精度，特别是在一个像素误差范围内。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于人体掩码的多光谱立体视差估计方法，用于改进RGB-LWIR光谱下的立体匹配精度。
AI.motivation: 多光谱立体视觉在自动驾驶等场景中具有重要价值，但存在光谱间特征差异、遮挡等挑战，传统方法难以有效处理。
AI.method: 通过分割获取RGB和LWIR光谱中的人体掩码，将掩码信息与原始图像拼接后输入Siamese网络，增强人体区域特征一致性。
AI.result: 在1像素误差范围内显著提升视差估计精度，有效应对多光谱间纹理差异和遮挡问题。
AI.conclusion: 融合人体掩码信息可有效提升多光谱立体视觉性能，为复杂环境下的目标识别提供新思路。

title: Exploration of Machine Learning Classification Models Used for Behavioral Biometrics Authentication
title_zh: 用于行为生物识别认证的机器学习分类模型的探索
abstract: Mobile devices have been manufactured and enhanced at growing rates in the past decades. While this growth has significantly evolved the capability of these devices, their security has been falling behind. This contrast in development between capability and security of mobile devices is a significant problem with the sensitive information of the public at risk. Continuing the previous work in this field, this study identifies key Machine Learning algorithms currently being used for behavioral biometric mobile authentication schemes and aims to provide a comprehensive review of these algorithms when used with touch dynamics and phone movement. Throughout this paper the benefits, limitations, and recommendations for future work will be discussed.
summary: Mobile devices have been manufactured and enhanced at growing rates in the past decades. While this growth has significantly evolved the capability of these devices, their security has been falling behind. This contrast in development between capability and security of mobile devices is a significant problem with the sensitive information of the public at risk. Continuing the previous work in this field, this study identifies key Machine Learning algorithms currently being used for behavioral biometric mobile authentication schemes and aims to provide a comprehensive review of these algorithms when used with touch dynamics and phone movement. Throughout this paper the benefits, limitations, and recommendations for future work will be discussed.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几十年里，移动设备的制造和增强速度不断增长。虽然这种增长极大地提高了这些设备的功能，但它们的安全性却一直落后。移动设备的功能和安全性之间的发展对比是一个重大问题，公众的敏感信息面临风险。本研究延续了该领域之前的工作，确定了目前用于行为生物识别移动身份验证方案的关键机器学习算法，旨在对这些算法在触摸动态和手机移动中使用时进行全面审查。本文将讨论好处、局限性以及对未来工作的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了当前用于行为生物特征移动认证的机器学习分类模型，分析其优缺点并提出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 移动设备功能快速发展但安全措施滞后，现有认证方式存在安全隐患，需探索更可靠的行为生物特征认证技术。
AI.method: 通过文献分析法，系统梳理触控动态和手机运动相关的机器学习算法在行为生物特征认证中的应用现状。
AI.result: 总结了主流算法的性能表现，指出数据采集难度、模型泛化能力及隐私保护等现存问题。
AI.conclusion: 需结合多模态数据提升鲁棒性，优化轻量化模型以适应移动端，并加强跨设备认证研究。

authors_text: Victor M. Batlle,J. M. M. Montiel,Juan D. Tardos
title: Photometric single-view dense 3D reconstruction in endoscopy
title_zh: 内窥镜中的光度单视图密集 3D 重建
abstract: Visual SLAM inside the human body will open the way to computer-assisted navigation in endoscopy. However, due to space limitations, medical endoscopes only provide monocular images, leading to systems lacking true scale. In this paper, we exploit the controlled lighting in colonoscopy to achieve the first in-vivo 3D reconstruction of the human colon using photometric stereo on a calibrated monocular endoscope. Our method works in a real medical environment, providing both a suitable in-place calibration procedure and a depth estimation technique adapted to the colon's tubular geometry. We validate our method on simulated colonoscopies, obtaining a mean error of 7% on depth estimation, which is below 3 mm on average. Our qualitative results on the EndoMapper dataset show that the method is able to correctly estimate the colon shape in real human colonoscopies, paving the ground for true-scale monocular SLAM in endoscopy.
summary: Visual SLAM inside the human body will open the way to computer-assisted navigation in endoscopy. However, due to space limitations, medical endoscopes only provide monocular images, leading to systems lacking true scale. In this paper, we exploit the controlled lighting in colonoscopy to achieve the first in-vivo 3D reconstruction of the human colon using photometric stereo on a calibrated monocular endoscope. Our method works in a real medical environment, providing both a suitable in-place calibration procedure and a depth estimation technique adapted to the colon's tubular geometry. We validate our method on simulated colonoscopies, obtaining a mean error of 7% on depth estimation, which is below 3 mm on average. Our qualitative results on the EndoMapper dataset show that the method is able to correctly estimate the colon shape in real human colonoscopies, paving the ground for true-scale monocular SLAM in endoscopy.
abstract_zh: 人体内的视觉 SLAM 将为内窥镜检查中的计算机辅助导航开辟道路。然而，由于空间限制，医用内窥镜只能提供单眼图像，导致系统缺乏真实的比例。在本文中，我们利用结肠镜检查中的受控照明，在校准的单目内窥镜上使用光度立体技术实现了人类结肠的首次体内 3D 重建。我们的方法在真实的医疗环境中工作，提供合适的就地校准程序和适应结肠管状几何形状的深度估计技术。我们在模拟结肠镜检查上验证了我们的方法，获得了 7% 的深度估计平均误差，平均低于 3 毫米。我们对 EndoMapper 数据集的定性结果表明，该方法能够正确估计真实人类结肠镜检查中的结肠形状，为内窥镜检查中的真实尺寸单目 SLAM 铺平了基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于光度立体视觉的单视角密集3D重建方法，用于内窥镜下的人体结肠重建。
AI.motivation: 内窥镜仅提供单目图像导致系统缺乏真实尺度，限制了计算机辅助导航的发展，需解决结肠内真实尺度重建问题。
AI.method: 利用结肠镜检查中的可控光照，结合校准后的单目内窥镜，通过光度立体视觉实现结肠的3D重建，并适应结肠管状几何结构的深度估计。
AI.result: 在模拟结肠镜数据中深度估计均方误差为7%（平均低于3mm），并在EndoMapper数据集上验证了结肠形状的准确重建。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为内窥镜单目SLAM系统提供了真实尺度重建基础，推动计算机辅助导航技术的发展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于光度立体视觉的单视角密集3D重建方法，用于内窥镜下的人体结肠重建。
ai_content.motivation: 内窥镜仅提供单目图像导致系统缺乏真实尺度，限制了计算机辅助导航的发展，需解决结肠内真实尺度重建问题。
ai_content.method: 利用结肠镜检查中的可控光照，结合校准后的单目内窥镜，通过光度立体视觉实现结肠的3D重建，并适应结肠管状几何结构的深度估计。
ai_content.result: 在模拟结肠镜数据中深度估计均方误差为7%（平均低于3mm），并在EndoMapper数据集上验证了结肠形状的准确重建。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为内窥镜单目SLAM系统提供了真实尺度重建基础，推动计算机辅助导航技术的发展。

search_text: Photometric single-view dense 3D reconstruction in endoscopy 内窥镜中的光度单视图密集 3D 重建 Visual SLAM inside the human body will open the way to computer-assisted navigation in endoscopy. However, due to space limitations, medical endoscopes only provide monocular images, leading to systems lacking true scale. In this paper, we exploit the controlled lighting in colonoscopy to achieve the first in-vivo 3D reconstruction of the human colon using photometric stereo on a calibrated monocular endoscope. Our method works in a real medical environment, providing both a suitable in-place calibration procedure and a depth estimation technique adapted to the colon's tubular geometry. We validate our method on simulated colonoscopies, obtaining a mean error of 7% on depth estimation, which is below 3 mm on average. Our qualitative results on the EndoMapper dataset show that the method is able to correctly estimate the colon shape in real human colonoscopies, paving the ground for true-scale monocular SLAM in endoscopy. 人体内的视觉 SLAM 将为内窥镜检查中的计算机辅助导航开辟道路。然而，由于空间限制，医用内窥镜只能提供单眼图像，导致系统缺乏真实的比例。在本文中，我们利用结肠镜检查中的受控照明，在校准的单目内窥镜上使用光度立体技术实现了人类结肠的首次体内 3D 重建。我们的方法在真实的医疗环境中工作，提供合适的就地校准程序和适应结肠管状几何形状的深度估计技术。我们在模拟结肠镜检查上验证了我们的方法，获得了 7% 的深度估计平均误差，平均低于 3 毫米。我们对 EndoMapper 数据集的定性结果表明，该方法能够正确估计真实人类结肠镜检查中的结肠形状，为内窥镜检查中的真实尺寸单目 SLAM 铺平了基础。 本文提出了一种基于光度立体视觉的单视角密集3D重建方法，用于内窥镜下的人体结肠重建。 Victor M. Batlle,J. M. M. Montiel,Juan D. Tardos cs.CV,cs.RO,eess.IV

authors_text: Patrick Hemmer,Max Schemmer,Lara Riefle,Nico Rosellen,Michael Vössing,Niklas Kühl
title: Factors that influence the adoption of human-AI collaboration in clinical decision-making
title_zh: 影响临床决策中人机协作采用的因素
comment: Thirtieth European Conference on Information Systems (ECIS 2022)
comments: Thirtieth European Conference on Information Systems (ECIS 2022)
abstract: Recent developments in Artificial Intelligence (AI) have fueled the emergence of human-AI collaboration, a setting where AI is a coequal partner. Especially in clinical decision-making, it has the potential to improve treatment quality by assisting overworked medical professionals. Even though research has started to investigate the utilization of AI for clinical decision-making, its potential benefits do not imply its adoption by medical professionals. While several studies have started to analyze adoption criteria from a technical perspective, research providing a human-centered perspective with a focus on AI's potential for becoming a coequal team member in the decision-making process remains limited. Therefore, in this work, we identify factors for the adoption of human-AI collaboration by conducting a series of semi-structured interviews with experts in the healthcare domain. We identify six relevant adoption factors and highlight existing tensions between them and effective human-AI collaboration.
summary: Recent developments in Artificial Intelligence (AI) have fueled the emergence of human-AI collaboration, a setting where AI is a coequal partner. Especially in clinical decision-making, it has the potential to improve treatment quality by assisting overworked medical professionals. Even though research has started to investigate the utilization of AI for clinical decision-making, its potential benefits do not imply its adoption by medical professionals. While several studies have started to analyze adoption criteria from a technical perspective, research providing a human-centered perspective with a focus on AI's potential for becoming a coequal team member in the decision-making process remains limited. Therefore, in this work, we identify factors for the adoption of human-AI collaboration by conducting a series of semi-structured interviews with experts in the healthcare domain. We identify six relevant adoption factors and highlight existing tensions between them and effective human-AI collaboration.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 的最新发展推动了人类与人工智能协作的出现，在这种情况下，人工智能是平等的合作伙伴。特别是在临床决策方面，它有可能通过协助过度劳累的医疗专业人员来提高治疗质量。尽管研究已经开始调查人工智能在临床决策中的应用，但它的潜在好处并不意味着它会被医疗专业人员采用。虽然一些研究已经开始从技术角度分析采用标准，但提供以人为本的视角并关注人工智能在决策过程中成为平等团队成员的潜力的研究仍然有限。因此，在这项工作中，我们通过对医疗保健领域的专家进行一系列半结构化访谈来确定采用人机协作的因素。我们确定了六个相关的采用因素，并强调了它们与有效的人类与人工智能协作之间现有的紧张关系。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在识别影响医疗决策中人机协作采纳的关键因素。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI在医疗领域展现出潜力，但其作为协作伙伴的采纳仍面临障碍，现有研究多从技术角度出发，缺乏以人为中心的分析。
AI.method: 通过半结构化访谈医疗领域专家，识别人机协作采纳的相关因素。
AI.result: 确定了六个影响采纳的因素，并揭示了这些因素之间的潜在矛盾。
AI.conclusion: 理解这些因素及其矛盾是推动有效人机协作的关键，需进一步研究以平衡各方需求。

authors_text: Ge Zhu,Jordan Darefsky,Fei Jiang,Anton Selitskiy,Zhiyao Duan
title: Music Source Separation with Generative Flow
title_zh: 使用生成流进行音乐源分离
abstract: Fully-supervised models for source separation are trained on parallel mixture-source data and are currently state-of-the-art. However, such parallel data is often difficult to obtain, and it is cumbersome to adapt trained models to mixtures with new sources. Source-only supervised models, in contrast, only require individual source data for training. In this paper, we first leverage flow-based generators to train individual music source priors and then use these models, along with likelihood-based objectives, to separate music mixtures. We show that in singing voice separation and music separation tasks, our proposed method is competitive with a fully-supervised approach. We also demonstrate that we can flexibly add new types of sources, whereas fully-supervised approaches would require retraining of the entire model.
summary: Fully-supervised models for source separation are trained on parallel mixture-source data and are currently state-of-the-art. However, such parallel data is often difficult to obtain, and it is cumbersome to adapt trained models to mixtures with new sources. Source-only supervised models, in contrast, only require individual source data for training. In this paper, we first leverage flow-based generators to train individual music source priors and then use these models, along with likelihood-based objectives, to separate music mixtures. We show that in singing voice separation and music separation tasks, our proposed method is competitive with a fully-supervised approach. We also demonstrate that we can flexibly add new types of sources, whereas fully-supervised approaches would require retraining of the entire model.
abstract_zh: 用于源分离的完全监督模型是在并行混合源数据上进行训练的，并且是目前最先进的。然而，这种并行数据通常很难获得，并且使经过训练的模型适应新来源的混合物也很麻烦。相比之下，纯源监督模型只需要单独的源数据进行训练。在本文中，我们首先利用基于流的生成器来训练单个音乐源先验，然后使用这些模型以及基于可能性的目标来分离音乐混合物。我们表明，在歌声分离和音乐分离任务中，我们提出的方法与完全监督的方法具有竞争力。我们还证明，我们可以灵活地添加新类型的源，而完全监督的方法则需要重新训练整个模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成流的音乐源分离方法，解决传统全监督模型依赖平行数据及难以适应新声源的问题。
AI.motivation: 全监督源分离模型需依赖难以获取的平行混合-源数据，且无法灵活扩展新声源类型，而源-only模型需解决如何有效建模单声源分布的问题。
AI.method: 利用流模型生成器训练各音乐声源的先验分布，结合似然最大化目标实现混合信号分离，无需平行数据且支持动态添加新声源。
AI.result: 在歌唱语音分离和音乐分离任务中，该方法性能与全监督模型相当，并可灵活扩展新声源类型而无需重新训练整个模型。
AI.conclusion: 生成流方法在保持分离效果的同时，显著提升了模型对新声源的适应能力，为实际应用提供了更灵活的解决方案。

title: AutoField: Automating Feature Selection in Deep Recommender Systems
title_zh: AutoField：深度推荐系统中的自动化特征选择
abstract: Feature quality has an impactful effect on recommendation performance. Thereby, feature selection is a critical process in developing deep learning-based recommender systems. Most existing deep recommender systems, however, focus on designing sophisticated neural networks, while neglecting the feature selection process. Typically, they just feed all possible features into their proposed deep architectures, or select important features manually by human experts. The former leads to non-trivial embedding parameters and extra inference time, while the latter requires plenty of expert knowledge and human labor effort. In this work, we propose an AutoML framework that can adaptively select the essential feature fields in an automatic manner. Specifically, we first design a differentiable controller network, which is capable of automatically adjusting the probability of selecting a particular feature field; then, only selected feature fields are utilized to retrain the deep recommendation model. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework. We conduct further experiments to investigate its properties, including the transferability, key components, and parameter sensitivity.
summary: Feature quality has an impactful effect on recommendation performance. Thereby, feature selection is a critical process in developing deep learning-based recommender systems. Most existing deep recommender systems, however, focus on designing sophisticated neural networks, while neglecting the feature selection process. Typically, they just feed all possible features into their proposed deep architectures, or select important features manually by human experts. The former leads to non-trivial embedding parameters and extra inference time, while the latter requires plenty of expert knowledge and human labor effort. In this work, we propose an AutoML framework that can adaptively select the essential feature fields in an automatic manner. Specifically, we first design a differentiable controller network, which is capable of automatically adjusting the probability of selecting a particular feature field; then, only selected feature fields are utilized to retrain the deep recommendation model. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework. We conduct further experiments to investigate its properties, including the transferability, key components, and parameter sensitivity.
abstract_zh: 特征质量对推荐性能有影响。因此，特征选择是开发基于深度学习的推荐系统的关键过程。然而，大多数现有的深度推荐系统都专注于设计复杂的神经网络，而忽略了特征选择过程。通常，他们只是将所有可能的特征输入到他们提出的深层架构中，或者由人类专家手动选择重要特征。前者会导致重要的嵌入参数和额外的推理时间，而后者则需要大量的专业知识和人力。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个 AutoML 框架，可以自动自适应地选择基本特征字段。具体来说，我们首先设计一个可微控制器网络，它能够自动调整选择特定特征字段的概率；然后，仅使用选定的特征字段来重新训练深度推荐模型。对三个基准数据集的广泛实验证明了我们框架的有效性。我们进行了进一步的实验来研究其特性，包括可转移性、关键组件和参数敏感性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoField框架，通过自动选择关键特征字段优化深度推荐系统。
AI.motivation: 现有深度推荐系统忽视特征选择过程，直接使用全特征或依赖人工选择，导致参数冗余和效率低下。
AI.method: 设计可微分控制器网络自动调整特征字段选择概率，仅使用选定特征重新训练模型。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上验证框架有效性，并分析其可迁移性、关键组件及参数敏感性。
AI.conclusion: AutoField框架能有效提升特征选择效率，为深度推荐系统提供自动化解决方案。

search_text: AutoField: Automating Feature Selection in Deep Recommender Systems AutoField：深度推荐系统中的自动化特征选择 Feature quality has an impactful effect on recommendation performance. Thereby, feature selection is a critical process in developing deep learning-based recommender systems. Most existing deep recommender systems, however, focus on designing sophisticated neural networks, while neglecting the feature selection process. Typically, they just feed all possible features into their proposed deep architectures, or select important features manually by human experts. The former leads to non-trivial embedding parameters and extra inference time, while the latter requires plenty of expert knowledge and human labor effort. In this work, we propose an AutoML framework that can adaptively select the essential feature fields in an automatic manner. Specifically, we first design a differentiable controller network, which is capable of automatically adjusting the probability of selecting a particular feature field; then, only selected feature fields are utilized to retrain the deep recommendation model. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework. We conduct further experiments to investigate its properties, including the transferability, key components, and parameter sensitivity. 特征质量对推荐性能有影响。因此，特征选择是开发基于深度学习的推荐系统的关键过程。然而，大多数现有的深度推荐系统都专注于设计复杂的神经网络，而忽略了特征选择过程。通常，他们只是将所有可能的特征输入到他们提出的深层架构中，或者由人类专家手动选择重要特征。前者会导致重要的嵌入参数和额外的推理时间，而后者则需要大量的专业知识和人力。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个 AutoML 框架，可以自动自适应地选择基本特征字段。具体来说，我们首先设计一个可微控制器网络，它能够自动调整选择特定特征字段的概率；然后，仅使用选定的特征字段来重新训练深度推荐模型。对三个基准数据集的广泛实验证明了我们框架的有效性。我们进行了进一步的实验来研究其特性，包括可转移性、关键组件和参数敏感性。 本文提出AutoField框架，通过自动选择关键特征字段优化深度推荐系统。 Yejing Wang,Xiangyu Zhao,Tong Xu,Xian Wu cs.IR,cs.AI

title: Detection of Tool based Edited Images from Error Level Analysis and Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 根据误差水平分析和卷积神经网络检测基于工具的编辑图像
abstract: Image Forgery is a problem of image forensics and its detection can be leveraged using Deep Learning. In this paper we present an approach for identification of authentic and tampered images done using image editing tools with Error Level Analysis and Convolutional Neural Network. The process is performed on CASIA ITDE v2 dataset and trained for 50 and 100 epochs respectively. The respective accuracies of the training and validation sets are represented using graphs.
summary: Image Forgery is a problem of image forensics and its detection can be leveraged using Deep Learning. In this paper we present an approach for identification of authentic and tampered images done using image editing tools with Error Level Analysis and Convolutional Neural Network. The process is performed on CASIA ITDE v2 dataset and trained for 50 and 100 epochs respectively. The respective accuracies of the training and validation sets are represented using graphs.
abstract_zh: 图像伪造是图像取证的一个问题，可以使用深度学习来检测它。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用具有错误级别分析和卷积神经网络的图像编辑工具来识别真实图像和篡改图像的方法。该过程在 CASIA ITDE v2 数据集上执行，并分别训练 50 和 100 epoch。训练集和验证集各自的准确度用图表表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合错误水平分析（ELA）与卷积神经网络（CNN）的方法，用于检测基于图像编辑工具篡改的图像。
AI.motivation: 随着数字图像编辑工具的普及，图像伪造问题日益严重，传统检测方法存在局限性，亟需基于深度学习的高效检测技术。
AI.method: 通过错误水平分析（ELA）提取图像特征，并结合卷积神经网络（CNN）进行分类训练，分别在50和100个训练周期下使用CASIA ITDE v2数据集进行模型优化。
AI.result: 实验结果通过图表展示了不同训练周期下模型在训练集和验证集上的准确率表现，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明，结合ELA与CNN的方法能有效识别图像编辑工具篡改痕迹，未来可进一步优化模型结构以提升检测精度。

authors_text: Roberto Bigazzi,Federico Landi,Silvia Cascianelli,Marcella Cornia,Lorenzo Baraldi,Rita Cucchiara
title: Embodied Navigation at the Art Gallery
title_zh: 美术馆的实体导航
comment: Accepted by 21st International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP 2021)
comments: Accepted by 21st International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP 2021)
abstract: Embodied agents, trained to explore and navigate indoor photorealistic environments, have achieved impressive results on standard datasets and benchmarks. So far, experiments and evaluations have involved domestic and working scenes like offices, flats, and houses. In this paper, we build and release a new 3D space with unique characteristics: the one of a complete art museum. We name this environment ArtGallery3D (AG3D). Compared with existing 3D scenes, the collected space is ampler, richer in visual features, and provides very sparse occupancy information. This feature is challenging for occupancy-based agents which are usually trained in crowded domestic environments with plenty of occupancy information. Additionally, we annotate the coordinates of the main points of interest inside the museum, such as paintings, statues, and other items. Thanks to this manual process, we deliver a new benchmark for PointGoal navigation inside this new space. Trajectories in this dataset are far more complex and lengthy than existing ground-truth paths for navigation in Gibson and Matterport3D. We carry on extensive experimental evaluation using our new space for evaluation and prove that existing methods hardly adapt to this scenario. As such, we believe that the availability of this 3D model will foster future research and help improve existing solutions.
summary: Embodied agents, trained to explore and navigate indoor photorealistic environments, have achieved impressive results on standard datasets and benchmarks. So far, experiments and evaluations have involved domestic and working scenes like offices, flats, and houses. In this paper, we build and release a new 3D space with unique characteristics: the one of a complete art museum. We name this environment ArtGallery3D (AG3D). Compared with existing 3D scenes, the collected space is ampler, richer in visual features, and provides very sparse occupancy information. This feature is challenging for occupancy-based agents which are usually trained in crowded domestic environments with plenty of occupancy information. Additionally, we annotate the coordinates of the main points of interest inside the museum, such as paintings, statues, and other items. Thanks to this manual process, we deliver a new benchmark for PointGoal navigation inside this new space. Trajectories in this dataset are far more complex and lengthy than existing ground-truth paths for navigation in Gibson and Matterport3D. We carry on extensive experimental evaluation using our new space for evaluation and prove that existing methods hardly adapt to this scenario. As such, we believe that the availability of this 3D model will foster future research and help improve existing solutions.
abstract_zh: 经过训练以探索和导航室内真实环境的实体代理在标准数据集和基准上取得了令人印象深刻的结果。到目前为止，实验和评估已经涉及办公室、公寓和房屋等家庭和工作场景。在本文中，我们构建并发布了一个具有独特特征的新3D空间：一个完整​​的艺术博物馆。我们将此环境命名为 ArtGallery3D (AG3D)。与现有的3D场景相比，收集的空间更充足，视觉特征更丰富，并提供非常稀疏的占用信息。此功能对于基于占用的代理来说具有挑战性，因为这些代理通常在拥挤的家庭环境中接受大量占用信息的训练。此外，我们还标注了博物馆内主要景点的坐标，例如绘画、雕像和其他物品。通过这个手动流程，我们为这个新空间内的 PointGoal 导航提供了新的基准。该数据集中的轨迹比 Gibson 和 Matterport3D 中现有的用于导航的地面实况路径复杂得多且冗长得多。我们利用新的评估空间进行了广泛的实验评估，并证明现有方法很难适应这种情况。因此，我们相信该 3D 模型的可用性将促进未来的研究并有助于改进现有的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个艺术博物馆的3D环境ArtGallery3D（AG3D），并创建了新的PointGoal导航基准测试，以推动具身导航技术在复杂场景中的发展。
AI.motivation: 现有具身导航研究多集中于家庭和办公场景，缺乏对视觉特征丰富且占用信息稀疏的艺术博物馆等场景的探索，限制了技术的适用性。
AI.method: 构建包含稀疏占用信息的AG3D环境，手动标注博物馆内关键兴趣点坐标，设计复杂轨迹的PointGoal导航基准测试。
AI.result: 实验表明现有导航方法在AG3D环境中表现不佳，验证了该场景对现有技术的挑战性。
AI.conclusion: AG3D环境的发布将促进具身导航领域在复杂场景下的研究，并推动现有算法的改进。

search_text: Embodied Navigation at the Art Gallery 美术馆的实体导航 Embodied agents, trained to explore and navigate indoor photorealistic environments, have achieved impressive results on standard datasets and benchmarks. So far, experiments and evaluations have involved domestic and working scenes like offices, flats, and houses. In this paper, we build and release a new 3D space with unique characteristics: the one of a complete art museum. We name this environment ArtGallery3D (AG3D). Compared with existing 3D scenes, the collected space is ampler, richer in visual features, and provides very sparse occupancy information. This feature is challenging for occupancy-based agents which are usually trained in crowded domestic environments with plenty of occupancy information. Additionally, we annotate the coordinates of the main points of interest inside the museum, such as paintings, statues, and other items. Thanks to this manual process, we deliver a new benchmark for PointGoal navigation inside this new space. Trajectories in this dataset are far more complex and lengthy than existing ground-truth paths for navigation in Gibson and Matterport3D. We carry on extensive experimental evaluation using our new space for evaluation and prove that existing methods hardly adapt to this scenario. As such, we believe that the availability of this 3D model will foster future research and help improve existing solutions. 经过训练以探索和导航室内真实环境的实体代理在标准数据集和基准上取得了令人印象深刻的结果。到目前为止，实验和评估已经涉及办公室、公寓和房屋等家庭和工作场景。在本文中，我们构建并发布了一个具有独特特征的新3D空间：一个完整​​的艺术博物馆。我们将此环境命名为 ArtGallery3D (AG3D)。与现有的3D场景相比，收集的空间更充足，视觉特征更丰富，并提供非常稀疏的占用信息。此功能对于基于占用的代理来说具有挑战性，因为这些代理通常在拥挤的家庭环境中接受大量占用信息的训练。此外，我们还标注了博物馆内主要景点的坐标，例如绘画、雕像和其他物品。通过这个手动流程，我们为这个新空间内的 PointGoal 导航提供了新的基准。该数据集中的轨迹比 Gibson 和 Matterport3D 中现有的用于导航的地面实况路径复杂得多且冗长得多。我们利用新的评估空间进行了广泛的实验评估，并证明现有方法很难适应这种情况。因此，我们相信该 3D 模型的可用性将促进未来的研究并有助于改进现有的解决方案。 本文构建了一个艺术博物馆的3D环境ArtGallery3D（AG3D），并创建了新的PointGoal导航基准测试，以推动具身导航技术在复杂场景中的发展。 Roberto Bigazzi,Federico Landi,Silvia Cascianelli,Marcella Cornia,Lorenzo Baraldi,Rita Cucchiara cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.RO

title: Near Optimal Per-Clip Lagrangian Multiplier Prediction in HEVC
title_zh: HEVC 中近乎最优的每剪辑拉格朗日乘子预测
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv: 2204.09055, arXiv:2204.08966
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv: 2204.09055, arXiv:2204.08966
abstract: The majority of internet traffic is video content. This drives the demand for video compression to deliver high quality video at low target bitrates. Optimising the parameters of a video codec for a specific video clip (per-clip optimisation) has been shown to yield significant bitrate savings. In previous work we have shown that per-clip optimisation of the Lagrangian multiplier leads to up to 24% BD-Rate improvement. A key component of these algorithms is modeling the R-D characteristic across the appropriate bitrate range. This is computationally heavy as it usually involves repeated video encodes of the high resolution material at different parameter settings. This work focuses on reducing this computational load by deploying a NN operating on lower bandwidth features. Our system achieves BD-Rate improvement in approximately 90% of a large corpus with comparable results to previous work in direct optimisation.

Our system achieves BD-Rate improvement in approximately 90% of a large corpus with comparable results to previous work in direct optimisation.
abstract_zh: 大部分互联网流量是视频内容。这推动了对视频压缩的需求，以低目标比特率提供高质量视频。优化特定视频剪辑的视频编解码器参数（每个剪辑优化）已被证明可以显着节省比特率。在之前的工作中，我们已经证明，拉格朗日乘数的每个剪辑优化可带来高达 24% 的 BD 速率提升。这些算法的一个关键组成部分是在适当的比特率范围内对 R-D 特性进行建模。这计算量很大，因为它通常涉及在不同参数设置下对高分辨率材料进行重复视频编码。这项工作的重点是通过部署在较低带宽特征上运行的神经网络来减少计算负载。我们的系统在大约 90% 的大型语料库中实现了 BD-Rate 改进，其结果与之前的直接优化工作相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的低带宽特征预测方法，用于HEVC编码中每个视频片段的拉格朗日乘数优化，以提升视频压缩效率。
AI.motivation: 互联网视频流量占比高，需通过优化视频编码参数降低比特率。传统逐片段优化拉格朗日乘数虽能提升24%的BD-Rate，但依赖重复编码导致计算量大。
AI.method: 设计神经网络模型，利用低带宽特征替代传统重复编码，直接预测最优拉格朗日乘数，降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在大规模数据集上实现约90%的BD-Rate提升，效果与直接优化方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效降低计算负载，同时保持优化性能，为实际应用中逐片段编码优化提供可行方案。

search_text: Near Optimal Per-Clip Lagrangian Multiplier Prediction in HEVC HEVC 中近乎最优的每剪辑拉格朗日乘子预测 The majority of internet traffic is video content. This drives the demand for video compression to deliver high quality video at low target bitrates. Optimising the parameters of a video codec for a specific video clip (per-clip optimisation) has been shown to yield significant bitrate savings. In previous work we have shown that per-clip optimisation of the Lagrangian multiplier leads to up to 24% BD-Rate improvement. A key component of these algorithms is modeling the R-D characteristic across the appropriate bitrate range. This is computationally heavy as it usually involves repeated video encodes of the high resolution material at different parameter settings. This work focuses on reducing this computational load by deploying a NN operating on lower bandwidth features. Our system achieves BD-Rate improvement in approximately 90% of a large corpus with comparable results to previous work in direct optimisation. 大部分互联网流量是视频内容。这推动了对视频压缩的需求，以低目标比特率提供高质量视频。优化特定视频剪辑的视频编解码器参数（每个剪辑优化）已被证明可以显着节省比特率。在之前的工作中，我们已经证明，拉格朗日乘数的每个剪辑优化可带来高达 24% 的 BD 速率提升。这些算法的一个关键组成部分是在适当的比特率范围内对 R-D 特性进行建模。这计算量很大，因为它通常涉及在不同参数设置下对高分辨率材料进行重复视频编码。这项工作的重点是通过部署在较低带宽特征上运行的神经网络来减少计算负载。我们的系统在大约 90% 的大型语料库中实现了 BD-Rate 改进，其结果与之前的直接优化工作相当。 本文提出一种基于神经网络的低带宽特征预测方法，用于HEVC编码中每个视频片段的拉格朗日乘数优化，以提升视频压缩效率。 Daniel J Ringis,François Pitié,Anil Kokaram eess.IV,cs.MM

title: Per-clip and per-bitrate adaptation of the Lagrangian multiplier in video coding
title_zh: 视频编码中拉格朗日乘数的每剪辑和每比特率自适应
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.09056, arXiv:2204.08966
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.09056, arXiv:2204.08966
abstract: In the past ten years there have been significant developments in optimization of transcoding parameters on a per-clip rather than per-genre basis. In our recent work we have presented per-clip optimization for the Lagrangian multiplier in Rate controlled compression, which yielded BD-Rate improvements of approximately 2\% across a corpus of videos using HEVC. However, in a video streaming application, the focus is on optimizing the rate/distortion tradeoff at a particular bitrate and not on average across a range of performance. We observed in previous work that a particular multiplier might give BD rate improvements over a certain range of bitrates, but not the entire range. Using different parameters across the range would improve gains overall. Therefore here we present a framework for choosing the best Lagrangian multiplier on a per-operating point basis across a range of bitrates. In effect, we are trying to find the para-optimal gain across bitrate and distortion for a single clip. In the experiments presented we employ direct optimization techniques to estimate this Lagrangian parameter path approximately 2,000 video clips. The clips are primarily from the YouTube-UGC dataset. We optimize both for bitrate savings as well as distortion metrics (PSNR, SSIM).
summary: In the past ten years there have been significant developments in optimization of transcoding parameters on a per-clip rather than per-genre basis. In our recent work we have presented per-clip optimization for the Lagrangian multiplier in Rate controlled compression, which yielded BD-Rate improvements of approximately 2\% across a corpus of videos using HEVC. However, in a video streaming application, the focus is on optimizing the rate/distortion tradeoff at a particular bitrate and not on average across a range of performance. We observed in previous work that a particular multiplier might give BD rate improvements over a certain range of bitrates, but not the entire range. Using different parameters across the range would improve gains overall. Therefore here we present a framework for choosing the best Lagrangian multiplier on a per-operating point basis across a range of bitrates. In effect, we are trying to find the para-optimal gain across bitrate and distortion for a single clip. In the experiments presented we employ direct optimization techniques to estimate this Lagrangian parameter path approximately 2,000 video clips. The clips are primarily from the YouTube-UGC dataset. We optimize both for bitrate savings as well as distortion metrics (PSNR, SSIM).
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，在每个剪辑而不是每个流派的基础上优化转码参数方面取得了重大进展。在我们最近的工作中，我们提出了速率控制压缩中拉格朗日乘数的每个剪辑优化，这使得使用 HEVC 的视频语料库的 BD 速率提高了大约 2%。然而，在视频流应用中，重点是优化特定比特率下的速率/失真权衡，而不是在一系列性能上进行平均。我们在之前的工作中观察到，特定的乘数可能会在一定的比特率范围内提高 BD 速率，但不能提高整个范围。在整个范围内使用不同的参数将提高整体增益。因此，我们在这里提出了一个框架，用于在一系列比特率范围内基于每个操作点选择最佳拉格朗日乘数。实际上，我们试图找到单个剪辑的比特率和失真的次优增益。在所提出的实验中，我们采用直接优化技术来估计大约 2,000 个视频剪辑的拉格朗日参数路径。这些剪辑主要来自 YouTube-UGC 数据集。我们针对比特率节省和失真指标（PSNR、SSIM）进行了优化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对单个视频片段和不同码率的拉格朗日乘数自适应优化框架，以提升视频编码的率失真性能。
AI.motivation: 传统基于视频类型而非单个片段的拉格朗日乘数优化方法无法满足视频流媒体中特定码率下的率失真优化需求，且固定参数难以覆盖全码率范围的性能提升。
AI.method: 通过直接优化技术，在约2000个YouTube-UGC数据集视频片段上估计拉格朗日参数路径，针对不同码率范围动态调整乘数，同时优化码率节省和失真指标（PSNR/SSIM）。
AI.result: 在HEVC编码下实现约2%的BD-Rate改进，验证了跨码率范围参数自适应调整的总体性能增益。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过单片段多码率的拉格朗日乘数优化，有效提升了视频压缩效率，证明了动态参数调整在率失真优化中的优势。

title: Sampling Strategies for Static Powergrid Models
title_zh: 静态电网模型的采样策略
abstract: Machine learning and computational intelligence technologies gain more and more popularity as possible solution for issues related to the power grid. One of these issues, the power flow calculation, is an iterative method to compute the voltage magnitudes of the power grid's buses from power values. Machine learning and, especially, artificial neural networks were successfully used as surrogates for the power flow calculation. Artificial neural networks highly rely on the quality and size of the training data, but this aspect of the process is apparently often neglected in the works we found. However, since the availability of high quality historical data for power grids is limited, we propose the Correlation Sampling algorithm. We show that this approach is able to cover a larger area of the sampling space compared to different random sampling algorithms from the literature and a copula-based approach, while at the same time inter-dependencies of the inputs are taken into account, which, from the other algorithms, only the copula-based approach does.
summary: Machine learning and computational intelligence technologies gain more and more popularity as possible solution for issues related to the power grid. One of these issues, the power flow calculation, is an iterative method to compute the voltage magnitudes of the power grid's buses from power values. Machine learning and, especially, artificial neural networks were successfully used as surrogates for the power flow calculation. Artificial neural networks highly rely on the quality and size of the training data, but this aspect of the process is apparently often neglected in the works we found. However, since the availability of high quality historical data for power grids is limited, we propose the Correlation Sampling algorithm. We show that this approach is able to cover a larger area of the sampling space compared to different random sampling algorithms from the literature and a copula-based approach, while at the same time inter-dependencies of the inputs are taken into account, which, from the other algorithms, only the copula-based approach does.
abstract_zh: 机器学习和计算智能技术作为电网相关问题的可能解决方案越来越受欢迎。其中一个问题是潮流计算，它是一种根据功率值计算电网总线电压幅度的迭代方法。机器学习，尤其是人工神经网络，已成功用作潮流计算的替代方法。人工神经网络高度依赖于训练数据的质量和大小，但在我们发现的工作中，过程的这一方面显然经常被忽视。然而，由于电网高质量历史数据的可用性有限，我们提出了相关采样算法。我们表明，与文献中的不同随机采样算法和基于 copula 的方法相比，这种方法能够覆盖更大的采样空间区域，同时考虑输入的相互依赖性，而与其他算法相比，只有基于 copula 的方法才这样做。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为相关采样的算法，用于改进静态电网模型中机器学习训练数据的生成策略。
AI.motivation: 电网潮流计算依赖高质量训练数据，但历史数据有限且现有采样方法未能有效捕捉输入变量间的依赖关系。
AI.method: 设计基于变量相关性的采样算法，并与随机采样及copula方法进行对比实验。
AI.result: 相关采样算法在覆盖采样空间范围上优于对比方法，且有效保留了输入变量间的相互依赖性。
AI.conclusion: 相关采样算法能更全面地表征电网数据特征，为电力系统机器学习模型提供更优质的训练数据支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为相关采样的算法，用于改进静态电网模型中机器学习训练数据的生成策略。
ai_content.motivation: 电网潮流计算依赖高质量训练数据，但历史数据有限且现有采样方法未能有效捕捉输入变量间的依赖关系。
ai_content.method: 设计基于变量相关性的采样算法，并与随机采样及copula方法进行对比实验。
ai_content.result: 相关采样算法在覆盖采样空间范围上优于对比方法，且有效保留了输入变量间的相互依赖性。
ai_content.conclusion: 相关采样算法能更全面地表征电网数据特征，为电力系统机器学习模型提供更优质的训练数据支持。

search_text: Sampling Strategies for Static Powergrid Models 静态电网模型的采样策略 Machine learning and computational intelligence technologies gain more and more popularity as possible solution for issues related to the power grid. One of these issues, the power flow calculation, is an iterative method to compute the voltage magnitudes of the power grid's buses from power values. Machine learning and, especially, artificial neural networks were successfully used as surrogates for the power flow calculation. Artificial neural networks highly rely on the quality and size of the training data, but this aspect of the process is apparently often neglected in the works we found. However, since the availability of high quality historical data for power grids is limited, we propose the Correlation Sampling algorithm. We show that this approach is able to cover a larger area of the sampling space compared to different random sampling algorithms from the literature and a copula-based approach, while at the same time inter-dependencies of the inputs are taken into account, which, from the other algorithms, only the copula-based approach does. 机器学习和计算智能技术作为电网相关问题的可能解决方案越来越受欢迎。其中一个问题是潮流计算，它是一种根据功率值计算电网总线电压幅度的迭代方法。机器学习，尤其是人工神经网络，已成功用作潮流计算的替代方法。人工神经网络高度依赖于训练数据的质量和大小，但在我们发现的工作中，过程的这一方面显然经常被忽视。然而，由于电网高质量历史数据的可用性有限，我们提出了相关采样算法。我们表明，与文献中的不同随机采样算法和基于 copula 的方法相比，这种方法能够覆盖更大的采样空间区域，同时考虑输入的相互依赖性，而与其他算法相比，只有基于 copula 的方法才这样做。 本文提出一种名为相关采样的算法，用于改进静态电网模型中机器学习训练数据的生成策略。 Stephan Balduin,Eric MSP Veith,Sebastian Lehnhoff cs.LG,cs.AI

title: PR-DAD: Phase Retrieval Using Deep Auto-Decoders
title_zh: PR-DAD：使用深度自动解码器进行相位检索
abstract: Phase retrieval is a well known ill-posed inverse problem where one tries to recover images given only the magnitude values of their Fourier transform as input. In recent years, new algorithms based on deep learning have been proposed, providing breakthrough results that surpass the results of the classical methods. In this work we provide a novel deep learning architecture PR-DAD (Phase Retrieval Using Deep Auto- Decoders), whose components are carefully designed based on mathematical modeling of the phase retrieval problem. The architecture provides experimental results that surpass all current results.
summary: Phase retrieval is a well known ill-posed inverse problem where one tries to recover images given only the magnitude values of their Fourier transform as input. In recent years, new algorithms based on deep learning have been proposed, providing breakthrough results that surpass the results of the classical methods. In this work we provide a novel deep learning architecture PR-DAD (Phase Retrieval Using Deep Auto- Decoders), whose components are carefully designed based on mathematical modeling of the phase retrieval problem. The architecture provides experimental results that surpass all current results.
abstract_zh: 相位检索是一种众所周知的不适定逆问题，其中仅以傅里叶变换的幅度值作为输入来尝试恢复图像。近年来，基于深度学习的新算法被提出，提供了超越经典方法结果的突破性结果。在这项工作中，我们提供了一种新颖的深度学习架构 PR-DAD（使用深度自动解码器的相位检索），其组件是根据相位检索问题的数学建模精心设计的。该架构提供了超越当前所有结果的实验​​结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度自动解码器的相位恢复新方法PR-DAD，通过数学建模设计网络结构以提升图像恢复效果。
AI.motivation: 相位恢复作为病态逆问题，传统方法存在局限性，而近期深度学习方法虽有突破但仍需更优架构设计。
AI.method: 构建PR-DAD架构，结合相位恢复的数学特性设计网络组件，利用深度自动编码器进行特征学习与重构。
AI.result: 实验表明PR-DAD在多个基准测试中超越现有所有相位恢复算法的性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 将数学建模与深度学习结合可有效解决相位恢复问题，PR-DAD验证了该方向的优越性。

authors_text: Dung Nguyen,Phuoc Nguyen,Hung Le,Kien Do,Svetha Venkatesh,Truyen Tran
title: Learning Theory of Mind via Dynamic Traits Attribution
title_zh: 通过动态特质归因学习心理理论
abstract: Machine learning of Theory of Mind (ToM) is essential to build social agents that co-live with humans and other agents. This capacity, once acquired, will help machines infer the mental states of others from observed contextual action trajectories, enabling future prediction of goals, intention, actions and successor representations. The underlying mechanism for such a prediction remains unclear, however. Inspired by the observation that humans often infer the character traits of others, then use it to explain behaviour, we propose a new neural ToM architecture that learns to generate a latent trait vector of an actor from the past trajectories. This trait vector then multiplicatively modulates the prediction mechanism via a `fast weights' scheme in the prediction neural network, which reads the current context and predicts the behaviour. We empirically show that the fast weights provide a good inductive bias to model the character traits of agents and hence improves mindreading ability. On the indirect assessment of false-belief understanding, the new ToM model enables more efficient helping behaviours.
summary: Machine learning of Theory of Mind (ToM) is essential to build social agents that co-live with humans and other agents. This capacity, once acquired, will help machines infer the mental states of others from observed contextual action trajectories, enabling future prediction of goals, intention, actions and successor representations. The underlying mechanism for such a prediction remains unclear, however. Inspired by the observation that humans often infer the character traits of others, then use it to explain behaviour, we propose a new neural ToM architecture that learns to generate a latent trait vector of an actor from the past trajectories. This trait vector then multiplicatively modulates the prediction mechanism via a `fast weights' scheme in the prediction neural network, which reads the current context and predicts the behaviour. We empirically show that the fast weights provide a good inductive bias to model the character traits of agents and hence improves mindreading ability. On the indirect assessment of false-belief understanding, the new ToM model enables more efficient helping behaviours.
abstract_zh: 心智理论 (ToM) 的机器学习对于构建与人类和其他智能体共存的社会智能体至关重要。这种能力一旦获得，将帮助机器从观察到的情境行动轨迹推断他人的心理状态，从而能够预测未来的目标、意图、行动和后续表征。然而，这种预测的根本机制仍不清楚。受到人类经常推断他人性格特征，然后用它来解释行为的观察的启发，我们提出了一种新的神经 ToM 架构，可以学习从过去的轨迹生成演员的潜在特征向量。然后，该特征向量通过预测神经网络中的“快速权重”方案以乘法方式调制预测机制，该方案读取当前上下文并预测行为。我们凭经验表明，快速权重为建模代理的性格特征提供了良好的归纳偏差，从而提高了读心能力。在对错误信念理解的间接评估上，新的 ToM 模型可以实现更有效的帮助行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的神经网络架构，通过动态学习他人行为轨迹中的潜在特质向量，提升机器的心智理论（ToM）能力，从而更准确预测他人行为和意图。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习方法难以有效建模他人心理状态，而人类常通过推断他人性格特质来解释行为，因此需探索基于动态特质归因的ToM学习机制。
AI.method: 设计神经网络架构，从历史行为轨迹生成潜在特质向量，并通过'快速权重'机制将其乘法调制到预测网络中，实现上下文感知的行为预测。
AI.result: 实验表明，快速权重机制有效建模了智能体性格特质，显著提升虚假信念理解任务中的帮助行为效率。
AI.conclusion: 动态特质归因与快速权重结合的ToM模型，为机器理解他人心理状态提供了新范式，推动了更自然的社会交互能力发展。

title: SDGCCA: Supervised Deep Generalized Canonical Correlation Analysis for Multi-omics Integration
title_zh: SDGCCA：多组学集成的监督深度广义典型相关分析
abstract: Integration of multi-omics data provides opportunities for revealing biological mechanisms related to certain phenotypes. We propose a novel method of multi-omics integration called supervised deep generalized canonical correlation analysis (SDGCCA) for modeling correlation structures between nonlinear multi-omics manifolds, aiming for improving classification of phenotypes and revealing biomarkers related to phenotypes. SDGCCA addresses the limitations of other canonical correlation analysis (CCA)-based models (e.g., deep CCA, deep generalized CCA) by considering complex/nonlinear cross-data correlations and discriminating phenotype groups. Although there are a few methods for nonlinear CCA projections for discriminant purposes of phenotypes, they only consider two views. On the other hand, SDGCCA is the nonlinear multiview CCA projection method for discrimination. When we applied SDGCCA to prediction of patients of Alzheimer's disease (AD) and discrimination of early- and late-stage cancers, it outperformed other CCA-based methods and other supervised methods. In addition, we demonstrate that SDGCCA can be used for feature selection to identify important multi-omics biomarkers. In the application on AD data, SDGCCA identified clusters of genes in multi-omics data, which are well known to be associated with AD.
summary: Integration of multi-omics data provides opportunities for revealing biological mechanisms related to certain phenotypes. We propose a novel method of multi-omics integration called supervised deep generalized canonical correlation analysis (SDGCCA) for modeling correlation structures between nonlinear multi-omics manifolds, aiming for improving classification of phenotypes and revealing biomarkers related to phenotypes. SDGCCA addresses the limitations of other canonical correlation analysis (CCA)-based models (e.g., deep CCA, deep generalized CCA) by considering complex/nonlinear cross-data correlations and discriminating phenotype groups. Although there are a few methods for nonlinear CCA projections for discriminant purposes of phenotypes, they only consider two views. On the other hand, SDGCCA is the nonlinear multiview CCA projection method for discrimination. When we applied SDGCCA to prediction of patients of Alzheimer's disease (AD) and discrimination of early- and late-stage cancers, it outperformed other CCA-based methods and other supervised methods. In addition, we demonstrate that SDGCCA can be used for feature selection to identify important multi-omics biomarkers. In the application on AD data, SDGCCA identified clusters of genes in multi-omics data, which are well known to be associated with AD.
abstract_zh: 多组学数据的整合为揭示与某些表型相关的生物学机制提供了机会。我们提出了一种称为监督深度广义典型相关分析（SDGCCA）的多组学集成新方法，用于对非线性多组学流形之间的相关结构进行建模，旨在改进表型的分类并揭示与表型相关的生物标志物。 SDGCCA 通过考虑复杂/非线性交叉数据相关性和区分表型组，解决了其他基于典型相关分析 (CCA) 的模型（例如深度 CCA、深度广义 CCA）的局限性。尽管有一些用于表型判别目的的非线性 CCA 投影方法，但它们只考虑两种视图。另一方面，SDGCCA是用于区分的非线性多视图CCA投影方法。当我们将 SDGCCA 应用于预测阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 患者以及区分早期和晚期癌症时，它优于其他基于 CCA 的方法和其他监督方法。此外，我们证明 SDGCCA 可用于特征选择，以识别重要的多组学生物标志物。在 AD 数据的应用中，SDGCCA 识别了多组学数据中的基因簇，这些基因簇众所周知与 AD 相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SDGCCA的监督深度广义典型相关分析方法，用于整合多组学数据以提高表型分类和发现与表型相关的生物标志物。
AI.motivation: 现有基于典型相关分析（CCA）的方法在处理非线性跨数据相关性和多视图数据时存在局限性，难以有效区分表型组并进行多组学整合。
AI.method: SDGCCA通过考虑复杂的非线性跨数据相关性及表型组的区分性，构建了一种非线性多视图CCA投影方法，结合深度学习建模多组学流形间的相关结构。
AI.result: 在阿尔茨海默病患者预测和癌症早期/晚期区分任务中，SDGCCA优于其他CCA-based方法及监督方法，并能通过特征选择识别多组学生物标志物（如与AD相关的基因簇）。
AI.conclusion: SDGCCA为多组学数据整合提供了有效工具，能够提升表型分类性能并揭示潜在生物标志物，具有广泛的应用前景。
