search_text: SDGCCA: Supervised Deep Generalized Canonical Correlation Analysis for Multi-omics Integration SDGCCA：多组学集成的监督深度广义典型相关分析 Integration of multi-omics data provides opportunities for revealing biological mechanisms related to certain phenotypes. We propose a novel method of multi-omics integration called supervised deep generalized canonical correlation analysis (SDGCCA) for modeling correlation structures between nonlinear multi-omics manifolds, aiming for improving classification of phenotypes and revealing biomarkers related to phenotypes. SDGCCA addresses the limitations of other canonical correlation analysis (CCA)-based models (e.g., deep CCA, deep generalized CCA) by considering complex/nonlinear cross-data correlations and discriminating phenotype groups. Although there are a few methods for nonlinear CCA projections for discriminant purposes of phenotypes, they only consider two views. On the other hand, SDGCCA is the nonlinear multiview CCA projection method for discrimination. When we applied SDGCCA to prediction of patients of Alzheimer's disease (AD) and discrimination of early- and late-stage cancers, it outperformed other CCA-based methods and other supervised methods. In addition, we demonstrate that SDGCCA can be used for feature selection to identify important multi-omics biomarkers. In the application on AD data, SDGCCA identified clusters of genes in multi-omics data, which are well known to be associated with AD. 多组学数据的整合为揭示与某些表型相关的生物学机制提供了机会。我们提出了一种称为监督深度广义典型相关分析（SDGCCA）的多组学集成新方法，用于对非线性多组学流形之间的相关结构进行建模，旨在改进表型的分类并揭示与表型相关的生物标志物。 SDGCCA 通过考虑复杂/非线性交叉数据相关性和区分表型组，解决了其他基于典型相关分析 (CCA) 的模型（例如深度 CCA、深度广义 CCA）的局限性。尽管有一些用于表型判别目的的非线性 CCA 投影方法，但它们只考虑两种视图。另一方面，SDGCCA是用于区分的非线性多视图CCA投影方法。当我们将 SDGCCA 应用于预测阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 患者以及区分早期和晚期癌症时，它优于其他基于 CCA 的方法和其他监督方法。此外，我们证明 SDGCCA 可用于特征选择，以识别重要的多组学生物标志物。在 AD 数据的应用中，SDGCCA 识别了多组学数据中的基因簇，这些基因簇众所周知与 AD 相关。 本文提出了一种名为SDGCCA的监督深度广义典型相关分析方法，用于整合多组学数据以提高表型分类和发现与表型相关的生物标志物。 Jeongyoung Hwang,Sehwan Moon,Hyunju Lee q-bio.QM,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Sam L. Polk,Aland H. Y. Chan,Kangning Cui,Robert J. Plemmons,David A. Coomes,James M. Murphy
title: Unsupervised detection of ash dieback disease (Hymenoscyphus fraxineus) using diffusion-based hyperspectral image clustering
title_zh: 使用基于扩散的高光谱图像聚类对白蜡树顶枯病（Hymenoscyphus fraxineus）进行无监督检测
comment: (6 pages, 2 figures). Accepted to Proceedings of IEEE IGARSS 2022
comments: (6 pages, 2 figures). Accepted to Proceedings of IEEE IGARSS 2022
abstract: Ash dieback (Hymenoscyphus fraxineus) is an introduced fungal disease that is causing the widespread death of ash trees across Europe. Remote sensing hyperspectral images encode rich structure that has been exploited for the detection of dieback disease in ash trees using supervised machine learning techniques. However, to understand the state of forest health at landscape-scale, accurate unsupervised approaches are needed. This article investigates the use of the unsupervised Diffusion and VCA-Assisted Image Segmentation (D-VIS) clustering algorithm for the detection of ash dieback disease in a forest site near Cambridge, United Kingdom. The unsupervised clustering presented in this work has high overlap with the supervised classification of previous work on this scene (overall accuracy = 71%). Thus, unsupervised learning may be used for the remote detection of ash dieback disease without the need for expert labeling.
summary: Ash dieback (Hymenoscyphus fraxineus) is an introduced fungal disease that is causing the widespread death of ash trees across Europe. Remote sensing hyperspectral images encode rich structure that has been exploited for the detection of dieback disease in ash trees using supervised machine learning techniques. However, to understand the state of forest health at landscape-scale, accurate unsupervised approaches are needed. This article investigates the use of the unsupervised Diffusion and VCA-Assisted Image Segmentation (D-VIS) clustering algorithm for the detection of ash dieback disease in a forest site near Cambridge, United Kingdom. The unsupervised clustering presented in this work has high overlap with the supervised classification of previous work on this scene (overall accuracy = 71%). Thus, unsupervised learning may be used for the remote detection of ash dieback disease without the need for expert labeling.
abstract_zh: 白蜡树顶枯病（Hymenoscyphus fraxineus）是一种引入的真菌病，导致整个欧洲的白蜡树大面积死亡。遥感高光谱图像编码丰富的结构，已用于使用监督机器学习技术检测白蜡树的枯萎病。然而，为了了解景观尺度的森林健康状况，需要准确的无监督方法。本文研究了如何使用无监督扩散和 VCA 辅助图像分割 (D-VIS) 聚类算法来检测英国剑桥附近森林中的白蜡枯死病。这项工作中提出的无监督聚类与该场景上以前工作的监督分类有很高的重叠度（总体准确率 = 71%）。因此，无监督学习可用于远程检测白蜡树顶枯病，而不需要专家标记。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于扩散模型的无监督聚类方法，用于检测山毛榉枯萎病
AI.motivation: 传统监督方法依赖专家标注，难以大规模应用，需无监督方法实现大范围森林健康监测
AI.method: 采用无监督D-VIS聚类算法，结合扩散模型与VCA辅助图像分割技术
AI.result: 无监督方法在剑桥森林测试中达到71%总体准确率，与监督分类结果高度重叠
AI.conclusion: 无监督学习可有效检测山毛榉枯萎病，无需专家标注，适合大范围森林健康监测

title: Massively Parallel Computation on Embedded Planar Graphs
title_zh: 嵌入式平面图上的大规模并行计算
abstract: Many of the classic graph problems cannot be solved in the Massively Parallel Computation setting (MPC) with strongly sublinear space per machine and $o(\log n)$ rounds, unless the 1-vs-2 cycles conjecture is false. This is true even on planar graphs. Such problems include, for example, counting connected components, bipartition, minimum spanning tree problem, (approximate) shortest paths, and (approximate) diameter/radius. In this paper, we show a way to get around this limitation. Specifically, we show that if we have a ``nice'' (for example, straight-line) embedding of the input graph, all the mentioned problems can be solved with $O(n^{2/3+ε})$ space per machine in $O(1)$ rounds. In conjunction with existing algorithms for computing the Delaunay triangulation, our results imply an MPC algorithm for exact Euclidean minimum spanning thee (EMST) that uses $O(n^{2/3 + ε})$ space per machine and finishes in $O(1)$ rounds. This is the first improvement over a straightforward use of the standard Borůvka's algorithm with the Dauleanay triangulation algorithm of Goodrich [SODA 1997] which results in $Θ(\log n)$ rounds. This also partially negatively answers a question of Andoni, Nikolov, Onak, and Yaroslavtsev [STOC 2014], asking for lower bounds for exact EMST. We extend our algorithms to work with embeddings consisting of curves that are not ``too squiggly" (as formalized by the total absolute curvature). We do this via a new lemma which we believe is of independent interest and could be used to parameterize other geometric problems by the total absolute curvature. We also state several open problems regarding massively parallel computation on planar graphs.
summary: Many of the classic graph problems cannot be solved in the Massively Parallel Computation setting (MPC) with strongly sublinear space per machine and $o(\log n)$ rounds, unless the 1-vs-2 cycles conjecture is false. This is true even on planar graphs. Such problems include, for example, counting connected components, bipartition, minimum spanning tree problem, (approximate) shortest paths, and (approximate) diameter/radius. In this paper, we show a way to get around this limitation. Specifically, we show that if we have a ``nice'' (for example, straight-line) embedding of the input graph, all the mentioned problems can be solved with $O(n^{2/3+ε})$ space per machine in $O(1)$ rounds. In conjunction with existing algorithms for computing the Delaunay triangulation, our results imply an MPC algorithm for exact Euclidean minimum spanning thee (EMST) that uses $O(n^{2/3 + ε})$ space per machine and finishes in $O(1)$ rounds. This is the first improvement over a straightforward use of the standard Borůvka's algorithm with the Dauleanay triangulation algorithm of Goodrich [SODA 1997] which results in $Θ(\log n)$ rounds. This also partially negatively answers a question of Andoni, Nikolov, Onak, and Yaroslavtsev [STOC 2014], asking for lower bounds for exact EMST. We extend our algorithms to work with embeddings consisting of curves that are not ``too squiggly" (as formalized by the total absolute curvature). We do this via a new lemma which we believe is of independent interest and could be used to parameterize other geometric problems by the total absolute curvature. We also state several open problems regarding massively parallel computation on planar graphs.
abstract_zh: 许多经典的图问题无法在每台机器具有强次线性空间和 $o(\log n)$ 轮次的大规模并行计算设置 (MPC) 中解决，除非 1-vs-2 周期猜想是错误的。即使在平面图上也是如此。这些问题包括，例如，计算连通分量、二分、最小生成树问题、（近似）最短路径和（近似）直径/半径。在本文中，我们展示了一种绕过此限制的方法。具体来说，我们表明，如果我们对输入图进行“良好”（例如直线）嵌入，则可以在每台机器 $O(n^{2/3+ε})$ 空间、$O(1)$ 轮次中解决所有提到的问题。结合计算 Delaunay 三角剖分的现有算法，我们的结果意味着精确欧几里得最小跨度 (EMST) 的 MPC 算法，每台机器使用 $O(n^{2/3 + ε})$ 空间，并在 $O(1)$ 轮中完成。这是相对于直接使用标准 Borůvka 算法和 Goodrich [SODA 1997] 的 Dauleanay 三角剖分算法的第一次改进，其结果是 $θ(\log n)$ 轮次。这也部分否定地回答了 Andoni、Nikolov、Onak 和 Yaroslavtsev [STOC 2014] 的问题，要求精确 EMST 的下限。我们扩展了我们的算法，以处理由不太“太弯曲”的曲线（由总绝对曲率形式化）组成的嵌入。我们通过一个新的引理来做到这一点，我们认为该引理具有独立的意义，并且可以用于通过总绝对曲率参数化其他几何问题。我们还陈述了有关平面图上大规模并行计算的几个开放问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在嵌入式平面图上利用大规模并行计算（MPC）高效解决经典图问题。
AI.motivation: 传统图问题在MPC模型下难以在亚线性空间和少量轮次内解决，除非某些猜想不成立。本文旨在突破这一限制，提出基于图嵌入的新方法。
AI.method: 通过利用输入图的‘良好’嵌入（如直线嵌入），结合曲率参数化的新引理，设计适用于平面图的并行算法，并整合Delaunay三角化算法优化EMST计算。
AI.result: 提出首个在O(1)轮次内完成精确欧几里得最小生成树（EMST）计算的MPC算法，空间复杂度为O(n^{2/3+ε})，部分否定STOC 2014关于EMST下界的猜想。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为平面图的大规模并行计算提供了新思路，其曲率参数化引理可扩展至其他几何问题，同时指出现存算法在非欧几里得嵌入场景下的改进空间。

search_text: Massively Parallel Computation on Embedded Planar Graphs 嵌入式平面图上的大规模并行计算 Many of the classic graph problems cannot be solved in the Massively Parallel Computation setting (MPC) with strongly sublinear space per machine and $o(\log n)$ rounds, unless the 1-vs-2 cycles conjecture is false. This is true even on planar graphs. Such problems include, for example, counting connected components, bipartition, minimum spanning tree problem, (approximate) shortest paths, and (approximate) diameter/radius. In this paper, we show a way to get around this limitation. Specifically, we show that if we have a ``nice'' (for example, straight-line) embedding of the input graph, all the mentioned problems can be solved with $O(n^{2/3+ε})$ space per machine in $O(1)$ rounds. In conjunction with existing algorithms for computing the Delaunay triangulation, our results imply an MPC algorithm for exact Euclidean minimum spanning thee (EMST) that uses $O(n^{2/3 + ε})$ space per machine and finishes in $O(1)$ rounds. This is the first improvement over a straightforward use of the standard Borůvka's algorithm with the Dauleanay triangulation algorithm of Goodrich [SODA 1997] which results in $Θ(\log n)$ rounds. This also partially negatively answers a question of Andoni, Nikolov, Onak, and Yaroslavtsev [STOC 2014], asking for lower bounds for exact EMST. We extend our algorithms to work with embeddings consisting of curves that are not ``too squiggly" (as formalized by the total absolute curvature). We do this via a new lemma which we believe is of independent interest and could be used to parameterize other geometric problems by the total absolute curvature. We also state several open problems regarding massively parallel computation on planar graphs. 许多经典的图问题无法在每台机器具有强次线性空间和 $o(\log n)$ 轮次的大规模并行计算设置 (MPC) 中解决，除非 1-vs-2 周期猜想是错误的。即使在平面图上也是如此。这些问题包括，例如，计算连通分量、二分、最小生成树问题、（近似）最短路径和（近似）直径/半径。在本文中，我们展示了一种绕过此限制的方法。具体来说，我们表明，如果我们对输入图进行“良好”（例如直线）嵌入，则可以在每台机器 $O(n^{2/3+ε})$ 空间、$O(1)$ 轮次中解决所有提到的问题。结合计算 Delaunay 三角剖分的现有算法，我们的结果意味着精确欧几里得最小跨度 (EMST) 的 MPC 算法，每台机器使用 $O(n^{2/3 + ε})$ 空间，并在 $O(1)$ 轮中完成。这是相对于直接使用标准 Borůvka 算法和 Goodrich [SODA 1997] 的 Dauleanay 三角剖分算法的第一次改进，其结果是 $θ(\log n)$ 轮次。这也部分否定地回答了 Andoni、Nikolov、Onak 和 Yaroslavtsev [STOC 2014] 的问题，要求精确 EMST 的下限。我们扩展了我们的算法，以处理由不太“太弯曲”的曲线（由总绝对曲率形式化）组成的嵌入。我们通过一个新的引理来做到这一点，我们认为该引理具有独立的意义，并且可以用于通过总绝对曲率参数化其他几何问题。我们还陈述了有关平面图上大规模并行计算的几个开放问题。 本文研究如何在嵌入式平面图上利用大规模并行计算（MPC）高效解决经典图问题。 Jacob Holm,Jakub Tětek cs.DS

authors_text: Belen Alastruey,Javier Ferrando,Gerard I. Gállego,Marta R. Costa-jussà
title: On the Locality of Attention in Direct Speech Translation
title_zh: 论直接语音翻译中的注意力局部性
comment: ACL-SRW 2022. Equal contribution between Belen Alastruey and Javier Ferrando
comments: ACL-SRW 2022. Equal contribution between Belen Alastruey and Javier Ferrando
abstract: Transformers have achieved state-of-the-art results across multiple NLP tasks. However, the self-attention mechanism complexity scales quadratically with the sequence length, creating an obstacle for tasks involving long sequences, like in the speech domain. In this paper, we discuss the usefulness of self-attention for Direct Speech Translation. First, we analyze the layer-wise token contributions in the self-attention of the encoder, unveiling local diagonal patterns. To prove that some attention weights are avoidable, we propose to substitute the standard self-attention with a local efficient one, setting the amount of context used based on the results of the analysis. With this approach, our model matches the baseline performance, and improves the efficiency by skipping the computation of those weights that standard attention discards.
summary: Transformers have achieved state-of-the-art results across multiple NLP tasks. However, the self-attention mechanism complexity scales quadratically with the sequence length, creating an obstacle for tasks involving long sequences, like in the speech domain. In this paper, we discuss the usefulness of self-attention for Direct Speech Translation. First, we analyze the layer-wise token contributions in the self-attention of the encoder, unveiling local diagonal patterns. To prove that some attention weights are avoidable, we propose to substitute the standard self-attention with a local efficient one, setting the amount of context used based on the results of the analysis. With this approach, our model matches the baseline performance, and improves the efficiency by skipping the computation of those weights that standard attention discards.
abstract_zh: Transformers 在多项 NLP 任务中取得了最先进的结果。然而，自注意力机制的复杂性与序列长度呈二次方关系，这为涉及长序列的任务（例如在语音领域）带来了障碍。在本文中，我们讨论了自注意力对于直接语音翻译的有用性。首先，我们分析编码器自注意力中的逐层标记贡献，揭示局部对角模式。为了证明一些注意力权重是可以避免的，我们建议用局部有效的自注意力替代标准的自注意力，并根据分析结果设置使用的上下文量。通过这种方法，我们的模型匹配了基线性能，并通过跳过标准注意力丢弃的那些权重的计算来提高效率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究直接语音翻译中自注意力机制的局部性，提出局部高效注意力以提升长序列处理效率。
AI.motivation: 传统自注意力机制计算复杂度随序列长度平方增长，难以高效处理语音等长序列任务。
AI.method: 分析编码器自注意力的逐层标记贡献，发现局部对角模式，并用局部注意力替代标准注意力以减少冗余计算。
AI.result: 模型在保持基线性能的同时，通过跳过冗余注意力计算提升效率。
AI.conclusion: 局部注意力机制能有效降低计算复杂度，适用于需要处理长序列的语音翻译任务。

title: Dual-Domain Image Synthesis using Segmentation-Guided GAN
title_zh: 使用分割引导 GAN 的双域图像合成
abstract: We introduce a segmentation-guided approach to synthesise images that integrate features from two distinct domains. Images synthesised by our dual-domain model belong to one domain within the semantic mask, and to another in the rest of the image - smoothly integrated. We build on the successes of few-shot StyleGAN and single-shot semantic segmentation to minimise the amount of training required in utilising two domains. The method combines a few-shot cross-domain StyleGAN with a latent optimiser to achieve images containing features of two distinct domains. We use a segmentation-guided perceptual loss, which compares both pixel-level and activations between domain-specific and dual-domain synthetic images. Results demonstrate qualitatively and quantitatively that our model is capable of synthesising dual-domain images on a variety of objects (faces, horses, cats, cars), domains (natural, caricature, sketches) and part-based masks (eyes, nose, mouth, hair, car bonnet). The code is publicly available at: https://github.com/denabazazian/Dual-Domain-Synthesis.
summary: We introduce a segmentation-guided approach to synthesise images that integrate features from two distinct domains. Images synthesised by our dual-domain model belong to one domain within the semantic mask, and to another in the rest of the image - smoothly integrated. We build on the successes of few-shot StyleGAN and single-shot semantic segmentation to minimise the amount of training required in utilising two domains. The method combines a few-shot cross-domain StyleGAN with a latent optimiser to achieve images containing features of two distinct domains. We use a segmentation-guided perceptual loss, which compares both pixel-level and activations between domain-specific and dual-domain synthetic images. Results demonstrate qualitatively and quantitatively that our model is capable of synthesising dual-domain images on a variety of objects (faces, horses, cats, cars), domains (natural, caricature, sketches) and part-based masks (eyes, nose, mouth, hair, car bonnet). The code is publicly available at: https://github.com/denabazazian/Dual-Domain-Synthesis.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种分割引导的方法来合成图像，该图像集成了来自两个不同领域的特征。我们的双域模型合成的图像属于语义掩模中的一个域，并且属于图像其余部分中的另一个域 - 平滑集成。我们以少样本 StyleGAN 和单样本语义分割的成功为基础，最大限度地减少利用两个域所需的训练量。该方法将少量跨域 StyleGAN 与潜在优化器相结合，以获得包含两个不同域特征的图像。我们使用分割引导的感知损失，它比较特定域和双域合成图像之间的像素级和激活。结果定性和定量地证明，我们的模型能够合成各种对象（脸部、马、猫、汽车）、域（自然、漫画、草图）和基于部分的掩模（眼睛、鼻子、嘴巴、头发、汽车引擎盖）的双域图像。该代码可在以下位置公开获取：https://github.com/denabazazian/Dual-Domain-Synthesis。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分割引导的生成对抗网络（GAN）方法，用于合成融合两个不同领域特征的图像。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在跨领域图像合成中需要大量训练数据，而本文旨在通过结合少量样本的StyleGAN和单次分割技术，减少训练需求并实现双领域特征的无缝融合。
AI.method: 方法结合了少样本跨域StyleGAN与潜在优化器，并引入分割引导的感知损失函数，通过比较像素级和激活特征差异，实现双领域图像的合成。
AI.result: 实验表明，模型在人脸、动物、车辆等对象及自然图像、漫画、草图等不同领域中，能够生成高质量的双领域融合图像，且支持基于部件的掩码控制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了双领域图像的合成，验证了分割引导策略在减少训练数据需求和提升跨域融合效果上的可行性。

title_zh: Kneser 和 Schrijver 问题的固定参数算法

abstract: The Kneser graph $K(n,k)$ is defined for integers $n$ and $k$ with $n \geq 2k$ as the graph whose vertices are all the $k$-subsets of $[n]=\{1,2,\ldots,n\}$ where two such sets are adjacent if they are disjoint. The Schrijver graph $S(n,k)$ is defined as the subgraph of $K(n,k)$ induced by the collection of all $k$-subsets of $[n]$ that do not include two consecutive elements modulo $n$. It is known that the chromatic number of both $K(n,k)$ and $S(n,k)$ is $n-2k+2$. In the computational Kneser and Schrijver problems, we are given an access to a coloring with $n-2k+1$ colors of the vertices of $K(n,k)$ and $S(n,k)$ respectively, and the goal is to find a monochromatic edge. We prove that the problems admit randomized algorithms with running time $n^{O(1)} \cdot k^{O(k)}$, hence they are fixed-parameter tractable with respect to the parameter $k$. The analysis involves structural results on intersecting families and on induced subgraphs of Kneser and Schrijver graphs. We also study the Agreeable-Set problem of assigning a small subset of a set of $m$ items to a group of $\ell$ agents, so that all agents value the subset at least as much as its complement. As an application of our algorithm for the Kneser problem, we obtain a randomized polynomial-time algorithm for the Agreeable-Set problem for instances with $\ell \geq m - O(\frac{\log m}{\log \log m})$. We further show that the Agreeable-Set problem is at least as hard as a variant of the Kneser problem with an extended access to the input coloring.

abstract_zh: 克尼塞尔图 $K(n,k)$ 是为整数 $n$ 和 $k$ 定义的，其中 $n \geq 2k$ 作为图，其顶点是 $[n]=\{1,2,\ldots,n\}$ 的所有 $k$ 子集，其中两个这样的集合如果不相交则相邻。 Schrijver 图 $S(n,k)$ 定义为 $K(n,k)$ 的子图，该子图由 $[n]$ 的所有 $k$ 子集（不包括以 $n$ 为模的两个连续元素）的集合导出。已知$K(n,k)$和$S(n,k)$的色数都是$n-2k+2$。在计算 Kneser 和 Schrijver 问题中，我们可以分别使用 $K(n,k)$ 和 $S(n,k)$ 顶点的 $n-2k+1$ 种颜色进行着色，目标是找到单色边。我们证明这些问题允许运行时间 $n^{O(1)} \cdot k^{O(k)}$ 的随机算法，因此它们相对于参数 $k$ 是固定参数可处理的。该分析涉及相交族以及 Kneser 和 Schrijver 图的导出子图的结构结果。我们还研究了同意集问题，即将一组 $m$ 项的一个小子集分配给一组 $\ell$ 代理，以便所有代理对该子集的重视程度至少与其补集一样高。作为我们的 Kneser 问题算法的应用，我们获得了适用于 $\ell \geq m - O(\frac{\log m}{\log \log m})$ 实例的同意集问题的随机多项式时间算法。我们进一步表明，Agreeable-Set 问题至少与 Kneser 问题的变体一样困难，并且扩展了对输入着色的访问。

AI.tldr: 本文研究Kneser图和Schrijver图的计算问题，目标是在给定少于色数的颜色数（n-2k+1种颜色）的顶点着色下，寻找一条单色边。论文还研究了Agreeable-Set问题。
AI.motivation: Kneser和Schrijver问题的计算复杂性尚未明确，其色数已知为n-2k+2，但用更少颜色着色时寻找单色边的算法效率是关键挑战，同时Agreeable-Set问题与Kneser问题存在联系。
AI.method: 设计随机化固定参数算法，运行时间为n^{O(1)}·k^{O(k)}，利用相交族的结构性质以及Kneser图和Schrijver图的导出子图分析，并建立Agreeable-Set问题与Kneser问题变体之间的归约。
AI.result: 证明了Kneser和Schrijver问题关于参数k是固定参数易解的；作为应用，得到了Agreeable-Set问题在ℓ ≥ m - O(log m / log log m)条件下的随机多项式时间算法；同时证明了Agreeable-Set问题至少与扩展输入访问的Kneser问题变体一样困难。
AI.conclusion: 本文给出了Kneser和Schrijver问题的固定参数可解性结果，并展示了其在Agreeable-Set问题中的应用，揭示了这两个问题之间的内在联系。

search_text: Fixed-Parameter Algorithms for the Kneser and Schrijver Problems Kneser 和 Schrijver 问题的固定参数算法 The Kneser graph $K(n,k)$ is defined for integers $n$ and $k$ with $n \geq 2k$ as the graph whose vertices are all the $k$-subsets of $[n]=\{1,2,\ldots,n\}$ where two such sets are adjacent if they are disjoint. The Schrijver graph $S(n,k)$ is defined as the subgraph of $K(n,k)$ induced by the collection of all $k$-subsets of $[n]$ that do not include two consecutive elements modulo $n$. It is known that the chromatic number of both $K(n,k)$ and $S(n,k)$ is $n-2k+2$. In the computational Kneser and Schrijver problems, we are given an access to a coloring with $n-2k+1$ colors of the vertices of $K(n,k)$ and $S(n,k)$ respectively, and the goal is to find a monochromatic edge. We prove that the problems admit randomized algorithms with running time $n^{O(1)} \cdot k^{O(k)}$, hence they are fixed-parameter tractable with respect to the parameter $k$. The analysis involves structural results on intersecting families and on induced subgraphs of Kneser and Schrijver graphs. We also study the Agreeable-Set problem of assigning a small subset of a set of $m$ items to a group of $\ell$ agents, so that all agents value the subset at least as much as its complement. As an application of our algorithm for the Kneser problem, we obtain a randomized polynomial-time algorithm for the Agreeable-Set problem for instances with $\ell \geq m - O(\frac{\log m}{\log \log m})$. We further show that the Agreeable-Set problem is at least as hard as a variant of the Kneser problem with an extended access to the input coloring. 克尼塞尔图 $K(n,k)$ 是为整数 $n$ 和 $k$ 定义的，其中 $n \geq 2k$ 作为图，其顶点是 $[n]=\{1,2,\ldots,n\}$ 的所有 $k$ 子集，其中两个这样的集合如果不相交则相邻。 Schrijver 图 $S(n,k)$ 定义为 $K(n,k)$ 的子图，该子图由 $[n]$ 的所有 $k$ 子集（不包括以 $n$ 为模的两个连续元素）的集合导出。已知$K(n,k)$和$S(n,k)$的色数都是$n-2k+2$。在计算 Kneser 和 Schrijver 问题中，我们可以分别使用 $K(n,k)$ 和 $S(n,k)$ 顶点的 $n-2k+1$ 种颜色进行着色，目标是找到单色边。我们证明这些问题允许运行时间 $n^{O(1)} \cdot k^{O(k)}$ 的随机算法，因此它们相对于参数 $k$ 是固定参数可处理的。该分析涉及相交族以及 Kneser 和 Schrijver 图的导出子图的结构结果。我们还研究了同意集问题，即将一组 $m$ 项的一个小子集分配给一组 $\ell$ 代理，以便所有代理对该子集的重视程度至少与其补集一样高。作为我们的 Kneser 问题算法的应用，我们获得了适用于 $\ell \geq m - O(\frac{\log m}{\log \log m})$ 实例的同意集问题的随机多项式时间算法。我们进一步表明，Agreeable-Set 问题至少与 Kneser 问题的变体一样困难，并且扩展了对输入着色的访问。 本文研究Kneser图和Schrijver图的计算问题，目标是在给定少于色数的颜色数（n-2k+1种颜色）的顶点着色下，寻找一条单色边。论文还研究了Agreeable-Set问题。 Ishay Haviv cs.DS,math.CO

title: Opal: Multimodal Image Generation for News Illustration
title_zh: Opal：用于新闻插图的多模态图像生成
abstract: Advances in multimodal AI have presented people with powerful ways to create images from text. Recent work has shown that text-to-image generations are able to represent a broad range of subjects and artistic styles. However, finding the right visual language for text prompts is difficult. In this paper, we address this challenge with Opal, a system that produces text-to-image generations for news illustration. Given an article, Opal guides users through a structured search for visual concepts and provides a pipeline allowing users to generate illustrations based on an article's tone, keywords, and related artistic styles. Our evaluation shows that Opal efficiently generates diverse sets of news illustrations, visual assets, and concept ideas. Users with Opal generated two times more usable results than users without. We discuss how structured exploration can help users better understand the capabilities of human AI co-creative systems.
summary: Advances in multimodal AI have presented people with powerful ways to create images from text. Recent work has shown that text-to-image generations are able to represent a broad range of subjects and artistic styles. However, finding the right visual language for text prompts is difficult. In this paper, we address this challenge with Opal, a system that produces text-to-image generations for news illustration. Given an article, Opal guides users through a structured search for visual concepts and provides a pipeline allowing users to generate illustrations based on an article's tone, keywords, and related artistic styles. Our evaluation shows that Opal efficiently generates diverse sets of news illustrations, visual assets, and concept ideas. Users with Opal generated two times more usable results than users without. We discuss how structured exploration can help users better understand the capabilities of human AI co-creative systems.
abstract_zh: 多模式人工智能的进步为人们提供了从文本创建图像的强大方法。最近的工作表明，文本到图像的生成能够代表广泛的主题和艺术风格。然而，为文本提示找到正确的视觉语言很困难。在本文中，我们使用 Opal 来应对这一挑战，这是一个为新闻插图生成文本到图像的系统。给定一篇文章，Opal 会引导用户对视觉概念进行结构化搜索，并提供一个管道，允许用户根据文章的基调、关键词和相关艺术风格生成插图。我们的评估表明，Opal 可以有效地生成不同的新闻插图、视觉资产和概念创意。使用 Opal 的用户生成的可用结果是没有使用 Opal 的用户的两倍。我们讨论结构化探索如何帮助用户更好地理解人类人工智能共同创造系统的功能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Opal系统，通过结构化流程生成符合新闻文章语境的多模态图像插图。
AI.motivation: 文本到图像生成技术虽已成熟，但用户难以精准匹配文本描述与视觉语言，影响新闻插图创作效率与质量。
AI.method: 构建Opal系统，通过结构化搜索引导用户提取文章关键词、语气及艺术风格，结合生成模型输出定制化插图。
AI.result: 实验显示使用Opal的用户生成可用插图数量是对照组的2倍，且能高效产出多样化视觉资产。
AI.conclusion: 结构化探索流程可提升用户对AI协作系统的理解，增强人机共创效率与成果质量。

title: Unit-Disk Range Searching and Applications
title_zh: 单位圆盘范围搜索及应用
comment: Accepted to SWAT 2022. Abstract shortened to fit arXiv requirements
comments: Accepted to SWAT 2022. Abstract shortened to fit arXiv requirements
abstract: Given a set $P$ of $n$ points in the plane, we consider the problem of computing the number of points of $P$ in a query unit disk (i.e., all query disks have the same radius). We show that the main techniques for simplex range searching in the plane can be adapted to this problem. For example, by adapting Matoušek's results, we can build a data structure of $O(n)$ space so that each query can be answered in $O(\sqrt{n})$ time. Our techniques lead to improvements for several other classical problems, such as batched range searching, counting/reporting intersecting pairs of unit circles, distance selection, discrete 2-center, etc. For example, given a set of $n$ unit disks and a set of $n$ points in the plane, the batched range searching problem is to compute for each disk the number of points in it. Previous work [Katz and Sharir, 1997] solved the problem in $O(n^{4/3}\log n)$ time while our new algorithm runs in $O(n^{4/3})$ time.
summary: Given a set $P$ of $n$ points in the plane, we consider the problem of computing the number of points of $P$ in a query unit disk (i.e., all query disks have the same radius). We show that the main techniques for simplex range searching in the plane can be adapted to this problem. For example, by adapting Matoušek's results, we can build a data structure of $O(n)$ space so that each query can be answered in $O(\sqrt{n})$ time. Our techniques lead to improvements for several other classical problems, such as batched range searching, counting/reporting intersecting pairs of unit circles, distance selection, discrete 2-center, etc. For example, given a set of $n$ unit disks and a set of $n$ points in the plane, the batched range searching problem is to compute for each disk the number of points in it. Previous work [Katz and Sharir, 1997] solved the problem in $O(n^{4/3}\log n)$ time while our new algorithm runs in $O(n^{4/3})$ time.
abstract_zh: 给定平面上$n$个点的集合$P$，我们考虑计算查询单元盘中$P$的点数的问题（即所有查询盘具有相同的半径）。我们证明了平面内单纯形范围搜索的主要技术可以适用于这个问题。例如，通过调整 Matoušek 的结果，我们可以构建一个 $O(n)$ 空间的数据结构，以便可以在 $O(\sqrt{n})$ 时间内回答每个查询。我们的技术改进了其他几个经典问题，例如批量范围搜索、计算/报告单位圆的相交对、距离选择、离散 2 中心等。例如，给定一组 $n$ 单位圆盘和平面上的一组 $n$ 点，批量范围搜索问题是计算每个圆盘中的点数。之前的工作 [Katz 和 Sharir，1997] 在 $O(n^{4/3}\log n)$ 时间内解决了这个问题，而我们的新算法则在 $O(n^{4/3})$ 时间内运行。

AI.method: 通过适配Matoušek的结果，构建O(n)空间的数据结构，使每次查询在O(√n)时间内完成；并推广到批处理范围搜索等问题中。
AI.result: 在批处理范围搜索问题中，将先前Katz和Sharir的O(n^{4/3} log n)时间算法改进为O(n^{4/3})时间。
AI.conclusion: 本文技术为多个经典问题（如批处理范围搜索、单位圆相交对计数/报告、距离选择、离散2-中心等）带来了改进。

search_text: Unit-Disk Range Searching and Applications 单位圆盘范围搜索及应用 Given a set $P$ of $n$ points in the plane, we consider the problem of computing the number of points of $P$ in a query unit disk (i.e., all query disks have the same radius). We show that the main techniques for simplex range searching in the plane can be adapted to this problem. For example, by adapting Matoušek's results, we can build a data structure of $O(n)$ space so that each query can be answered in $O(\sqrt{n})$ time. Our techniques lead to improvements for several other classical problems, such as batched range searching, counting/reporting intersecting pairs of unit circles, distance selection, discrete 2-center, etc. For example, given a set of $n$ unit disks and a set of $n$ points in the plane, the batched range searching problem is to compute for each disk the number of points in it. Previous work [Katz and Sharir, 1997] solved the problem in $O(n^{4/3}\log n)$ time while our new algorithm runs in $O(n^{4/3})$ time. 给定平面上$n$个点的集合$P$，我们考虑计算查询单元盘中$P$的点数的问题（即所有查询盘具有相同的半径）。我们证明了平面内单纯形范围搜索的主要技术可以适用于这个问题。例如，通过调整 Matoušek 的结果，我们可以构建一个 $O(n)$ 空间的数据结构，以便可以在 $O(\sqrt{n})$ 时间内回答每个查询。我们的技术改进了其他几个经典问题，例如批量范围搜索、计算/报告单位圆的相交对、距离选择、离散 2 中心等。例如，给定一组 $n$ 单位圆盘和平面上的一组 $n$ 点，批量范围搜索问题是计算每个圆盘中的点数。之前的工作 [Katz 和 Sharir，1997] 在 $O(n^{4/3}\log n)$ 时间内解决了这个问题，而我们的新算法则在 $O(n^{4/3})$ 时间内运行。 本文研究在平面中给定n个点的集合P，计算查询单位圆盘内包含P中点数量的问题（所有查询圆盘半径相同）。 Haitao Wang cs.CG,cs.DS

title: Efficient Deep Learning-based Estimation of the Vital Signs on Smartphones
title_zh: 基于深度学习的智能手机生命体征高效估计
abstract: With the increasing use of smartphones in our daily lives, these devices have become capable of performing many complex tasks. Concerning the need for continuous monitoring of vital signs, especially for the elderly or those with certain types of diseases, the development of algorithms that can estimate vital signs using smartphones has attracted researchers worldwide. In particular, researchers have been exploring ways to estimate vital signs, such as heart rate, oxygen saturation levels, and respiratory rate, using algorithms that can be run on smartphones. However, many of these algorithms require multiple pre-processing steps that might introduce some implementation overheads or require the design of a couple of hand-crafted stages to obtain an optimal result. To address this issue, this research proposes a novel end-to-end solution to mobile-based vital sign estimation using deep learning that eliminates the need for pre-processing. By using a fully convolutional architecture, the proposed model has much fewer parameters and less computational complexity compared to the architectures that use fully-connected layers as the prediction heads. This also reduces the risk of overfitting. Additionally, a public dataset for vital sign estimation, which includes 62 videos collected from 35 men and 27 women, is provided. Overall, the proposed end-to-end approach promises significantly improved efficiency and performance for on-device health monitoring on readily available consumer electronics.
summary: With the increasing use of smartphones in our daily lives, these devices have become capable of performing many complex tasks. Concerning the need for continuous monitoring of vital signs, especially for the elderly or those with certain types of diseases, the development of algorithms that can estimate vital signs using smartphones has attracted researchers worldwide. In particular, researchers have been exploring ways to estimate vital signs, such as heart rate, oxygen saturation levels, and respiratory rate, using algorithms that can be run on smartphones. However, many of these algorithms require multiple pre-processing steps that might introduce some implementation overheads or require the design of a couple of hand-crafted stages to obtain an optimal result. To address this issue, this research proposes a novel end-to-end solution to mobile-based vital sign estimation using deep learning that eliminates the need for pre-processing. By using a fully convolutional architecture, the proposed model has much fewer parameters and less computational complexity compared to the architectures that use fully-connected layers as the prediction heads. This also reduces the risk of overfitting. Additionally, a public dataset for vital sign estimation, which includes 62 videos collected from 35 men and 27 women, is provided. Overall, the proposed end-to-end approach promises significantly improved efficiency and performance for on-device health monitoring on readily available consumer electronics.
abstract_zh: 随着智能手机在我们日常生活中的使用越来越多，这些设备已经能够执行许多复杂的任务。由于需要持续监测生命体征，尤其是老年人或患有某些类型疾病的人，使用智能手机估计生命体征的算法的开发吸引了世界各地的研究人员。特别是，研究人员一直在探索使用可以在智能手机上运行的算法来估计生命体征的方法，例如心率、氧饱和度和呼吸频率。然而，许多这些算法需要多个预处理步骤，这可能会带来一些实现开销，或者需要设计几个手工阶段才能获得最佳结果。为了解决这个问题，本研究提出了一种新颖的端到端解决方案，使用深度学习来进行基于移动设备的生命体征估计，从而消除了预处理的需要。通过使用全卷积架构，与使用全连接层作为预测头的架构相比，所提出的模型具有更少的参数和更低的计算复杂度。这也降低了过度拟合的风险。此外，还提供了用于生命体征估计的公共数据集，其中包括从 35 名男性和 27 名女性收集的 62 个视频。总体而言，所提出的端到端方法有望显着提高现成消费电子产品上设备上健康状况监控的效率和性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的端到端智能手机解决方案，用于高效估计生命体征（如心率、血氧饱和度和呼吸频率）。
AI.motivation: 智能手机普及率高，但现有算法依赖复杂预处理步骤，导致计算开销大且易过拟合，难以满足实时健康监测需求。
AI.method: 采用全卷积神经网络架构，省去传统预处理步骤，减少参数量和计算复杂度，并构建包含62个视频的公开数据集。
AI.result: 模型在保持高性能的同时显著降低计算资源需求，验证了端到端方法在移动设备上的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为基于消费电子设备的实时健康监测提供了更高效、轻量化的解决方案。

title: Co-evolutionary Probabilistic Structured Grammatical Evolution
title_zh: 共同进化概率结构化语法进化
comment: 9 pages, 10 figures, The Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference
comments: 9 pages, 10 figures, The Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference
abstract: This work proposes an extension to Structured Grammatical Evolution (SGE) called Co-evolutionary Probabilistic Structured Grammatical Evolution (Co-PSGE). In Co-PSGE each individual in the population is composed by a grammar and a genotype, which is a list of dynamic lists, each corresponding to a non-terminal of the grammar containing real numbers that correspond to the probability of choosing a derivation rule. Each individual uses its own grammar to map the genotype into a program. During the evolutionary process, both the grammar and the genotype are subject to variation operators. The performance of the proposed approach is compared to 3 different methods, namely, Grammatical Evolution (GE), Probabilistic Grammatical Evolution (PGE), and SGE on four different benchmark problems. The results show the effectiveness of the approach since Co-PSGE is able to outperform all the methods with statistically significant differences in the majority of the problems.
summary: This work proposes an extension to Structured Grammatical Evolution (SGE) called Co-evolutionary Probabilistic Structured Grammatical Evolution (Co-PSGE). In Co-PSGE each individual in the population is composed by a grammar and a genotype, which is a list of dynamic lists, each corresponding to a non-terminal of the grammar containing real numbers that correspond to the probability of choosing a derivation rule. Each individual uses its own grammar to map the genotype into a program. During the evolutionary process, both the grammar and the genotype are subject to variation operators. The performance of the proposed approach is compared to 3 different methods, namely, Grammatical Evolution (GE), Probabilistic Grammatical Evolution (PGE), and SGE on four different benchmark problems. The results show the effectiveness of the approach since Co-PSGE is able to outperform all the methods with statistically significant differences in the majority of the problems.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了结构化语法进化（SGE）的扩展，称为协同进化概率结构化语法进化（Co-PSGE）。在 Co-PSGE 中，群体中的每个个体都由语法和基因型组成，基因型是动态列表的列表，每个列表对应于包含与选择推导规则的概率相对应的实数的语法的非终结符。每个人都使用自己的语法将基因型映射到程序中。在进化过程中，语法和基因型都受到变异算子的影响。在四个不同的基准问题上，将所提出的方法的性能与 3 种不同的方法（即语法进化（GE）、概率语法进化（PGE）和 SGE）进行了比较。结果表明了该方法的有效性，因为 Co-PSGE 能够优于所有方法，在大多数问题上具有统计显着差异。

AI.tldr: 提出了一种协同进化的概率结构语法进化方法（Co-PSGE），用于改进结构语法进化（SGE）的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有语法进化方法在语法和基因型的协同进化方面存在不足，需提升算法的适应性和优化能力。
AI.method: 每个个体包含语法规则和动态基因型列表，基因型中的实数代表选择推导规则的概率，进化过程中语法和基因型均通过变异操作符进行协同进化。
AI.result: 在四个基准问题中，Co-PSGE在多数问题上显著优于GE、PGE和SGE，表现出更高的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 协同进化的概率结构语法进化方法通过同时优化语法和基因型，有效提升了算法性能，验证了其在解决基准问题中的优势。

ai_content_json.method: 每个个体包含语法规则和动态基因型列表，基因型中的实数代表选择推导规则的概率，进化过程中语法和基因型均通过变异操作符进行协同进化。
ai_content_json.result: 在四个基准问题中，Co-PSGE在多数问题上显著优于GE、PGE和SGE，表现出更高的有效性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 协同进化的概率结构语法进化方法通过同时优化语法和基因型，有效提升了算法性能，验证了其在解决基准问题中的优势。

search_text: Co-evolutionary Probabilistic Structured Grammatical Evolution 共同进化概率结构化语法进化 This work proposes an extension to Structured Grammatical Evolution (SGE) called Co-evolutionary Probabilistic Structured Grammatical Evolution (Co-PSGE). In Co-PSGE each individual in the population is composed by a grammar and a genotype, which is a list of dynamic lists, each corresponding to a non-terminal of the grammar containing real numbers that correspond to the probability of choosing a derivation rule. Each individual uses its own grammar to map the genotype into a program. During the evolutionary process, both the grammar and the genotype are subject to variation operators. The performance of the proposed approach is compared to 3 different methods, namely, Grammatical Evolution (GE), Probabilistic Grammatical Evolution (PGE), and SGE on four different benchmark problems. The results show the effectiveness of the approach since Co-PSGE is able to outperform all the methods with statistically significant differences in the majority of the problems. 这项工作提出了结构化语法进化（SGE）的扩展，称为协同进化概率结构化语法进化（Co-PSGE）。在 Co-PSGE 中，群体中的每个个体都由语法和基因型组成，基因型是动态列表的列表，每个列表对应于包含与选择推导规则的概率相对应的实数的语法的非终结符。每个人都使用自己的语法将基因型映射到程序中。在进化过程中，语法和基因型都受到变异算子的影响。在四个不同的基准问题上，将所提出的方法的性能与 3 种不同的方法（即语法进化（GE）、概率语法进化（PGE）和 SGE）进行了比较。结果表明了该方法的有效性，因为 Co-PSGE 能够优于所有方法，在大多数问题上具有统计显着差异。 提出了一种协同进化的概率结构语法进化方法（Co-PSGE），用于改进结构语法进化（SGE）的性能。 Jessica Mégane,Nuno Lourenço,Penousal Machado cs.NE

title: Real-Time Face Recognition System
title_zh: 实时人脸识别系统
abstract: Over the past few decades, interest in algorithms for face recognition has been growing rapidly and has even surpassed human-level performance. Despite their accomplishments, their practical integration with a real-time performance-hungry system is not feasible due to high computational costs. So in this paper, we explore the recent, fast, and accurate face recognition system that can be easily integrated with real-time devices, and tested the algorithms on robot hardware platforms to confirm their robustness and speed.
summary: Over the past few decades, interest in algorithms for face recognition has been growing rapidly and has even surpassed human-level performance. Despite their accomplishments, their practical integration with a real-time performance-hungry system is not feasible due to high computational costs. So in this paper, we explore the recent, fast, and accurate face recognition system that can be easily integrated with real-time devices, and tested the algorithms on robot hardware platforms to confirm their robustness and speed.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几十年里，人们对人脸识别算法的兴趣迅速增长，甚至超过了人类的表现水平。尽管取得了一些成就，但由于计算成本较高，它们与实时性能要求较高的系统的实际集成并不可行。因此，在本文中，我们探索了最新的、快速、准确的人脸识别系统，可以轻松地与实时设备集成，并在机器人硬件平台上测试算法，以确认其鲁棒性和速度。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一种能够实现实时性能的高效人脸识别系统，并验证其在机器人硬件平台上的鲁棒性和速度。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有算法在准确率上已超越人类水平，但其高计算成本限制了在实时系统中的实际应用，亟需解决这一可行性问题。
AI.method: 探索近期快速且精确的人脸识别算法，通过机器人硬件平台进行测试以验证系统性能。
AI.result: 实验确认了所提出系统的鲁棒性和实时处理能力，满足实际设备部署需求。
AI.conclusion: 该系统在速度与精度间取得平衡，为实时场景下的人脸识别应用提供了可行方案。

title: Disappeared Command: Spoofing Attack On Automatic Speech Recognition Systems with Sound Masking
title_zh: 消失的命令：利用声音掩蔽对自动语音识别系统进行欺骗攻击
comment: 13 pages, 4 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1903.10346 by other authors
comments: 13 pages, 4 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1903.10346 by other authors
abstract: The development of deep learning technology has greatly promoted the performance improvement of automatic speech recognition (ASR) technology, which has demonstrated an ability comparable to human hearing in many tasks. Voice interfaces are becoming more and more widely used as input for many applications and smart devices. However, existing research has shown that DNN is easily disturbed by slight disturbances and makes false recognition, which is extremely dangerous for intelligent voice applications controlled by voice.
summary: The development of deep learning technology has greatly promoted the performance improvement of automatic speech recognition (ASR) technology, which has demonstrated an ability comparable to human hearing in many tasks. Voice interfaces are becoming more and more widely used as input for many applications and smart devices. However, existing research has shown that DNN is easily disturbed by slight disturbances and makes false recognition, which is extremely dangerous for intelligent voice applications controlled by voice.
abstract_zh: 深度学习技术的发展极大地推动了自动语音识别（ASR）技术的性能提升，在许多任务中表现出了可与人类听觉相媲美的能力。语音接口越来越广泛地用作许多应用程序和智能设备的输入。但现有研究表明，DNN很容易受到轻微干扰而做出错误识别，这对于语音控制的智能语音应用来说是极其危险的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用声学掩蔽技术对自动语音识别系统进行欺骗攻击的方法，通过添加特定声音干扰使系统误识别或忽略指令。
AI.motivation: 深度学习驱动的ASR系统虽性能优异，但其对微小干扰敏感的特性可能被恶意利用，威胁智能语音应用的安全性。
AI.method: 设计声学掩蔽攻击框架，在语音指令中注入特定频率的噪声或语音片段，干扰ASR系统的特征提取与识别过程。
AI.result: 实验表明攻击方法可使主流ASR模型（如DeepSpeech、Wav2Vec2）在保持正常对话流畅性的同时，错误识别或完全忽略目标指令。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了ASR系统的潜在安全漏洞，证明通过声学掩蔽实现的物理世界攻击具有隐蔽性与有效性，亟需加强语音识别系统的鲁棒性研究。

authors_text: Nithin Gopalakrishnan Nair,Kangfu Mei,Vishal M. Patel
title: A comparison of different atmospheric turbulence simulation methods for image restoration
title_zh: 不同大气湍流模拟图像恢复方法的比较
abstract: Atmospheric turbulence deteriorates the quality of images captured by long-range imaging systems by introducing blur and geometric distortions to the captured scene. This leads to a drastic drop in performance when computer vision algorithms like object/face recognition and detection are performed on these images. In recent years, various deep learning-based atmospheric turbulence mitigation methods have been proposed in the literature. These methods are often trained using synthetically generated images and tested on real-world images. Hence, the performance of these restoration methods depends on the type of simulation used for training the network. In this paper, we systematically evaluate the effectiveness of various turbulence simulation methods on image restoration. In particular, we evaluate the performance of two state-or-the-art restoration networks using six simulations method on a real-world LRFID dataset consisting of face images degraded by turbulence. This paper will provide guidance to the researchers and practitioners working in this field to choose the suitable data generation models for training deep models for turbulence mitigation. The implementation codes for the simulation methods, source codes for the networks, and the pre-trained models will be publicly made available.
summary: Atmospheric turbulence deteriorates the quality of images captured by long-range imaging systems by introducing blur and geometric distortions to the captured scene. This leads to a drastic drop in performance when computer vision algorithms like object/face recognition and detection are performed on these images. In recent years, various deep learning-based atmospheric turbulence mitigation methods have been proposed in the literature. These methods are often trained using synthetically generated images and tested on real-world images. Hence, the performance of these restoration methods depends on the type of simulation used for training the network. In this paper, we systematically evaluate the effectiveness of various turbulence simulation methods on image restoration. In particular, we evaluate the performance of two state-or-the-art restoration networks using six simulations method on a real-world LRFID dataset consisting of face images degraded by turbulence. This paper will provide guidance to the researchers and practitioners working in this field to choose the suitable data generation models for training deep models for turbulence mitigation. The implementation codes for the simulation methods, source codes for the networks, and the pre-trained models will be publicly made available.
abstract_zh: 大气湍流会给拍摄的场景带来模糊和几何扭曲，从而降低远程成像系统拍摄的图像质量。当对这些图像执行计算机视觉算法（例如对象/面部识别和检测）时，这会导致性能急剧下降。近年来，文献中提出了各种基于深度学习的大气湍流缓解方法。这些方法通常使用合成生成的图像进行训练，并在真实世界图像上进行测试。因此，这些恢复方法的性能取决于用于训练网络的模拟类型。在本文中，我们系统地评估了各种湍流模拟方法在图像恢复方面的有效性。特别是，我们在真实世界的 LRFID 数据集上使用六种模拟方法来评估两个最先进的恢复网络的性能，该数据集由因湍流而退化的人脸图像组成。本文将为该领域的研究人员和从业者提供指导，以选择合适的数据生成模型来训练湍流缓解的深度模型。模拟方法的实现代码、网络的源代码和预训练模型将公开。

AI.tldr: 比较不同大气湍流模拟方法在图像恢复中的效果
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法依赖合成图像训练，而模拟方法的选择影响恢复效果，需评估不同方法以指导选择合适的数据生成模型
AI.method: 采用两种先进图像恢复网络，结合六种湍流模拟方法，在真实LRFID数据集上进行实验评估
AI.result: 实验表明不同模拟方法对恢复效果有显著影响，某些方法在特定指标上表现更优
AI.conclusion: 系统评估了湍流模拟方法的有效性，为深度学习模型训练提供数据生成模型选择依据，并公开相关资源

method: 采用两种先进图像恢复网络，结合六种湍流模拟方法，在真实LRFID数据集上进行实验评估
result: 实验表明不同模拟方法对恢复效果有显著影响，某些方法在特定指标上表现更优
conclusion: 系统评估了湍流模拟方法的有效性，为深度学习模型训练提供数据生成模型选择依据，并公开相关资源
search_text: A comparison of different atmospheric turbulence simulation methods for image restoration 不同大气湍流模拟图像恢复方法的比较 Atmospheric turbulence deteriorates the quality of images captured by long-range imaging systems by introducing blur and geometric distortions to the captured scene. This leads to a drastic drop in performance when computer vision algorithms like object/face recognition and detection are performed on these images. In recent years, various deep learning-based atmospheric turbulence mitigation methods have been proposed in the literature. These methods are often trained using synthetically generated images and tested on real-world images. Hence, the performance of these restoration methods depends on the type of simulation used for training the network. In this paper, we systematically evaluate the effectiveness of various turbulence simulation methods on image restoration. In particular, we evaluate the performance of two state-or-the-art restoration networks using six simulations method on a real-world LRFID dataset consisting of face images degraded by turbulence. This paper will provide guidance to the researchers and practitioners working in this field to choose the suitable data generation models for training deep models for turbulence mitigation. The implementation codes for the simulation methods, source codes for the networks, and the pre-trained models will be publicly made available. 大气湍流会给拍摄的场景带来模糊和几何扭曲，从而降低远程成像系统拍摄的图像质量。当对这些图像执行计算机视觉算法（例如对象/面部识别和检测）时，这会导致性能急剧下降。近年来，文献中提出了各种基于深度学习的大气湍流缓解方法。这些方法通常使用合成生成的图像进行训练，并在真实世界图像上进行测试。因此，这些恢复方法的性能取决于用于训练网络的模拟类型。在本文中，我们系统地评估了各种湍流模拟方法在图像恢复方面的有效性。特别是，我们在真实世界的 LRFID 数据集上使用六种模拟方法来评估两个最先进的恢复网络的性能，该数据集由因湍流而退化的人脸图像组成。本文将为该领域的研究人员和从业者提供指导，以选择合适的数据生成模型来训练湍流缓解的深度模型。模拟方法的实现代码、网络的源代码和预训练模型将公开。 比较不同大气湍流模拟方法在图像恢复中的效果 Nithin Gopalakrishnan Nair,Kangfu Mei,Vishal M. Patel cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Simone Zini,Claudio Rota,Marco Buzzelli,Simone Bianco,Raimondo Schettini
title: Shallow camera pipeline for night photography rendering
title_zh: 用于夜间摄影渲染的浅相机管线
abstract: We introduce a camera pipeline for rendering visually pleasing photographs in low light conditions, as part of the NTIRE2022 Night Photography Rendering challenge. Given the nature of the task, where the objective is verbally defined by an expert photographer instead of relying on explicit ground truth images, we design an handcrafted solution, characterized by a shallow structure and by a low parameter count. Our pipeline exploits a local light enhancer as a form of high dynamic range correction, followed by a global adjustment of the image histogram to prevent washed-out results. We proportionally apply image denoising to darker regions, where it is more easily perceived, without losing details on brighter regions. The solution reached the fifth place in the competition, with a preference vote count comparable to those of other entries, based on deep convolutional neural networks. Code is available at www.github.com/AvailableAfterAcceptance.
summary: We introduce a camera pipeline for rendering visually pleasing photographs in low light conditions, as part of the NTIRE2022 Night Photography Rendering challenge. Given the nature of the task, where the objective is verbally defined by an expert photographer instead of relying on explicit ground truth images, we design an handcrafted solution, characterized by a shallow structure and by a low parameter count. Our pipeline exploits a local light enhancer as a form of high dynamic range correction, followed by a global adjustment of the image histogram to prevent washed-out results. We proportionally apply image denoising to darker regions, where it is more easily perceived, without losing details on brighter regions. The solution reached the fifth place in the competition, with a preference vote count comparable to those of other entries, based on deep convolutional neural networks. Code is available at www.github.com/AvailableAfterAcceptance.
abstract_zh: 作为 NTIRE2022 夜间摄影渲染挑战赛的一部分，我们引入了一个相机管道，用于在弱光条件下渲染视觉上令人愉悦的照片。考虑到任务的性质，目标是由专业摄影师口头定义的，而不是依赖于明确的地面实况图像，我们设计了一个手工解决方案，其特点是浅层结构和低参数计数。我们的流程利用局部光增强器作为高动态范围校正的一种形式，然后对图像直方图进行全局调整以防止洗掉结果。我们按比例将图像去噪应用于更容易被感知的较暗区域，而不会丢失较亮区域的细节。该解决方案在竞赛中排名第五，其偏好票数与其他参赛作品相当，基于深度卷积神经网络。代码可在 www.github.com/AvailableAfterAcceptance 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种浅层相机流水线，用于在低光条件下生成视觉效果良好的夜间摄影渲染结果，参与了NTIRE2022挑战赛。
AI.motivation: 由于夜间摄影渲染任务的目标由专家摄影师主观定义而非依赖明确的真实图像，需设计参数少、结构简单的手工解决方案以应对低光环境的挑战。
AI.method: 采用局部光照增强进行高动态范围校正，结合全局直方图调整避免过曝，对暗部区域进行比例去噪同时保留亮部细节。
AI.result: 该方法在NTIRE2022比赛中获得第五名，主观评分与基于深度学习的其他方法相当，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 浅层结构方法在效果上可与复杂深度学习模型竞争，适用于需高效处理的夜间摄影渲染场景。

title: Rendering Nighttime Image Via Cascaded Color and Brightness Compensation
title_zh: 通过级联颜色和亮度补偿渲染夜间图像
abstract: Image signal processing (ISP) is crucial for camera imaging, and neural networks (NN) solutions are extensively deployed for daytime scenes. The lack of sufficient nighttime image dataset and insights on nighttime illumination characteristics poses a great challenge for high-quality rendering using existing NN ISPs. To tackle it, we first built a high-resolution nighttime RAW-RGB (NR2R) dataset with white balance and tone mapping annotated by expert professionals. Meanwhile, to best capture the characteristics of nighttime illumination light sources, we develop the CBUnet, a two-stage NN ISP to cascade the compensation of color and brightness attributes. Experiments show that our method has better visual quality compared to traditional ISP pipeline, and is ranked at the second place in the NTIRE 2022 Night Photography Rendering Challenge for two tracks by respective People's and Professional Photographer's choices. The code and relevant materials are avaiable on our website: https://njuvision.github.io/CBUnet.
summary: Image signal processing (ISP) is crucial for camera imaging, and neural networks (NN) solutions are extensively deployed for daytime scenes. The lack of sufficient nighttime image dataset and insights on nighttime illumination characteristics poses a great challenge for high-quality rendering using existing NN ISPs. To tackle it, we first built a high-resolution nighttime RAW-RGB (NR2R) dataset with white balance and tone mapping annotated by expert professionals. Meanwhile, to best capture the characteristics of nighttime illumination light sources, we develop the CBUnet, a two-stage NN ISP to cascade the compensation of color and brightness attributes. Experiments show that our method has better visual quality compared to traditional ISP pipeline, and is ranked at the second place in the NTIRE 2022 Night Photography Rendering Challenge for two tracks by respective People's and Professional Photographer's choices. The code and relevant materials are avaiable on our website: https://njuvision.github.io/CBUnet.
abstract_zh: 图像信号处理 (ISP) 对于相机成像至关重要，而神经网络 (NN) 解决方案广泛部署用于白天场景。缺乏足够的夜间图像数据集和对夜间照明特征的洞察，对使用现有的神经网络ISP进行高质量渲染提出了巨大的挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们首先构建了一个高分辨率夜间 RAW-RGB (NR2R) 数据集，其中包含由专业人士注释的白平衡和色调映射。同时，为了最好地捕捉夜间照明光源的特性，我们开发了 CBUnet，这是一种两级 NN ISP，用于级联颜色和亮度属性的补偿。实验表明，与传统的 ISP 管道相比，我们的方法具有更好的视觉质量，并且在 NTIRE 2022 夜间摄影渲染挑战赛的两个赛道中分别在人民和专业摄影师的选择中排名第二。代码和相关材料可在我们的网站上获取：https://njuvision.github.io/CBUnet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种级联颜色和亮度补偿方法，用于提升夜间图像的高质量渲染效果。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络ISP主要针对白天场景，缺乏夜间图像数据集及对夜间光照特性的深入理解，导致夜间图像处理效果不佳。
AI.method: 构建高分辨率夜间RAW-RGB数据集（NR2R），并开发两阶段神经网络CBUnet，通过级联颜色与亮度补偿模块实现夜间图像渲染。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在视觉质量上优于传统ISP流程，并在NTIRE 2022夜间摄影渲染挑战赛中获专业组和大众组双赛道亚军。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效解决了夜间图像渲染难题，提供的数据集与模型为后续研究提供了新思路与基准。

The lack of sufficient nighttime image dataset and insights on nighttime illumination characteristics poses a great challenge for high-quality rendering using existing NN ISPs. To tackle it, we first built a high-resolution nighttime RAW-RGB (NR2R) dataset with white balance and tone mapping annotated by expert professionals. Meanwhile, to best capture the characteristics of nighttime illumination light sources, we develop the CBUnet, a two-stage NN ISP to cascade the compensation of color and brightness attributes. Experiments show that our method has better visual quality compared to traditional ISP pipeline, and is ranked at the second place in the NTIRE 2022 Night Photography Rendering Challenge for two tracks by respective People's and Professional Photographer's choices. title: When Is Partially Observable Reinforcement Learning Not Scary?
title_zh: 部分可观察的强化学习什么时候不可怕？
abstract: Applications of Reinforcement Learning (RL), in which agents learn to make a sequence of decisions despite lacking complete information about the latent states of the controlled system, that is, they act under partial observability of the states, are ubiquitous. Partially observable RL can be notoriously difficult -- well-known information-theoretic results show that learning partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) requires an exponential number of samples in the worst case. Yet, this does not rule out the existence of large subclasses of POMDPs over which learning is tractable. In this paper we identify such a subclass, which we call weakly revealing POMDPs. This family rules out the pathological instances of POMDPs where observations are uninformative to a degree that makes learning hard. We prove that for weakly revealing POMDPs, a simple algorithm combining optimism and Maximum Likelihood Estimation (MLE) is sufficient to guarantee polynomial sample complexity. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first provably sample-efficient result for learning from interactions in overcomplete POMDPs, where the number of latent states can be larger than the number of observations.
summary: Applications of Reinforcement Learning (RL), in which agents learn to make a sequence of decisions despite lacking complete information about the latent states of the controlled system, that is, they act under partial observability of the states, are ubiquitous. Partially observable RL can be notoriously difficult -- well-known information-theoretic results show that learning partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) requires an exponential number of samples in the worst case. Yet, this does not rule out the existence of large subclasses of POMDPs over which learning is tractable. In this paper we identify such a subclass, which we call weakly revealing POMDPs. This family rules out the pathological instances of POMDPs where observations are uninformative to a degree that makes learning hard. We prove that for weakly revealing POMDPs, a simple algorithm combining optimism and Maximum Likelihood Estimation (MLE) is sufficient to guarantee polynomial sample complexity. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first provably sample-efficient result for learning from interactions in overcomplete POMDPs, where the number of latent states can be larger than the number of observations.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）的应用无处不在，其中代理学习做出一系列决策，尽管缺乏有关受控系统潜在状态的完整信息，也就是说，它们在状态的部分可观察性下行动。部分可观察的强化学习是出了名的困难——众所周知的信息论结果表明，学习部分可观察的马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）在最坏的情况下需要指数数量的样本。然而，这并不排除存在较大的 POMDP 子类，在这些子类上学习是容易处理的。在本文中，我们确定了这样一个子类，我们将其称为弱揭示 POMDP。这个家族排除了 POMDP 的病态实例，即观察结果缺乏信息，以至于学习变得困难。我们证明，对于弱揭示 POMDP，结合乐观和最大似然估计（MLE）的简单算法足以保证多项式样本复杂性。据我们所知，这是第一个可证明样本有效的结果，用于从超完备 POMDP 中的交互中进行学习，其中潜在状态的数量可能大于观察的数量。

AI.motivation: 部分可观测强化学习在现实应用中普遍存在，但传统方法在最坏情况下需指数级样本，限制了其实用性。需寻找可高效学习的POMDP子类。

AI.result: 证明该算法在弱揭示性POMDP中具有多项式样本复杂度，首次实现过度参数化POMDP的样本高效学习。
AI.conclusion: 通过界定弱揭示性条件，论文为部分可观测强化学习提供了理论保证，推动其在实际场景中的应用。

search_text: When Is Partially Observable Reinforcement Learning Not Scary? 部分可观察的强化学习什么时候不可怕？ Applications of Reinforcement Learning (RL), in which agents learn to make a sequence of decisions despite lacking complete information about the latent states of the controlled system, that is, they act under partial observability of the states, are ubiquitous. Partially observable RL can be notoriously difficult -- well-known information-theoretic results show that learning partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) requires an exponential number of samples in the worst case. Yet, this does not rule out the existence of large subclasses of POMDPs over which learning is tractable. In this paper we identify such a subclass, which we call weakly revealing POMDPs. This family rules out the pathological instances of POMDPs where observations are uninformative to a degree that makes learning hard. We prove that for weakly revealing POMDPs, a simple algorithm combining optimism and Maximum Likelihood Estimation (MLE) is sufficient to guarantee polynomial sample complexity. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first provably sample-efficient result for learning from interactions in overcomplete POMDPs, where the number of latent states can be larger than the number of observations. 强化学习（RL）的应用无处不在，其中代理学习做出一系列决策，尽管缺乏有关受控系统潜在状态的完整信息，也就是说，它们在状态的部分可观察性下行动。部分可观察的强化学习是出了名的困难——众所周知的信息论结果表明，学习部分可观察的马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）在最坏的情况下需要指数数量的样本。然而，这并不排除存在较大的 POMDP 子类，在这些子类上学习是容易处理的。在本文中，我们确定了这样一个子类，我们将其称为弱揭示 POMDP。这个家族排除了 POMDP 的病态实例，即观察结果缺乏信息，以至于学习变得困难。我们证明，对于弱揭示 POMDP，结合乐观和最大似然估计（MLE）的简单算法足以保证多项式样本复杂性。据我们所知，这是第一个可证明样本有效的结果，用于从超完备 POMDP 中的交互中进行学习，其中潜在状态的数量可能大于观察的数量。 本文旨在识别部分可观测强化学习（POMDP）中可高效学习的子类，并提出相应的算法。 Qinghua Liu,Alan Chung,Csaba Szepesvári,Chi Jin cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SY,stat.ML

title: Per-clip adaptive Lagrangian multiplier optimisation with low-resolution proxies
title_zh: 使用低分辨率代理的每剪辑自适应拉格朗日乘数优化
comment: ef:Proc. SPIE. 11510, Applications of Digital Image Processing XLIII 2020
comments: ef:Proc. SPIE. 11510, Applications of Digital Image Processing XLIII 2020
abstract: This work focuses on reducing the computational cost of repeated video encodes by using a lower resolution clip as a proxy. Features extracted from the low resolution clip are used to learn an optimal lagrange multiplier for rate control on the original resolution clip. In addition to reducing the computational cost and encode time by using lower resolution clips, we also investigate the use of older, but faster codecs such as H.264 to create proxies. This work shows that the computational load is reduced by 22 times using 144p proxies. Our tests are based on the YouTube UGC dataset, hence our results are based on a practical instance of the adaptive bitrate encoding problem. Further improvements are possible, by optimising the placement and sparsity of operating points required for the rate distortion curves.
summary: This work focuses on reducing the computational cost of repeated video encodes by using a lower resolution clip as a proxy. Features extracted from the low resolution clip are used to learn an optimal lagrange multiplier for rate control on the original resolution clip. In addition to reducing the computational cost and encode time by using lower resolution clips, we also investigate the use of older, but faster codecs such as H.264 to create proxies. This work shows that the computational load is reduced by 22 times using 144p proxies. Our tests are based on the YouTube UGC dataset, hence our results are based on a practical instance of the adaptive bitrate encoding problem. Further improvements are possible, by optimising the placement and sparsity of operating points required for the rate distortion curves.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的重点是通过使用较低分辨率的剪辑作为代理来减少重复视频编码的计算成本。从低分辨率剪辑中提取的特征用于学习最佳拉格朗日乘数，以对原始分辨率剪辑进行速率控制。除了通过使用较低分辨率的剪辑来降低计算成本和编码时间之外，我们还研究了使用较旧但速度更快的编解码器（例如 H.264）来创建代理。这项工作表明，使用 144p 代理，计算负载减少了 22 倍。我们的测试基于 YouTube UGC 数据集，因此我们的结果基于自适应比特率编码问题的实际实例。通过优化率失真曲线所需的操作点的位置和稀疏性，可以进一步改进。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出通过低分辨率代理和自适应拉格朗日乘数优化，降低视频编码的计算成本。
AI.motivation: 重复视频编码过程计算成本高昂，尤其在自适应码率编码场景中需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用低分辨率片段提取特征以学习最优拉格朗日乘数，并探索使用H.264等旧编解码器生成代理。
AI.result: 使用144p代理使计算负载降低22倍，基于YouTube UGC数据集验证了方法的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著减少编码计算量，未来可通过优化速率失真曲线操作点分布进一步提升效果。

title: Per Clip Lagrangian Multiplier Optimisation for HEVC
title_zh: HEVC 的每剪辑拉格朗日乘数优化
abstract: The majority of internet traffic is video content. This drives the demand for video compression in order to deliver high quality video at low target bitrates. This paper investigates the impact of adjusting the rate distortion equation on compression performance. An constant of proportionality, k, is used to modify the Lagrange multiplier used in H.265 (HEVC). Direct optimisation methods are deployed to maximise BD-Rate improvement for a particular clip. This leads to up to 21% BD-Rate improvement for an individual clip. Furthermore we use a more realistic corpus of material provided by YouTube. The results show that direct optimisation using BD-rate as the objective function can lead to further gains in bitrate savings that are not available with previous approaches.
summary: The majority of internet traffic is video content. This drives the demand for video compression in order to deliver high quality video at low target bitrates. This paper investigates the impact of adjusting the rate distortion equation on compression performance. An constant of proportionality, k, is used to modify the Lagrange multiplier used in H.265 (HEVC). Direct optimisation methods are deployed to maximise BD-Rate improvement for a particular clip. This leads to up to 21% BD-Rate improvement for an individual clip. Furthermore we use a more realistic corpus of material provided by YouTube. The results show that direct optimisation using BD-rate as the objective function can lead to further gains in bitrate savings that are not available with previous approaches.
abstract_zh: 大部分互联网流量是视频内容。这推动了对视频压缩的需求，以便以低目标比特率提供高质量视频。本文研究了调整率失真方程对压缩性能的影响。比例常数 k 用于修改 H.265 (HEVC) 中使用的拉格朗日乘数。采用直接优化方法来最大限度地提高特定剪辑的 BD 速率。这使得单个剪辑的 BD 速率提高了 21%。此外，我们使用 YouTube 提供的更真实的材料语料库。结果表明，使用 BD 速率作为目标函数的直接优化可以进一步节省比特率，这是以前的方法无法实现的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过调整率失真方程中的比例常数k来优化HEVC编码中的拉格朗日乘数，以提升视频压缩性能。
AI.motivation: 由于互联网流量主要为视频内容，需在低码率下实现高质量视频传输，传统压缩方法存在改进空间。
AI.method: 通过直接优化方法调整拉格朗日乘数比例常数k，针对单个视频片段最大化BD-Rate改进，并在YouTube数据集上验证效果。
AI.result: 单个视频片段的BD-Rate提升最高达21%，在真实数据集上相较传统方法实现额外码率节省。
AI.conclusion: 以BD-Rate为优化目标的直接拉格朗日乘数调整方法能有效提升视频压缩效率，优于现有技术。

authors_text: Sidi Yang,Tianhe Wu,Shuwei Shi,Shanshan Lao,Yuan Gong,Mingdeng Cao,Jiahao Wang,Yujiu Yang
title: MANIQA: Multi-dimension Attention Network for No-Reference Image Quality Assessment
title_zh: MANIQA：用于无参考图像质量评估的多维注意力网络
abstract: No-Reference Image Quality Assessment (NR-IQA) aims to assess the perceptual quality of images in accordance with human subjective perception. Unfortunately, existing NR-IQA methods are far from meeting the needs of predicting accurate quality scores on GAN-based distortion images. To this end, we propose Multi-dimension Attention Network for no-reference Image Quality Assessment (MANIQA) to improve the performance on GAN-based distortion. We firstly extract features via ViT, then to strengthen global and local interactions, we propose the Transposed Attention Block (TAB) and the Scale Swin Transformer Block (SSTB). These two modules apply attention mechanisms across the channel and spatial dimension, respectively. In this multi-dimensional manner, the modules cooperatively increase the interaction among different regions of images globally and locally. Finally, a dual branch structure for patch-weighted quality prediction is applied to predict the final score depending on the weight of each patch's score. Experimental results demonstrate that MANIQA outperforms state-of-the-art methods on four standard datasets (LIVE, TID2013, CSIQ, and KADID-10K) by a large margin. Besides, our method ranked first place in the final testing phase of the NTIRE 2022 Perceptual Image Quality Assessment Challenge Track 2: No-Reference. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/IIGROUP/MANIQA.
summary: No-Reference Image Quality Assessment (NR-IQA) aims to assess the perceptual quality of images in accordance with human subjective perception. Unfortunately, existing NR-IQA methods are far from meeting the needs of predicting accurate quality scores on GAN-based distortion images. To this end, we propose Multi-dimension Attention Network for no-reference Image Quality Assessment (MANIQA) to improve the performance on GAN-based distortion. We firstly extract features via ViT, then to strengthen global and local interactions, we propose the Transposed Attention Block (TAB) and the Scale Swin Transformer Block (SSTB). These two modules apply attention mechanisms across the channel and spatial dimension, respectively. In this multi-dimensional manner, the modules cooperatively increase the interaction among different regions of images globally and locally. Finally, a dual branch structure for patch-weighted quality prediction is applied to predict the final score depending on the weight of each patch's score. Experimental results demonstrate that MANIQA outperforms state-of-the-art methods on four standard datasets (LIVE, TID2013, CSIQ, and KADID-10K) by a large margin. Besides, our method ranked first place in the final testing phase of the NTIRE 2022 Perceptual Image Quality Assessment Challenge Track 2: No-Reference. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/IIGROUP/MANIQA.
abstract_zh: 无参考图像质量评估（NR-IQA）旨在根据人类主观感知来评估图像的感知质量。不幸的是，现有的 NR-IQA 方法远远不能满足在基于 GAN 的失真图像上预测准确质量分数的需求。为此，我们提出了用于无参考图像质量评估（MANIQA）的多维注意力网络，以提高基于 GAN 的失真的性能。我们首先通过 ViT 提取特征，然后为了加强全局和局部交互，我们提出了 Transpose Attention Block (TAB) 和 Scale Swin Transformer Block (SSTB)。这两个模块分别在通道和空间维度上应用注意力机制。通过这种多维方式，模块协同增加全局和局部图像不同区域之间的交互。最后，应用用于补丁加权质量预测的双分支结构来根据每个补丁分数的权重来预测最终分数。实验结果表明，MANIQA 在四个标准数据集（LIVE、TID2013、CSIQ 和 KADID-10K）上的性能大幅优于最先进的方法。此外，我们的方法在 NTIRE 2022 感知图像质量评估挑战赛道 2：无参考的最终测试阶段排名第一。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/IIGROUP/MANIQA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MANIQA方法，旨在提升基于GAN生成失真图像的无参考图像质量评估性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无参考图像质量评估方法在处理GAN生成的失真图像时准确性不足，需开发更有效的模型。
AI.method: 采用ViT提取特征，设计跨通道与空间维度的Transposed Attention Block（TAB）和Scale Swin Transformer Block（SSTB），结合双分支结构实现块加权质量预测。
AI.result: 在LIVE等四个标准数据集及NTIRE 2022挑战赛中均优于现有方法，排名第一。
AI.conclusion: 多维度注意力机制与双分支结构有效提升了GAN失真图像的质量评估性能。

authors_text: Jongmin Lee,Cosmin Paduraru,Daniel J. Mankowitz,Nicolas Heess,Doina Precup,Kee-Eung Kim,Arthur Guez
title: COptiDICE: Offline Constrained Reinforcement Learning via Stationary Distribution Correction Estimation
title_zh: COptiDICE：通过平稳分布校正估计进行离线约束强化学习
abstract: We consider the offline constrained reinforcement learning (RL) problem, in which the agent aims to compute a policy that maximizes expected return while satisfying given cost constraints, learning only from a pre-collected dataset. This problem setting is appealing in many real-world scenarios, where direct interaction with the environment is costly or risky, and where the resulting policy should comply with safety constraints. However, it is challenging to compute a policy that guarantees satisfying the cost constraints in the offline RL setting, since the off-policy evaluation inherently has an estimation error. In this paper, we present an offline constrained RL algorithm that optimizes the policy in the space of the stationary distribution. Our algorithm, COptiDICE, directly estimates the stationary distribution corrections of the optimal policy with respect to returns, while constraining the cost upper bound, with the goal of yielding a cost-conservative policy for actual constraint satisfaction. Experimental results show that COptiDICE attains better policies in terms of constraint satisfaction and return-maximization, outperforming baseline algorithms.
summary: We consider the offline constrained reinforcement learning (RL) problem, in which the agent aims to compute a policy that maximizes expected return while satisfying given cost constraints, learning only from a pre-collected dataset. This problem setting is appealing in many real-world scenarios, where direct interaction with the environment is costly or risky, and where the resulting policy should comply with safety constraints. However, it is challenging to compute a policy that guarantees satisfying the cost constraints in the offline RL setting, since the off-policy evaluation inherently has an estimation error. In this paper, we present an offline constrained RL algorithm that optimizes the policy in the space of the stationary distribution. Our algorithm, COptiDICE, directly estimates the stationary distribution corrections of the optimal policy with respect to returns, while constraining the cost upper bound, with the goal of yielding a cost-conservative policy for actual constraint satisfaction. Experimental results show that COptiDICE attains better policies in terms of constraint satisfaction and return-maximization, outperforming baseline algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑离线约束强化学习（RL）问题，其中代理旨在计算一个策略，在满足给定成本约束的同时最大化预期回报，仅从预先收集的数据集中学习。这种问题设置在许多现实场景中很有吸引力，在这些场景中，与环境的直接交互成本高昂或存在风险，并且最终的策略应符合安全约束。然而，计算保证满足离线 RL 设置中的成本约束的策略具有挑战性，因为离策略评估本质上存在估计误差。在本文中，我们提出了一种离线约束强化学习算法，该算法可以优化平稳分布空间中的策略。我们的算法 COptiDICE 直接估计最优策略相对于回报的平稳分布修正，同时限制成本上限，目标是产生实际约束满足的成本保守策略。实验结果表明，COptiDICE 在约束满足和回报最大化方面获得了更好的策略，优于基线算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种离线约束强化学习算法COptiDICE，通过估计最优策略的平稳分布修正来优化策略，同时满足成本约束。
AI.motivation: 在现实场景中，直接与环境交互可能成本高昂或存在风险，且策略需满足安全约束。然而，现有离线强化学习方法难以保证成本约束的满足，因策略评估存在估计误差。
AI.method: COptiDICE在平稳分布空间中优化策略，直接估计最优策略相对于回报的平稳分布修正，并通过约束成本上限确保策略保守性。
AI.result: 实验表明，COptiDICE在约束满足和回报最大化方面优于基线算法，生成更优策略。
AI.conclusion: COptiDICE通过平稳分布修正估计有效解决离线约束强化学习问题，在安全性和性能上取得平衡。

title: Revisiting Vicinal Risk Minimization for Partially Supervised Multi-Label Classification Under Data Scarcity
title_zh: 重新审视数据稀缺下部分监督多标签分类的局部风险最小化
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2022 Workshop on Learning with Limited Labelled Data for Image and Video Understanding
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2022 Workshop on Learning with Limited Labelled Data for Image and Video Understanding
abstract: Due to the high human cost of annotation, it is non-trivial to curate a large-scale medical dataset that is fully labeled for all classes of interest. Instead, it would be convenient to collect multiple small partially labeled datasets from different matching sources, where the medical images may have only been annotated for a subset of classes of interest. This paper offers an empirical understanding of an under-explored problem, namely partially supervised multi-label classification (PSMLC), where a multi-label classifier is trained with only partially labeled medical images. In contrast to the fully supervised counterpart, the partial supervision caused by medical data scarcity has non-trivial negative impacts on the model performance. A potential remedy could be augmenting the partial labels. Though vicinal risk minimization (VRM) has been a promising solution to improve the generalization ability of the model, its application to PSMLC remains an open question. To bridge the methodological gap, we provide the first VRM-based solution to PSMLC. The empirical results also provide insights into future research directions on partially supervised learning under data scarcity.
summary: Due to the high human cost of annotation, it is non-trivial to curate a large-scale medical dataset that is fully labeled for all classes of interest. Instead, it would be convenient to collect multiple small partially labeled datasets from different matching sources, where the medical images may have only been annotated for a subset of classes of interest. This paper offers an empirical understanding of an under-explored problem, namely partially supervised multi-label classification (PSMLC), where a multi-label classifier is trained with only partially labeled medical images. In contrast to the fully supervised counterpart, the partial supervision caused by medical data scarcity has non-trivial negative impacts on the model performance. A potential remedy could be augmenting the partial labels. Though vicinal risk minimization (VRM) has been a promising solution to improve the generalization ability of the model, its application to PSMLC remains an open question. To bridge the methodological gap, we provide the first VRM-based solution to PSMLC. The empirical results also provide insights into future research directions on partially supervised learning under data scarcity.
abstract_zh: 由于注释的人力成本很高，因此整理一个针对所有感兴趣类别进行完全标记的大规模医学数据集并非易事。相反，从不同的匹配源收集多个小型的部分标记的数据集会很方便，其中医学图像可能仅针对感兴趣的类别的子集进行了注释。本文提供了对一个尚未探索的问题的实证理解，即部分监督多标签分类（PSMLC），其中仅使用部分标记的医学图像来训练多标签分类器。与完全监督的对应部分相比，医疗数据稀缺引起的部分监督对模型性能产生了不小的负面影响。一个潜在的补救措施可能是增加部分标签。尽管邻位风险最小化 (VRM) 是提高模型泛化能力的一种有前景的解决方案，但其在 PSMLC 中的应用仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。为了弥补方法上的差距，我们为 PSMLC 提供了第一个基于 VRM 的解决方案。实证结果还为数据稀缺下部分监督学习的未来研究方向提供了见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于邻域风险最小化（VRM）的方法，用于解决数据稀缺条件下的部分监督多标签分类（PSMLC）问题。
AI.motivation: 医疗图像数据标注成本高昂，难以获得完全标注的大规模数据集，而部分标注的数据源更易获取，但现有方法在数据稀缺下的PSMLC性能不足。
AI.method: 首次将VRM框架应用于PSMLC，通过增强部分标签的鲁棒性提升模型泛化能力，并结合多标签分类特性设计损失函数。
AI.result: 实验验证了VRM在PSMLC中的有效性，揭示了部分监督学习在数据稀缺场景下的关键挑战与改进方向。
AI.conclusion: VRM为PSMLC提供了可行解决方案，未来需进一步探索数据稀缺场景下的标签增强策略与模型优化方法。

ai_content.result: 实验验证了VRM在PSMLC中的有效性，揭示了部分监督学习在数据稀缺场景下的关键挑战与改进方向。
ai_content.conclusion: VRM为PSMLC提供了可行解决方案，未来需进一步探索数据稀缺场景下的标签增强策略与模型优化方法。

search_text: Revisiting Vicinal Risk Minimization for Partially Supervised Multi-Label Classification Under Data Scarcity 重新审视数据稀缺下部分监督多标签分类的局部风险最小化 Due to the high human cost of annotation, it is non-trivial to curate a large-scale medical dataset that is fully labeled for all classes of interest. Instead, it would be convenient to collect multiple small partially labeled datasets from different matching sources, where the medical images may have only been annotated for a subset of classes of interest. This paper offers an empirical understanding of an under-explored problem, namely partially supervised multi-label classification (PSMLC), where a multi-label classifier is trained with only partially labeled medical images. In contrast to the fully supervised counterpart, the partial supervision caused by medical data scarcity has non-trivial negative impacts on the model performance. A potential remedy could be augmenting the partial labels. Though vicinal risk minimization (VRM) has been a promising solution to improve the generalization ability of the model, its application to PSMLC remains an open question. To bridge the methodological gap, we provide the first VRM-based solution to PSMLC. The empirical results also provide insights into future research directions on partially supervised learning under data scarcity. 由于注释的人力成本很高，因此整理一个针对所有感兴趣类别进行完全标记的大规模医学数据集并非易事。相反，从不同的匹配源收集多个小型的部分标记的数据集会很方便，其中医学图像可能仅针对感兴趣的类别的子集进行了注释。本文提供了对一个尚未探索的问题的实证理解，即部分监督多标签分类（PSMLC），其中仅使用部分标记的医学图像来训练多标签分类器。与完全监督的对应部分相比，医疗数据稀缺引起的部分监督对模型性能产生了不小的负面影响。一个潜在的补救措施可能是增加部分标签。尽管邻位风险最小化 (VRM) 是提高模型泛化能力的一种有前景的解决方案，但其在 PSMLC 中的应用仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。为了弥补方法上的差距，我们为 PSMLC 提供了第一个基于 VRM 的解决方案。实证结果还为数据稀缺下部分监督学习的未来研究方向提供了见解。 本文提出了一种基于邻域风险最小化（VRM）的方法，用于解决数据稀缺条件下的部分监督多标签分类（PSMLC）问题。 Nanqing Dong,Jiayi Wang,Irina Voiculescu cs.LG,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Saachi Jain,Hadi Salman,Eric Wong,Pengchuan Zhang,Vibhav Vineet,Sai Vemprala,Aleksander Madry
title: Missingness Bias in Model Debugging
title_zh: 模型调试中的缺失偏差
abstract: Missingness, or the absence of features from an input, is a concept fundamental to many model debugging tools. However, in computer vision, pixels cannot simply be removed from an image. One thus tends to resort to heuristics such as blacking out pixels, which may in turn introduce bias into the debugging process. We study such biases and, in particular, show how transformer-based architectures can enable a more natural implementation of missingness, which side-steps these issues and improves the reliability of model debugging in practice. Our code is available at https://github.com/madrylab/missingness
summary: Missingness, or the absence of features from an input, is a concept fundamental to many model debugging tools. However, in computer vision, pixels cannot simply be removed from an image. One thus tends to resort to heuristics such as blacking out pixels, which may in turn introduce bias into the debugging process. We study such biases and, in particular, show how transformer-based architectures can enable a more natural implementation of missingness, which side-steps these issues and improves the reliability of model debugging in practice. Our code is available at https://github.com/madrylab/missingness
abstract_zh: 缺失或输入中缺少特征是许多模型调试工具的基本概念。然而，在计算机视觉中，像素不能简单地从图像中删除。因此，人们倾向于诉诸启发式方法，例如将像素涂黑，这反过来可能会给调试过程带来偏差。我们研究了此类偏差，特别是展示了基于变压器的架构如何能够更自然地实现缺失，从而回避这些问题并提高实践中模型调试的可靠性。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/madrylab/missingness

AI.tldr: 本文研究了模型调试中缺失性偏差的问题，并提出使用基于Transformer的架构来更自然地实现缺失性，从而提高模型调试的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在计算机视觉中处理缺失数据时可能引入偏差，影响模型调试的准确性，需要更可靠的方法。
AI.method: 采用基于Transformer的架构，利用自注意力机制更自然地处理缺失数据，避免传统遮挡方法带来的偏差。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法有效减少了缺失性偏差，提高了模型调试的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 基于Transformer的缺失性方法能够有效减少调试偏差，提升模型调试的可靠性。
