title: Deep learning-based surrogate model for 3-D patient-specific computational fluid dynamics
title_zh: 基于深度学习的 3D 患者特定计算流体动力学替代模型
abstract: Optimization and uncertainty quantification have been playing an increasingly important role in computational hemodynamics. However, existing methods based on principled modeling and classic numerical techniques have faced significant challenges, particularly when it comes to complex 3D patient-specific shapes in the real world. First, it is notoriously challenging to parameterize the input space of arbitrarily complex 3-D geometries. Second, the process often involves massive forward simulations, which are extremely computationally demanding or even infeasible. We propose a novel deep learning surrogate modeling solution to address these challenges and enable rapid hemodynamic predictions. Specifically, a statistical generative model for 3-D patient-specific shapes is developed based on a small set of baseline patient-specific geometries. An unsupervised shape correspondence solution is used to enable geometric morphing and scalable shape synthesis statistically. Moreover, a simulation routine is developed for automatic data generation by automatic meshing, boundary setting, simulation, and post-processing. An efficient supervised learning solution is proposed to map the geometric inputs to the hemodynamics predictions in latent spaces. Numerical studies on aortic flows are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness and merit of the proposed techniques.
summary: Optimization and uncertainty quantification have been playing an increasingly important role in computational hemodynamics. However, existing methods based on principled modeling and classic numerical techniques have faced significant challenges, particularly when it comes to complex 3D patient-specific shapes in the real world. First, it is notoriously challenging to parameterize the input space of arbitrarily complex 3-D geometries. Second, the process often involves massive forward simulations, which are extremely computationally demanding or even infeasible. We propose a novel deep learning surrogate modeling solution to address these challenges and enable rapid hemodynamic predictions. Specifically, a statistical generative model for 3-D patient-specific shapes is developed based on a small set of baseline patient-specific geometries. An unsupervised shape correspondence solution is used to enable geometric morphing and scalable shape synthesis statistically. Moreover, a simulation routine is developed for automatic data generation by automatic meshing, boundary setting, simulation, and post-processing. An efficient supervised learning solution is proposed to map the geometric inputs to the hemodynamics predictions in latent spaces. Numerical studies on aortic flows are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness and merit of the proposed techniques.
abstract_zh: 优化和不确定性量化在计算血流动力学中发挥着越来越重要的作用。然而，基于原则建模和经典数值技术的现有方法面临着巨大的挑战，特别是当涉及到现实世界中复杂的 3D 患者特定形状时。首先，参数化任意复杂的 3D 几何形状的输入空间是众所周知的挑战。其次，该过程通常涉及大量的正向模拟，这对计算量要求极高甚至不可行。我们提出了一种新颖的深度学习替代建模解决方案来应对这些挑战并实现快速血流动力学预测。具体来说，基于一小组基线患者特定几何形状开发了 3D 患者特定形状的统计生成模型。使用无监督的形状对应解决方案来实现几何变形和可扩展的形状统计统计合成。此外，还开发了一个仿真例程，用于通过自动网格划分、边界设置、仿真和后处理来自动生成数据。提出了一种有效的监督学习解决方案，将几何输入映射到潜在空间中的血流动力学预测。对主动脉血流进行数值研究以证明所提出技术的有效性和优点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的代理模型，用于解决三维患者特异性计算流体动力学中的优化和不确定性量化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理复杂三维患者特异性几何形状时面临参数化困难和计算成本高昂的挑战，亟需高效替代方案。
AI.method: 开发统计生成模型生成三维患者几何形状，结合无监督形状对应实现形态变换；构建自动仿真流程并设计监督学习模型，将几何输入映射到潜空间中的血流动力学预测。
AI.result: 通过主动脉血流的数值实验验证了该方法在效率和准确性上的优势，证明其能有效处理复杂几何的快速预测。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习代理模型成功克服了传统计算流体动力学在患者特异性分析中的瓶颈，为临床应用提供了可行的技术路径。

title: Learning heuristics for A*
title_zh: A* 的学习启发法
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures. To appear at the ICLR 2022 GroundedML Workshop
comments: 7 pages, 2 figures. To appear at the ICLR 2022 GroundedML Workshop
abstract: Path finding in graphs is one of the most studied classes of problems in computer science. In this context, search algorithms are often extended with heuristics for a more efficient search of target nodes. In this work we combine recent advancements in Neural Algorithmic Reasoning to learn efficient heuristic functions for path finding problems on graphs. At training time, we exploit multi-task learning to learn jointly the Dijkstra's algorithm and a consistent heuristic function for the A* search algorithm. At inference time, we plug our learnt heuristics into the A* algorithm. Results show that running A* over the learnt heuristics value can greatly speed up target node searching compared to Dijkstra, while still finding minimal-cost paths.
summary: Path finding in graphs is one of the most studied classes of problems in computer science. In this context, search algorithms are often extended with heuristics for a more efficient search of target nodes. In this work we combine recent advancements in Neural Algorithmic Reasoning to learn efficient heuristic functions for path finding problems on graphs. At training time, we exploit multi-task learning to learn jointly the Dijkstra's algorithm and a consistent heuristic function for the A* search algorithm. At inference time, we plug our learnt heuristics into the A* algorithm. Results show that running A* over the learnt heuristics value can greatly speed up target node searching compared to Dijkstra, while still finding minimal-cost paths.
abstract_zh: 图中的路径查找是计算机科学中研究最多的问题类别之一。在这种情况下，搜索算法通常通过启发式方法进行扩展，以更有效地搜索目标节点。在这项工作中，我们结合了神经算法推理的最新进展，学习有效的启发式函数来解决图上的路径查找问题。在训练时，我们利用多任务学习来联合学习 Dijkstra 算法和 A* 搜索算法的一致启发式函数。在推理时，我们将学习到的启发式方法插入到 A* 算法中。结果表明，与 Dijkstra 相比，在学习的启发式值上运行 A* 可以大大加快目标节点搜索速度，同时仍然找到最小成本路径。

AI.tldr: 学习用于A*算法的启发式函数以加速路径搜索
AI.motivation: 传统启发式函数设计依赖领域知识且难以优化，需通过机器学习自动获取高效启发式策略
AI.method: 采用多任务学习框架，联合训练Dijkstra算法和A*的启发式函数
AI.result: A*结合学习启发式函数在保持最短路径的同时显著加速搜索
AI.conclusion: 神经网络可有效学习路径搜索启发式函数，为组合优化问题提供新解决思路

search_text: Learning heuristics for A* A* 的学习启发法 Path finding in graphs is one of the most studied classes of problems in computer science. In this context, search algorithms are often extended with heuristics for a more efficient search of target nodes. In this work we combine recent advancements in Neural Algorithmic Reasoning to learn efficient heuristic functions for path finding problems on graphs. At training time, we exploit multi-task learning to learn jointly the Dijkstra's algorithm and a consistent heuristic function for the A* search algorithm. At inference time, we plug our learnt heuristics into the A* algorithm. Results show that running A* over the learnt heuristics value can greatly speed up target node searching compared to Dijkstra, while still finding minimal-cost paths. 图中的路径查找是计算机科学中研究最多的问题类别之一。在这种情况下，搜索算法通常通过启发式方法进行扩展，以更有效地搜索目标节点。在这项工作中，我们结合了神经算法推理的最新进展，学习有效的启发式函数来解决图上的路径查找问题。在训练时，我们利用多任务学习来联合学习 Dijkstra 算法和 A* 搜索算法的一致启发式函数。在推理时，我们将学习到的启发式方法插入到 A* 算法中。结果表明，与 Dijkstra 相比，在学习的启发式值上运行 A* 可以大大加快目标节点搜索速度，同时仍然找到最小成本路径。 学习用于A*算法的启发式函数以加速路径搜索 Danilo Numeroso,Davide Bacciu,Petar Veličković cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Learning to Imagine: Diversify Memory for Incremental Learning using Unlabeled Data
title_zh: 学习想象：使用未标记数据实现增量学习的记忆多样化
abstract: Deep neural network (DNN) suffers from catastrophic forgetting when learning incrementally, which greatly limits its applications. Although maintaining a handful of samples (called `exemplars`) of each task could alleviate forgetting to some extent, existing methods are still limited by the small number of exemplars since these exemplars are too few to carry enough task-specific knowledge, and therefore the forgetting remains. To overcome this problem, we propose to `imagine` diverse counterparts of given exemplars referring to the abundant semantic-irrelevant information from unlabeled data. Specifically, we develop a learnable feature generator to diversify exemplars by adaptively generating diverse counterparts of exemplars based on semantic information from exemplars and semantically-irrelevant information from unlabeled data. We introduce semantic contrastive learning to enforce the generated samples to be semantic consistent with exemplars and perform semanticdecoupling contrastive learning to encourage diversity of generated samples. The diverse generated samples could effectively prevent DNN from forgetting when learning new tasks. Our method does not bring any extra inference cost and outperforms state-of-the-art methods on two benchmarks CIFAR-100 and ImageNet-Subset by a clear margin.
summary: Deep neural network (DNN) suffers from catastrophic forgetting when learning incrementally, which greatly limits its applications. Although maintaining a handful of samples (called `exemplars`) of each task could alleviate forgetting to some extent, existing methods are still limited by the small number of exemplars since these exemplars are too few to carry enough task-specific knowledge, and therefore the forgetting remains. To overcome this problem, we propose to `imagine` diverse counterparts of given exemplars referring to the abundant semantic-irrelevant information from unlabeled data. Specifically, we develop a learnable feature generator to diversify exemplars by adaptively generating diverse counterparts of exemplars based on semantic information from exemplars and semantically-irrelevant information from unlabeled data. We introduce semantic contrastive learning to enforce the generated samples to be semantic consistent with exemplars and perform semanticdecoupling contrastive learning to encourage diversity of generated samples. The diverse generated samples could effectively prevent DNN from forgetting when learning new tasks. Our method does not bring any extra inference cost and outperforms state-of-the-art methods on two benchmarks CIFAR-100 and ImageNet-Subset by a clear margin.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）在增量学习时会遭受灾难性遗忘，这极大地限制了其应用。尽管为每个任务维护少量样本（称为“范例”）可以在一定程度上减轻遗忘，但现有方法仍然受到范例数量较少的限制，因为这些范例太少而无法携带足够的特定于任务的知识，因此遗忘仍然存在。为了克服这个问题，我们建议“想象”给定样本的不同对应物，参考来自未标记数据的丰富的语义无关信息。具体来说，我们开发了一种可学习的特征生成器，通过基于来自样本的语义信息和来自未标记数据的语义无关信息自适应地生成样本的不同对应项，从而使样本多样化。我们引入语义对比学习来强制生成的样本在语义上与范例一致，并执行语义解耦对比学习以鼓励生成样本的多样性。多样化的生成样本可以有效防止 DNN 在学习新任务时遗忘。我们的方法不会带来任何额外的推理成本，并且在 CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet-Subset 两个基准上明显优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用未标记数据生成多样化样本的方法，以解决深度神经网络在增量学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有增量学习方法依赖少量样本（exemplars）缓解遗忘，但样本数量不足导致任务特定知识保存不充分，遗忘问题依然严重。
AI.method: 设计可学习的特征生成器，结合exemplars的语义信息和未标记数据的语义无关信息生成多样化样本，并引入语义对比学习与语义解耦对比学习确保生成样本的语义一致性和多样性。
AI.result: 该方法在CIFAR-100和ImageNet-Subset基准测试中显著优于现有先进方法，且无额外推理成本。
AI.conclusion: 通过生成多样化样本有效防止灾难性遗忘，提升了增量学习的性能，同时保持了计算效率。

title: Feature Structure Distillation with Centered Kernel Alignment in BERT Transferring
title_zh: BERT 传输中具有中心核对齐的特征结构蒸馏
comment: This work has been submitted to the ELSEVIER for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the ELSEVIER for possible publication
abstract: Knowledge distillation is an approach to transfer information on representations from a teacher to a student by reducing their difference. A challenge of this approach is to reduce the flexibility of the student's representations inducing inaccurate learning of the teacher's knowledge. To resolve it in transferring, we investigate distillation of structures of representations specified to three types: intra-feature, local inter-feature, global inter-feature structures. To transfer them, we introduce feature structure distillation methods based on the Centered Kernel Alignment, which assigns a consistent value to similar features structures and reveals more informative relations. In particular, a memory-augmented transfer method with clustering is implemented for the global structures. The methods are empirically analyzed on the nine tasks for language understanding of the GLUE dataset with Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers (BERT), which is a representative neural language model. In the results, the proposed methods effectively transfer the three types of structures and improve performance compared to state-of-the-art distillation methods. Indeed, the code for the methods is available in https://github.com/maroo-sky/FSD.
summary: Knowledge distillation is an approach to transfer information on representations from a teacher to a student by reducing their difference. A challenge of this approach is to reduce the flexibility of the student's representations inducing inaccurate learning of the teacher's knowledge. To resolve it in transferring, we investigate distillation of structures of representations specified to three types: intra-feature, local inter-feature, global inter-feature structures. To transfer them, we introduce feature structure distillation methods based on the Centered Kernel Alignment, which assigns a consistent value to similar features structures and reveals more informative relations. In particular, a memory-augmented transfer method with clustering is implemented for the global structures. The methods are empirically analyzed on the nine tasks for language understanding of the GLUE dataset with Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers (BERT), which is a representative neural language model. In the results, the proposed methods effectively transfer the three types of structures and improve performance compared to state-of-the-art distillation methods. Indeed, the code for the methods is available in https://github.com/maroo-sky/FSD.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏是一种通过减少教师与学生之间的差异将表征信息传递给学生的​​方法。这种方法的一个挑战是降低学生表达的灵活性，从而导致教师知识的学习不准确。为了解决转移中的问题，我们研究了指定为三种类型的表示结构的蒸馏：特征内、局部特征间、全局特征间结构。为了转移它们，我们引入了基于中心核对齐的特征结构蒸馏方法，该方法为相似的特征结构分配一致的值并揭示更多信息关系。特别是，针对全局结构实现了具有集群的内存增强传输方法。这些方法通过 Transformers 双向编码器表示（BERT）（一种代表性的神经语言模型）对 GLUE 数据集的九个语言理解任务进行了实证分析。结果表明，与最先进的蒸馏方法相比，所提出的方法有效地转移了三种类型的结构并提高了性能。事实上，这些方法的代码可以在 https://github.com/maroo-sky/FSD 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于中心核对齐的特征结构蒸馏方法，用于BERT模型的知识迁移任务，通过保留三种特征结构关系提升学生模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏方法难以同时保持学生模型灵活性与教师模型知识准确性，尤其在特征结构迁移方面存在局限性。
AI.method: 设计基于中心核对齐的特征结构蒸馏框架，分别处理特征内部结构、局部跨特征结构和全局跨特征结构，并引入聚类增强的记忆机制处理全局结构。
AI.result: 在GLUE数据集九个自然语言理解任务中，该方法相较现有蒸馏技术取得性能提升，且代码已开源验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化特征迁移机制，本文方法有效解决了知识蒸馏中的表示灵活性与知识准确性矛盾，为模型压缩提供新思路。

The methods are empirically analyzed on the nine tasks for language understanding of the GLUE dataset with Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers (BERT), which is a representative neural language model. In the results, the proposed methods effectively transfer the three types of structures and improve performance compared to state-of-the-art distillation methods. Indeed, the code for the methods is available in https://github.com/maroo-sky/FSD. 知识蒸馏是一种通过减少教师与学生之间的差异将表征信息传递给学生的​​方法。这种方法的一个挑战是降低学生表达的灵活性，从而导致教师知识的学习不准确。为了解决转移中的问题，我们研究了指定为三种类型的表示结构的蒸馏：特征内、局部特征间、全局特征间结构。为了转移它们，我们引入了基于中心核对齐的特征结构蒸馏方法，该方法为相似的特征结构分配一致的值并揭示更多信息关系。特别是，针对全局结构实现了具有集群的内存增强传输方法。这些方法通过 Transformers 双向编码器表示（BERT）（一种代表性的神经语言模型）对 GLUE 数据集的九个语言理解任务进行了实证分析。结果表明，与最先进的蒸馏方法相比，所提出的方法有效地转移了三种类型的结构并提高了性能。事实上，这些方法的代码可以在 https://github.com/maroo-sky/FSD 中找到。 本文提出一种基于中心核对齐的特征结构蒸馏方法，用于BERT模型的知识迁移任务，通过保留三种特征结构关系提升学生模型性能。 Hee-Jun Jung,Doyeon Kim,Seung-Hoon Na,Kangil Kim cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Blockwise Streaming Transformer for Spoken Language Understanding and Simultaneous Speech Translation
title_zh: 用于口语理解和同步语音翻译的 Blockwise Streaming Transformer
abstract: Although Transformers have gained success in several speech processing tasks like spoken language understanding (SLU) and speech translation (ST), achieving online processing while keeping competitive performance is still essential for real-world interaction. In this paper, we take the first step on streaming SLU and simultaneous ST using a blockwise streaming Transformer, which is based on contextual block processing and blockwise synchronous beam search. Furthermore, we design an automatic speech recognition (ASR)-based intermediate loss regularization for the streaming SLU task to improve the classification performance further. As for the simultaneous ST task, we propose a cross-lingual encoding method, which employs a CTC branch optimized with target language translations. In addition, the CTC translation output is also used to refine the search space with CTC prefix score, achieving joint CTC/attention simultaneous translation for the first time. Experiments for SLU are conducted on FSC and SLURP corpora, while the ST task is evaluated on Fisher-CallHome Spanish and MuST-C En-De corpora. Experimental results show that the blockwise streaming Transformer achieves competitive results compared to offline models, especially with our proposed methods that further yield a 2.4% accuracy gain on the SLU task and a 4.3 BLEU gain on the ST task over streaming baselines.
summary: Although Transformers have gained success in several speech processing tasks like spoken language understanding (SLU) and speech translation (ST), achieving online processing while keeping competitive performance is still essential for real-world interaction. In this paper, we take the first step on streaming SLU and simultaneous ST using a blockwise streaming Transformer, which is based on contextual block processing and blockwise synchronous beam search. Furthermore, we design an automatic speech recognition (ASR)-based intermediate loss regularization for the streaming SLU task to improve the classification performance further. As for the simultaneous ST task, we propose a cross-lingual encoding method, which employs a CTC branch optimized with target language translations. In addition, the CTC translation output is also used to refine the search space with CTC prefix score, achieving joint CTC/attention simultaneous translation for the first time. Experiments for SLU are conducted on FSC and SLURP corpora, while the ST task is evaluated on Fisher-CallHome Spanish and MuST-C En-De corpora. Experimental results show that the blockwise streaming Transformer achieves competitive results compared to offline models, especially with our proposed methods that further yield a 2.4% accuracy gain on the SLU task and a 4.3 BLEU gain on the ST task over streaming baselines.
abstract_zh: 尽管 Transformers 在口语理解 (SLU) 和语音翻译 (ST) 等多项语音处理任务中取得了成功，但在保持竞争性能的同时实现在线处理对于现实世界的交互仍然至关重要。在本文中，我们使用基于上下文块处理和块同步波束搜索的块式流式 Transformer 迈出了流式 SLU 和同步 ST 的第一步。此外，我们为流式 SLU 任务设计了一种基于自动语音识别（ASR）的中间损失正则化，以进一步提高分类性能。对于同步 ST 任务，我们提出了一种跨语言编码方法，该方法采用经过目标语言翻译优化的 CTC 分支。此外，CTC翻译输出还用于通过CTC前缀分数细化搜索空间，首次实现联合CTC/attention同时翻译。 SLU 的实验是在 FSC 和 SLURP 语料库上进行的，而 ST 任务是在 Fisher-CallHome 西班牙语和 MuST-C En-De 语料库上进行评估的。实验结果表明，与离线模型相比，块式流式 Transformer 取得了有竞争力的结果，尤其是我们提出的方法，在流式基线上，SLU 任务的精度进一步提高了 2.4%，ST 任务的 BLEU 提高了 4.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于块流式处理的Transformer模型，用于实现口语理解（SLU）和同时语音翻译（ST）的在线处理。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在语音处理任务中表现优异，但实现保持竞争力的在线处理仍是实际交互中的关键需求。
AI.method: 设计了基于上下文块处理和块流式同步束搜索的流式Transformer，并引入ASR中间损失正则化提升SLU性能；针对ST任务，提出跨语言编码方法，结合CTC分支与目标语言翻译优化，并首次实现CTC/注意力联合翻译。
AI.result: 在FSC、SLURP等数据集上，SLU任务准确率较流式基线提升2.4%，ST任务BLEU值提升4.3，性能接近离线模型。
AI.conclusion: 块流式Transformer有效解决了SLU和ST的实时性需求，所提方法显著提升了流式处理的准确性。

authors_text: Runmin Cong,Ning Yang,Chongyi Li,Huazhu Fu,Yao Zhao,Qingming Huang,Sam Kwong
title: Global-and-Local Collaborative Learning for Co-Salient Object Detection
title_zh: 用于共同显着目标检测的全局和局部协作学习
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics 2022, project page: https://rmcong.github.io/proj_GLNet.html
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics 2022, project page: https://rmcong.github.io/proj_GLNet.html
abstract: The goal of co-salient object detection (CoSOD) is to discover salient objects that commonly appear in a query group containing two or more relevant images. Therefore, how to effectively extract inter-image correspondence is crucial for the CoSOD task. In this paper, we propose a global-and-local collaborative learning architecture, which includes a global correspondence modeling (GCM) and a local correspondence modeling (LCM) to capture comprehensive inter-image corresponding relationship among different images from the global and local perspectives. Firstly, we treat different images as different time slices and use 3D convolution to integrate all intra features intuitively, which can more fully extract the global group semantics. Secondly, we design a pairwise correlation transformation (PCT) to explore similarity correspondence between pairwise images and combine the multiple local pairwise correspondences to generate the local inter-image relationship. Thirdly, the inter-image relationships of the GCM and LCM are integrated through a global-and-local correspondence aggregation (GLA) module to explore more comprehensive inter-image collaboration cues. Finally, the intra- and inter-features are adaptively integrated by an intra-and-inter weighting fusion (AEWF) module to learn co-saliency features and predict the co-saliency map. The proposed GLNet is evaluated on three prevailing CoSOD benchmark datasets, demonstrating that our model trained on a small dataset (about 3k images) still outperforms eleven state-of-the-art competitors trained on some large datasets (about 8k-200k images).
summary: The goal of co-salient object detection (CoSOD) is to discover salient objects that commonly appear in a query group containing two or more relevant images. Therefore, how to effectively extract inter-image correspondence is crucial for the CoSOD task. In this paper, we propose a global-and-local collaborative learning architecture, which includes a global correspondence modeling (GCM) and a local correspondence modeling (LCM) to capture comprehensive inter-image corresponding relationship among different images from the global and local perspectives. Firstly, we treat different images as different time slices and use 3D convolution to integrate all intra features intuitively, which can more fully extract the global group semantics. Secondly, we design a pairwise correlation transformation (PCT) to explore similarity correspondence between pairwise images and combine the multiple local pairwise correspondences to generate the local inter-image relationship. Thirdly, the inter-image relationships of the GCM and LCM are integrated through a global-and-local correspondence aggregation (GLA) module to explore more comprehensive inter-image collaboration cues. Finally, the intra- and inter-features are adaptively integrated by an intra-and-inter weighting fusion (AEWF) module to learn co-saliency features and predict the co-saliency map. The proposed GLNet is evaluated on three prevailing CoSOD benchmark datasets, demonstrating that our model trained on a small dataset (about 3k images) still outperforms eleven state-of-the-art competitors trained on some large datasets (about 8k-200k images).
abstract_zh: 共同显着对象检测 (CoSOD) 的目标是发现通常出现在包含两个或更多相关图像的查询组中的显着对象。因此，如何有效地提取图像间的对应关系对于CoSOD任务至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种全局和局部协作学习架构，其中包括全局对应建模（GCM）和局部对应建模（LCM），以从全局和局部角度捕获不同图像之间的全面图像间对应关系。首先，我们将不同的图像视为不同的时间片，并使用3D卷积直观地整合所有帧内特征，这可以更充分地提取全局组语义。其次，我们设计了成对相关变换（PCT）来探索成对图像之间的相似对应关系，并结合多个局部成对对应关系来生成局部图像间关系。第三，GCM和LCM的图像间关系通过全局和局部对应聚合（GLA）模块进行集成，以探索更全面的图像间协作线索。最后，通过帧内和帧间加权融合（AEWF）模块自适应地集成帧内和帧间特征，以学习协同显着特征并预测协同显着图。所提出的 GLNet 在三个流行的 CoSOD 基准数据集上进行了评估，表明我们在小型数据集（约 3k 图像）上训练的模型仍然优于在一些大型数据集（约 8k-200k 图像）上训练的 11 个最先进的竞争对手。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种全局与局部协同学习架构，用于解决多图像组中共同显著物体检测（CoSOD）问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在提取多图像间的跨图像对应关系时存在局限，难以全面捕捉全局与局部的交互信息，影响CoSOD性能。
AI.method: 设计包含全局对应建模（GCM）和局部对应建模（LCM）的架构：通过3D卷积建模全局跨图像语义，利用成对相关性变换（PCT）挖掘局部对应关系，并通过GLA模块融合全局与局部信息，最终通过AEWF模块整合内外特征生成共显著图。
AI.result: 在三个主流CoSOD数据集上验证，该模型在仅使用约3k图像训练时，性能优于使用8k-200k图像训练的11种先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 全局-局部协同学习框架能有效捕捉跨图像多尺度对应关系，在小数据集上即可实现优于现有方法的CoSOD性能。

The proposed GLNet is evaluated on three prevailing CoSOD benchmark datasets, demonstrating that our model trained on a small dataset (about 3k images) still outperforms eleven state-of-the-art competitors trained on some large datasets (about 8k-200k images). 共同显着对象检测 (CoSOD) 的目标是发现通常出现在包含两个或更多相关图像的查询组中的显着对象。因此，如何有效地提取图像间的对应关系对于CoSOD任务至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种全局和局部协作学习架构，其中包括全局对应建模（GCM）和局部对应建模（LCM），以从全局和局部角度捕获不同图像之间的全面图像间对应关系。首先，我们将不同的图像视为不同的时间片，并使用3D卷积直观地整合所有帧内特征，这可以更充分地提取全局组语义。其次，我们设计了成对相关变换（PCT）来探索成对图像之间的相似对应关系，并结合多个局部成对对应关系来生成局部图像间关系。第三，GCM和LCM的图像间关系通过全局和局部对应聚合（GLA）模块进行集成，以探索更全面的图像间协作线索。最后，通过帧内和帧间加权融合（AEWF）模块自适应地集成帧内和帧间特征，以学习协同显着特征并预测协同显着图。所提出的 GLNet 在三个流行的 CoSOD 基准数据集上进行了评估，表明我们在小型数据集（约 3k 图像）上训练的模型仍然优于在一些大型数据集（约 8k-200k 图像）上训练的 11 个最先进的竞争对手。 本文提出一种全局与局部协同学习架构，用于解决多图像组中共同显著物体检测（CoSOD）问题。 Runmin Cong,Ning Yang,Chongyi Li,Huazhu Fu,Yao Zhao,Qingming Huang,Sam Kwong cs.CV

authors_text: Wenbin Zou,Tian Ye,Weixin Zheng,Yunchen Zhang,Liang Chen,Yi Wu
title: Self-Calibrated Efficient Transformer for Lightweight Super-Resolution
title_zh: 自校准高效变压器，实现轻量级超分辨率
abstract: Recently, deep learning has been successfully applied to the single-image super-resolution (SISR) with remarkable performance. However, most existing methods focus on building a more complex network with a large number of layers, which can entail heavy computational costs and memory storage. To address this problem, we present a lightweight Self-Calibrated Efficient Transformer (SCET) network to solve this problem. The architecture of SCET mainly consists of the self-calibrated module and efficient transformer block, where the self-calibrated module adopts the pixel attention mechanism to extract image features effectively. To further exploit the contextual information from features, we employ an efficient transformer to help the network obtain similar features over long distances and thus recover sufficient texture details. We provide comprehensive results on different settings of the overall network. Our proposed method achieves more remarkable performance than baseline methods. The source code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/AlexZou14/SCET.
summary: Recently, deep learning has been successfully applied to the single-image super-resolution (SISR) with remarkable performance. However, most existing methods focus on building a more complex network with a large number of layers, which can entail heavy computational costs and memory storage. To address this problem, we present a lightweight Self-Calibrated Efficient Transformer (SCET) network to solve this problem. The architecture of SCET mainly consists of the self-calibrated module and efficient transformer block, where the self-calibrated module adopts the pixel attention mechanism to extract image features effectively. To further exploit the contextual information from features, we employ an efficient transformer to help the network obtain similar features over long distances and thus recover sufficient texture details. We provide comprehensive results on different settings of the overall network. Our proposed method achieves more remarkable performance than baseline methods. The source code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/AlexZou14/SCET.
abstract_zh: 最近，深度学习已成功应用于单图像超分辨率（SISR），并取得了显着的性能。然而，大多数现有方法侧重于构建具有大量层的更复杂的网络，这可能需要大量的计算成本和内存存储。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种轻量级自校准高效变压器（SCET）网络来解决这个问题。 SCET的架构主要由自校准模块和高效变压器块组成，其中自校准模块采用像素注意机制来有效提取图像特征。为了进一步利用特征中的上下文信息，我们采用了高效的转换器来帮助网络在长距离上获得相似的特征，从而恢复足够的纹理细节。我们提供整个网络不同设置的综合结果。我们提出的方法比基线方法取得了更显着的性能。源代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/AlexZou14/SCET 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级的自校准高效Transformer网络（SCET），用于解决单图像超分辨率（SISR）问题。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法通常依赖复杂网络结构，导致计算成本高且内存消耗大，亟需一种轻量化且高效的解决方案。
AI.method: SCET网络包含自校准模块和高效Transformer块，前者通过像素注意力机制提取图像特征，后者通过长距离上下文信息捕获纹理细节。
AI.result: 实验表明，SCET在多种设置下均优于基线方法，实现了更显著的超分辨率性能。
AI.conclusion: SCET通过轻量化设计平衡了计算效率与重建质量，为轻量级超分辨率任务提供了有效方案。

title: Photorealistic Monocular 3D Reconstruction of Humans Wearing Clothing
title_zh: 真实感单目 3D 重建人体穿着衣服
abstract: We present PHORHUM, a novel, end-to-end trainable, deep neural network methodology for photorealistic 3D human reconstruction given just a monocular RGB image. Our pixel-aligned method estimates detailed 3D geometry and, for the first time, the unshaded surface color together with the scene illumination. Observing that 3D supervision alone is not sufficient for high fidelity color reconstruction, we introduce patch-based rendering losses that enable reliable color reconstruction on visible parts of the human, and detailed and plausible color estimation for the non-visible parts. Moreover, our method specifically addresses methodological and practical limitations of prior work in terms of representing geometry, albedo, and illumination effects, in an end-to-end model where factors can be effectively disentangled. In extensive experiments, we demonstrate the versatility and robustness of our approach. Our state-of-the-art results validate the method qualitatively and for different metrics, for both geometric and color reconstruction.
summary: We present PHORHUM, a novel, end-to-end trainable, deep neural network methodology for photorealistic 3D human reconstruction given just a monocular RGB image. Our pixel-aligned method estimates detailed 3D geometry and, for the first time, the unshaded surface color together with the scene illumination. Observing that 3D supervision alone is not sufficient for high fidelity color reconstruction, we introduce patch-based rendering losses that enable reliable color reconstruction on visible parts of the human, and detailed and plausible color estimation for the non-visible parts. Moreover, our method specifically addresses methodological and practical limitations of prior work in terms of representing geometry, albedo, and illumination effects, in an end-to-end model where factors can be effectively disentangled. In extensive experiments, we demonstrate the versatility and robustness of our approach. Our state-of-the-art results validate the method qualitatively and for different metrics, for both geometric and color reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 PHORHUM，一种新颖的、端到端可训练的深度神经网络方法，用于仅在单眼 RGB 图像的情况下进行逼真的 3D 人体重建。我们的像素对齐方法可以估计详细的 3D 几何形状，并且首次估计未着色的表面颜色以及场景照明。观察到仅 3D 监督不足以实现高保真度颜色重建，我们引入了基于补丁的渲染损失，可以对人类可见部分进行可靠的颜色重建，并对不可见部分进行详细且合理的颜色估计。此外，我们的方法专门解决了先前工作在表示几何、反照率和照明效果方面的方法和实际限制，在端到端模型中可以有效地解开因素。在广泛的实验中，我们证明了我们方法的多功能性和稳健性。我们最先进的结果定性地验证了该方法，并针对几何和颜色重建的不同指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单目RGB图像的端到端深度神经网络方法PHORHUM，用于生成穿着衣物的人类高保真3D重建。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在仅依赖3D监督时难以实现高保真颜色重建，尤其对非可见人体部位的颜色估计不足，需改进几何、反照率和光照的解耦表示。
AI.method: 采用像素对齐方法估计3D几何与无阴影表面颜色，引入基于块的渲染损失以提升可见部位颜色重建可靠性，并通过端到端模型实现几何、反照率和光照因素的有效解耦。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法在几何和颜色重建上的鲁棒性与通用性，多项指标达到当前最优水平，尤其在非可见部位颜色估计上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: PHORHUM通过结合几何结构与光照颜色建模，有效解决了单目3D人体重建中的关键挑战，为服装细节与非可见区域的重建提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tian Ye,Sixiang Chen,Yun Liu,Erkang Chen,Yuche Li
title: Towards Efficient Single Image Dehazing and Desnowing
title_zh: 实现高效的单幅图像去雾和去雪
abstract: Removing adverse weather conditions like rain, fog, and snow from images is a challenging problem. Although the current recovery algorithms targeting a specific condition have made impressive progress, it is not flexible enough to deal with various degradation types. We propose an efficient and compact image restoration network named DAN-Net (Degradation-Adaptive Neural Network) to address this problem, which consists of multiple compact expert networks with one adaptive gated neural. A single expert network efficiently addresses specific degradation in nasty winter scenes relying on the compact architecture and three novel components. Based on the Mixture of Experts strategy, DAN-Net captures degradation information from each input image to adaptively modulate the outputs of task-specific expert networks to remove various adverse winter weather conditions. Specifically, it adopts a lightweight Adaptive Gated Neural Network to estimate gated attention maps of the input image, while different task-specific experts with the same topology are jointly dispatched to process the degraded image. Such novel image restoration pipeline handles different types of severe weather scenes effectively and efficiently. It also enjoys the benefit of coordinate boosting in which the whole network outperforms each expert trained without coordination. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the presented manner outperforms the state-of-the-art single-task methods on image quality and has better inference efficiency. Furthermore, we have collected the first real-world winter scenes dataset to evaluate winter image restoration methods, which contains various hazy and snowy images snapped in winter. Both the dataset and source code will be publicly available.
summary: Removing adverse weather conditions like rain, fog, and snow from images is a challenging problem. Although the current recovery algorithms targeting a specific condition have made impressive progress, it is not flexible enough to deal with various degradation types. We propose an efficient and compact image restoration network named DAN-Net (Degradation-Adaptive Neural Network) to address this problem, which consists of multiple compact expert networks with one adaptive gated neural. A single expert network efficiently addresses specific degradation in nasty winter scenes relying on the compact architecture and three novel components. Based on the Mixture of Experts strategy, DAN-Net captures degradation information from each input image to adaptively modulate the outputs of task-specific expert networks to remove various adverse winter weather conditions. Specifically, it adopts a lightweight Adaptive Gated Neural Network to estimate gated attention maps of the input image, while different task-specific experts with the same topology are jointly dispatched to process the degraded image. Such novel image restoration pipeline handles different types of severe weather scenes effectively and efficiently. It also enjoys the benefit of coordinate boosting in which the whole network outperforms each expert trained without coordination. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the presented manner outperforms the state-of-the-art single-task methods on image quality and has better inference efficiency. Furthermore, we have collected the first real-world winter scenes dataset to evaluate winter image restoration methods, which contains various hazy and snowy images snapped in winter. Both the dataset and source code will be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 从图像中去除雨、雾和雪等恶劣天气条件是一个具有挑战性的问题。尽管当前针对特定条件的恢复算法已经取得了令人瞩目的进展，但它还不够灵活，无法应对各种退化类型。我们提出了一种高效且紧凑的图像恢复网络，名为 DAN-Net（退化自适应神经网络）来解决这一问题，该网络由多个紧凑的专家网络和一个自适应门控神经网络组成。单个专家网络依靠紧凑的架构和三个新颖的组件，有效地解决了恶劣冬季场景中的特定退化问题。基于专家混合策略，DAN-Net 从每个输入图像中捕获退化信息，以自适应地调制特定任务专家网络的输出，以消除各种不利的冬季天气条件。具体来说，它采用轻量级自适应门控神经网络来估计输入图像的门控注意力图，同时联合调度具有相同拓扑的不同任务特定专家来处理退化图像。这种新颖的图像恢复流程可以有效且高效地处理不同类型的恶劣天气场景。它还享有协调提升的好处，其中整个网络的性能优于每个未经协调训练的专家。大量实验表明，所提出的方法在图像质量方面优于最先进的单任务方法，并且具有更好的推理效率。此外，我们收集了第一个真实世界的冬季场景数据集来评估冬季图像恢复方法，其中包含冬季拍摄的各种雾霾和雪天图像。数据集和源代码都将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的单图像去雾和去雪方法DAN-Net，通过自适应门控机制和专家网络组合处理多种冬季恶劣天气图像。
AI.motivation: 现有单一任务算法无法灵活应对多种天气退化问题，且缺乏协调优化的网络结构。
AI.method: 设计DAN-Net网络架构，包含多个紧凑专家网络和自适应门控神经网络，基于专家混合策略动态调用任务专家并生成注意力图。
AI.result: 在图像质量和推理效率上优于现有单任务方法，并构建了首个真实冬季场景数据集验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: DAN-Net通过协调多专家网络和自适应门控机制，实现了对复杂冬季天气图像的有效恢复，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Towards Efficient Single Image Dehazing and Desnowing 实现高效的单幅图像去雾和去雪 Removing adverse weather conditions like rain, fog, and snow from images is a challenging problem. Although the current recovery algorithms targeting a specific condition have made impressive progress, it is not flexible enough to deal with various degradation types. We propose an efficient and compact image restoration network named DAN-Net (Degradation-Adaptive Neural Network) to address this problem, which consists of multiple compact expert networks with one adaptive gated neural. A single expert network efficiently addresses specific degradation in nasty winter scenes relying on the compact architecture and three novel components. Based on the Mixture of Experts strategy, DAN-Net captures degradation information from each input image to adaptively modulate the outputs of task-specific expert networks to remove various adverse winter weather conditions. Specifically, it adopts a lightweight Adaptive Gated Neural Network to estimate gated attention maps of the input image, while different task-specific experts with the same topology are jointly dispatched to process the degraded image. Such novel image restoration pipeline handles different types of severe weather scenes effectively and efficiently. It also enjoys the benefit of coordinate boosting in which the whole network outperforms each expert trained without coordination. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the presented manner outperforms the state-of-the-art single-task methods on image quality and has better inference efficiency. Furthermore, we have collected the first real-world winter scenes dataset to evaluate winter image restoration methods, which contains various hazy and snowy images snapped in winter. Both the dataset and source code will be publicly available. 从图像中去除雨、雾和雪等恶劣天气条件是一个具有挑战性的问题。尽管当前针对特定条件的恢复算法已经取得了令人瞩目的进展，但它还不够灵活，无法应对各种退化类型。我们提出了一种高效且紧凑的图像恢复网络，名为 DAN-Net（退化自适应神经网络）来解决这一问题，该网络由多个紧凑的专家网络和一个自适应门控神经网络组成。单个专家网络依靠紧凑的架构和三个新颖的组件，有效地解决了恶劣冬季场景中的特定退化问题。基于专家混合策略，DAN-Net 从每个输入图像中捕获退化信息，以自适应地调制特定任务专家网络的输出，以消除各种不利的冬季天气条件。具体来说，它采用轻量级自适应门控神经网络来估计输入图像的门控注意力图，同时联合调度具有相同拓扑的不同任务特定专家来处理退化图像。这种新颖的图像恢复流程可以有效且高效地处理不同类型的恶劣天气场景。它还享有协调提升的好处，其中整个网络的性能优于每个未经协调训练的专家。大量实验表明，所提出的方法在图像质量方面优于最先进的单任务方法，并且具有更好的推理效率。此外，我们收集了第一个真实世界的冬季场景数据集来评估冬季图像恢复方法，其中包含冬季拍摄的各种雾霾和雪天图像。数据集和源代码都将公开。 本文提出一种高效的单图像去雾和去雪方法DAN-Net，通过自适应门控机制和专家网络组合处理多种冬季恶劣天气图像。 Tian Ye,Sixiang Chen,Yun Liu,Erkang Chen,Yuche Li cs.CV

title: Model Checking Strategic Abilities in Information-sharing Systems
title_zh: 信息共享系统中战略能力的模型检查
abstract: We introduce a subclass of concurrent game structures (CGS) with imperfect information in which agents are endowed with private data-sharing capabilities. Importantly, our CGSs are such that it is still decidable to model-check these CGSs against a relevant fragment of ATL. These systems can be thought as a generalisation of architectures allowing information forks, in the sense that, in the initial states of the system, we allow information forks from agents outside a given set A to agents inside this A. For this reason, together with the fact that the communication in our models underpins a specialised form of broadcast, we call our formalism A-cast systems. To underline, the fragment of ATL for which we show the model-checking problem to be decidable over A-cast is a large and significant one; it expresses coalitions over agents in any subset of the set A. Indeed, as we show, our systems and this ATL fragments can encode security problems that are notoriously hard to express faithfully: terrorist-fraud attacks in identity schemes.
summary: We introduce a subclass of concurrent game structures (CGS) with imperfect information in which agents are endowed with private data-sharing capabilities. Importantly, our CGSs are such that it is still decidable to model-check these CGSs against a relevant fragment of ATL. These systems can be thought as a generalisation of architectures allowing information forks, in the sense that, in the initial states of the system, we allow information forks from agents outside a given set A to agents inside this A. For this reason, together with the fact that the communication in our models underpins a specialised form of broadcast, we call our formalism A-cast systems. To underline, the fragment of ATL for which we show the model-checking problem to be decidable over A-cast is a large and significant one; it expresses coalitions over agents in any subset of the set A. Indeed, as we show, our systems and this ATL fragments can encode security problems that are notoriously hard to express faithfully: terrorist-fraud attacks in identity schemes.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一个具有不完美信息的并发博弈结构（CGS）的子类，其中代理被赋予私有数据共享能力。重要的是，我们的 CGS 仍然可以根据 ATL 的相关片段对这些 CGS 进行模型检查。这些系统可以被认为是允许信息分叉的体系结构的概括，从某种意义上说，在系统的初始状态下，我们允许从给定集合 A 外部的代理到该 A 内部的代理的信息分叉。因此，加上我们模型中的通信支持特殊形式的广播这一事实，我们将其称为形式主义 A-cast 系统。需要强调的是，我们证明模型检查问题可以通过 A-cast 来判定的 ATL 片段是一个很大且重要的片段；它表达了集合 A 的任何子集中的代理联盟。事实上，正如我们所展示的，我们的系统和这个 ATL 片段可以编码众所周知难以忠实表达的安全问题：身份方案中的恐怖分子欺诈攻击。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为A-cast系统的并发博弈结构子类，支持信息分叉和广播通信，并证明其可针对ATL逻辑的特定片段进行模型检测。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以处理信息共享系统中的信息分叉和广播通信，且传统ATL逻辑难以准确表达复杂安全问题（如身份欺诈攻击）。
AI.method: 设计允许信息分叉的A-cast系统模型，结合广播通信机制，并针对ATL逻辑中涉及集合A内代理联盟的子逻辑证明模型检测的可判定性。
AI.result: 成功构建A-cast系统并证明其ATL子逻辑的模型检测可判定性，同时展示该模型能有效编码传统方法难以处理的安全问题。
AI.conclusion: A-cast系统为分析信息共享中的战略能力提供了新框架，尤其在处理涉及信息分叉和广播的安全问题上具有显著优势。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为A-cast系统的并发博弈结构子类，支持信息分叉和广播通信，并证明其可针对ATL逻辑的特定片段进行模型检测。

Indeed, as we show, our systems and this ATL fragments can encode security problems that are notoriously hard to express faithfully: terrorist-fraud attacks in identity schemes. 我们引入了一个具有不完美信息的并发博弈结构（CGS）的子类，其中代理被赋予私有数据共享能力。重要的是，我们的 CGS 仍然可以根据 ATL 的相关片段对这些 CGS 进行模型检查。这些系统可以被认为是允许信息分叉的体系结构的概括，从某种意义上说，在系统的初始状态下，我们允许从给定集合 A 外部的代理到该 A 内部的代理的信息分叉。因此，加上我们模型中的通信支持特殊形式的广播这一事实，我们将其称为形式主义 A-cast 系统。需要强调的是，我们证明模型检查问题可以通过 A-cast 来判定的 ATL 片段是一个很大且重要的片段；它表达了集合 A 的任何子集中的代理联盟。事实上，正如我们所展示的，我们的系统和这个 ATL 片段可以编码众所周知难以忠实表达的安全问题：身份方案中的恐怖分子欺诈攻击。 本文提出一种名为A-cast系统的并发博弈结构子类，支持信息分叉和广播通信，并证明其可针对ATL逻辑的特定片段进行模型检测。 Francesco Belardinelli,Ioana Boureanu,Catalin Dima,Vadim Malvone cs.LO,cs.AI

authors_text: Yang Yang,Yiyang Huang,Ming Shi,Kejiang Chen,Weiming Zhang,Nenghai Yu
title: Invertible Mask Network for Face Privacy-Preserving
title_zh: 用于面部隐私保护的可逆掩模网络
abstract: Face privacy-preserving is one of the hotspots that arises dramatic interests of research. However, the existing face privacy-preserving methods aim at causing the missing of semantic information of face and cannot preserve the reusability of original facial information. To achieve the naturalness of the processed face and the recoverability of the original protected face, this paper proposes face privacy-preserving method based on Invertible "Mask" Network (IMN). In IMN, we introduce a Mask-net to generate "Mask" face firstly. Then, put the "Mask" face onto the protected face and generate the masked face, in which the masked face is indistinguishable from "Mask" face. Finally, "Mask" face can be put off from the masked face and obtain the recovered face to the authorized users, in which the recovered face is visually indistinguishable from the protected face. The experimental results show that the proposed method can not only effectively protect the privacy of the protected face, but also almost perfectly recover the protected face from the masked face.
summary: Face privacy-preserving is one of the hotspots that arises dramatic interests of research. However, the existing face privacy-preserving methods aim at causing the missing of semantic information of face and cannot preserve the reusability of original facial information. To achieve the naturalness of the processed face and the recoverability of the original protected face, this paper proposes face privacy-preserving method based on Invertible "Mask" Network (IMN). In IMN, we introduce a Mask-net to generate "Mask" face firstly. Then, put the "Mask" face onto the protected face and generate the masked face, in which the masked face is indistinguishable from "Mask" face. Finally, "Mask" face can be put off from the masked face and obtain the recovered face to the authorized users, in which the recovered face is visually indistinguishable from the protected face. The experimental results show that the proposed method can not only effectively protect the privacy of the protected face, but also almost perfectly recover the protected face from the masked face.
abstract_zh: 人脸隐私保护是引起人们极大兴趣的研究热点之一。然而，现有的人脸隐私保护方法主要是造成人脸语义信息的缺失，无法保持原始人脸信息的可重用性。为了实现处理后人脸的自然性和原始受保护人脸的可恢复性，提出基于可逆“掩模”网络（IMN）的人脸隐私保护方法。在IMN中，我们首先引入Mask-net来生成“Mask”脸。然后，将“面具”脸放在被保护的脸上，生成蒙面脸，其中蒙面脸与“面具”脸没有区别。最后，可以将“面具”人脸从蒙面人脸中摘下，并将恢复的人脸提供给授权用户，其中恢复的人脸在视觉上与受保护的人脸无法区分。实验结果表明，该方法不仅能够有效保护受保护人脸的隐私，而且几乎完美地从蒙面人脸中恢复出受保护人脸。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可逆掩码网络（IMN）的人脸隐私保护方法，能够在保护隐私的同时实现原始人脸信息的可恢复性。
AI.motivation: 现有隐私保护方法会导致人脸语义信息丢失且无法保留原始信息的可重用性，难以同时满足处理后人脸的自然性和原始人脸的可恢复性需求。
AI.method: 通过引入Mask-net生成'掩码'人脸，将其叠加到待保护人脸生成不可区分的掩码人脸，并可通过移除掩码恢复原始人脸。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效保护隐私且几乎完美地从掩码人脸中恢复原始人脸。
AI.conclusion: IMN方法在保证人脸隐私性的同时实现了原始信息的可逆恢复，解决了现有方法的语义丢失与可重用性不足问题。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可逆掩码网络（IMN）的人脸隐私保护方法，能够在保护隐私的同时实现原始人脸信息的可恢复性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有隐私保护方法会导致人脸语义信息丢失且无法保留原始信息的可重用性，难以同时满足处理后人脸的自然性和原始人脸的可恢复性需求。

search_text: Invertible Mask Network for Face Privacy-Preserving 用于面部隐私保护的可逆掩模网络 Face privacy-preserving is one of the hotspots that arises dramatic interests of research. However, the existing face privacy-preserving methods aim at causing the missing of semantic information of face and cannot preserve the reusability of original facial information. To achieve the naturalness of the processed face and the recoverability of the original protected face, this paper proposes face privacy-preserving method based on Invertible "Mask" Network (IMN). In IMN, we introduce a Mask-net to generate "Mask" face firstly. Then, put the "Mask" face onto the protected face and generate the masked face, in which the masked face is indistinguishable from "Mask" face. Finally, "Mask" face can be put off from the masked face and obtain the recovered face to the authorized users, in which the recovered face is visually indistinguishable from the protected face. The experimental results show that the proposed method can not only effectively protect the privacy of the protected face, but also almost perfectly recover the protected face from the masked face. 人脸隐私保护是引起人们极大兴趣的研究热点之一。然而，现有的人脸隐私保护方法主要是造成人脸语义信息的缺失，无法保持原始人脸信息的可重用性。为了实现处理后人脸的自然性和原始受保护人脸的可恢复性，提出基于可逆“掩模”网络（IMN）的人脸隐私保护方法。在IMN中，我们首先引入Mask-net来生成“Mask”脸。然后，将“面具”脸放在被保护的脸上，生成蒙面脸，其中蒙面脸与“面具”脸没有区别。最后，可以将“面具”人脸从蒙面人脸中摘下，并将恢复的人脸提供给授权用户，其中恢复的人脸在视觉上与受保护的人脸无法区分。实验结果表明，该方法不仅能够有效保护受保护人脸的隐私，而且几乎完美地从蒙面人脸中恢复出受保护人脸。 本文提出一种基于可逆掩码网络（IMN）的人脸隐私保护方法，能够在保护隐私的同时实现原始人脸信息的可恢复性。 Yang Yang,Yiyang Huang,Ming Shi,Kejiang Chen,Weiming Zhang,Nenghai Yu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Haipeng Zeng,Xingbo Wang,Yong Wang,Aoyu Wu,Ting Chuen Pong,Huamin Qu
title: GestureLens: Visual Analysis of Gestures in Presentation Videos
title_zh: GestureLens：演示视频中手势的视觉分析
comment: 14 pages, 6 figures. A preprint version of a publication at IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics (TVCG), 2022
comments: 14 pages, 6 figures. A preprint version of a publication at IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics (TVCG), 2022
abstract: Appropriate gestures can enhance message delivery and audience engagement in both daily communication and public presentations. In this paper, we contribute a visual analytic approach that assists professional public speaking coaches in improving their practice of gesture training through analyzing presentation videos. Manually checking and exploring gesture usage in the presentation videos is often tedious and time-consuming. There lacks an efficient method to help users conduct gesture exploration, which is challenging due to the intrinsically temporal evolution of gestures and their complex correlation to speech content. In this paper, we propose GestureLens, a visual analytics system to facilitate gesture-based and content-based exploration of gesture usage in presentation videos. Specifically, the exploration view enables users to obtain a quick overview of the spatial and temporal distributions of gestures. The dynamic hand movements are firstly aggregated through a heatmap in the gesture space for uncovering spatial patterns, and then decomposed into two mutually perpendicular timelines for revealing temporal patterns. The relation view allows users to explicitly explore the correlation between speech content and gestures by enabling linked analysis and intuitive glyph designs. The video view and dynamic view show the context and overall dynamic movement of the selected gestures, respectively. Two usage scenarios and expert interviews with professional presentation coaches demonstrate the effectiveness and usefulness of GestureLens in facilitating gesture exploration and analysis of presentation videos.
summary: Appropriate gestures can enhance message delivery and audience engagement in both daily communication and public presentations. In this paper, we contribute a visual analytic approach that assists professional public speaking coaches in improving their practice of gesture training through analyzing presentation videos. Manually checking and exploring gesture usage in the presentation videos is often tedious and time-consuming. There lacks an efficient method to help users conduct gesture exploration, which is challenging due to the intrinsically temporal evolution of gestures and their complex correlation to speech content. In this paper, we propose GestureLens, a visual analytics system to facilitate gesture-based and content-based exploration of gesture usage in presentation videos. Specifically, the exploration view enables users to obtain a quick overview of the spatial and temporal distributions of gestures. The dynamic hand movements are firstly aggregated through a heatmap in the gesture space for uncovering spatial patterns, and then decomposed into two mutually perpendicular timelines for revealing temporal patterns. The relation view allows users to explicitly explore the correlation between speech content and gestures by enabling linked analysis and intuitive glyph designs. The video view and dynamic view show the context and overall dynamic movement of the selected gestures, respectively. Two usage scenarios and expert interviews with professional presentation coaches demonstrate the effectiveness and usefulness of GestureLens in facilitating gesture exploration and analysis of presentation videos.
abstract_zh: 适当的手势可以增强日常沟通和公开演示中的信息传递和观众参与度。在本文中，我们提供了一种视觉分析方法，可以帮助专业的公开演讲教练通过分析演示视频来改进他们的手势训练实践。手动检查和探索演示视频中的手势使用情况通常既乏味又耗时。缺乏一种有效的方法来帮助用户进行手势探索，由于手势本质上的时间演变及其与语音内容的复杂相关性，这具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了 GestureLens，这是一种视觉分析系统，可促进基于手势和基于内容的演示视频中手势使用的探索。具体来说，探索视图使用户能够快速概览手势的空间和时间分布。动态手部动作首先通过手势空间中的热图进行聚合，以揭示空间模式，然后分解为两个相互垂直的时间线以揭示时间模式。关系视图允许用户通过启用链接分析和直观的字形设计来明确探索语音内容和手势之间的相关性。视频视图和动态视图分别显示所选手势的上下文和整体动态运动。两个使用场景以及对专业演示教练的专家访谈证明了 GestureLens 在促进演示视频的手势探索和分析方面的有效性和实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GestureLens系统，通过视觉分析方法帮助演讲教练分析演示视频中的手势使用情况。
AI.motivation: 手动检查演示视频中的手势使用既繁琐又耗时，缺乏高效方法分析手势的时空分布及其与演讲内容的关联。
AI.method: 设计GestureLens系统，包含探索视图（通过热图和时间线分析手势时空分布）、关联视图（通过链接分析和符号设计探索手势与演讲内容的关系）以及视频动态视图。
AI.result: 通过两个使用场景和专家访谈验证了GestureLens在手势探索与分析中的有效性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: GestureLens通过整合视觉分析与内容关联，为演示视频中的手势分析提供了高效工具，有助于提升演讲训练效果。

authors_text: Liang Chen,Peiyi Wang,Runxin Xu,Tianyu Liu,Zhifang Sui,Baobao Chang
title: ATP: AMRize Then Parse! Enhancing AMR Parsing with PseudoAMRs
title_zh: ATP：AMR 化然后解析！使用 PseudoAMR 增强 AMR 解析
comment: NAACL 2022 Findings. Code and models are released at https://github.com/chenllliang/ATP
comments: NAACL 2022 Findings. Code and models are released at https://github.com/chenllliang/ATP
abstract: As Abstract Meaning Representation (AMR) implicitly involves compound semantic annotations, we hypothesize auxiliary tasks which are semantically or formally related can better enhance AMR parsing. We find that 1) Semantic role labeling (SRL) and dependency parsing (DP), would bring more performance gain than other tasks e.g. MT and summarization in the text-to-AMR transition even with much less data. 2) To make a better fit for AMR, data from auxiliary tasks should be properly "AMRized" to PseudoAMR before training. Knowledge from shallow level parsing tasks can be better transferred to AMR Parsing with structure transform. 3) Intermediate-task learning is a better paradigm to introduce auxiliary tasks to AMR parsing, compared to multitask learning. From an empirical perspective, we propose a principled method to involve auxiliary tasks to boost AMR parsing. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves new state-of-the-art performance on different benchmarks especially in topology-related scores.
summary: As Abstract Meaning Representation (AMR) implicitly involves compound semantic annotations, we hypothesize auxiliary tasks which are semantically or formally related can better enhance AMR parsing. We find that 1) Semantic role labeling (SRL) and dependency parsing (DP), would bring more performance gain than other tasks e.g. MT and summarization in the text-to-AMR transition even with much less data. 2) To make a better fit for AMR, data from auxiliary tasks should be properly "AMRized" to PseudoAMR before training. Knowledge from shallow level parsing tasks can be better transferred to AMR Parsing with structure transform. 3) Intermediate-task learning is a better paradigm to introduce auxiliary tasks to AMR parsing, compared to multitask learning. From an empirical perspective, we propose a principled method to involve auxiliary tasks to boost AMR parsing. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves new state-of-the-art performance on different benchmarks especially in topology-related scores.
abstract_zh: 由于抽象含义表示（AMR）隐含地涉及复合语义注释，我们假设语义或形式相关的辅助任务可以更好地增强 AMR 解析。我们发现 1）语义角色标记（SRL）和依存解析（DP）将比其他任务带来更多的性能增益，例如：即使数据少得多，也可以在文本到 AMR 转换中进行机器翻译和摘要。 2）为了更好地适应AMR，来自辅助任务的数据应该在训练之前正确地“AMR化”为PseudoAMR。来自浅层解析任务的知识可以通过结构转换更好地转移到 AMR 解析。 3）与多任务学习相比，中间任务学习是将辅助任务引入AMR解析的更好范例。从实证角度来看，我们提出了一种涉及辅助任务来增强 AMR 解析的原则方法。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在不同的基准上实现了新的最先进的性能，特别是在拓扑相关的分数方面。

AI.tldr: 通过引入伪AMR和辅助任务提升AMR解析效果
AI.motivation: AMR解析需要更有效的辅助任务来提升性能，传统方法可能未充分利用相关任务的数据
AI.method: 通过将辅助任务数据转换为伪AMR，并采用中间任务学习框架整合辅助任务
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个基准测试中达到新SOTA，尤其在拓扑相关指标上表现突出
AI.conclusion: 中间任务学习比多任务学习更有效，结构转换促进知识迁移，提升AMR解析性能

Knowledge from shallow level parsing tasks can be better transferred to AMR Parsing with structure transform. 3) Intermediate-task learning is a better paradigm to introduce auxiliary tasks to AMR parsing, compared to multitask learning. From an empirical perspective, we propose a principled method to involve auxiliary tasks to boost AMR parsing. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves new state-of-the-art performance on different benchmarks especially in topology-related scores. 由于抽象含义表示（AMR）隐含地涉及复合语义注释，我们假设语义或形式相关的辅助任务可以更好地增强 AMR 解析。我们发现 1）语义角色标记（SRL）和依存解析（DP）将比其他任务带来更多的性能增益，例如：即使数据少得多，也可以在文本到 AMR 转换中进行机器翻译和摘要。 2）为了更好地适应AMR，来自辅助任务的数据应该在训练之前正确地“AMR化”为PseudoAMR。来自浅层解析任务的知识可以通过结构转换更好地转移到 AMR 解析。 3）与多任务学习相比，中间任务学习是将辅助任务引入AMR解析的更好范例。从实证角度来看，我们提出了一种涉及辅助任务来增强 AMR 解析的原则方法。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在不同的基准上实现了新的最先进的性能，特别是在拓扑相关的分数方面。 通过引入伪AMR和辅助任务提升AMR解析效果 Liang Chen,Peiyi Wang,Runxin Xu,Tianyu Liu,Zhifang Sui,Baobao Chang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Pengwan Yang,Yuki M. Asano,Pascal Mettes,Cees G. M. Snoek
title: Less than Few: Self-Shot Video Instance Segmentation
title_zh: 不到几个：自拍视频实例分割
abstract: The goal of this paper is to bypass the need for labelled examples in few-shot video understanding at run time. While proven effective, in many practical video settings even labelling a few examples appears unrealistic. This is especially true as the level of details in spatio-temporal video understanding and with it, the complexity of annotations continues to increase. Rather than performing few-shot learning with a human oracle to provide a few densely labelled support videos, we propose to automatically learn to find appropriate support videos given a query. We call this self-shot learning and we outline a simple self-supervised learning method to generate an embedding space well-suited for unsupervised retrieval of relevant samples. To showcase this novel setting, we tackle, for the first time, video instance segmentation in a self-shot (and few-shot) setting, where the goal is to segment instances at the pixel-level across the spatial and temporal domains. We provide strong baseline performances that utilize a novel transformer-based model and show that self-shot learning can even surpass few-shot and can be positively combined for further performance gains. Experiments on new benchmarks show that our approach achieves strong performance, is competitive to oracle support in some settings, scales to large unlabelled video collections, and can be combined in a semi-supervised setting.
summary: The goal of this paper is to bypass the need for labelled examples in few-shot video understanding at run time. While proven effective, in many practical video settings even labelling a few examples appears unrealistic. This is especially true as the level of details in spatio-temporal video understanding and with it, the complexity of annotations continues to increase. Rather than performing few-shot learning with a human oracle to provide a few densely labelled support videos, we propose to automatically learn to find appropriate support videos given a query. We call this self-shot learning and we outline a simple self-supervised learning method to generate an embedding space well-suited for unsupervised retrieval of relevant samples. To showcase this novel setting, we tackle, for the first time, video instance segmentation in a self-shot (and few-shot) setting, where the goal is to segment instances at the pixel-level across the spatial and temporal domains. We provide strong baseline performances that utilize a novel transformer-based model and show that self-shot learning can even surpass few-shot and can be positively combined for further performance gains. Experiments on new benchmarks show that our approach achieves strong performance, is competitive to oracle support in some settings, scales to large unlabelled video collections, and can be combined in a semi-supervised setting.
abstract_zh: 本文的目标是绕过运行时在少量视频理解中对标记示例的需求。虽然被证明是有效的，但在许多实际的视频设置中，即使标记几个示例也显得不现实。随着时空视频理解的细节水平以及随之而来的注释的复杂性不断增加，这一点尤其如此。我们建议自动学习在给定查询的情况下找到合适的支持视频，而不是使用人类预言机执行几次镜头学习来提供一些密集标记的支持视频。我们将这种学习称为自拍摄学习，并概述了一种简单的自监督学习方法来生成非常适合相关样本的无监督检索的嵌入空间。为了展示这种新颖的设置，我们首次在自拍（和少镜头）设置中处理视频实例分割，其目标是跨空间和时间域在像素级分割实例。我们提供了强大的基线性能，利用了一种新颖的基于变压器的模型，并表明自拍摄学习甚至可以超越少数拍摄学习，并且可以积极组合以获得进一步的性能提升。新基准的实验表明，我们的方法实现了强大的性能，在某些设置中与预言机支持相比具有竞争力，可扩展到大型未标记视频集合，并且可以在半监督设置中组合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需人工标注支持样本的自监督视频实例分割方法，通过自监督学习生成适合无监督检索的嵌入空间，实现像素级时空域分割。
AI.motivation: 传统少样本学习依赖人工标注的支持视频，在实际视频场景中标注成本过高且细节复杂度持续增加，难以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 提出自监督学习框架自动生成支持样本，构建适合无监督检索的嵌入空间，并设计基于Transformer的模型实现视频实例分割。
AI.result: 在新基准测试中表现优异，部分场景超越少样本方法，可扩展至大规模未标注视频集，并支持半监督设置。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习为视频理解提供了可行替代方案，证明了无需人工标注即可实现高性能分割的潜力。

title: OpenGlue: Open Source Graph Neural Net Based Pipeline for Image Matching
title_zh: OpenGlue：基于开源图神经网络的图像匹配管道
abstract: We present OpenGlue: a free open-source framework for image matching, that uses a Graph Neural Network-based matcher inspired by SuperGlue \cite{sarlin20superglue}. We show that including additional geometrical information, such as local feature scale, orientation, and affine geometry, when available (e.g. for SIFT features), significantly improves the performance of the OpenGlue matcher. We study the influence of the various attention mechanisms on accuracy and speed. We also present a simple architectural improvement by combining local descriptors with context-aware descriptors. The code and pretrained OpenGlue models for the different local features are publicly available.
summary: We present OpenGlue: a free open-source framework for image matching, that uses a Graph Neural Network-based matcher inspired by SuperGlue \cite{sarlin20superglue}. We show that including additional geometrical information, such as local feature scale, orientation, and affine geometry, when available (e.g. for SIFT features), significantly improves the performance of the OpenGlue matcher. We study the influence of the various attention mechanisms on accuracy and speed. We also present a simple architectural improvement by combining local descriptors with context-aware descriptors. The code and pretrained OpenGlue models for the different local features are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 OpenGlue：一个用于图像匹配的免费开源框架，它使用受 SuperGlue \cite{sarlin20superglue} 启发的基于图神经网络的匹配器。我们表明，如果可用的话（例如，对于 SIFT 特征），包括额外的几何信息，例如局部特征尺度、方向和仿射几何，可以显着提高 OpenGlue 匹配器的性能。我们研究各种注意力机制对准确性和速度的影响。我们还通过将本地描述符与上下文感知描述符相结合，提出了一种简单的架构改进。针对不同局部特征的代码和预训练的 OpenGlue 模型是公开可用的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OpenGlue，一个基于图神经网络的开源图像匹配框架，通过结合几何信息和改进架构提升匹配性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图像匹配方法在处理几何变换和复杂场景时存在局限，需通过引入几何信息和优化模型结构来提升鲁棒性与准确性。
AI.method: 基于SuperGlue设计图神经网络匹配器，整合局部特征尺度、方向及仿射几何信息，并结合上下文感知描述子优化架构。
AI.result: 实验表明，几何信息的引入及架构改进显著提升匹配精度与速度，且公开了代码和预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: OpenGlue通过几何信息融合与模型优化有效提升了图像匹配性能，为研究和应用提供了开源工具支持。

title: On the Influence of Explainable AI on Automation Bias
title_zh: 可解释的人工智能对自动化偏差的影响
comment: Thirtieth European Conference on Information Systems (ECIS 2022)
comments: Thirtieth European Conference on Information Systems (ECIS 2022)
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) is gaining momentum, and its importance for the future of work in many areas, such as medicine and banking, is continuously rising. However, insights on the effective collaboration of humans and AI are still rare. Typically, AI supports humans in decision-making by addressing human limitations. However, it may also evoke human bias, especially in the form of automation bias as an over-reliance on AI advice. We aim to shed light on the potential to influence automation bias by explainable AI (XAI). In this pre-test, we derive a research model and describe our study design. Subsequentially, we conduct an online experiment with regard to hotel review classifications and discuss first results. We expect our research to contribute to the design and development of safe hybrid intelligence systems.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) is gaining momentum, and its importance for the future of work in many areas, such as medicine and banking, is continuously rising. However, insights on the effective collaboration of humans and AI are still rare. Typically, AI supports humans in decision-making by addressing human limitations. However, it may also evoke human bias, especially in the form of automation bias as an over-reliance on AI advice. We aim to shed light on the potential to influence automation bias by explainable AI (XAI). In this pre-test, we derive a research model and describe our study design. Subsequentially, we conduct an online experiment with regard to hotel review classifications and discuss first results. We expect our research to contribute to the design and development of safe hybrid intelligence systems.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 正在蓬勃发展，其对于医学和银行等许多领域未来工作的重要性不断上升。然而，关于人类与人工智能有效协作的见解仍然很少。通常，人工智能通过解决人类的局限性来支持人类的决策。然而，它也可能引发人类偏见，尤其是过度依赖人工智能建议的自动化偏见。我们的目标是揭示可解释的人工智能（XAI）影响自动化偏见的潜力。在这个预测试中，我们推导出一个研究模型并描述我们的研究设计。随后，我们对酒店评论分类进行了在线实验并讨论了初步结果。我们希望我们的研究能够为安全混合智能系统的设计和开发做出贡献。

AI.tldr: 研究可解释AI（XAI）对自动化偏差的影响，并通过酒店评论分类实验验证其效果。
AI.motivation: AI在医疗、金融等领域应用广泛，但人机协作中存在过度依赖AI的自动化偏差问题，需探索XAI如何缓解此问题。
AI.method: 构建研究模型，设计在线实验，通过酒店评论分类任务测试参与者对AI解释的信任度与决策依赖程度。
AI.result: 初步实验表明XAI能有效降低自动化偏差，提升人类对AI决策的审慎性，但需更多数据验证。
AI.conclusion: XAI可作为优化人机协作安全性的关键设计要素，为构建可靠混合智能系统提供理论支持。

ai_content.tldr: 研究可解释AI（XAI）对自动化偏差的影响，并通过酒店评论分类实验验证其效果。
ai_content.motivation: AI在医疗、金融等领域应用广泛，但人机协作中存在过度依赖AI的自动化偏差问题，需探索XAI如何缓解此问题。

search_text: On the Influence of Explainable AI on Automation Bias 可解释的人工智能对自动化偏差的影响 Artificial intelligence (AI) is gaining momentum, and its importance for the future of work in many areas, such as medicine and banking, is continuously rising. However, insights on the effective collaboration of humans and AI are still rare. Typically, AI supports humans in decision-making by addressing human limitations. However, it may also evoke human bias, especially in the form of automation bias as an over-reliance on AI advice. We aim to shed light on the potential to influence automation bias by explainable AI (XAI). In this pre-test, we derive a research model and describe our study design. Subsequentially, we conduct an online experiment with regard to hotel review classifications and discuss first results. We expect our research to contribute to the design and development of safe hybrid intelligence systems. 人工智能 (AI) 正在蓬勃发展，其对于医学和银行等许多领域未来工作的重要性不断上升。然而，关于人类与人工智能有效协作的见解仍然很少。通常，人工智能通过解决人类的局限性来支持人类的决策。然而，它也可能引发人类偏见，尤其是过度依赖人工智能建议的自动化偏见。我们的目标是揭示可解释的人工智能（XAI）影响自动化偏见的潜力。在这个预测试中，我们推导出一个研究模型并描述我们的研究设计。随后，我们对酒店评论分类进行了在线实验并讨论了初步结果。我们希望我们的研究能够为安全混合智能系统的设计和开发做出贡献。 研究可解释AI（XAI）对自动化偏差的影响，并通过酒店评论分类实验验证其效果。 Max Schemmer,Niklas Kühl,Carina Benz,Gerhard Satzger cs.HC,cs.AI

authors_text: Niko Moritz,Frank Seide,Duc Le,Jay Mahadeokar,Christian Fuegen
title: An Investigation of Monotonic Transducers for Large-Scale Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于大规模自动语音识别的单调换能器的研究
abstract: The two most popular loss functions for streaming end-to-end automatic speech recognition (ASR) are RNN-Transducer (RNN-T) and connectionist temporal classification (CTC). Between these two loss types we can classify the monotonic RNN-T (MonoRNN-T) and the recently proposed CTC-like Transducer (CTC-T). Monotonic transducers have a few advantages. First, RNN-T can suffer from runaway hallucination, where a model keeps emitting non-blank symbols without advancing in time. Secondly, monotonic transducers consume exactly one model score per time step and are therefore more compatible with traditional FST-based ASR decoders. However, the MonoRNN-T so far has been found to have worse accuracy than RNN-T. It does not have to be that way: By regularizing the training via joint LAS training or parameter initialization from RNN-T, both MonoRNN-T and CTC-T perform as well or better than RNN-T. This is demonstrated for LibriSpeech and for a large-scale in-house data set.
summary: The two most popular loss functions for streaming end-to-end automatic speech recognition (ASR) are RNN-Transducer (RNN-T) and connectionist temporal classification (CTC). Between these two loss types we can classify the monotonic RNN-T (MonoRNN-T) and the recently proposed CTC-like Transducer (CTC-T). Monotonic transducers have a few advantages. First, RNN-T can suffer from runaway hallucination, where a model keeps emitting non-blank symbols without advancing in time. Secondly, monotonic transducers consume exactly one model score per time step and are therefore more compatible with traditional FST-based ASR decoders. However, the MonoRNN-T so far has been found to have worse accuracy than RNN-T. It does not have to be that way: By regularizing the training via joint LAS training or parameter initialization from RNN-T, both MonoRNN-T and CTC-T perform as well or better than RNN-T. This is demonstrated for LibriSpeech and for a large-scale in-house data set.
abstract_zh: 流式端到端自动语音识别 (ASR) 的两个最流行的损失函数是 RNN-Transducer (RNN-T) 和连接主义时间分类 (CTC)。在这两种损失类型之间，我们可以对单调 RNN-T (MonoRNN-T) 和最近提出的类 CTC 传感器 (CTC-T) 进行分类。单调换能器有一些优点。首先，RNN-T 可能会出现失控幻觉，即模型不断发出非空白符号而不及时前进。其次，单调传感器每个时间步仅消耗一个模型分数，因此与传统的基于 FST 的 ASR 解码器更兼容。然而，迄今为止，MonoRNN-T 的精度被发现比 RNN-T 差。不一定是这样：通过联合 LAS 训练或 RNN-T 的参数初始化来规范训练，MonoRNN-T 和 CTC-T 的性能与 RNN-T 一样好甚至更好。 LibriSpeech 和大型内部数据集证明了这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了单调转导器（MonoRNN-T和CTC-T）在大规模自动语音识别（ASR）中的应用，通过正则化训练和参数初始化方法提升其性能。
AI.motivation: 传统RNN-T存在幻觉问题且与FST解码器兼容性差，而CTC-T等单调转导器需解决准确性不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用联合语言模型训练（LAS）和从RNN-T迁移的参数初始化策略优化MonoRNN-T和CTC-T的训练过程。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech和内部大规模数据集上，优化后的MonoRNN-T和CTC-T性能达到或超越传统RNN-T。
AI.conclusion: 通过正则化训练，单调转导器可有效解决原有缺陷，在保持兼容性的同时实现与RNN-T相当或更优的识别准确率。

authors_text: E. E. Baraboshkin,A. E. Demidov,D. M. Orlov,D. A. Koroteev
title: Core Box Image Recognition and its Improvement with a New Augmentation Technique
title_zh: 核心盒图像识别及其利用新增强技术的改进
comment: 20 pages, 16 figures, 1 table, the augmentation pipeline code samples published as Open-Source code for TLA at https://github.com/BEEugene/TemplateArtification/, continue of the research from arXiv:1909.10227
comments: 20 pages, 16 figures, 1 table, the augmentation pipeline code samples published as Open-Source code for TLA at https://github.com/BEEugene/TemplateArtification/, continue of the research from arXiv:1909.10227
abstract: Most methods for automated full-bore rock core image analysis (description, colour, properties distribution, etc.) are based on separate core column analyses. The core is usually imaged in a box because of the significant amount of time taken to get an image for each core column. The work presents an innovative method and algorithm for core columns extraction from core boxes. The conditions for core boxes imaging may differ tremendously. Such differences are disastrous for machine learning algorithms which need a large dataset describing all possible data variations. Still, such images have some standard features - a box and core. Thus, we can emulate different environments with a unique augmentation described in this work. It is called template-like augmentation (TLA). The method is described and tested on various environments, and results are compared on an algorithm trained on both 'traditional' data and a mix of traditional and TLA data. The algorithm trained with TLA data provides better metrics and can detect core on most new images, unlike the algorithm trained on data without TLA. The algorithm for core column extraction implemented in an automated core description system speeds up the core box processing by a factor of 20.
summary: Most methods for automated full-bore rock core image analysis (description, colour, properties distribution, etc.) are based on separate core column analyses. The core is usually imaged in a box because of the significant amount of time taken to get an image for each core column. The work presents an innovative method and algorithm for core columns extraction from core boxes. The conditions for core boxes imaging may differ tremendously. Such differences are disastrous for machine learning algorithms which need a large dataset describing all possible data variations. Still, such images have some standard features - a box and core. Thus, we can emulate different environments with a unique augmentation described in this work. It is called template-like augmentation (TLA). The method is described and tested on various environments, and results are compared on an algorithm trained on both 'traditional' data and a mix of traditional and TLA data. The algorithm trained with TLA data provides better metrics and can detect core on most new images, unlike the algorithm trained on data without TLA. The algorithm for core column extraction implemented in an automated core description system speeds up the core box processing by a factor of 20.
abstract_zh: 大多数自动化全孔岩心图像分析（描述、颜色、属性分布等）的方法都基于单独的岩心柱分析。由于获取每个岩心列的图像需要花费大量时间，因此岩心通常在盒子中成像。这项工作提出了一种从岩心盒中提取岩心柱的创新方法和算法。岩心盒成像的条件可能差异很大。这种差异对于需要描述所有可能的数据变化的大型数据集的机器学习算法来说是灾难性的。尽管如此，此类图像仍具有一些标准特征 - 盒子和核心。因此，我们可以通过本工作中描述的独特增强来模拟不同的环境。它被称为类模板增强（TLA）。该方法在各种环境中进行了描述和测试，并在“传统”数据以及传统数据和 TLA 数据混合训练的算法上对结果进行了比较。与在没有 TLA 的数据上训练的算法不同，使用 TLA 数据训练的算法提供了更好的指标，并且可以在大多数新图像上检测核心。在自动化岩心描述系统中实施的岩心列提取算法可将岩心盒处理速度加快 20 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于新型增强技术（TLA）的岩芯盒图像识别方法，用于自动化提取岩芯柱并提升识别效率。
AI.motivation: 传统岩芯图像分析方法依赖单独岩芯柱成像，耗时且难以应对岩芯盒成像条件差异导致的机器学习模型性能下降问题。
AI.method: 设计模板式增强（TLA）技术模拟多样化的岩芯盒环境，结合传统数据与TLA数据训练核心柱提取算法。
AI.result: TLA增强数据训练的算法在新图像中检测率显著提升，处理速度较传统方法提高20倍。
AI.conclusion: TLA增强技术有效解决了岩芯盒图像环境差异问题，显著提升了自动化岩芯描述系统的鲁棒性与效率。

The algorithm for core column extraction implemented in an automated core description system speeds up the core box processing by a factor of 20. 大多数自动化全孔岩心图像分析（描述、颜色、属性分布等）的方法都基于单独的岩心柱分析。由于获取每个岩心列的图像需要花费大量时间，因此岩心通常在盒子中成像。这项工作提出了一种从岩心盒中提取岩心柱的创新方法和算法。岩心盒成像的条件可能差异很大。这种差异对于需要描述所有可能的数据变化的大型数据集的机器学习算法来说是灾难性的。尽管如此，此类图像仍具有一些标准特征 - 盒子和核心。因此，我们可以通过本工作中描述的独特增强来模拟不同的环境。它被称为类模板增强（TLA）。该方法在各种环境中进行了描述和测试，并在“传统”数据以及传统数据和 TLA 数据混合训练的算法上对结果进行了比较。与在没有 TLA 的数据上训练的算法不同，使用 TLA 数据训练的算法提供了更好的指标，并且可以在大多数新图像上检测核心。在自动化岩心描述系统中实施的岩心列提取算法可将岩心盒处理速度加快 20 倍。 本文提出一种基于新型增强技术（TLA）的岩芯盒图像识别方法，用于自动化提取岩芯柱并提升识别效率。 E. E. Baraboshkin,A. E. Demidov,D. M. Orlov,D. A. Koroteev cs.CV

title: Unsupervised Learning of Efficient Geometry-Aware Neural Articulated Representations
title_zh: 高效几何感知神经铰接表示的无监督学习
abstract: We propose an unsupervised method for 3D geometry-aware representation learning of articulated objects, in which no image-pose pairs or foreground masks are used for training. Though photorealistic images of articulated objects can be rendered with explicit pose control through existing 3D neural representations, these methods require ground truth 3D pose and foreground masks for training, which are expensive to obtain. We obviate this need by learning the representations with GAN training. The generator is trained to produce realistic images of articulated objects from random poses and latent vectors by adversarial training. To avoid a high computational cost for GAN training, we propose an efficient neural representation for articulated objects based on tri-planes and then present a GAN-based framework for its unsupervised training. Experiments demonstrate the efficiency of our method and show that GAN-based training enables the learning of controllable 3D representations without paired supervision.
summary: We propose an unsupervised method for 3D geometry-aware representation learning of articulated objects, in which no image-pose pairs or foreground masks are used for training. Though photorealistic images of articulated objects can be rendered with explicit pose control through existing 3D neural representations, these methods require ground truth 3D pose and foreground masks for training, which are expensive to obtain. We obviate this need by learning the representations with GAN training. The generator is trained to produce realistic images of articulated objects from random poses and latent vectors by adversarial training. To avoid a high computational cost for GAN training, we propose an efficient neural representation for articulated objects based on tri-planes and then present a GAN-based framework for its unsupervised training. Experiments demonstrate the efficiency of our method and show that GAN-based training enables the learning of controllable 3D representations without paired supervision.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于铰接对象的 3D 几何感知表示学习的无监督方法，其中不使用图像姿势对或前景蒙版进行训练。尽管可以通过现有的 3D 神经表示通过明确的姿势控制来渲染铰接物体的真实感图像，但这些方法需要地面实况 3D 姿势和前景掩模进行训练，而获得这些图像的成本很高。我们通过 GAN 训练学习表征来消除这种需求。生成器经过训练，可以通过对抗性训练从随机姿势和潜在向量中生成铰接物体的真实图像。为了避免 GAN 训练的高计算成本，我们提出了一种基于三平面的铰接物体的高效神经表示，然后提出了一个基于 GAN 的框架用于其无监督训练。实验证明了我们方法的效率，并表明基于 GAN 的训练能够在没有配对监督的情况下学习可控 3D 表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需图像-姿态对或前景掩码的无监督方法，用于学习关节物体的3D几何感知神经表示。
AI.motivation: 现有3D神经表示方法需依赖昂贵的真实3D姿态和前景掩码数据，而本文旨在通过GAN训练消除对这些监督信息的依赖。
AI.method: 基于三平面构建高效神经表示，设计GAN框架通过对抗训练生成器，使其从随机姿态和潜在向量生成真实关节物体图像。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法的高效性，证明GAN训练可实现无需配对监督的可控3D表示学习。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现了无监督的几何感知神经表示学习，为关节物体建模提供了无需人工标注的新途径。

title: Detect-and-describe: Joint learning framework for detection and description of objects
title_zh: 检测和描述：用于检测和描述对象的联合学习框架
abstract: Traditional object detection answers two questions; "what" (what the object is?) and "where" (where the object is?). "what" part of the object detection can be fine-grained further i.e. "what type", "what shape" and "what material" etc. This results in the shifting of the object detection tasks to the object description paradigm. Describing an object provides additional detail that enables us to understand the characteristics and attributes of the object ("plastic boat" not just boat, "glass bottle" not just bottle). This additional information can implicitly be used to gain insight into unseen objects (e.g. unknown object is "metallic", "has wheels"), which is not possible in traditional object detection. In this paper, we present a new approach to simultaneously detect objects and infer their attributes, we call it Detect and Describe (DaD) framework. DaD is a deep learning-based approach that extends object detection to object attribute prediction as well. We train our model on aPascal train set and evaluate our approach on aPascal test set. We achieve 97.0% in Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve (AUC) for object attributes prediction on aPascal test set. We also show qualitative results for object attribute prediction on unseen objects, which demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach for describing unknown objects.
summary: Traditional object detection answers two questions; "what" (what the object is?) and "where" (where the object is?). "what" part of the object detection can be fine-grained further i.e. "what type", "what shape" and "what material" etc. This results in the shifting of the object detection tasks to the object description paradigm. Describing an object provides additional detail that enables us to understand the characteristics and attributes of the object ("plastic boat" not just boat, "glass bottle" not just bottle). This additional information can implicitly be used to gain insight into unseen objects (e.g. unknown object is "metallic", "has wheels"), which is not possible in traditional object detection. In this paper, we present a new approach to simultaneously detect objects and infer their attributes, we call it Detect and Describe (DaD) framework. DaD is a deep learning-based approach that extends object detection to object attribute prediction as well. We train our model on aPascal train set and evaluate our approach on aPascal test set. We achieve 97.0% in Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve (AUC) for object attributes prediction on aPascal test set. We also show qualitative results for object attribute prediction on unseen objects, which demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach for describing unknown objects.
abstract_zh: 传统的物体检测回答两个问题； “什么”（物体是什么？）和“哪里”（物体在哪里？）。对象检测的“什么”部分可以进一步细粒度，即“什么类型”、“什么形状”和“什么材料”等。这导致对象检测任务转移到对象描述范式。描述一个物体提供了额外的细节，使我们能够理解该物体的​​特征和属性（“塑料船”不仅仅是船，“玻璃瓶”不仅仅是瓶子）。这些附加信息可以隐式地用于深入了解看不见的物体（例如未知物体是“金属的”、“有轮子”），这在传统的物体检测中是不可能的。在本文中，我们提出了一种同时检测对象并推断其属性的新方法，我们将其称为检测和描述（DaD）框架。 DaD 是一种基于深度学习的方法，它将对象检测扩展到对象属性预测。我们在 aPascal 训练集上训练我们的模型，并在 aPascal 测试集上评估我们的方法。我们在 aPascal 测试集上的对象属性预测的接收器操作特征曲线下面积 (AUC) 达到了 97.0%。我们还展示了对不可见物体的物体属性预测的定性结果，这证明了我们的方法在描述未知物体方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联合学习框架Detect-and-describe（DaD），用于同时检测物体并推断其属性，以扩展传统目标检测的任务。
AI.motivation: 传统目标检测仅回答物体的类别和位置，无法提供细粒度属性信息。通过描述物体的材质、形状等属性，可增强对未知物体的推理能力，提升理解深度。
AI.method: 基于深度学习的DaD框架，联合优化目标检测与属性预测任务，在aPascal数据集上训练并测试，通过端到端学习实现属性信息的联合推理。
AI.result: 在aPascal测试集上，物体属性预测的AUC达到97.0%，并在未知物体的定性实验中验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DaD框架通过联合学习检测与描述任务，显著提升了物体属性预测能力，为未知物体的语义理解提供了有效途径。
