authors_text: Yue Cao,Zhaolin Wan,Dongwei Ren,Zifei Yan,Wangmeng Zuo
title: Incorporating Semi-Supervised and Positive-Unlabeled Learning for Boosting Full Reference Image Quality Assessment
title_zh: 结合半监督和积极无标记学习来促进全参考图像质量评估
comment: CVPR 2022. The source code and model are available at https://github.com/happycaoyue/JSPL
comments: CVPR 2022. The source code and model are available at https://github.com/happycaoyue/JSPL
abstract: Full-reference (FR) image quality assessment (IQA) evaluates the visual quality of a distorted image by measuring its perceptual difference with pristine-quality reference, and has been widely used in low-level vision tasks. Pairwise labeled data with mean opinion score (MOS) are required in training FR-IQA model, but is time-consuming and cumbersome to collect. In contrast, unlabeled data can be easily collected from an image degradation or restoration process, making it encouraging to exploit unlabeled training data to boost FR-IQA performance. Moreover, due to the distribution inconsistency between labeled and unlabeled data, outliers may occur in unlabeled data, further increasing the training difficulty. In this paper, we suggest to incorporate semi-supervised and positive-unlabeled (PU) learning for exploiting unlabeled data while mitigating the adverse effect of outliers. Particularly, by treating all labeled data as positive samples, PU learning is leveraged to identify negative samples (i.e., outliers) from unlabeled data. Semi-supervised learning (SSL) is further deployed to exploit positive unlabeled data by dynamically generating pseudo-MOS. We adopt a dual-branch network including reference and distortion branches. Furthermore, spatial attention is introduced in the reference branch to concentrate more on the informative regions, and sliced Wasserstein distance is used for robust difference map computation to address the misalignment issues caused by images recovered by GAN models. Extensive experiments show that our method performs favorably against state-of-the-arts on the benchmark datasets PIPAL, KADID-10k, TID2013, LIVE and CSIQ.
summary: Full-reference (FR) image quality assessment (IQA) evaluates the visual quality of a distorted image by measuring its perceptual difference with pristine-quality reference, and has been widely used in low-level vision tasks. Pairwise labeled data with mean opinion score (MOS) are required in training FR-IQA model, but is time-consuming and cumbersome to collect. In contrast, unlabeled data can be easily collected from an image degradation or restoration process, making it encouraging to exploit unlabeled training data to boost FR-IQA performance. Moreover, due to the distribution inconsistency between labeled and unlabeled data, outliers may occur in unlabeled data, further increasing the training difficulty. In this paper, we suggest to incorporate semi-supervised and positive-unlabeled (PU) learning for exploiting unlabeled data while mitigating the adverse effect of outliers. Particularly, by treating all labeled data as positive samples, PU learning is leveraged to identify negative samples (i.e., outliers) from unlabeled data. Semi-supervised learning (SSL) is further deployed to exploit positive unlabeled data by dynamically generating pseudo-MOS. We adopt a dual-branch network including reference and distortion branches. Furthermore, spatial attention is introduced in the reference branch to concentrate more on the informative regions, and sliced Wasserstein distance is used for robust difference map computation to address the misalignment issues caused by images recovered by GAN models. Extensive experiments show that our method performs favorably against state-of-the-arts on the benchmark datasets PIPAL, KADID-10k, TID2013, LIVE and CSIQ.
abstract_zh: 全参考（FR）图像质量评估（IQA）通过测量失真图像与原始质量参考的感知差异来评估失真图像的视觉质量，并已广泛应用于低级视觉任务。训练 FR-IQA 模型需要带有平均意见得分 (MOS) 的成对标记数据，但收集起来既耗时又麻烦。相比之下，可以从图像降级或恢复过程中轻松收集未标记的数据，这使得利用未标记的训练数据来提高 FR-IQA 性能变得令人鼓舞。而且，由于标记和未标记数据之间的分布不一致，未标记数据可能会出现异常值，进一步增加训练难度。在本文中，我们建议结合半监督和正未标记（PU）学习来利用未标记数据，同时减轻异常值的不利影响。特别是，通过将所有标记数据视为正样本，PU 学习可用于从未标记数据中识别负样本（即异常值）。半监督学习（SSL）被进一步部署，通过动态生成伪 MOS 来利用积极的未标记数据。我们采用包括参考分支和失真分支的双分支网络。此外，在参考分支中引入了空间注意力，以更多地关注信息区域，并使用切片 Wasserstein 距离进行稳健的差异图计算，以解决由 GAN 模型恢复的图像引起的错位问题。大量实验表明，我们的方法在基准数据集 PIPAL、KADID-10k、TID2013、LIVE 和 CSIQ 上的性能优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合半监督学习和正负样本学习的方法，以提升全参考图像质量评估（FR-IQA）性能。
AI.motivation: 传统FR-IQA模型依赖耗时的成对标签数据，而未标记数据虽易获取但存在分布不一致和异常值问题，需有效利用未标记数据以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 将标记数据视为正样本，通过正负样本学习（PU）识别未标记数据中的负样本（异常值），再利用半监督学习生成伪MOS标签。采用双分支网络（参考分支与失真分支），结合空间注意力机制和切片Wasserstein距离优化差异图计算。
AI.result: 在PIPAL、KADID-10k等基准数据集上，该方法性能优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合半监督与正负样本学习策略，并优化网络结构，有效缓解了未标记数据分布差异与异常值问题，显著提升了FR-IQA模型性能。

search_text: Incorporating Semi-Supervised and Positive-Unlabeled Learning for Boosting Full Reference Image Quality Assessment 结合半监督和积极无标记学习来促进全参考图像质量评估 Full-reference (FR) image quality assessment (IQA) evaluates the visual quality of a distorted image by measuring its perceptual difference with pristine-quality reference, and has been widely used in low-level vision tasks. Pairwise labeled data with mean opinion score (MOS) are required in training FR-IQA model, but is time-consuming and cumbersome to collect. In contrast, unlabeled data can be easily collected from an image degradation or restoration process, making it encouraging to exploit unlabeled training data to boost FR-IQA performance. Moreover, due to the distribution inconsistency between labeled and unlabeled data, outliers may occur in unlabeled data, further increasing the training difficulty. In this paper, we suggest to incorporate semi-supervised and positive-unlabeled (PU) learning for exploiting unlabeled data while mitigating the adverse effect of outliers. Particularly, by treating all labeled data as positive samples, PU learning is leveraged to identify negative samples (i.e., outliers) from unlabeled data. Semi-supervised learning (SSL) is further deployed to exploit positive unlabeled data by dynamically generating pseudo-MOS. We adopt a dual-branch network including reference and distortion branches. Furthermore, spatial attention is introduced in the reference branch to concentrate more on the informative regions, and sliced Wasserstein distance is used for robust difference map computation to address the misalignment issues caused by images recovered by GAN models. Extensive experiments show that our method performs favorably against state-of-the-arts on the benchmark datasets PIPAL, KADID-10k, TID2013, LIVE and CSIQ. 全参考（FR）图像质量评估（IQA）通过测量失真图像与原始质量参考的感知差异来评估失真图像的视觉质量，并已广泛应用于低级视觉任务。训练 FR-IQA 模型需要带有平均意见得分 (MOS) 的成对标记数据，但收集起来既耗时又麻烦。相比之下，可以从图像降级或恢复过程中轻松收集未标记的数据，这使得利用未标记的训练数据来提高 FR-IQA 性能变得令人鼓舞。而且，由于标记和未标记数据之间的分布不一致，未标记数据可能会出现异常值，进一步增加训练难度。在本文中，我们建议结合半监督和正未标记（PU）学习来利用未标记数据，同时减轻异常值的不利影响。特别是，通过将所有标记数据视为正样本，PU 学习可用于从未标记数据中识别负样本（即异常值）。半监督学习（SSL）被进一步部署，通过动态生成伪 MOS 来利用积极的未标记数据。我们采用包括参考分支和失真分支的双分支网络。此外，在参考分支中引入了空间注意力，以更多地关注信息区域，并使用切片 Wasserstein 距离进行稳健的差异图计算，以解决由 GAN 模型恢复的图像引起的错位问题。大量实验表明，我们的方法在基准数据集 PIPAL、KADID-10k、TID2013、LIVE 和 CSIQ 上的性能优于最先进的方法。 本文提出结合半监督学习和正负样本学习的方法，以提升全参考图像质量评估（FR-IQA）性能。 Yue Cao,Zhaolin Wan,Dongwei Ren,Zifei Yan,Wangmeng Zuo cs.CV,eess.IV

title: Edge-enhanced Feature Distillation Network for Efficient Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于高效超分辨率的边缘增强特征蒸馏网络
comment: Accepted to NTIRE workshop at CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted to NTIRE workshop at CVPR 2022
abstract: With the recently massive development in convolution neural networks, numerous lightweight CNN-based image super-resolution methods have been proposed for practical deployments on edge devices. However, most existing methods focus on one specific aspect: network or loss design, which leads to the difficulty of minimizing the model size. To address the issue, we conclude block devising, architecture searching, and loss design to obtain a more efficient SR structure. In this paper, we proposed an edge-enhanced feature distillation network, named EFDN, to preserve the high-frequency information under constrained resources. In detail, we build an edge-enhanced convolution block based on the existing reparameterization methods. Meanwhile, we propose edge-enhanced gradient loss to calibrate the reparameterized path training. Experimental results show that our edge-enhanced strategies preserve the edge and significantly improve the final restoration quality. Code is available at https://github.com/icandle/EFDN.
summary: With the recently massive development in convolution neural networks, numerous lightweight CNN-based image super-resolution methods have been proposed for practical deployments on edge devices. However, most existing methods focus on one specific aspect: network or loss design, which leads to the difficulty of minimizing the model size. To address the issue, we conclude block devising, architecture searching, and loss design to obtain a more efficient SR structure. In this paper, we proposed an edge-enhanced feature distillation network, named EFDN, to preserve the high-frequency information under constrained resources. In detail, we build an edge-enhanced convolution block based on the existing reparameterization methods. Meanwhile, we propose edge-enhanced gradient loss to calibrate the reparameterized path training. Experimental results show that our edge-enhanced strategies preserve the edge and significantly improve the final restoration quality. Code is available at https://github.com/icandle/EFDN.
abstract_zh: 随着最近卷积神经网络的大规模发展，人们提出了许多基于 CNN 的轻量级图像超分辨率方法，用于边缘设备上的实际部署。然而，大多数现有方法都专注于一个特定方面：网络或损失设计，这导致难以最小化模型大小。为了解决这个问题，我们总结了块设计、架构搜索和损失设计，以获得更有效的 SR 结构。在本文中，我们提出了一种边缘增强特征蒸馏网络，名为 EFDN，以在资源受限的情况下保留高频信息。具体来说，我们基于现有的重新参数化方法构建了边缘增强卷积块。同时，我们提出边缘增强梯度损失来校准重新参数化的路径训练。实验结果表明，我们的边缘增强策略保留了边缘并显着提高了最终的恢复质量。代码可在 https://github.com/icandle/EFDN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种边增强特征蒸馏网络（EFDN），旨在资源受限的边缘设备上实现高效图像超分辨率，同时保留高频边缘信息。
AI.motivation: 现有轻量级超分辨率方法多侧重单一设计方向（如网络结构或损失函数），难以兼顾模型压缩与重建质量，导致在边缘设备部署时效率不足。
AI.method: 设计包含边增强卷积块的网络结构，并引入边增强梯度损失函数，通过再参数化方法优化训练过程以保留高频细节。
AI.result: 实验表明，EFDN在保持模型轻量化的同时显著提升了边缘细节还原效果，代码已在GitHub开源。
AI.conclusion: 边增强策略有效平衡了模型效率与超分辨率质量，为边缘设备部署提供了可行方案。

title: Dynamic Point Cloud Denoising via Gradient Fields
title_zh: 通过梯度场动态点云去噪
abstract: 3D dynamic point clouds provide a discrete representation of real-world objects or scenes in motion, which have been widely applied in immersive telepresence, autonomous driving, surveillance, etc. However, point clouds acquired from sensors are usually perturbed by noise, which affects downstream tasks such as surface reconstruction and analysis. Although many efforts have been made for static point cloud denoising, dynamic point cloud denoising remains under-explored. In this paper, we propose a novel gradient-field-based dynamic point cloud denoising method, exploiting the temporal correspondence via the estimation of gradient fields -- a fundamental problem in dynamic point cloud processing and analysis. The gradient field is the gradient of the log-probability function of the noisy point cloud, based on which we perform gradient ascent so as to converge each point to the underlying clean surface. We estimate the gradient of each surface patch and exploit the temporal correspondence, where the temporally corresponding patches are searched leveraging on rigid motion in classical mechanics. In particular, we treat each patch as a rigid object, which moves in the gradient field of an adjacent frame via force until reaching a balanced state, i.e., when the sum of gradients over the patch reaches 0. Since the gradient would be smaller when the point is closer to the underlying surface, the balanced patch would fit the underlying surface well, thus leading to the temporal correspondence. Finally, the position of each point in the patch is updated along the direction of the gradient averaged from corresponding patches in adjacent frames. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art methods under both synthetic noise and simulated real-world noise.
summary: 3D dynamic point clouds provide a discrete representation of real-world objects or scenes in motion, which have been widely applied in immersive telepresence, autonomous driving, surveillance, etc. However, point clouds acquired from sensors are usually perturbed by noise, which affects downstream tasks such as surface reconstruction and analysis. Although many efforts have been made for static point cloud denoising, dynamic point cloud denoising remains under-explored. In this paper, we propose a novel gradient-field-based dynamic point cloud denoising method, exploiting the temporal correspondence via the estimation of gradient fields -- a fundamental problem in dynamic point cloud processing and analysis. The gradient field is the gradient of the log-probability function of the noisy point cloud, based on which we perform gradient ascent so as to converge each point to the underlying clean surface. We estimate the gradient of each surface patch and exploit the temporal correspondence, where the temporally corresponding patches are searched leveraging on rigid motion in classical mechanics. In particular, we treat each patch as a rigid object, which moves in the gradient field of an adjacent frame via force until reaching a balanced state, i.e., when the sum of gradients over the patch reaches 0. Since the gradient would be smaller when the point is closer to the underlying surface, the balanced patch would fit the underlying surface well, thus leading to the temporal correspondence. Finally, the position of each point in the patch is updated along the direction of the gradient averaged from corresponding patches in adjacent frames. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art methods under both synthetic noise and simulated real-world noise.
abstract_zh: 3D动态点云提供了真实世界物体或运动场景的离散表示，已广泛应用于沉浸式远程呈现、自动驾驶、监控等领域。然而，从传感器获取的点云通常会受到噪声的干扰，从而影响表面重建和分析等下游任务。尽管静态点云去噪已经做出了很多努力，但动态点云去噪仍然有待探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于梯度场的动态点云去噪方法，通过梯度场的估计来利用时间对应性——这是动态点云处理和分析中的基本问题。梯度场是噪声点云的对数概率函数的梯度，基于该梯度我们进行梯度上升，以将每个点收敛到底层的干净表面。我们估计每个表面补丁的梯度并利用时间对应性，其中利用经典力学中的刚性运动来搜索时间对应的补丁。特别地，我们将每个面片视为一个刚性物体，它通过力在相邻帧的梯度场中移动，直到达到平衡状态，即当面片上的梯度之和达到0时。由于当点越接近下垫面时梯度越小，平衡的面片将很好地贴合下垫面，从而产生时间对应。最后，沿着相邻帧中对应补丁平均的梯度方向更新补丁中每个点的位置。实验结果表明，所提出的模型在合成噪声和模拟现实噪声下都优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于梯度场的动态点云去噪方法，利用时间对应关系和梯度上升优化点云表面。
AI.motivation: 动态点云在现实场景中广泛应用，但现有方法对动态噪声处理不足，且静态点云去噪技术难以直接迁移。
AI.method: 通过估计噪声点云的对数概率梯度场，结合刚体运动模型实现时间对应 patches 的梯度平衡，沿相邻帧梯度方向更新点位置。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在合成噪声和真实场景噪声下均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 梯度场与时间对应结合可有效解决动态点云去噪问题，为动态点云处理提供新思路。

search_text: Dynamic Point Cloud Denoising via Gradient Fields 通过梯度场动态点云去噪 3D dynamic point clouds provide a discrete representation of real-world objects or scenes in motion, which have been widely applied in immersive telepresence, autonomous driving, surveillance, etc. However, point clouds acquired from sensors are usually perturbed by noise, which affects downstream tasks such as surface reconstruction and analysis. Although many efforts have been made for static point cloud denoising, dynamic point cloud denoising remains under-explored. In this paper, we propose a novel gradient-field-based dynamic point cloud denoising method, exploiting the temporal correspondence via the estimation of gradient fields -- a fundamental problem in dynamic point cloud processing and analysis. The gradient field is the gradient of the log-probability function of the noisy point cloud, based on which we perform gradient ascent so as to converge each point to the underlying clean surface. We estimate the gradient of each surface patch and exploit the temporal correspondence, where the temporally corresponding patches are searched leveraging on rigid motion in classical mechanics. In particular, we treat each patch as a rigid object, which moves in the gradient field of an adjacent frame via force until reaching a balanced state, i.e., when the sum of gradients over the patch reaches 0. Since the gradient would be smaller when the point is closer to the underlying surface, the balanced patch would fit the underlying surface well, thus leading to the temporal correspondence. Finally, the position of each point in the patch is updated along the direction of the gradient averaged from corresponding patches in adjacent frames. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art methods under both synthetic noise and simulated real-world noise. 3D动态点云提供了真实世界物体或运动场景的离散表示，已广泛应用于沉浸式远程呈现、自动驾驶、监控等领域。然而，从传感器获取的点云通常会受到噪声的干扰，从而影响表面重建和分析等下游任务。尽管静态点云去噪已经做出了很多努力，但动态点云去噪仍然有待探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于梯度场的动态点云去噪方法，通过梯度场的估计来利用时间对应性——这是动态点云处理和分析中的基本问题。梯度场是噪声点云的对数概率函数的梯度，基于该梯度我们进行梯度上升，以将每个点收敛到底层的干净表面。我们估计每个表面补丁的梯度并利用时间对应性，其中利用经典力学中的刚性运动来搜索时间对应的补丁。特别地，我们将每个面片视为一个刚性物体，它通过力在相邻帧的梯度场中移动，直到达到平衡状态，即当面片上的梯度之和达到0时。由于当点越接近下垫面时梯度越小，平衡的面片将很好地贴合下垫面，从而产生时间对应。最后，沿着相邻帧中对应补丁平均的梯度方向更新补丁中每个点的位置。实验结果表明，所提出的模型在合成噪声和模拟现实噪声下都优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种基于梯度场的动态点云去噪方法，利用时间对应关系和梯度上升优化点云表面。 Qianjiang Hu,Wei Hu cs.CV

title: Table-based Fact Verification with Self-adaptive Mixture of Experts
title_zh: 基于表格的事实验证与自适应专家混合
abstract: The table-based fact verification task has recently gained widespread attention and yet remains to be a very challenging problem. It inherently requires informative reasoning over natural language together with different numerical and logical reasoning on tables (e.g., count, superlative, comparative). Considering that, we exploit mixture-of-experts and present in this paper a new method: Self-adaptive Mixture-of-Experts Network (SaMoE). Specifically, we have developed a mixture-of-experts neural network to recognize and execute different types of reasoning -- the network is composed of multiple experts, each handling a specific part of the semantics for reasoning, whereas a management module is applied to decide the contribution of each expert network to the verification result. A self-adaptive method is developed to teach the management module combining results of different experts more efficiently without external knowledge. The experimental results illustrate that our framework achieves 85.1% accuracy on the benchmark dataset TabFact, comparable with the previous state-of-the-art models. We hope our framework can serve as a new baseline for table-based verification. Our code is available at https://github.com/THUMLP/SaMoE.
summary: The table-based fact verification task has recently gained widespread attention and yet remains to be a very challenging problem. It inherently requires informative reasoning over natural language together with different numerical and logical reasoning on tables (e.g., count, superlative, comparative). Considering that, we exploit mixture-of-experts and present in this paper a new method: Self-adaptive Mixture-of-Experts Network (SaMoE). Specifically, we have developed a mixture-of-experts neural network to recognize and execute different types of reasoning -- the network is composed of multiple experts, each handling a specific part of the semantics for reasoning, whereas a management module is applied to decide the contribution of each expert network to the verification result. A self-adaptive method is developed to teach the management module combining results of different experts more efficiently without external knowledge. The experimental results illustrate that our framework achieves 85.1% accuracy on the benchmark dataset TabFact, comparable with the previous state-of-the-art models. We hope our framework can serve as a new baseline for table-based verification. Our code is available at https://github.com/THUMLP/SaMoE.
abstract_zh: 基于表的事实验证任务最近受到了广泛的关注，但仍然是一个非常具有挑战性的问题。它本质上需要对自然语言进行信息推理，以及对表格进行不同的数字和逻辑推理（例如计数、最高级、比较）。考虑到这一点，我们利用专家混合并在本文中提出了一种新方法：自适应专家混合网络（SaMoE）。具体来说，我们开发了一个混合专家神经网络来识别和执行不同类型的推理——该网络由多个专家组成，每个专家处理推理语义的特定部分，而管理模块则用于决定每个专家网络对验证结果的贡献。开发了一种自适应方法，可以在无需外部知识的情况下更有效地结合不同专家的结果来教导管理模块。实验结果表明，我们的框架在基准数据集 TabFact 上实现了 85.1% 的准确率，与之前最先进的模型相当。我们希望我们的框架可以作为基于表格的验证的新基线。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/THUMLP/SaMoE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于表格的事实验证方法，名为自适应专家混合网络（SaMoE），用于处理自然语言与表格数据结合的事实验证任务。
AI.motivation: 表格事实验证任务具有挑战性，因为它需要自然语言推理和多种数值及逻辑推理，而现有方法在处理这些任务时存在局限。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种自适应专家混合网络（SaMoE），该网络由多个专家模块和一个管理模块组成，每个专家处理特定的推理部分，管理模块决定各专家的贡献度，且通过自适应方法提升组合效率。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该框架在TabFact基准数据集上达到了85.1%的准确率，与先前最先进的模型相当。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的SaMoE框架为表格事实验证任务提供了一种新的基线方法，并希望为未来的研究提供参考。

title: Multi-View Spatial-Temporal Network for Continuous Sign Language Recognition
title_zh: 用于连续手语识别的多视图时空网络
abstract: Sign language is a beautiful visual language and is also the primary language used by speaking and hearing-impaired people. However, sign language has many complex expressions, which are difficult for the public to understand and master. Sign language recognition algorithms will significantly facilitate communication between hearing-impaired people and normal people. Traditional continuous sign language recognition often uses a sequence learning method based on Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and Long Short-Term Memory Network (LSTM). These methods can only learn spatial and temporal features separately, which cannot learn the complex spatial-temporal features of sign language. LSTM is also difficult to learn long-term dependencies. To alleviate these problems, this paper proposes a multi-view spatial-temporal continuous sign language recognition network. The network consists of three parts. The first part is a Multi-View Spatial-Temporal Feature Extractor Network (MSTN), which can directly extract the spatial-temporal features of RGB and skeleton data; the second is a sign language encoder network based on Transformer, which can learn long-term dependencies; the third is a Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) decoder network, which is used to predict the whole meaning of the continuous sign language. Our algorithm is tested on two public sign language datasets SLR-100 and PHOENIX-Weather 2014T (RWTH). As a result, our method achieves excellent performance on both datasets. The word error rate on the SLR-100 dataset is 1.9%, and the word error rate on the RWTHPHOENIX-Weather dataset is 22.8%.
summary: Sign language is a beautiful visual language and is also the primary language used by speaking and hearing-impaired people. However, sign language has many complex expressions, which are difficult for the public to understand and master. Sign language recognition algorithms will significantly facilitate communication between hearing-impaired people and normal people. Traditional continuous sign language recognition often uses a sequence learning method based on Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and Long Short-Term Memory Network (LSTM). These methods can only learn spatial and temporal features separately, which cannot learn the complex spatial-temporal features of sign language. LSTM is also difficult to learn long-term dependencies. To alleviate these problems, this paper proposes a multi-view spatial-temporal continuous sign language recognition network. The network consists of three parts. The first part is a Multi-View Spatial-Temporal Feature Extractor Network (MSTN), which can directly extract the spatial-temporal features of RGB and skeleton data; the second is a sign language encoder network based on Transformer, which can learn long-term dependencies; the third is a Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) decoder network, which is used to predict the whole meaning of the continuous sign language. Our algorithm is tested on two public sign language datasets SLR-100 and PHOENIX-Weather 2014T (RWTH). As a result, our method achieves excellent performance on both datasets. The word error rate on the SLR-100 dataset is 1.9%, and the word error rate on the RWTHPHOENIX-Weather dataset is 22.8%.
abstract_zh: 手语是一种美丽的视觉语言，也是口语和听力障碍人士使用的主要语言。然而，手语的表达方式很多复杂，公众难以理解和掌握。手语识别算法将极大地促进听力障碍者与正常人之间的交流。传统的连续手语识别通常采用基于卷积神经网络（CNN）和长短期记忆网络（LSTM）的序列学习方法。这些方法只能分别学习空间和时间特征，无法学习手语复杂的时空特征。 LSTM 也很难学习长期依赖关系。为了缓解这些问题，本文提出了一种多视图时空连续手语识别网络。该网络由三部分组成。第一部分是多视图时空特征提取网络（MSTN），可以直接提取RGB和骨架数据的时空特征；第二个是基于 Transformer 的手语编码器网络，可以学习长期依赖关系；第三个是连接主义时间分类（CTC）解码器网络，用于预测连续手语的整体含义。我们的算法在两个公共手语数据集 SLR-100 和 PHOENIX-Weather 2014T (RWTH) 上进行了测试。因此，我们的方法在两个数据集上都取得了出色的性能。 SLR-100数据集上的误字率为1.9%，RWTHPHOENIX-Weather数据集上的误字率为22.8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多视角时空网络用于连续手语识别，以提升手语识别的准确性和对复杂时空特征的学习能力。
AI.motivation: 传统基于CNN和LSTM的手语识别方法无法有效学习手语的复杂时空特征，且难以处理长时依赖问题，限制了识别效果。
AI.method: 设计包含多视角时空特征提取器（MSTN）、Transformer编码器和CTC解码器的三阶段网络，分别提取RGB和骨骼数据特征、学习长时依赖并预测连续手语语义。
AI.result: 在SLR-100和PHOENIX-Weather 2014T数据集上分别达到1.9%和22.8%的词错误率，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合多视角时空特征与Transformer结构的模型能有效提升连续手语识别性能，为聋哑人交流提供更精准的技术支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种多视角时空网络用于连续手语识别，以提升手语识别的准确性和对复杂时空特征的学习能力。
ai_content.motivation: 传统基于CNN和LSTM的手语识别方法无法有效学习手语的复杂时空特征，且难以处理长时依赖问题，限制了识别效果。
ai_content.method: 设计包含多视角时空特征提取器（MSTN）、Transformer编码器和CTC解码器的三阶段网络，分别提取RGB和骨骼数据特征、学习长时依赖并预测连续手语语义。
ai_content.result: 在SLR-100和PHOENIX-Weather 2014T数据集上分别达到1.9%和22.8%的词错误率，优于现有方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 融合多视角时空特征与Transformer结构的模型能有效提升连续手语识别性能，为聋哑人交流提供更精准的技术支持。

search_text: Multi-View Spatial-Temporal Network for Continuous Sign Language Recognition 用于连续手语识别的多视图时空网络 Sign language is a beautiful visual language and is also the primary language used by speaking and hearing-impaired people. However, sign language has many complex expressions, which are difficult for the public to understand and master. Sign language recognition algorithms will significantly facilitate communication between hearing-impaired people and normal people. Traditional continuous sign language recognition often uses a sequence learning method based on Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and Long Short-Term Memory Network (LSTM). These methods can only learn spatial and temporal features separately, which cannot learn the complex spatial-temporal features of sign language. LSTM is also difficult to learn long-term dependencies. To alleviate these problems, this paper proposes a multi-view spatial-temporal continuous sign language recognition network. The network consists of three parts. The first part is a Multi-View Spatial-Temporal Feature Extractor Network (MSTN), which can directly extract the spatial-temporal features of RGB and skeleton data; the second is a sign language encoder network based on Transformer, which can learn long-term dependencies; the third is a Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) decoder network, which is used to predict the whole meaning of the continuous sign language. Our algorithm is tested on two public sign language datasets SLR-100 and PHOENIX-Weather 2014T (RWTH). As a result, our method achieves excellent performance on both datasets. The word error rate on the SLR-100 dataset is 1.9%, and the word error rate on the RWTHPHOENIX-Weather dataset is 22.8%. 手语是一种美丽的视觉语言，也是口语和听力障碍人士使用的主要语言。然而，手语的表达方式很多复杂，公众难以理解和掌握。手语识别算法将极大地促进听力障碍者与正常人之间的交流。传统的连续手语识别通常采用基于卷积神经网络（CNN）和长短期记忆网络（LSTM）的序列学习方法。这些方法只能分别学习空间和时间特征，无法学习手语复杂的时空特征。 LSTM 也很难学习长期依赖关系。为了缓解这些问题，本文提出了一种多视图时空连续手语识别网络。该网络由三部分组成。第一部分是多视图时空特征提取网络（MSTN），可以直接提取RGB和骨架数据的时空特征；第二个是基于 Transformer 的手语编码器网络，可以学习长期依赖关系；第三个是连接主义时间分类（CTC）解码器网络，用于预测连续手语的整体含义。我们的算法在两个公共手语数据集 SLR-100 和 PHOENIX-Weather 2014T (RWTH) 上进行了测试。因此，我们的方法在两个数据集上都取得了出色的性能。 SLR-100数据集上的误字率为1.9%，RWTHPHOENIX-Weather数据集上的误字率为22.8%。 本文提出一种多视角时空网络用于连续手语识别，以提升手语识别的准确性和对复杂时空特征的学习能力。 Ronghui Li,Lu Meng cs.CV

title: Augmentation of Atmospheric Turbulence Effects on Thermal Adapted Object Detection Models
title_zh: 大气湍流效应对热适应目标检测模型的增强
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2022 Perception Beyond the Visible Spectrum (PBVS) Workshop
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2022 Perception Beyond the Visible Spectrum (PBVS) Workshop
abstract: Atmospheric turbulence has a degrading effect on the image quality of long-range observation systems. As a result of various elements such as temperature, wind velocity, humidity, etc., turbulence is characterized by random fluctuations in the refractive index of the atmosphere. It is a phenomenon that may occur in various imaging spectra such as the visible or the infrared bands. In this paper, we analyze the effects of atmospheric turbulence on object detection performance in thermal imagery. We use a geometric turbulence model to simulate turbulence effects on a medium-scale thermal image set, namely "FLIR ADAS v2". We apply thermal domain adaptation to state-of-the-art object detectors and propose a data augmentation strategy to increase the performance of object detectors which utilizes turbulent images in different severity levels as training data. Our results show that the proposed data augmentation strategy yields an increase in performance for both turbulent and non-turbulent thermal test images.
summary: Atmospheric turbulence has a degrading effect on the image quality of long-range observation systems. As a result of various elements such as temperature, wind velocity, humidity, etc., turbulence is characterized by random fluctuations in the refractive index of the atmosphere. It is a phenomenon that may occur in various imaging spectra such as the visible or the infrared bands. In this paper, we analyze the effects of atmospheric turbulence on object detection performance in thermal imagery. We use a geometric turbulence model to simulate turbulence effects on a medium-scale thermal image set, namely "FLIR ADAS v2". We apply thermal domain adaptation to state-of-the-art object detectors and propose a data augmentation strategy to increase the performance of object detectors which utilizes turbulent images in different severity levels as training data. Our results show that the proposed data augmentation strategy yields an increase in performance for both turbulent and non-turbulent thermal test images.
abstract_zh: 大气湍流会降低远程观测系统的图像质量。由于温度、风速、湿度等多种因素的影响，湍流的特点是大气折射率的随机波动。这种现象可能发生在各种成像光谱中，例如可见光或红外波段。在本文中，我们分析了大气湍流对热图像中目标检测性能的影响。我们使用几何湍流模型来模拟中等规模热图像集（即“FLIR ADAS v2”）上的湍流效应。我们将热域适应应用于最先进的物体检测器，并提出了一种数据增强策略来提高物体检测器的性能，该策略利用不同严重程度的湍流图像作为训练数据。我们的结果表明，所提出的数据增强策略可以提高湍流和非湍流热测试图像的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大气湍流对热成像目标检测模型的影响，并提出了一种数据增强策略以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 大气湍流会显著降低远距离观测系统的图像质量，而现有目标检测模型在热成像湍流环境下表现不佳，需针对性优化。
AI.method: 基于几何湍流模型模拟不同强度的湍流效应，利用FLIR ADAS v2数据集进行热域适应，并将湍流图像作为训练数据增强模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，该数据增强策略在湍流和非湍流测试图像上均提升了目标检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入多强度湍流数据增强，可有效提升热成像目标检测模型在复杂环境下的鲁棒性。

title: Proposal-free Lidar Panoptic Segmentation with Pillar-level Affinity
title_zh: 具有支柱级亲和力的无提案激光雷达全景分割
abstract: We propose a simple yet effective proposal-free architecture for lidar panoptic segmentation. We jointly optimize both semantic segmentation and class-agnostic instance classification in a single network using a pillar-based bird's-eye view representation. The instance classification head learns pairwise affinity between pillars to determine whether the pillars belong to the same instance or not. We further propose a local clustering algorithm to propagate instance ids by merging semantic segmentation and affinity predictions. Our experiments on nuScenes dataset show that our approach outperforms previous proposal-free methods and is comparable to proposal-based methods which requires extra annotation from object detection.
summary: We propose a simple yet effective proposal-free architecture for lidar panoptic segmentation. We jointly optimize both semantic segmentation and class-agnostic instance classification in a single network using a pillar-based bird's-eye view representation. The instance classification head learns pairwise affinity between pillars to determine whether the pillars belong to the same instance or not. We further propose a local clustering algorithm to propagate instance ids by merging semantic segmentation and affinity predictions. Our experiments on nuScenes dataset show that our approach outperforms previous proposal-free methods and is comparable to proposal-based methods which requires extra annotation from object detection.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种简单而有效的无建议激光雷达全景分割架构。我们使用基于支柱的鸟瞰视图表示在单个网络中联合优化语义分割和与类无关的实例分类。实例分类头学习支柱之间的成对亲和力，以确定支柱是否属于同一实例。我们进一步提出了一种本地聚类算法，通过合并语义分割和亲和力预测来传播实例 ID。我们在 nuScenes 数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法优于以前的无提案方法，并且与基于提案的方法相当，后者需要对象检测的额外注释。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需proposal的激光雷达全景分割方法，结合语义分割与实例分类，利用pillar级亲和力进行实例分组。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖proposal生成或需要额外标注，而proposal-free方法在精度上存在不足，需更高效的方法。
AI.method: 基于pillar的鸟瞰图表示，联合优化语义分割与类无关实例分类，通过学习pillar间亲和力判断实例归属，并采用局部聚类算法传播实例ID。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，该方法在无需proposal的情况下优于现有proposal-free方法，且性能接近需额外标注的proposal-based方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种有效的proposal-free架构，通过亲和力学习和聚类算法提升分割效果，为激光雷达全景分割提供了新思路。

title: Influence of Repetition through Limited Recall
title_zh: 重复通过有限回忆的影响
comment: ef:Proceedings of the International AAAI Conference on Web and Social Media. 16, 1 (May 2022), 863-872
comments: ef:Proceedings of the International AAAI Conference on Web and Social Media. 16, 1 (May 2022), 863-872
abstract: Decision makers who receive many signals are subject to imperfect recall. This is especially important when learning from feeds that aggregate messages from many senders on social media platforms. In this paper, we study a stylized model of learning from feeds and highlight the inefficiencies that arise due to imperfect recall. In our model, failure to recall a specific message comes from the accumulation of messages which creates interference. We characterize the influence of each sender according to the rate at which she sends messages and to the strength of interference. Our analysis indicates that imperfect recall not only leads to double-counting and extreme opinions in finite populations, but also impedes the ability of the receiver to learn the true state as the population of the senders increases. We estimate the strength of interference in an online experiment where participants are exposed to (non-informative) repeated messages and they need to estimate the opinion of others. Results show that interference plays a significant role and is weaker among participants who disagree with each other. Our work has implication for the diffusion of information in networks, especially when it is false because it is shared and repeated more than true information.
summary: Decision makers who receive many signals are subject to imperfect recall. This is especially important when learning from feeds that aggregate messages from many senders on social media platforms. In this paper, we study a stylized model of learning from feeds and highlight the inefficiencies that arise due to imperfect recall. In our model, failure to recall a specific message comes from the accumulation of messages which creates interference. We characterize the influence of each sender according to the rate at which she sends messages and to the strength of interference. Our analysis indicates that imperfect recall not only leads to double-counting and extreme opinions in finite populations, but also impedes the ability of the receiver to learn the true state as the population of the senders increases. We estimate the strength of interference in an online experiment where participants are exposed to (non-informative) repeated messages and they need to estimate the opinion of others. Results show that interference plays a significant role and is weaker among participants who disagree with each other. Our work has implication for the diffusion of information in networks, especially when it is false because it is shared and repeated more than true information.
abstract_zh: 接收到许多信号的决策者可能会受到不完全回忆的影响。当从聚合社交媒体平台上许多发件人的消息的提要中学习时，这一点尤其重要。在本文中，我们研究了一种从提要中学习的程式化模型，并强调了由于不完美的召回而导致的低效率。在我们的模型中，无法回忆起特定消息是由于消息的积累造成了干扰。我们根据每个发送者发送消息的速率和干扰的强度来描述每个发送者的影响力。我们的分析表明，不完美的召回不仅会导致有限群体中的重复计算和极端观点，而且随着发送者群体的增加，也会阻碍接收者了解真实状态的能力。我们估计在线实验中的干扰强度，其中参与者会接触到（非信息性）重复消息，并且他们需要估计其他人的意见。结果表明，干扰起着显着的作用，并且在彼此意见不一致的参与者中较弱。我们的工作对网络中信息的传播具有影响，特别是当信息是错误的时，因为它比真实信息被共享和重复更多。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在社交平台信息流中，由于人类记忆有限导致的重复信息对决策者学习效率的影响。
AI.motivation: 社交平台信息流中信息过载导致决策者记忆不完善，可能引发误判和极端观点，需量化重复信息对学习过程的干扰效应。
AI.method: 构建信息流学习模型，结合在线实验验证：参与者在接收重复非信息性消息后需估计他人观点，分析记忆干扰强度与发送频率的关系。
AI.result: 记忆干扰导致重复计数、极端观点，且随着发送者数量增加学习效率下降；实验显示干扰效应在意见分歧群体中较弱。
AI.conclusion: 有限记忆与信息重复会阻碍真相学习，尤其加剧虚假信息传播，需警惕社交网络中重复信息的扭曲效应。

search_text: Influence of Repetition through Limited Recall 重复通过有限回忆的影响 Decision makers who receive many signals are subject to imperfect recall. This is especially important when learning from feeds that aggregate messages from many senders on social media platforms. In this paper, we study a stylized model of learning from feeds and highlight the inefficiencies that arise due to imperfect recall. In our model, failure to recall a specific message comes from the accumulation of messages which creates interference. We characterize the influence of each sender according to the rate at which she sends messages and to the strength of interference. Our analysis indicates that imperfect recall not only leads to double-counting and extreme opinions in finite populations, but also impedes the ability of the receiver to learn the true state as the population of the senders increases. We estimate the strength of interference in an online experiment where participants are exposed to (non-informative) repeated messages and they need to estimate the opinion of others. Results show that interference plays a significant role and is weaker among participants who disagree with each other. Our work has implication for the diffusion of information in networks, especially when it is false because it is shared and repeated more than true information. 接收到许多信号的决策者可能会受到不完全回忆的影响。当从聚合社交媒体平台上许多发件人的消息的提要中学习时，这一点尤其重要。在本文中，我们研究了一种从提要中学习的程式化模型，并强调了由于不完美的召回而导致的低效率。在我们的模型中，无法回忆起特定消息是由于消息的积累造成了干扰。我们根据每个发送者发送消息的速率和干扰的强度来描述每个发送者的影响力。我们的分析表明，不完美的召回不仅会导致有限群体中的重复计算和极端观点，而且随着发送者群体的增加，也会阻碍接收者了解真实状态的能力。我们估计在线实验中的干扰强度，其中参与者会接触到（非信息性）重复消息，并且他们需要估计其他人的意见。结果表明，干扰起着显着的作用，并且在彼此意见不一致的参与者中较弱。我们的工作对网络中信息的传播具有影响，特别是当信息是错误的时，因为它比真实信息被共享和重复更多。 本文研究了在社交平台信息流中，由于人类记忆有限导致的重复信息对决策者学习效率的影响。 Jad Sassine,M. authors_text: Kenneth T. Co,David Martinez-Rego,Zhongyuan Hau,Emil C. Lupu
title: Jacobian Ensembles Improve Robustness Trade-offs to Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: 雅可比系综提高了对抗性攻击的鲁棒性权衡
abstract: Deep neural networks have become an integral part of our software infrastructure and are being deployed in many widely-used and safety-critical applications. However, their integration into many systems also brings with it the vulnerability to test time attacks in the form of Universal Adversarial Perturbations (UAPs). UAPs are a class of perturbations that when applied to any input causes model misclassification. Although there is an ongoing effort to defend models against these adversarial attacks, it is often difficult to reconcile the trade-offs in model accuracy and robustness to adversarial attacks. Jacobian regularization has been shown to improve the robustness of models against UAPs, whilst model ensembles have been widely adopted to improve both predictive performance and model robustness. In this work, we propose a novel approach, Jacobian Ensembles-a combination of Jacobian regularization and model ensembles to significantly increase the robustness against UAPs whilst maintaining or improving model accuracy. Our results show that Jacobian Ensembles achieves previously unseen levels of accuracy and robustness, greatly improving over previous methods that tend to skew towards only either accuracy or robustness.
summary: Deep neural networks have become an integral part of our software infrastructure and are being deployed in many widely-used and safety-critical applications. However, their integration into many systems also brings with it the vulnerability to test time attacks in the form of Universal Adversarial Perturbations (UAPs). UAPs are a class of perturbations that when applied to any input causes model misclassification. Although there is an ongoing effort to defend models against these adversarial attacks, it is often difficult to reconcile the trade-offs in model accuracy and robustness to adversarial attacks. Jacobian regularization has been shown to improve the robustness of models against UAPs, whilst model ensembles have been widely adopted to improve both predictive performance and model robustness. In this work, we propose a novel approach, Jacobian Ensembles-a combination of Jacobian regularization and model ensembles to significantly increase the robustness against UAPs whilst maintaining or improving model accuracy. Our results show that Jacobian Ensembles achieves previously unseen levels of accuracy and robustness, greatly improving over previous methods that tend to skew towards only either accuracy or robustness.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络已成为我们软件基础设施不可或缺的一部分，并被部署在许多广泛使用和安全关键的应用程序中。然而，它们集成到许多系统中也带来了以通用对抗扰动 (UAP) 形式进行测试时间攻击的漏洞。 UAP 是一类扰动，当应用于任何输入时会导致模型错误分类。尽管人们一直在努力保护模型免受这些对抗性攻击，但通常很难在模型准确性和对抗性攻击的鲁棒性之间进行权衡。雅可比正则化已被证明可以提高针对 UAP 的模型的鲁棒性，而模型集成已被广泛采用来提高预测性能和模型鲁棒性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，即雅可比集成（Jacobian Ensembles）——雅可比正则化和模型集成的结合，可显着提高针对 UAP 的鲁棒性，同时保持或提高模型准确性。我们的结果表明，雅可比系综实现了前所未有的准确性和鲁棒性水平，大大提高了以前仅倾向于准确性或鲁棒性的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合雅可比正则化与模型集成的方法，以提升深度神经网络对通用对抗扰动的鲁棒性，同时保持或提高模型准确性。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在安全关键应用中易受对抗攻击影响，现有方法难以平衡模型准确率与鲁棒性之间的权衡。
AI.method: 将雅可比正则化技术与模型集成策略结合，形成Jacobian Ensembles方法，通过联合优化提升对抗鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在准确率和鲁棒性上均优于现有技术，实现了此前未达到的性能平衡。
AI.conclusion: Jacobian Ensembles有效解决了对抗攻击防御中的准确率-鲁棒性权衡问题，为安全关键场景提供了更可靠的解决方案。

authors_text: Yikai Wang,Xinghao Chen,Lele Cao,Wenbing Huang,Fuchun Sun,Yunhe Wang
title: Multimodal Token Fusion for Vision Transformers
title_zh: Vision Transformer 的多模式令牌融合
abstract: Many adaptations of transformers have emerged to address the single-modal vision tasks, where self-attention modules are stacked to handle input sources like images. Intuitively, feeding multiple modalities of data to vision transformers could improve the performance, yet the inner-modal attentive weights may also be diluted, which could thus undermine the final performance. In this paper, we propose a multimodal token fusion method (TokenFusion), tailored for transformer-based vision tasks. To effectively fuse multiple modalities, TokenFusion dynamically detects uninformative tokens and substitutes these tokens with projected and aggregated inter-modal features. Residual positional alignment is also adopted to enable explicit utilization of the inter-modal alignments after fusion. The design of TokenFusion allows the transformer to learn correlations among multimodal features, while the single-modal transformer architecture remains largely intact. Extensive experiments are conducted on a variety of homogeneous and heterogeneous modalities and demonstrate that TokenFusion surpasses state-of-the-art methods in three typical vision tasks: multimodal image-to-image translation, RGB-depth semantic segmentation, and 3D object detection with point cloud and images. Our code is available at https://github.com/yikaiw/TokenFusion.
summary: Many adaptations of transformers have emerged to address the single-modal vision tasks, where self-attention modules are stacked to handle input sources like images. Intuitively, feeding multiple modalities of data to vision transformers could improve the performance, yet the inner-modal attentive weights may also be diluted, which could thus undermine the final performance. In this paper, we propose a multimodal token fusion method (TokenFusion), tailored for transformer-based vision tasks. To effectively fuse multiple modalities, TokenFusion dynamically detects uninformative tokens and substitutes these tokens with projected and aggregated inter-modal features. Residual positional alignment is also adopted to enable explicit utilization of the inter-modal alignments after fusion. The design of TokenFusion allows the transformer to learn correlations among multimodal features, while the single-modal transformer architecture remains largely intact. Extensive experiments are conducted on a variety of homogeneous and heterogeneous modalities and demonstrate that TokenFusion surpasses state-of-the-art methods in three typical vision tasks: multimodal image-to-image translation, RGB-depth semantic segmentation, and 3D object detection with point cloud and images. Our code is available at https://github.com/yikaiw/TokenFusion.
abstract_zh: 为了解决单模态视觉任务，已经出现了许多变压器的改进，其中自我注意模块被堆叠起来来处理图像等输入源。直观上，向视觉转换器提供多种数据模态可以提高性能，但内部模态注意力权重也可能被稀释，从而损害最终性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种多模态令牌融合方法（TokenFusion），专为基于变压器的视觉任务而定制。为了有效地融合多种模态，TokenFusion 动态检测无信息的标记，并用预测和聚合的模态间特征替换这些标记。还采用残余位置对齐，以便能够在融合后明确利用模间对齐。 TokenFusion 的设计允许变压器学习多模态特征之间的相关性，而单模态变压器架构基本保持不变。对各种同质和异质模态进行了大量实验，证明 TokenFusion 在三个典型视觉任务中超越了最先进的方法：多模态图像到图像转换、RGB 深度语义分割以及点云和图像的 3D 对象检测。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/yikaiw/TokenFusion 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多模态标记融合方法（TokenFusion），旨在提升基于Transformer的视觉任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 虽然将多种模态的数据输入视觉Transformer可以提高性能，但模态内部的注意力权重可能会被稀释，从而影响最终效果。
AI.method: TokenFusion通过动态检测无信息标记并将其替换为跨模态特征的投影和聚合，同时采用残差位置对齐，以显式利用融合后的跨模态对齐。
AI.result: 在多种同质和异质模态上进行了大量实验，结果表明TokenFusion在三种典型的视觉任务中优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: TokenFusion方法在保持单模态Transformer架构基本不变的情况下，能够有效融合多模态特征，提升视觉任务的性能。

search_text: Multimodal Token Fusion for Vision Transformers Vision Transformer 的多模式令牌融合 Many adaptations of transformers have emerged to address the single-modal vision tasks, where self-attention modules are stacked to handle input sources like images. Intuitively, feeding multiple modalities of data to vision transformers could improve the performance, yet the inner-modal attentive weights may also be diluted, which could thus undermine the final performance. In this paper, we propose a multimodal token fusion method (TokenFusion), tailored for transformer-based vision tasks. To effectively fuse multiple modalities, TokenFusion dynamically detects uninformative tokens and substitutes these tokens with projected and aggregated inter-modal features. Residual positional alignment is also adopted to enable explicit utilization of the inter-modal alignments after fusion. The design of TokenFusion allows the transformer to learn correlations among multimodal features, while the single-modal transformer architecture remains largely intact. Extensive experiments are conducted on a variety of homogeneous and heterogeneous modalities and demonstrate that TokenFusion surpasses state-of-the-art methods in three typical vision tasks: multimodal image-to-image translation, RGB-depth semantic segmentation, and 3D object detection with point cloud and images. Our code is available at https://github.com/yikaiw/TokenFusion. 为了解决单模态视觉任务，已经出现了许多变压器的改进，其中自我注意模块被堆叠起来来处理图像等输入源。直观上，向视觉转换器提供多种数据模态可以提高性能，但内部模态注意力权重也可能被稀释，从而损害最终性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种多模态令牌融合方法（TokenFusion），专为基于变压器的视觉任务而定制。为了有效地融合多种模态，TokenFusion 动态检测无信息的标记，并用预测和聚合的模态间特征替换这些标记。还采用残余位置对齐，以便能够在融合后明确利用模间对齐。 TokenFusion 的设计允许变压器学习多模态特征之间的相关性，而单模态变压器架构基本保持不变。对各种同质和异质模态进行了大量实验，证明 TokenFusion 在三个典型视觉任务中超越了最先进的方法：多模态图像到图像转换、RGB 深度语义分割以及点云和图像的 3D 对象检测。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/yikaiw/TokenFusion 获取。 本文提出了一种多模态标记融合方法（TokenFusion），旨在提升基于Transformer的视觉任务的性能。 Yikai Wang,Xinghao Chen,Lele Cao,Wenbing Huang,Fuchun Sun,Yunhe Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Rui Yan,Cheng Wen,Shuran Zhou,Tingwei Guo,Wei Zou,Xiangang Li
title: Audio Deep Fake Detection System with Neural Stitching for ADD 2022
title_zh: ADD 2022 具有神经拼接功能的音频深度伪造检测系统
abstract: This paper describes our best system and methodology for ADD 2022: The First Audio Deep Synthesis Detection Challenge\cite{Yi2022ADD}. The very same system was used for both two rounds of evaluation in Track 3.2 with a similar training methodology. The first round of Track 3.2 data is generated from Text-to-Speech(TTS) or voice conversion (VC) algorithms, while the second round of data consists of generated fake audio from other participants in Track 3.1, aiming to spoof our systems. Our systems use a standard 34-layer ResNet, with multi-head attention pooling \cite{india2019self} to learn the discriminative embedding for fake audio and spoof detection. We further utilize neural stitching to boost the model's generalization capability in order to perform equally well in different tasks, and more details will be explained in the following sessions. The experiments show that our proposed method outperforms all other systems with a 10.1% equal error rate(EER) in Track 3.2.
summary: This paper describes our best system and methodology for ADD 2022: The First Audio Deep Synthesis Detection Challenge\cite{Yi2022ADD}. The very same system was used for both two rounds of evaluation in Track 3.2 with a similar training methodology. The first round of Track 3.2 data is generated from Text-to-Speech(TTS) or voice conversion (VC) algorithms, while the second round of data consists of generated fake audio from other participants in Track 3.1, aiming to spoof our systems. Our systems use a standard 34-layer ResNet, with multi-head attention pooling \cite{india2019self} to learn the discriminative embedding for fake audio and spoof detection. We further utilize neural stitching to boost the model's generalization capability in order to perform equally well in different tasks, and more details will be explained in the following sessions. The experiments show that our proposed method outperforms all other systems with a 10.1% equal error rate(EER) in Track 3.2.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了我们 ADD 2022 的最佳系统和方法：首届音频深度合成检测挑战\cite{Yi2022ADD}。 Track 3.2 中的两轮评估均使用相同的系统，并采用类似的培训方法。第一轮 Track 3.2 数据是由文本到语音 (TTS) 或语音转换 (VC) 算法生成的，而第二轮数据由 Track 3.1 中其他参与者生成的假音频组成，旨在欺骗我们的系统。我们的系统使用标准的 34 层 ResNet，具有多头注意力池 \cite{india2019self} 来学习用于虚假音频和欺骗检测的判别性嵌入。我们进一步利用神经拼接来提高模型的泛化能力，以便在不同的任务中表现得同样好，更多细节将在下面的课程中解释。实验表明，我们提出的方法在 Track 3.2 中以 10.1% 的等错误率 (EER) 优于所有其他系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经缝合的音频深度伪造检测系统，用于ADD 2022挑战赛Track 3.2的音频合成检测任务。
AI.motivation: 为应对音频深度伪造检测中不同合成方法（如TTS、VC）及对抗样本的挑战，需提升模型泛化能力以实现鲁棒检测。
AI.method: 采用34层ResNet结合多头注意力池化提取判别性嵌入，并通过神经缝合技术增强模型在不同任务中的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在ADD 2022 Track 3.2测试中，系统以10.1%的等错误率（EER）超越所有其他参赛系统。
AI.conclusion: 神经缝合技术有效提升了音频伪造检测的泛化性能，为应对多样化合成攻击提供了可行方案。

title: Shape-Aware Monocular 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 形状感知单目 3D 物体检测
comment: 8 pages; 6 figures. typo fixed; reference changed
comments: 8 pages; 6 figures. typo fixed; reference changed
abstract: The detection of 3D objects through a single perspective camera is a challenging issue. The anchor-free and keypoint-based models receive increasing attention recently due to their effectiveness and simplicity. However, most of these methods are vulnerable to occluded and truncated objects. In this paper, a single-stage monocular 3D object detection model is proposed. An instance-segmentation head is integrated into the model training, which allows the model to be aware of the visible shape of a target object. The detection largely avoids interference from irrelevant regions surrounding the target objects. In addition, we also reveal that the popular IoU-based evaluation metrics, which were originally designed for evaluating stereo or LiDAR-based detection methods, are insensitive to the improvement of monocular 3D object detection algorithms. A novel evaluation metric, namely average depth similarity (ADS) is proposed for the monocular 3D object detection models. Our method outperforms the baseline on both the popular and the proposed evaluation metrics while maintaining real-time efficiency.
summary: The detection of 3D objects through a single perspective camera is a challenging issue. The anchor-free and keypoint-based models receive increasing attention recently due to their effectiveness and simplicity. However, most of these methods are vulnerable to occluded and truncated objects. In this paper, a single-stage monocular 3D object detection model is proposed. An instance-segmentation head is integrated into the model training, which allows the model to be aware of the visible shape of a target object. The detection largely avoids interference from irrelevant regions surrounding the target objects. In addition, we also reveal that the popular IoU-based evaluation metrics, which were originally designed for evaluating stereo or LiDAR-based detection methods, are insensitive to the improvement of monocular 3D object detection algorithms. A novel evaluation metric, namely average depth similarity (ADS) is proposed for the monocular 3D object detection models. Our method outperforms the baseline on both the popular and the proposed evaluation metrics while maintaining real-time efficiency.
abstract_zh: 通过单视角相机检测 3D 物体是一个具有挑战性的问题。无锚定和基于关键点的模型由于其有效性和简单性而受到越来越多的关注。然而，这些方法中的大多数都容易受到遮挡和截断对象的影响。本文提出了一种单阶段单目 3D 物体检测模型。实例分割头集成到模型训练中，使模型能够了解目标对象的可见形状。检测很大程度上避免了目标物体周围不相关区域的干扰。此外，我们还发现，流行的基于 IoU 的评估指标最初是为评估立体或基于 LiDAR 的检测方法而设计的，但对单目 3D 物体检测算法的改进不敏感。为单目 3D 目标检测模型提出了一种新颖的评估指标，即平均深度相似度（ADS）。我们的方法在流行的和建议的评估指标上都优于基线，同时保持实时效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合形状感知的单目3D目标检测模型，并设计新的评估指标ADS以提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有单目3D检测方法对遮挡和截断目标鲁棒性不足，且传统IoU指标无法有效评估单目方法改进效果。
AI.method: 集成实例分割头以感知目标可见形状，消除无关区域干扰；提出平均深度相似度（ADS）作为单目3D检测专用评估指标。
AI.result: 在主流和自定义指标上均优于基线方法，同时保持实时检测效率。
AI.conclusion: 形状感知机制与ADS指标的结合有效提升了单目3D检测性能，为该领域提供新思路。

title: NAFSSR: Stereo Image Super-Resolution Using NAFNet
title_zh: NAFSSR：使用 NAFNet 的立体图像超分辨率
abstract: Stereo image super-resolution aims at enhancing the quality of super-resolution results by utilizing the complementary information provided by binocular systems. To obtain reasonable performance, most methods focus on finely designing modules, loss functions, and etc. to exploit information from another viewpoint. This has the side effect of increasing system complexity, making it difficult for researchers to evaluate new ideas and compare methods. This paper inherits a strong and simple image restoration model, NAFNet, for single-view feature extraction and extends it by adding cross attention modules to fuse features between views to adapt to binocular scenarios. The proposed baseline for stereo image super-resolution is noted as NAFSSR. Furthermore, training/testing strategies are proposed to fully exploit the performance of NAFSSR. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. In particular, NAFSSR outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on the KITTI 2012, KITTI 2015, Middlebury, and Flickr1024 datasets. With NAFSSR, we won 1st place in the NTIRE 2022 Stereo Image Super-resolution Challenge. Codes and models will be released at https://github.com/megvii-research/NAFNet.
summary: Stereo image super-resolution aims at enhancing the quality of super-resolution results by utilizing the complementary information provided by binocular systems. To obtain reasonable performance, most methods focus on finely designing modules, loss functions, and etc. to exploit information from another viewpoint. This has the side effect of increasing system complexity, making it difficult for researchers to evaluate new ideas and compare methods. This paper inherits a strong and simple image restoration model, NAFNet, for single-view feature extraction and extends it by adding cross attention modules to fuse features between views to adapt to binocular scenarios. The proposed baseline for stereo image super-resolution is noted as NAFSSR. Furthermore, training/testing strategies are proposed to fully exploit the performance of NAFSSR. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. In particular, NAFSSR outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on the KITTI 2012, KITTI 2015, Middlebury, and Flickr1024 datasets. With NAFSSR, we won 1st place in the NTIRE 2022 Stereo Image Super-resolution Challenge. Codes and models will be released at https://github.com/megvii-research/NAFNet.
abstract_zh: 立体图像超分辨率旨在利用双目系统提供的互补信息来提高超分辨率结果的质量。为了获得合理的性能，大多数方法侧重于精细设计模块、损失函数等，以从另一个角度利用信息。这会增加系统复杂性，使研究人员难以评估新想法和比较方法。本文继承了强大而简单的图像恢复模型NAFNet，用于单视图特征提取，并通过添加交叉注意模块来融合视图之间的特征以适应双目场景对其进行扩展。建议的立体图像超分辨率基线被标记为 NAFSSR。此外，还提出了训练/测试策略以充分利用 NAFSSR 的性能。大量的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。特别是，NAFSSR 在 KITTI 2012、KITTI 2015、Middlebury 和 Flickr1024 数据集上的性能优于最先进的方法。凭借 NAFSSR，我们在 NTIRE 2022 立体图像超分辨率挑战赛中获得第一名。代码和模型将在https://github.com/megvii-research/NAFNet发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NAFSSR方法，通过改进NAFNet模型并引入跨视图注意力模块，实现立体图像超分辨率任务。
AI.motivation: 现有立体图像超分辨率方法依赖复杂模块设计和损失函数，导致系统复杂度高且难以评估新方法。本文旨在提供一个简单有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 继承NAFNet的单视角特征提取能力，添加跨注意力模块融合双视角特征，并设计训练/测试策略优化模型性能。
AI.result: 在KITTI、Middlebury等数据集上优于SOTA方法，获得NTIRE 2022立体图像超分辨率挑战赛冠军。
AI.conclusion: NAFSSR通过简单架构与跨视图特征融合有效提升立体图像超分辨率性能，验证了方法的有效性与实用性。

search_text: NAFSSR: Stereo Image Super-Resolution Using NAFNet NAFSSR：使用 NAFNet 的立体图像超分辨率 Stereo image super-resolution aims at enhancing the quality of super-resolution results by utilizing the complementary information provided by binocular systems. To obtain reasonable performance, most methods focus on finely designing modules, loss functions, and etc. to exploit information from another viewpoint. This has the side effect of increasing system complexity, making it difficult for researchers to evaluate new ideas and compare methods. This paper inherits a strong and simple image restoration model, NAFNet, for single-view feature extraction and extends it by adding cross attention modules to fuse features between views to adapt to binocular scenarios. The proposed baseline for stereo image super-resolution is noted as NAFSSR. Furthermore, training/testing strategies are proposed to fully exploit the performance of NAFSSR. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. In particular, NAFSSR outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on the KITTI 2012, KITTI 2015, Middlebury, and Flickr1024 datasets. With NAFSSR, we won 1st place in the NTIRE 2022 Stereo Image Super-resolution Challenge. Codes and models will be released at https://github.com/megvii-research/NAFNet. 立体图像超分辨率旨在利用双目系统提供的互补信息来提高超分辨率结果的质量。为了获得合理的性能，大多数方法侧重于精细设计模块、损失函数等，以从另一个角度利用信息。这会增加系统复杂性，使研究人员难以评估新想法和比较方法。本文继承了强大而简单的图像恢复模型NAFNet，用于单视图特征提取，并通过添加交叉注意模块来融合视图之间的特征以适应双目场景对其进行扩展。建议的立体图像超分辨率基线被标记为 NAFSSR。此外，还提出了训练/测试策略以充分利用 NAFSSR 的性能。大量的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。特别是，NAFSSR 在 KITTI 2012、KITTI 2015、Middlebury 和 Flickr1024 数据集上的性能优于最先进的方法。凭借 NAFSSR，我们在 NTIRE 2022 立体图像超分辨率挑战赛中获得第一名。代码和模型将在https://github.com/megvii-research/NAFNet发布。 本文提出NAFSSR方法，通过改进NAFNet模型并引入跨视图注意力模块，实现立体图像超分辨率任务。 Xiaojie Chu,Liangyu Chen,Wenqing Yu cs.CV

title: Unsupervised Contrastive Hashing for Cross-Modal Retrieval in Remote Sensing
title_zh: 用于遥感跨模态检索的无监督对比哈希
comment: Our code is publicly available at https://git.tu-berlin.de/rsim/duch. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2201.08125
comments: Our code is publicly available at https://git.tu-berlin.de/rsim/duch. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2201.08125
abstract: The development of cross-modal retrieval systems that can search and retrieve semantically relevant data across different modalities based on a query in any modality has attracted great attention in remote sensing (RS). In this paper, we focus our attention on cross-modal text-image retrieval, where queries from one modality (e.g., text) can be matched to archive entries from another (e.g., image). Most of the existing cross-modal text-image retrieval systems in RS require a high number of labeled training samples and also do not allow fast and memory-efficient retrieval. These issues limit the applicability of the existing cross-modal retrieval systems for large-scale applications in RS. To address this problem, in this paper we introduce a novel unsupervised cross-modal contrastive hashing (DUCH) method for text-image retrieval in RS. To this end, the proposed DUCH is made up of two main modules: 1) feature extraction module, which extracts deep representations of two modalities; 2) hashing module that learns to generate cross-modal binary hash codes from the extracted representations. We introduce a novel multi-objective loss function including: i) contrastive objectives that enable similarity preservation in intra- and inter-modal similarities; ii) an adversarial objective that is enforced across two modalities for cross-modal representation consistency; and iii) binarization objectives for generating hash codes. Experimental results show that the proposed DUCH outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Our code is publicly available at https://git.tu-berlin.de/rsim/duch.
summary: The development of cross-modal retrieval systems that can search and retrieve semantically relevant data across different modalities based on a query in any modality has attracted great attention in remote sensing (RS). In this paper, we focus our attention on cross-modal text-image retrieval, where queries from one modality (e.g., text) can be matched to archive entries from another (e.g., image). Most of the existing cross-modal text-image retrieval systems in RS require a high number of labeled training samples and also do not allow fast and memory-efficient retrieval. These issues limit the applicability of the existing cross-modal retrieval systems for large-scale applications in RS. To address this problem, in this paper we introduce a novel unsupervised cross-modal contrastive hashing (DUCH) method for text-image retrieval in RS. To this end, the proposed DUCH is made up of two main modules: 1) feature extraction module, which extracts deep representations of two modalities; 2) hashing module that learns to generate cross-modal binary hash codes from the extracted representations. We introduce a novel multi-objective loss function including: i) contrastive objectives that enable similarity preservation in intra- and inter-modal similarities; ii) an adversarial objective that is enforced across two modalities for cross-modal representation consistency; and iii) binarization objectives for generating hash codes. Experimental results show that the proposed DUCH outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Our code is publicly available at https://git.tu-berlin.de/rsim/duch.
abstract_zh: 跨模态检索系统的发展引起了遥感（RS）领域的极大关注，该系统可以基于任何模态的查询跨不同模态搜索和检索语义相关数据。在本文中，我们将注意力集中在跨模式文本图像检索上，其中来自一种模式（例如文本）的查询可以与来自另一种模式（例如图像）的存档条目进行匹配。 RS 中现有的大多数跨模态文本图像检索系统需要大量标记训练样本，并且也不允许快速且节省内存的检索。这些问题限制了现有跨模态检索系统在遥感领域大规模应用的适用性。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的无监督跨模态对比哈希（DUCH）方法，用于 RS 中的文本图像检索。为此，所提出的 DUCH 由两个主要模块组成：1）特征提取模块，提取两种模态的深度表示； 2）哈希模块，学习从提取的表示生成跨模式二进制哈希代码。我们引入了一种新颖的多目标损失函数，包括：i）对比目标，可以在模式内和模式间相似性中保留相似性； ii）跨两种模式强制执行的对抗性目标，以实现跨模式表示的一致性； iii) 用于生成哈希码的二值化目标。实验结果表明，所提出的 DUCH 优于最先进的方法。我们的代码可在 https://git.tu-berlin.de/rsim/duch 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督对比哈希方法（DUCH），用于解决遥感领域跨模态文本-图像检索中的大规模应用问题。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态检索系统依赖大量标注数据且检索效率低，难以满足遥感领域大规模应用需求。
AI.method: DUCH包含特征提取模块和哈希模块，通过多目标损失函数（对比目标、对抗目标、二值化目标）学习跨模态二值哈希码。
AI.result: 实验表明DUCH优于现有最先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: DUCH有效解决了遥感跨模态检索中标签依赖和效率问题，为大规模应用提供了新方法。

title: Software Engineering Approaches for TinyML based IoT Embedded Vision: A Systematic Literature Review
title_zh: 基于 TinyML 的物联网嵌入式视觉的软件工程方法：系统文献综述
abstract: Internet of Things (IoT) has catapulted human ability to control our environments through ubiquitous sensing, communication, computation, and actuation. Over the past few years, IoT has joined forces with Machine Learning (ML) to embed deep intelligence at the far edge. TinyML (Tiny Machine Learning) has enabled the deployment of ML models for embedded vision on extremely lean edge hardware, bringing the power of IoT and ML together. However, TinyML powered embedded vision applications are still in a nascent stage, and they are just starting to scale to widespread real-world IoT deployment. To harness the true potential of IoT and ML, it is necessary to provide product developers with robust, easy-to-use software engineering (SE) frameworks and best practices that are customized for the unique challenges faced in TinyML engineering. Through this systematic literature review, we aggregated the key challenges reported by TinyML developers and identified state-of-art SE approaches in large-scale Computer Vision, Machine Learning, and Embedded Systems that can help address key challenges in TinyML based IoT embedded vision. In summary, our study draws synergies between SE expertise that embedded systems developers and ML developers have independently developed to help address the unique challenges in the engineering of TinyML based IoT embedded vision.
summary: Internet of Things (IoT) has catapulted human ability to control our environments through ubiquitous sensing, communication, computation, and actuation. Over the past few years, IoT has joined forces with Machine Learning (ML) to embed deep intelligence at the far edge. TinyML (Tiny Machine Learning) has enabled the deployment of ML models for embedded vision on extremely lean edge hardware, bringing the power of IoT and ML together. However, TinyML powered embedded vision applications are still in a nascent stage, and they are just starting to scale to widespread real-world IoT deployment. To harness the true potential of IoT and ML, it is necessary to provide product developers with robust, easy-to-use software engineering (SE) frameworks and best practices that are customized for the unique challenges faced in TinyML engineering. Through this systematic literature review, we aggregated the key challenges reported by TinyML developers and identified state-of-art SE approaches in large-scale Computer Vision, Machine Learning, and Embedded Systems that can help address key challenges in TinyML based IoT embedded vision. In summary, our study draws synergies between SE expertise that embedded systems developers and ML developers have independently developed to help address the unique challenges in the engineering of TinyML based IoT embedded vision.
abstract_zh: 物联网 (IoT) 通过无处不在的传感、通信、计算和驱动，提升了人类控制环境的能力。在过去的几年里，物联网与机器学习 (ML) 联手，在远端嵌入深度智能。 TinyML（微型机器学习）支持在极其精简的边缘硬件上部署用于嵌入式视觉的 ML 模型，将 IoT 和 ML 的力量结合在一起。然而，TinyML 支持的嵌入式视觉应用仍处于初级阶段，它们刚刚开始扩展到广泛的现实世界物联网部署。为了充分发挥 IoT 和 ML 的真正潜力，有必要为产品开发人员提供强大、易于使用的软件工程 (SE) 框架和最佳实践，这些框架和最佳实践是针对 TinyML 工程中面临的独特挑战而定制的。通过这篇系统性的文献综述，我们汇总了 TinyML 开发人员报告的关键挑战，并确定了大规模计算机视觉、机器学习和嵌入式系统中最先进的 SE 方法，这些方法可以帮助解决基于 TinyML 的物联网嵌入式视觉的关键挑战。总之，我们的研究利用了嵌入式系统开发人员和机器学习开发人员独立开发的 SE 专业知识之间的协同作用，以帮助解决基于 TinyML 的物联网嵌入式视觉工程中的独特挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统文献综述，总结了TinyML在物联网嵌入式视觉中的关键挑战，并识别了可借鉴的软件工程方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管TinyML将机器学习带入边缘设备，但其软件工程框架尚不成熟，需整合现有领域最佳实践以推动实际应用。
AI.method: 采用系统文献综述方法，汇总开发者报告的挑战，并从计算机视觉、机器学习和嵌入式系统领域提取软件工程解决方案。
AI.result: 识别出TinyML开发中的核心挑战，并映射了来自相关领域的软件工程方法，为解决这些问题提供了参考框架。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合嵌入式系统与机器学习领域的软件工程经验，本文为构建TinyML嵌入式视觉的工程化实践奠定了基础。

ai_content.motivation: 尽管TinyML将机器学习带入边缘设备，但其软件工程框架尚不成熟，需整合现有领域最佳实践以推动实际应用。
ai_content.method: 采用系统文献综述方法，汇总开发者报告的挑战，并从计算机视觉、机器学习和嵌入式系统领域提取软件工程解决方案。
ai_content.result: 识别出TinyML开发中的核心挑战，并映射了来自相关领域的软件工程方法，为解决这些问题提供了参考框架。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过融合嵌入式系统与机器学习领域的软件工程经验，本文为构建TinyML嵌入式视觉的工程化实践奠定了基础。

search_text: Software Engineering Approaches for TinyML based IoT Embedded Vision: A Systematic Literature Review 基于 TinyML 的物联网嵌入式视觉的软件工程方法：系统文献综述 Internet of Things (IoT) has catapulted human ability to control our environments through ubiquitous sensing, communication, computation, and actuation. Over the past few years, IoT has joined forces with Machine Learning (ML) to embed deep intelligence at the far edge. TinyML (Tiny Machine Learning) has enabled the deployment of ML models for embedded vision on extremely lean edge hardware, bringing the power of IoT and ML together. However, TinyML powered embedded vision applications are still in a nascent stage, and they are just starting to scale to widespread real-world IoT deployment. To harness the true potential of IoT and ML, it is necessary to provide product developers with robust, easy-to-use software engineering (SE) frameworks and best practices that are customized for the unique challenges faced in TinyML engineering. Through this systematic literature review, we aggregated the key challenges reported by TinyML developers and identified state-of-art SE approaches in large-scale Computer Vision, Machine Learning, and Embedded Systems that can help address key challenges in TinyML based IoT embedded vision. In summary, our study draws synergies between SE expertise that embedded systems developers and ML developers have independently developed to help address the unique challenges in the engineering of TinyML based IoT embedded vision. 物联网 (IoT) 通过无处不在的传感、通信、计算和驱动，提升了人类控制环境的能力。在过去的几年里，物联网与机器学习 (ML) 联手，在远端嵌入深度智能。 TinyML（微型机器学习）支持在极其精简的边缘硬件上部署用于嵌入式视觉的 ML 模型，将 IoT 和 ML 的力量结合在一起。然而，TinyML 支持的嵌入式视觉应用仍处于初级阶段，它们刚刚开始扩展到广泛的现实世界物联网部署。为了充分发挥 IoT 和 ML 的真正潜力，有必要为产品开发人员提供强大、易于使用的软件工程 (SE) 框架和最佳实践，这些框架和最佳实践是针对 TinyML 工程中面临的独特挑战而定制的。通过这篇系统性的文献综述，我们汇总了 TinyML 开发人员报告的关键挑战，并确定了大规模计算机视觉、机器学习和嵌入式系统中最先进的 SE 方法，这些方法可以帮助解决基于 TinyML 的物联网嵌入式视觉的关键挑战。总之，我们的研究利用了嵌入式系统开发人员和机器学习开发人员独立开发的 SE 专业知识之间的协同作用，以帮助解决基于 TinyML 的物联网嵌入式视觉工程中的独特挑战。 本文通过系统文献综述，总结了TinyML在物联网嵌入式视觉中的关键挑战，并识别了可借鉴的软件工程方法。 Shashank Bangalore Lakshman,Nasir U. Eisty cs.SE,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Guangwei Gao,Zixiang Xu,Juncheng Li,Jian Yang,Tieyong Zeng,Guo-Jun Qi
title: CTCNet: A CNN-Transformer Cooperation Network for Face Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: CTCNet：用于人脸图像超分辨率的 CNN-Transformer 协作网络
comment: IEEE Transactions on Image Processing, 12 figures, 9 tables
comments: IEEE Transactions on Image Processing, 12 figures, 9 tables
abstract: Recently, deep convolution neural networks (CNNs) steered face super-resolution methods have achieved great progress in restoring degraded facial details by jointly training with facial priors. However, these methods have some obvious limitations. On the one hand, multi-task joint learning requires additional marking on the dataset, and the introduced prior network will significantly increase the computational cost of the model. On the other hand, the limited receptive field of CNN will reduce the fidelity and naturalness of the reconstructed facial images, resulting in suboptimal reconstructed images. In this work, we propose an efficient CNN-Transformer Cooperation Network (CTCNet) for face super-resolution tasks, which uses the multi-scale connected encoder-decoder architecture as the backbone. Specifically, we first devise a novel Local-Global Feature Cooperation Module (LGCM), which is composed of a Facial Structure Attention Unit (FSAU) and a Transformer block, to promote the consistency of local facial detail and global facial structure restoration simultaneously. Then, we design an efficient Feature Refinement Module (FRM) to enhance the encoded features. Finally, to further improve the restoration of fine facial details, we present a Multi-scale Feature Fusion Unit (MFFU) to adaptively fuse the features from different stages in the encoder procedure. Extensive evaluations on various datasets have assessed that the proposed CTCNet can outperform other state-of-the-art methods significantly. Source code will be available at https://github.com/IVIPLab/CTCNet.
summary: Recently, deep convolution neural networks (CNNs) steered face super-resolution methods have achieved great progress in restoring degraded facial details by jointly training with facial priors. However, these methods have some obvious limitations. On the one hand, multi-task joint learning requires additional marking on the dataset, and the introduced prior network will significantly increase the computational cost of the model. On the other hand, the limited receptive field of CNN will reduce the fidelity and naturalness of the reconstructed facial images, resulting in suboptimal reconstructed images. In this work, we propose an efficient CNN-Transformer Cooperation Network (CTCNet) for face super-resolution tasks, which uses the multi-scale connected encoder-decoder architecture as the backbone. Specifically, we first devise a novel Local-Global Feature Cooperation Module (LGCM), which is composed of a Facial Structure Attention Unit (FSAU) and a Transformer block, to promote the consistency of local facial detail and global facial structure restoration simultaneously. Then, we design an efficient Feature Refinement Module (FRM) to enhance the encoded features. Finally, to further improve the restoration of fine facial details, we present a Multi-scale Feature Fusion Unit (MFFU) to adaptively fuse the features from different stages in the encoder procedure. Extensive evaluations on various datasets have assessed that the proposed CTCNet can outperform other state-of-the-art methods significantly. Source code will be available at https://github.com/IVIPLab/CTCNet.
abstract_zh: 最近，深度卷积神经网络（CNN）引导的人脸超分辨率方法通过与面部先验联合训练，在恢复退化的面部细节方面取得了巨大进展。然而，这些方法有一些明显的局限性。一方面，多任务联合学习需要对数据集进行额外标记，引入的先验网络将显着增加模型的计算成本。另一方面，CNN有限的感受野会降低重建面部图像的保真度和自然度，导致重建图像不理想。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于人脸超分辨率任务的高效 CNN-Transformer 合作网络（CTCNet），它使用多尺度连接的编码器-解码器架构作为主干。具体来说，我们首先设计了一种新颖的局部全局特征合作模块（LGCM），它由面部结构注意单元（FSAU）和变压器块组成，以同时促进局部面部细节和全局面部结构恢复的一致性。然后，我们设计了一个高效的特征细化模块（FRM）来增强编码特征。最后，为了进一步改善精细面部细节的恢复，我们提出了多尺度特征融合单元（MFFU）来自适应融合编码器过程中不同阶段的特征。对各种数据集的广泛评估表明，所提出的 CTCNet 可以显着优于其他最先进的方法。源代码可在 https://github.com/IVIPLab/CTCNet 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）和Transformer的协作网络CTCNet，用于人脸图像超分辨率重建。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN的人脸超分辨率方法存在多任务联合学习需额外标注、计算成本高以及感受野有限导致重建效果不佳等问题。
AI.method: 设计多尺度连接的编码器-解码器框架，包含局部-全局特征协作模块（LGCM）、特征优化模块（FRM）和多尺度特征融合单元（MFFU），通过Transformer块与面部结构注意力单元协同提升细节与结构一致性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，CTCNet显著优于现有最先进方法，源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: CTCNet通过CNN与Transformer的协作机制有效解决了人脸超分辨率中的细节还原与结构保持问题。

authors_text: Cheng Wen,Tingwei Guo,Xingjun Tan,Rui Yan,Shuran Zhou,Chuandong Xie,Wei Zou,Xiangang Li
title: Time Domain Adversarial Voice Conversion for ADD 2022
title_zh: ADD 2022 的时域对抗性语音转换
abstract: In this paper, we describe our speech generation system for the first Audio Deep Synthesis Detection Challenge (ADD 2022). Firstly, we build an any-to-many voice conversion (VC) system to convert source speech with arbitrary language content into the target speaker%u2019s fake speech. Then the converted speech generated from VC is post-processed in the time domain to improve the deception ability. The experimental results show that our system has adversarial ability against anti-spoofing detectors with a little compromise in audio quality and speaker similarity. This system ranks top in Track 3.1 in the ADD 2022, showing that our method could also gain good generalization ability against different detectors.
summary: In this paper, we describe our speech generation system for the first Audio Deep Synthesis Detection Challenge (ADD 2022). Firstly, we build an any-to-many voice conversion (VC) system to convert source speech with arbitrary language content into the target speaker%u2019s fake speech. Then the converted speech generated from VC is post-processed in the time domain to improve the deception ability. The experimental results show that our system has adversarial ability against anti-spoofing detectors with a little compromise in audio quality and speaker similarity. This system ranks top in Track 3.1 in the ADD 2022, showing that our method could also gain good generalization ability against different detectors.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了第一届音频深度合成检测挑战赛（ADD 2022）的语音生成系统。首先，我们构建了一个任意对多的语音转换（VC）系统，将具有任意语言内容的源语音转换为目标说话者的假语音。然后将VC生成的转换后的语音在时域进行后处理，以提高欺骗能力。实验结果表明，我们的系统具有对抗反欺骗检测器的对抗能力，但在音频质量和说话人相似性方面略有妥协。该系统在 ADD 2022 的 Track 3.1 中排名最高，这表明我们的方法还可以获得针对不同检测器的良好泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种时域对抗语音转换系统，用于生成具有欺骗性的目标说话人语音，以应对音频深度合成检测挑战。
AI.motivation: 为提升语音合成对抗检测器的能力，同时保持音频质量与说话人相似度，需设计更有效的语音生成方法。
AI.method: 构建任意语言内容到目标说话人的多对多语音转换系统，并通过时域后处理增强生成语音的欺骗性。
AI.result: 系统在ADD 2022 Track 3.1中排名第一，显示其对多种检测器具有良好的对抗性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 时域对抗语音转换方法在保持音频质量的前提下有效提升欺骗能力，验证了其在对抗检测中的实用性。

Firstly, we build an any-to-many voice conversion (VC) system to convert source speech with arbitrary language content into the target speaker%u2019s fake speech. Then the converted speech generated from VC is post-processed in the time domain to improve the deception ability. The experimental results show that our system has adversarial ability against anti-spoofing detectors with a little compromise in audio quality and speaker similarity. This system ranks top in Track 3.1 in the ADD 2022, showing that our method could also gain good generalization ability against different detectors. 在本文中，我们描述了第一届音频深度合成检测挑战赛（ADD 2022）的语音生成系统。首先，我们构建了一个任意对多的语音转换（VC）系统，将具有任意语言内容的源语音转换为目标说话者的假语音。然后将VC生成的转换后的语音在时域进行后处理，以提高欺骗能力。实验结果表明，我们的系统具有对抗反欺骗检测器的对抗能力，但在音频质量和说话人相似性方面略有妥协。该系统在 ADD 2022 的 Track 3.1 中排名最高，这表明我们的方法还可以获得针对不同检测器的良好泛化能力。 本文提出一种时域对抗语音转换系统，用于生成具有欺骗性的目标说话人语音，以应对音频深度合成检测挑战。 Cheng Wen,Tingwei Guo,Xingjun Tan,Rui Yan,Shuran Zhou,Chuandong Xie,Wei Zou,Xiangang Li eess.AS,cs.CR,cs.SD

authors_text: Xia Chen,Guanlan Zhang,Michael Yu Wang,Hongyu Yu
title: A Thin Format Vision-Based Tactile Sensor with A Micro Lens Array (MLA)
title_zh: 具有微透镜阵列 (MLA) 的薄型视觉触觉传感器
abstract: Vision-based tactile sensors have been widely studied in the robotics field for high spatial resolution and compatibility with machine learning algorithms. However, the currently employed sensor's imaging system is bulky limiting its further application. Here we present a micro lens array (MLA) based vison system to achieve a low thickness format of the sensor package with high tactile sensing performance. Multiple micromachined micro lens units cover the whole elastic touching layer and provide a stitched clear tactile image, enabling high spatial resolution with a thin thickness of 5 mm. The thermal reflow and soft lithography method ensure the uniform spherical profile and smooth surface of micro lens. Both optical and mechanical characterization demonstrated the sensor's stable imaging and excellent tactile sensing, enabling precise 3D tactile information, such as displacement mapping and force distribution with an ultra compact-thin structure.
summary: Vision-based tactile sensors have been widely studied in the robotics field for high spatial resolution and compatibility with machine learning algorithms. However, the currently employed sensor's imaging system is bulky limiting its further application. Here we present a micro lens array (MLA) based vison system to achieve a low thickness format of the sensor package with high tactile sensing performance. Multiple micromachined micro lens units cover the whole elastic touching layer and provide a stitched clear tactile image, enabling high spatial resolution with a thin thickness of 5 mm. The thermal reflow and soft lithography method ensure the uniform spherical profile and smooth surface of micro lens. Both optical and mechanical characterization demonstrated the sensor's stable imaging and excellent tactile sensing, enabling precise 3D tactile information, such as displacement mapping and force distribution with an ultra compact-thin structure.
abstract_zh: 基于视觉的触觉传感器因其高空间分辨率和与机器学习算法的兼容性而在机器人领域得到了广泛的研究。然而，目前使用的传感器的成像系统体积庞大，限制了其进一步的应用。在这里，我们提出了一种基于微透镜阵列（MLA）的视觉系统，以实现具有高触觉传感性能的低厚度传感器封装。多个微加工微透镜单元覆盖整个弹性触摸层，并提供缝合的清晰触觉图像，以 5 毫米的薄厚度实现高空间分辨率。热回流和软光刻方法保证了微透镜均匀的球面轮廓和光滑的表面。光学和机械特性均证明了该传感器具有稳定的成像和出色的触觉传感能力，可通过超紧凑薄型结构实现精确的 3D 触觉信息，例如位移映射和力分布。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于微透镜阵列的薄型视觉触觉传感器，以解决现有传感器体积大、厚度厚的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉触觉传感器因成像系统笨重而限制了其在机器人领域的进一步应用，需实现更薄且保持高分辨率的结构。
AI.method: 采用微透镜阵列覆盖弹性触摸层，并通过热回流与软光刻技术制造均匀球形微透镜，实现薄型化设计。
AI.result: 传感器具备稳定成像与优异触觉感知能力，可精确获取3D触觉信息（如位移映射、力分布），厚度仅5mm。
AI.conclusion: 该薄型传感器在保持高触觉性能的同时实现了紧凑结构，适用于机器人等需要轻薄化设计的场景。
