authors_text: Arnab Bhattacharyya,Clément L. Canonne,Joy Qiping Yang
title: Independence Testing for Bounded Degree Bayesian Network
title_zh: 有界贝叶斯网络的独立性检验
abstract: We study the following independence testing problem: given access to samples from a distribution $P$ over $\{0,1\}^n$, decide whether $P$ is a product distribution or whether it is $\varepsilon$-far in total variation distance from any product distribution. For arbitrary distributions, this problem requires $\exp(n)$ samples. We show in this work that if $P$ has a sparse structure, then in fact only linearly many samples are required. Specifically, if $P$ is Markov with respect to a Bayesian network whose underlying DAG has in-degree bounded by $d$, then $\tildeΘ(2^{d/2}\cdot n/\varepsilon^2)$ samples are necessary and sufficient for independence testing.
summary: We study the following independence testing problem: given access to samples from a distribution $P$ over $\{0,1\}^n$, decide whether $P$ is a product distribution or whether it is $\varepsilon$-far in total variation distance from any product distribution. For arbitrary distributions, this problem requires $\exp(n)$ samples. We show in this work that if $P$ has a sparse structure, then in fact only linearly many samples are required. Specifically, if $P$ is Markov with respect to a Bayesian network whose underlying DAG has in-degree bounded by $d$, then $\tildeΘ(2^{d/2}\cdot n/\varepsilon^2)$ samples are necessary and sufficient for independence testing.
abstract_zh: 我们研究以下独立性测试问题：给定来自 $\{0,1\}^n$ 上的分布 $P$ 的样本，确定 $P$ 是否是乘积分布，或者它与任何乘积分布的总变异距离是否为 $\varepsilon$-far。对于任意分布，此问题需要 $\exp(n)$ 样本。我们在这项工作中表明，如果 $P$ 具有稀疏结构，那么实际上只需要线性许多样本。具体来说，如果 $P$ 是相对于贝叶斯网络而言的马尔可夫网络，其底层 DAG 的入度以 $d$ 为界，则 $\tildeθ(2^{d/2}\cdot n/\varepsilon^2)$ 样本对于独立性测试是必要且充分的。

AI.tldr: 研究贝叶斯网络中独立性检验问题，在分布具有有界入度稀疏结构时，判断样本来自乘积分布还是与任何乘积分布有ε-总变差距离。
AI.motivation: 任意分布上的独立性检验需要指数级样本，而实际中许多分布具有稀疏结构（如贝叶斯网络有界入度），探索能否利用稀疏性大幅降低样本复杂度。
AI.method: 利用贝叶斯网络的有界入度稀疏结构，设计基于条件独立性检验的算法，通过分析总变差距离下界和上界，给出样本复杂度的紧界。
AI.result: 证明了当分布P对应一个入度不超过d的贝叶斯网络时，独立性检验所需的样本数量为Θ̃(2^{d/2}·n/ε²)，即线性于变量数n。
AI.conclusion: 对于有稀疏结构（有界入度贝叶斯网络）的分布，独立性检验可以从指数级样本降为线性级样本，揭示了稀疏性在统计检验中的核心作用。

authors_text: Yuxuan Sun,Ethan Carlson,Rebecca Qian,Kavya Srinet,Arthur Szlam
title: Many Episode Learning in a Modular Embodied Agent via End-to-End Interaction
title_zh: 通过端到端交互在模块化具体代理中进行多集学习
abstract: In this work we give a case study of an embodied machine-learning (ML) powered agent that improves itself via interactions with crowd-workers. The agent consists of a set of modules, some of which are learned, and others heuristic. While the agent is not "end-to-end" in the ML sense, end-to-end interaction is a vital part of the agent's learning mechanism. We describe how the design of the agent works together with the design of multiple annotation interfaces to allow crowd-workers to assign credit to module errors from end-to-end interactions, and to label data for individual modules. Over multiple automated human-agent interaction, credit assignment, data annotation, and model re-training and re-deployment, rounds we demonstrate agent improvement.
summary: In this work we give a case study of an embodied machine-learning (ML) powered agent that improves itself via interactions with crowd-workers. The agent consists of a set of modules, some of which are learned, and others heuristic. While the agent is not "end-to-end" in the ML sense, end-to-end interaction is a vital part of the agent's learning mechanism. We describe how the design of the agent works together with the design of multiple annotation interfaces to allow crowd-workers to assign credit to module errors from end-to-end interactions, and to label data for individual modules. Over multiple automated human-agent interaction, credit assignment, data annotation, and model re-training and re-deployment, rounds we demonstrate agent improvement.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们给出了一个由机器学习 (ML) 支持的具体代理的案例研究，该代理通过与人群工作者的交互来改进自身。该代理由一组模块组成，其中一些模块是学习的，另一些是启发式的。虽然代理不是机器学习意义上的“端到端”，但端到端交互是代理学习机制的重要组成部分。我们描述了代理的设计如何与多个注释接口的设计一起工作，以允许众包工作人员将信用分配给端到端交互中的模块错误，并为各个模块标记数据。通过多次自动化的人机交互、信用分配、数据注释以及模型重新训练和重新部署，我们多次展示了代理的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过端到端交互与众包工作者协作，提升模块化具身智能体性能的多回合学习方法。
AI.motivation: 传统模块化智能体难以有效归因模块错误并优化，需通过众包反馈实现端到端交互学习。
AI.method: 设计多接口让众包工作者标注模块错误与数据，结合多轮交互、信用分配及模型重训练优化智能体。
AI.result: 通过多轮交互与重训练，智能体在任务表现上显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了模块化智能体通过人类反馈端到端交互学习的有效性，为未来人机协作学习提供新思路。

ai_content.conclusion: 该方法验证了模块化智能体通过人类反馈端到端交互学习的有效性，为未来人机协作学习提供新思路。

ai_content_json.method: 设计多接口让众包工作者标注模块错误与数据，结合多轮交互、信用分配及模型重训练优化智能体。
ai_content_json.result: 通过多轮交互与重训练，智能体在任务表现上显著提升。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法验证了模块化智能体通过人类反馈端到端交互学习的有效性，为未来人机协作学习提供新思路。

search_text: Many Episode Learning in a Modular Embodied Agent via End-to-End Interaction 通过端到端交互在模块化具体代理中进行多集学习 In this work we give a case study of an embodied machine-learning (ML) powered agent that improves itself via interactions with crowd-workers. The agent consists of a set of modules, some of which are learned, and others heuristic. While the agent is not "end-to-end" in the ML sense, end-to-end interaction is a vital part of the agent's learning mechanism. We describe how the design of the agent works together with the design of multiple annotation interfaces to allow crowd-workers to assign credit to module errors from end-to-end interactions, and to label data for individual modules. Over multiple automated human-agent interaction, credit assignment, data annotation, and model re-training and re-deployment, rounds we demonstrate agent improvement. 在这项工作中，我们给出了一个由机器学习 (ML) 支持的具体代理的案例研究，该代理通过与人群工作者的交互来改进自身。该代理由一组模块组成，其中一些模块是学习的，另一些是启发式的。虽然代理不是机器学习意义上的“端到端”，但端到端交互是代理学习机制的重要组成部分。我们描述了代理的设计如何与多个注释接口的设计一起工作，以允许众包工作人员将信用分配给端到端交互中的模块错误，并为各个模块标记数据。通过多次自动化的人机交互、信用分配、数据注释以及模型重新训练和重新部署，我们多次展示了代理的改进。 本文提出一种通过端到端交互与众包工作者协作，提升模块化具身智能体性能的多回合学习方法。 Yuxuan Sun,Ethan Carlson,Rebecca Qian,Kavya Srinet,Arthur Szlam cs.AI

authors_text: Yanguang Xu,Jianwei Sun,Yang Han,Shuaijiang Zhao,Chaoyang Mei,Tingwei Guo,Shuran Zhou,Chuandong Xie,Wei Zou,Xiangang Li,Shuran Zhou,Chuandong Xie,Wei Zou,Xiangang Li
title: Audio-Visual Wake Word Spotting System For MISP Challenge 2021
title_zh: 2021 年 MISP 挑战赛的视听唤醒词识别系统
abstract: This paper presents the details of our system designed for the Task 1 of Multimodal Information Based Speech Processing (MISP) Challenge 2021. The purpose of Task 1 is to leverage both audio and video information to improve the environmental robustness of far-field wake word spotting. In the proposed system, firstly, we take advantage of speech enhancement algorithms such as beamforming and weighted prediction error (WPE) to address the multi-microphone conversational audio. Secondly, several data augmentation techniques are applied to simulate a more realistic far-field scenario. For the video information, the provided region of interest (ROI) is used to obtain visual representation. Then the multi-layer CNN is proposed to learn audio and visual representations, and these representations are fed into our two-branch attention-based network which can be employed for fusion, such as transformer and conformed. The focal loss is used to fine-tune the model and improve the performance significantly. Finally, multiple trained models are integrated by casting vote to achieve our final 0.091 score.
summary: This paper presents the details of our system designed for the Task 1 of Multimodal Information Based Speech Processing (MISP) Challenge 2021. The purpose of Task 1 is to leverage both audio and video information to improve the environmental robustness of far-field wake word spotting. In the proposed system, firstly, we take advantage of speech enhancement algorithms such as beamforming and weighted prediction error (WPE) to address the multi-microphone conversational audio. Secondly, several data augmentation techniques are applied to simulate a more realistic far-field scenario. For the video information, the provided region of interest (ROI) is used to obtain visual representation. Then the multi-layer CNN is proposed to learn audio and visual representations, and these representations are fed into our two-branch attention-based network which can be employed for fusion, such as transformer and conformed. The focal loss is used to fine-tune the model and improve the performance significantly. Finally, multiple trained models are integrated by casting vote to achieve our final 0.091 score.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们为 2021 年基于多模态信息的语音处理 (MISP) 挑战赛任务 1 设计的系统的详细信息。任务 1 的目的是利用音频和视频信息来提高远场唤醒词识别的环境鲁棒性。在所提出的系统中，首先，我们利用波束成形和加权预测误差（WPE）等语音增强算法来解决多麦克风对话音频问题。其次，应用多种数据增强技术来模拟更真实的远场场景。对于视频信息，所提供的感兴趣区域（ROI）用于获得视觉表示。然后提出多层 CNN 来学习音频和视觉表示，并将这些表示输入到我们的两分支基于注意力的网络中，该网络可用于融合，例如 Transformer 和 Conformed。焦点损失用于微调模型并显着提高性能。最后，通过投票整合多个经过训练的模型，以获得最终的 0.091 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合音频和视频信息的唤醒词检测系统，用于提升远场环境下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 通过融合音频和视频信息，增强远场唤醒词检测在复杂环境中的稳定性与准确性。
AI.method: 采用波束成形和加权预测误差算法进行语音增强，结合数据增强技术模拟远场场景；利用ROI提取视频特征，通过多层CNN和双分支注意力网络（如Transformer）融合多模态信息，并使用焦点损失优化模型。
AI.result: 通过多模型投票集成，最终在挑战赛中取得0.091的评分。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合与注意力机制有效提升了唤醒词检测性能，验证了音频-视觉协同分析的可行性。

authors_text: Wang Zeng,Sheng Jin,Wentao Liu,Chen Qian,Ping Luo,Wanli Ouyang,Xiaogang Wang
title: Not All Tokens Are Equal: Human-centric Visual Analysis via Token Clustering Transformer
title_zh: 并非所有代币都是平等的：通过代币聚类变压器进行以人为中心的视觉分析
abstract: Vision transformers have achieved great successes in many computer vision tasks. Most methods generate vision tokens by splitting an image into a regular and fixed grid and treating each cell as a token. However, not all regions are equally important in human-centric vision tasks, e.g., the human body needs a fine representation with many tokens, while the image background can be modeled by a few tokens. To address this problem, we propose a novel Vision Transformer, called Token Clustering Transformer (TCFormer), which merges tokens by progressive clustering, where the tokens can be merged from different locations with flexible shapes and sizes. The tokens in TCFormer can not only focus on important areas but also adjust the token shapes to fit the semantic concept and adopt a fine resolution for regions containing critical details, which is beneficial to capturing detailed information. Extensive experiments show that TCFormer consistently outperforms its counterparts on different challenging human-centric tasks and datasets, including whole-body pose estimation on COCO-WholeBody and 3D human mesh reconstruction on 3DPW. Code is available at https://github.com/zengwang430521/TCFormer.git
summary: Vision transformers have achieved great successes in many computer vision tasks. Most methods generate vision tokens by splitting an image into a regular and fixed grid and treating each cell as a token. However, not all regions are equally important in human-centric vision tasks, e.g., the human body needs a fine representation with many tokens, while the image background can be modeled by a few tokens. To address this problem, we propose a novel Vision Transformer, called Token Clustering Transformer (TCFormer), which merges tokens by progressive clustering, where the tokens can be merged from different locations with flexible shapes and sizes. The tokens in TCFormer can not only focus on important areas but also adjust the token shapes to fit the semantic concept and adopt a fine resolution for regions containing critical details, which is beneficial to capturing detailed information. Extensive experiments show that TCFormer consistently outperforms its counterparts on different challenging human-centric tasks and datasets, including whole-body pose estimation on COCO-WholeBody and 3D human mesh reconstruction on 3DPW. Code is available at https://github.com/zengwang430521/TCFormer.git
abstract_zh: 视觉转换器在许多计算机视觉任务中取得了巨大的成功。大多数方法通过将图像分割成规则且固定的网格并将每个单元视为令牌来生成视觉令牌。然而，在以人为中心的视觉任务中，并非所有区域都同等重要，例如，人体需要具有许多标记的精细表示，而图像背景可以通过几个标记来建模。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的视觉变换器，称为令牌聚类变换器（TCFormer），它通过渐进式聚类来合并令牌，其中令牌可以从不同位置合并，具有灵活的形状和大小。 TCFormer 中的标记不仅可以聚焦于重要区域，还可以调整标记形状以适应语义概念，并对包含关键细节的区域采用精细分辨率，这有利于捕获详细信息。大量实验表明，TCFormer 在各种具有挑战性的以人为中心的任务和数据集上始终优于其同行，包括 COCO-WholeBody 上的全身姿势估计和 3DPW 上的 3D 人体网格重建。代码可在 https://github.com/zengwang430521/TCFormer.git 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Token Clustering Transformer (TCFormer)的新视觉Transformer模型，旨在通过动态聚类机制优化人类为中心的视觉任务中的视觉令牌分配。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉Transformer将图像分割为固定网格生成令牌，但人类为中心的任务中不同区域重要性差异大（如人体需要精细表示而背景可简化），现有方法无法自适应调整令牌分布。
AI.method: 设计TCFormer通过渐进式聚类合并令牌，允许不同位置的令牌以灵活形状和尺寸进行合并，使模型能聚焦关键区域并动态调整分辨率以捕捉细节信息。
AI.result: 在COCO-WholeBody全身姿态估计和3DPW三维人体网格重建等数据集上，TCFormer显著优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: TCFormer通过自适应令牌聚类机制有效提升了人类为中心视觉任务的性能，验证了动态令牌分配策略的优越性。

Extensive experiments show that TCFormer consistently outperforms its counterparts on different challenging human-centric tasks and datasets, including whole-body pose estimation on COCO-WholeBody and 3D human mesh reconstruction on 3DPW. authors_text: Sidong Feng,Minmin Jiang,Tingting Zhou,Yankun Zhen,Chunyang Chen
title: Auto-Icon+: An Automated End-to-End Code Generation Tool for Icon Designs in UI Development
title_zh: Auto-Icon+：用于 UI 开发中图标设计的自动化端到端代码生成工具
comment: Accepted to ACM Transactions on Interactive Intelligent Systems (TIIS)
comments: Accepted to ACM Transactions on Interactive Intelligent Systems (TIIS)
abstract: Approximately 50% of development resources are devoted to UI development tasks [9]. Occupying a large proportion of development resources, developing icons can be a time-consuming task, because developers need to consider not only effective implementation methods but also easy-to-understand descriptions. In this paper, we present Auto-Icon+, an approach for automatically generating readable and efficient code for icons from design artifacts. According to our interviews to understand the gap between designers (icons are assembled from multiple components) and developers (icons as single images), we apply a heuristic clustering algorithm to compose the components into an icon image. We then propose an approach based on a deep learning model and computer vision methods to convert the composed icon image to fonts with descriptive labels, thereby reducing the laborious manual effort for developers and facilitating UI development. We quantitatively evaluate the quality of our method in the real world UI development environment and demonstrate that our method offers developers accurate, efficient, readable, and usable code for icon designs, in terms of saving 65.2% implementing time.

Occupying a large proportion of development resources, developing icons can be a time-consuming task, because developers need to consider not only effective implementation methods but also easy-to-understand descriptions. We then propose an approach based on a deep learning model and computer vision methods to convert the composed icon image to fonts with descriptive labels, thereby reducing the laborious manual effort for developers and facilitating UI development. We quantitatively evaluate the quality of our method in the real world UI development environment and demonstrate that our method offers developers accurate, efficient, readable, and usable code for icon designs, in terms of saving 65.2% implementing time.
abstract_zh: 大约 50% 的开发资源专门用于 UI 开发任务 [9]。占用很大比例的开发资源，开发图标可能是一项耗时的工作，因为开发人员不仅需要考虑有效的实现方法，还需要考虑易于理解的描述。在本文中，我们提出了 Auto-Icon+，一种从设计工件自动生成可读且高效的图标代码的方法。根据我们的采访，为了了解设计师（图标由多个组件组装而成）和开发人员（图标作为单个图像）之间的差距，我们应用启发式聚类算法将组件组合成图标图像。然后，我们提出了一种基于深度学习模型和计算机视觉方法的方法，将合成的图标图像转换为带有描述性标签的字体，从而减少开发人员的繁重手动工作并促进 UI 开发。我们在现实世界的 UI 开发环境中定量评估了我们的方法的质量，并证明我们的方法为开发人员提供了准确、高效、可读和可用的图标设计代码，节省了 65.2% 的实施时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Auto-Icon+工具，通过自动化方法生成可读且高效的图标代码，以提升UI开发效率。
AI.motivation: 图标开发消耗大量开发资源且需兼顾设计与实现，设计师与开发者对图标需求存在差异，需减少人工工作量。
AI.method: 采用启发式聚类算法整合图标组件，并结合深度学习模型与计算机视觉技术将图标图像转换为带描述标签的字体代码。
AI.result: 在真实UI开发环境中验证，该方法使图标实现时间减少65.2%，生成代码具备准确性、高效性与可读性。
AI.conclusion: Auto-Icon+有效弥合了设计与开发间的差距，为图标设计提供自动化解决方案，显著提升UI开发效率。

title: ActAR: Actor-Driven Pose Embeddings for Video Action Recognition
title_zh: ActAR：用于视频动作识别的演员驱动的姿势嵌入
abstract: Human action recognition (HAR) in videos is one of the core tasks of video understanding. Based on video sequences, the goal is to recognize actions performed by humans. While HAR has received much attention in the visible spectrum, action recognition in infrared videos is little studied. Accurate recognition of human actions in the infrared domain is a highly challenging task because of the redundant and indistinguishable texture features present in the sequence. Furthermore, in some cases, challenges arise from the irrelevant information induced by the presence of multiple active persons not contributing to the actual action of interest. Therefore, most existing methods consider a standard paradigm that does not take into account these challenges, which is in some part due to the ambiguous definition of the recognition task in some cases. In this paper, we propose a new method that simultaneously learns to recognize efficiently human actions in the infrared spectrum, while automatically identifying the key-actors performing the action without using any prior knowledge or explicit annotations. Our method is composed of three stages. In the first stage, optical flow-based key-actor identification is performed. Then for each key-actor, we estimate key-poses that will guide the frame selection process. A scale-invariant encoding process along with embedded pose filtering are performed in order to enhance the quality of action representations. Experimental results on InfAR dataset show that our proposed model achieves promising recognition performance and learns useful action representations.
summary: Human action recognition (HAR) in videos is one of the core tasks of video understanding. Based on video sequences, the goal is to recognize actions performed by humans. While HAR has received much attention in the visible spectrum, action recognition in infrared videos is little studied. Accurate recognition of human actions in the infrared domain is a highly challenging task because of the redundant and indistinguishable texture features present in the sequence. Furthermore, in some cases, challenges arise from the irrelevant information induced by the presence of multiple active persons not contributing to the actual action of interest. Therefore, most existing methods consider a standard paradigm that does not take into account these challenges, which is in some part due to the ambiguous definition of the recognition task in some cases. In this paper, we propose a new method that simultaneously learns to recognize efficiently human actions in the infrared spectrum, while automatically identifying the key-actors performing the action without using any prior knowledge or explicit annotations. Our method is composed of three stages. In the first stage, optical flow-based key-actor identification is performed. Then for each key-actor, we estimate key-poses that will guide the frame selection process. A scale-invariant encoding process along with embedded pose filtering are performed in order to enhance the quality of action representations. Experimental results on InfAR dataset show that our proposed model achieves promising recognition performance and learns useful action representations.
abstract_zh: 视频中的人体动作识别（HAR）是视频理解的核心任务之一。基于视频序列，目标是识别人类执行的动作。虽然 HAR 在可见光谱领域受到了广泛关注，但红外视频中的动作识别研究却很少。由于序列中存在冗余且难以区分的纹理特征，在红外域中准确识别人类行为是一项极具挑战性的任务。此外，在某些情况下，由于多个活跃人员的存在而引发的不相关信息对感兴趣的实际行动没有贡献，因此产生了挑战。因此，大多数现有方法考虑的标准范式没有考虑到这些挑战，这在一定程度上是由于某些情况下识别任务的定义不明确造成的。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法，该方法可以同时学习有效识别红外光谱中的人类动作，同时自动识别执行该动作的关键人物，而无需使用任何先验知识或显式注释。我们的方法由三个阶段组成。在第一阶段，执行基于光流的关键角色识别。然后，对于每个关键人物，我们估计将指导帧选择过程的关键姿势。执行尺度不变编码过程以及嵌入式姿势过滤，以提高动作表示的质量。 InfAR 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们提出的模型实现了有希望的识别性能并学习有用的动作表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ActAR方法，通过演员驱动的姿态嵌入解决红外视频中的人类动作识别问题。
AI.motivation: 红外视频中存在冗余纹理特征和多人物干扰信息，现有方法未能有效处理这些挑战，导致动作识别性能不足。
AI.method: 分三阶段实现：基于光流的关键演员识别、关键姿态估计引导帧选择、结合尺度不变编码与姿态过滤的动作表示增强。
AI.result: 在InfAR数据集上取得有竞争力的识别性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ActAR通过自动识别关键演员和优化姿态表示，有效解决了红外视频动作识别中的核心挑战。

title: Interventional Behavior Prediction: Avoiding Overly Confident Anticipation in Interactive Prediction
title_zh: 干预行为预测：避免交互式预测中过度自信的预期
abstract: Conditional behavior prediction (CBP) builds up the foundation for a coherent interactive prediction and planning framework that can enable more efficient and less conservative maneuvers in interactive scenarios. In CBP task, we train a prediction model approximating the posterior distribution of target agents' future trajectories conditioned on the future trajectory of an assigned ego agent. However, we argue that CBP may provide overly confident anticipation on how the autonomous agent may influence the target agents' behavior. Consequently, it is risky for the planner to query a CBP model. Instead, we should treat the planned trajectory as an intervention and let the model learn the trajectory distribution under intervention. We refer to it as the interventional behavior prediction (IBP) task. Moreover, to properly evaluate an IBP model with offline datasets, we propose a Shapley-value-based metric to verify if the prediction model satisfies the inherent temporal independence of an interventional distribution. We show that the proposed metric can effectively identify a CBP model violating the temporal independence, which plays an important role when establishing IBP benchmarks.
summary: Conditional behavior prediction (CBP) builds up the foundation for a coherent interactive prediction and planning framework that can enable more efficient and less conservative maneuvers in interactive scenarios. In CBP task, we train a prediction model approximating the posterior distribution of target agents' future trajectories conditioned on the future trajectory of an assigned ego agent. However, we argue that CBP may provide overly confident anticipation on how the autonomous agent may influence the target agents' behavior. Consequently, it is risky for the planner to query a CBP model. Instead, we should treat the planned trajectory as an intervention and let the model learn the trajectory distribution under intervention. We refer to it as the interventional behavior prediction (IBP) task. Moreover, to properly evaluate an IBP model with offline datasets, we propose a Shapley-value-based metric to verify if the prediction model satisfies the inherent temporal independence of an interventional distribution. We show that the proposed metric can effectively identify a CBP model violating the temporal independence, which plays an important role when establishing IBP benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 条件行为预测 (CBP) 为连贯的交互式预测和规划框架奠定了基础，可以在交互式场景中实现更高效、更少保守的操作。在 CBP 任务中，我们训练一个预测模型，该模型近似目标代理未来轨迹的后验分布，以指定自我代理的未来轨迹为条件。然而，我们认为 CBP 可能对自主代理如何影响目标代理的行为提供了过于自信的预期。因此，规划者查询 CBP 模型是有风险的。相反，我们应该将规划的轨迹视为一种干预，让模型学习干预下的轨迹分布。我们将其称为干预行为预测（IBP）任务。此外，为了正确评估具有离线数据集的 IBP 模型，我们提出了一种基于 Shapley 值的度量来验证预测模型是否满足干预分布的固有时间独立性。我们表明，所提出的度量可以有效地识别违反时间独立性的 CBP 模型，这在建立 IBP 基准时起着重要作用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种干预行为预测（IBP）方法，旨在解决传统条件行为预测（CBP）在交互场景中过于自信的问题，并引入基于夏普利值的评估指标验证模型有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统CBP模型在预测目标智能体轨迹时可能对自主智能体的干预过于自信，导致规划器依赖时存在安全隐患，需通过干预视角重新建模行为预测。
AI.method: 将规划轨迹视为干预变量，构建干预分布下的轨迹预测模型（IBP），并设计基于夏普利值的评估指标检验模型是否满足干预分布的时序独立性假设。
AI.result: 提出的评估指标能有效识别违反时序独立性的CBP模型，验证了IBP框架在交互预测任务中的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 干预行为预测（IBP）能更安全地建模交互场景中的不确定性，所提评估指标为建立IBP基准提供了理论依据。

search_text: Interventional Behavior Prediction: Avoiding Overly Confident Anticipation in Interactive Prediction 干预行为预测：避免交互式预测中过度自信的预期 Conditional behavior prediction (CBP) builds up the foundation for a coherent interactive prediction and planning framework that can enable more efficient and less conservative maneuvers in interactive scenarios. In CBP task, we train a prediction model approximating the posterior distribution of target agents' future trajectories conditioned on the future trajectory of an assigned ego agent. However, we argue that CBP may provide overly confident anticipation on how the autonomous agent may influence the target agents' behavior. Consequently, it is risky for the planner to query a CBP model. Instead, we should treat the planned trajectory as an intervention and let the model learn the trajectory distribution under intervention. We refer to it as the interventional behavior prediction (IBP) task. Moreover, to properly evaluate an IBP model with offline datasets, we propose a Shapley-value-based metric to verify if the prediction model satisfies the inherent temporal independence of an interventional distribution. We show that the proposed metric can effectively identify a CBP model violating the temporal independence, which plays an important role when establishing IBP benchmarks. 条件行为预测 (CBP) 为连贯的交互式预测和规划框架奠定了基础，可以在交互式场景中实现更高效、更少保守的操作。在 CBP 任务中，我们训练一个预测模型，该模型近似目标代理未来轨迹的后验分布，以指定自我代理的未来轨迹为条件。然而，我们认为 CBP 可能对自主代理如何影响目标代理的行为提供了过于自信的预期。因此，规划者查询 CBP 模型是有风险的。相反，我们应该将规划的轨迹视为一种干预，让模型学习干预下的轨迹分布。我们将其称为干预行为预测（IBP）任务。此外，为了正确评估具有离线数据集的 IBP 模型，我们提出了一种基于 Shapley 值的度量来验证预测模型是否满足干预分布的固有时间独立性。我们表明，所提出的度量可以有效地识别违反时间独立性的 CBP 模型，这在建立 IBP 基准时起着重要作用。 本文提出了一种干预行为预测（IBP）方法，旨在解决传统条件行为预测（CBP）在交互场景中过于自信的问题，并引入基于夏普利值的评估指标验证模型有效性。 Chen Tang,Wei Zhan,Masayoshi Tomizuka cs.RO,cs.AI

title: Toward Understanding the Use of Centralized Exchanges for Decentralized Cryptocurrency
title_zh: 理解中心化交易所对去中心化加密货币的使用
comment: 13th International Conference on Applied Human Factors and Ergonomics (AHFE 2022)
comments: 13th International Conference on Applied Human Factors and Ergonomics (AHFE 2022)
abstract: Cryptocurrency has been extensively studied as a decentralized financial technology built on blockchain. However, there is a lack of understanding of user experience with cryptocurrency exchanges, the main means for novice users to interact with cryptocurrency. We conduct a qualitative study to provide a panoramic view of user experience and security perception of exchanges. All 15 Chinese participants mainly use centralized exchanges (CEX) instead of decentralized exchanges (DEX) to trade decentralized cryptocurrency, which is paradoxical. A closer examination reveals that CEXes provide better usability and charge lower transaction fee than DEXes. Country-specific security perceptions are observed. Though DEXes provide better anonymity and privacy protection, and are free of governmental regulation, these are not necessary features for many participants. Based on the findings, we propose design implications to make cryptocurrency trading more decentralized.
summary: Cryptocurrency has been extensively studied as a decentralized financial technology built on blockchain. However, there is a lack of understanding of user experience with cryptocurrency exchanges, the main means for novice users to interact with cryptocurrency. We conduct a qualitative study to provide a panoramic view of user experience and security perception of exchanges. All 15 Chinese participants mainly use centralized exchanges (CEX) instead of decentralized exchanges (DEX) to trade decentralized cryptocurrency, which is paradoxical. A closer examination reveals that CEXes provide better usability and charge lower transaction fee than DEXes. Country-specific security perceptions are observed. Though DEXes provide better anonymity and privacy protection, and are free of governmental regulation, these are not necessary features for many participants. Based on the findings, we propose design implications to make cryptocurrency trading more decentralized.
abstract_zh: 加密货币作为一种基于区块链的去中心化金融技术已被广泛研究。然而，对于新手用户与加密货币交互的主要手段——加密货币交易所的用户体验缺乏了解。我们进行定性研究，以提供交易所的用户体验和安全感知的全景。所有15家中国参与者主要使用中心化交易所（CEX）而不是去中心化交易所（DEX）来交易去中心化加密货币，这是自相矛盾的。仔细检查发现，CEX 比 DEX 提供更好的可用性并且收取更低的交易费用。观察特定国家的安全观念。尽管 DEX 提供了更好的匿名性和隐私保护，并且不受政府监管，但这些对于许多参与者来说并不是必需的功能。根据研究结果，我们提出了使加密货币交易更加去中心化的设计建议。

AI.tldr: 本文通过定性研究分析用户使用集中式交易所（CEX）进行去中心化加密货币交易的体验与安全感知，探讨为何用户偏好CEX而非去中心化交易所（DEX）。
AI.motivation: 尽管加密货币以去中心化为特点，但用户主要通过CEX进行交易，这一现象缺乏深入理解，需研究用户行为与安全需求差异。
AI.method: 对15名中国用户进行定性访谈，分析其使用CEX而非DEX的原因，比较两者在易用性、费用及安全感知上的差异。
AI.result: 发现CEX因易用性和低费用更受用户青睐，而DEX的匿名性与去监管特性并非多数用户核心需求，用户安全感知存在国家差异。
AI.conclusion: 需优化DEX设计以平衡易用性与去中心化特性，同时考虑用户对安全需求的多样性，推动更符合实际需求的去中心化交易方案。

authors_text: Nida Ishtiaq,Amirali Khodadadian Gostar,Alireza Bab-Hadiashar,Reza Hoseinnezhad
title: Interaction-Aware Labeled Multi-Bernoulli Filter
title_zh: 交互感知标记多伯努利滤波器
comment: 13 pages including references, 9 figures, submitted and undergoing second round of review with IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITS)
comments: 13 pages including references, 9 figures, submitted and undergoing second round of review with IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITS)
abstract: Tracking multiple objects through time is an important part of an intelligent transportation system. Random finite set (RFS)-based filters are one of the emerging techniques for tracking multiple objects. In multi-object tracking (MOT), a common assumption is that each object is moving independent of its surroundings. But in many real-world applications, target objects interact with one another and the environment. Such interactions, when considered for tracking, are usually modeled by an interactive motion model which is application specific. In this paper, we present a novel approach to incorporate target interactions within the prediction step of an RFS-based multi-target filter, i.e. labeled multi-Bernoulli (LMB) filter. The method has been developed for two practical applications of tracking a coordinated swarm and vehicles. The method has been tested for a complex vehicle tracking dataset and compared with the LMB filter through the OSPA and OSPA$^{(2)}$ metrics. The results demonstrate that the proposed interaction-aware method depicts considerable performance enhancement over the LMB filter in terms of the selected metrics.
summary: Tracking multiple objects through time is an important part of an intelligent transportation system. Random finite set (RFS)-based filters are one of the emerging techniques for tracking multiple objects. In multi-object tracking (MOT), a common assumption is that each object is moving independent of its surroundings. But in many real-world applications, target objects interact with one another and the environment. Such interactions, when considered for tracking, are usually modeled by an interactive motion model which is application specific. In this paper, we present a novel approach to incorporate target interactions within the prediction step of an RFS-based multi-target filter, i.e. labeled multi-Bernoulli (LMB) filter. The method has been developed for two practical applications of tracking a coordinated swarm and vehicles. The method has been tested for a complex vehicle tracking dataset and compared with the LMB filter through the OSPA and OSPA$^{(2)}$ metrics. The results demonstrate that the proposed interaction-aware method depicts considerable performance enhancement over the LMB filter in terms of the selected metrics.
abstract_zh: 随着时间的推移跟踪多个对象是智能交通系统的重要组成部分。基于随机有限集 (RFS) 的滤波器是用于跟踪多个对象的新兴技术之一。在多对象跟踪（MOT）中，一个常见的假设是每个对象的移动独立于其周围环境。但在许多现实世界的应用中，目标对象彼此之间以及环境之间进行交互。当考虑进行跟踪时，此类交互通常通过特定于应用程序的交互运动模型来建模。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，将目标交互纳入基于 RFS 的多目标滤波器的预测步骤中，即标记的多伯努利 (LMB) 滤波器。该方法是针对跟踪协调群和车辆的两个实际应用而开发的。该方法已针对复杂的车辆跟踪数据集进行了测试，并通过 OSPA 和 OSPA$^{(2)}$ 指标与 LMB 过滤器进行了比较。结果表明，所提出的交互感知方法在所选指标方面比 LMB 过滤器具有显着的性能增强。

AI.tldr: 提出一种考虑目标交互的改进型LMB滤波器，用于多目标跟踪。
AI.motivation: 传统多目标跟踪方法假设目标独立运动，但实际场景中目标间存在交互，导致跟踪性能下降，需改进模型以提高准确性。
AI.method: 在LMB滤波器预测步骤中整合交互运动模型，以处理协调群和车辆的跟踪任务。
AI.result: 在复杂车辆跟踪数据集上测试，使用OSPA指标显示比传统LMB滤波器有显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 交互感知方法有效提升跟踪性能，适用于复杂场景的多目标跟踪应用。

motivation: 传统多目标跟踪方法假设目标独立运动，但实际场景中目标间存在交互，导致跟踪性能下降，需改进模型以提高准确性。
method: 在LMB滤波器预测步骤中整合交互运动模型，以处理协调群和车辆的跟踪任务。
result: 在复杂车辆跟踪数据集上测试，使用OSPA指标显示比传统LMB滤波器有显著性能提升。
conclusion: 交互感知方法有效提升跟踪性能，适用于复杂场景的多目标跟踪应用。
search_text: Interaction-Aware Labeled Multi-Bernoulli Filter 交互感知标记多伯努利滤波器 Tracking multiple objects through time is an important part of an intelligent transportation system. Random finite set (RFS)-based filters are one of the emerging techniques for tracking multiple objects. In multi-object tracking (MOT), a common assumption is that each object is moving independent of its surroundings. But in many real-world applications, target objects interact with one another and the environment. Such interactions, when considered for tracking, are usually modeled by an interactive motion model which is application specific. In this paper, we present a novel approach to incorporate target interactions within the prediction step of an RFS-based multi-target filter, i.e. labeled multi-Bernoulli (LMB) filter. The method has been developed for two practical applications of tracking a coordinated swarm and vehicles. The method has been tested for a complex vehicle tracking dataset and compared with the LMB filter through the OSPA and OSPA$^{(2)}$ metrics. The results demonstrate that the proposed interaction-aware method depicts considerable performance enhancement over the LMB filter in terms of the selected metrics. 随着时间的推移跟踪多个对象是智能交通系统的重要组成部分。基于随机有限集 (RFS) 的滤波器是用于跟踪多个对象的新兴技术之一。在多对象跟踪（MOT）中，一个常见的假设是每个对象的移动独立于其周围环境。但在许多现实世界的应用中，目标对象彼此之间以及环境之间进行交互。当考虑进行跟踪时，此类交互通常通过特定于应用程序的交互运动模型来建模。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，将目标交互纳入基于 RFS 的多目标滤波器的预测步骤中，即标记的多伯努利 (LMB) 滤波器。该方法是针对跟踪协调群和车辆的两个实际应用而开发的。该方法已针对复杂的车辆跟踪数据集进行了测试，并通过 OSPA 和 OSPA$^{(2)}$ 指标与 LMB 过滤器进行了比较。结果表明，所提出的交互感知方法在所选指标方面比 LMB 过滤器具有显着的性能增强。 提出一种考虑目标交互的改进型LMB滤波器，用于多目标跟踪。 Nida Ishtiaq,Amirali Khodadadian Gostar,Alireza Bab-Hadiashar,Reza Hoseinnezhad eess.SP,cs.CV

authors_text: Atoosa Parsa,Dong Wang,Corey S. O'Hern,Mark D. Shattuck,Rebecca Kramer-Bottiglio,Josh Bongard
title: Evolving Programmable Computational Metamaterials
title_zh: 不断发展的可编程计算超材料
comment: Accepted to the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference 2022 (GECCO '22)
comments: Accepted to the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference 2022 (GECCO '22)
abstract: Granular metamaterials are a promising choice for the realization of mechanical computing devices. As preliminary evidence of this, we demonstrate here how to embed Boolean logic gates (AND and XOR) into a granular metamaterial by evolving where particular grains are placed in the material. Our results confirm the existence of gradients of increasing "AND-ness" and "XOR-ness" within the space of possible materials that can be followed by evolutionary search. We measure the computational functionality of a material by probing how it transforms bits encoded as vibrations with zero or non-zero amplitude. We compared the evolution of materials built from mass-contrasting particles and materials built from stiffness-contrasting particles, and found that the latter were more evolvable. We believe this work may pave the way toward evolutionary design of increasingly sophisticated, programmable, and computationally dense metamaterials with certain advantages over more traditional computational substrates.
summary: Granular metamaterials are a promising choice for the realization of mechanical computing devices. As preliminary evidence of this, we demonstrate here how to embed Boolean logic gates (AND and XOR) into a granular metamaterial by evolving where particular grains are placed in the material. We measure the computational functionality of a material by probing how it transforms bits encoded as vibrations with zero or non-zero amplitude. We believe this work may pave the way toward evolutionary design of increasingly sophisticated, programmable, and computationally dense metamaterials with certain advantages over more traditional computational substrates.
abstract_zh: 颗粒超材料是实现机械计算设备的一个有前途的选择。作为这一点的初步证据，我们在此演示如何通过演化特定颗粒在材料中的放置位置，将布尔逻辑门（AND 和 XOR）嵌入颗粒超材料中。我们的结果证实了在可以进行进化搜索的可能材料的空间内存在不断增加的“AND-ness”和“XOR-ness”梯度。我们通过探究材料如何将编码为零或非零振幅振动的比特进行转换来测量材料的计算功能。我们比较了由质量对比粒子构建的材料和由刚度对比粒子构建的材料的演化，发现后者更具演化性。我们相信这项工作可能为日益复杂、可编程和计算密集的超材料的进化设计铺平道路，与更传统的计算基底相比具有某些优势。

AI.tldr: 本文通过进化算法设计具有布尔逻辑功能的颗粒超材料，用于实现机械计算。
AI.motivation: 探索利用超材料实现机械计算的可能性，验证其相较于传统计算基质的优势。
AI.method: 采用进化算法优化颗粒排列，比较质量对比与刚度对比颗粒的可进化性，并通过振动测试评估计算功能。
AI.result: 发现存在AND/XOR特性梯度，刚度对比颗粒材料更具可进化性，且能有效转换振动编码的比特。
AI.conclusion: 进化设计可开发出更复杂、可编程的超材料计算结构，可能超越传统计算基质。

title: LitMC-BERT: transformer-based multi-label classification of biomedical literature with an application on COVID-19 literature curation
title_zh: LitMC-BERT：基于 Transformer 的生物医学文献多标签分类及其在 COVID-19 文献管理中的应用
abstract: The rapid growth of biomedical literature poses a significant challenge for curation and interpretation. This has become more evident during the COVID-19 pandemic. LitCovid, a literature database of COVID-19 related papers in PubMed, has accumulated over 180,000 articles with millions of accesses. Approximately 10,000 new articles are added to LitCovid every month. A main curation task in LitCovid is topic annotation where an article is assigned with up to eight topics, e.g., Treatment and Diagnosis. The annotated topics have been widely used both in LitCovid (e.g., accounting for ~18% of total uses) and downstream studies such as network generation. However, it has been a primary curation bottleneck due to the nature of the task and the rapid literature growth. This study proposes LITMC-BERT, a transformer-based multi-label classification method in biomedical literature. It uses a shared transformer backbone for all the labels while also captures label-specific features and the correlations between label pairs. We compare LITMC-BERT with three baseline models on two datasets. Its micro-F1 and instance-based F1 are 5% and 4% higher than the current best results, respectively, and only requires ~18% of the inference time than the Binary BERT baseline. The related datasets and models are available via https://github.com/ncbi/ml-transformer.
summary: The rapid growth of biomedical literature poses a significant challenge for curation and interpretation. This has become more evident during the COVID-19 pandemic. LitCovid, a literature database of COVID-19 related papers in PubMed, has accumulated over 180,000 articles with millions of accesses. The annotated topics have been widely used both in LitCovid (e.g., accounting for ~18% of total uses) and downstream studies such as network generation. However, it has been a primary curation bottleneck due to the nature of the task and the rapid literature growth. This study proposes LITMC-BERT, a transformer-based multi-label classification method in biomedical literature. It uses a shared transformer backbone for all the labels while also captures label-specific features and the correlations between label pairs. We compare LITMC-BERT with three baseline models on two datasets. Its micro-F1 and instance-based F1 are 5% and 4% higher than the current best results, respectively, and only requires ~18% of the inference time than the Binary BERT baseline. The related datasets and models are available via https://github.com/ncbi/ml-transformer.
abstract_zh: 生物医学文献的快速增长对管理和解释提出了重大挑战。这在 COVID-19 大流行期间变得更加明显。 LitCovid 是 PubMed 中 COVID-19 相关论文的文献数据库，已积累超过 18 万篇文章，访问量达数百万次。 LitCovid 每月大约添加 10,000 篇新文章。 LitCovid 中的主要管理任务是主题注释，其中为一篇文章分配最多八个主题，例如治疗和诊断。带注释的主题已广泛用于 LitCovid（例如，约占总使用量的 18%）和网络生成等下游研究。然而，由于任务的性质和文献的快速增长，它一直是主要的管理瓶颈。本研究提出了 LITMC-BERT，一种生物医学文献中基于 Transformer 的多标签分类方法。它对所有标签使用共享的变压器主干，同时还捕获特定于标签的特征以及标签对之间的相关性。我们将 LITMC-BERT 与两个数据集上的三个基线模型进行比较。其微型 F1 和基于实例的 F1 分别比当前最佳结果高 5% 和 4%，并且仅需要比 Binary BERT 基线约 18% 的推理时间。相关数据集和模型可通过 https://github.com/ncbi/ml-transformer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LitMC-BERT，一种基于Transformer的生物医学文献多标签分类方法，并应用于新冠疫情期间的文献整理任务。
AI.motivation: 生物医学文献的快速增长导致手动标注效率低下，尤其在新冠疫情期间，LitCovid数据库每月新增数千篇文献，亟需自动化分类方法提升标注效率。
AI.method: LitMC-BERT采用共享的Transformer主干网络，同时捕捉标签特异性特征及标签间相关性，通过多标签分类优化模型结构。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上，LitMC-BERT的微F1和实例级F1分别比现有最佳模型高5%和4%，推理时间仅为二值BERT基线的18%。
AI.conclusion: LitMC-BERT有效提升了生物医学文献多标签分类的准确性与效率，为大规模文献整理提供了可行的自动化解决方案。

title: Learning Forward Dynamics Model and Informed Trajectory Sampler for Safe Quadruped Navigation
title_zh: 用于安全四足动物导航的学习前向动力学模型和知情轨迹采样器
comment: Accepted to Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS 2022)
comments: Accepted to Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS 2022)
abstract: For autonomous quadruped robot navigation in various complex environments, a typical SOTA system is composed of four main modules -- mapper, global planner, local planner, and command-tracking controller -- in a hierarchical manner. In this paper, we build a robust and safe local planner which is designed to generate a velocity plan to track a coarsely planned path from the global planner. Previous works used waypoint-based methods (e.g. Proportional-Differential control and pure pursuit) which simplify the path tracking problem to local point-goal navigation. However, they suffer from frequent collisions in geometrically complex and narrow environments because of two reasons; the global planner uses a coarse and inaccurate model and the local planner is unable to track the global plan sufficiently well. Currently, deep learning methods are an appealing alternative because they can learn safety and path feasibility from experience more accurately. However, existing deep learning methods are not capable of planning for a long horizon. In this work, we propose a learning-based fully autonomous navigation framework composed of three innovative elements: a learned forward dynamics model (FDM), an online sampling-based model-predictive controller, and an informed trajectory sampler (ITS). Using our framework, a quadruped robot can autonomously navigate in various complex environments without a collision and generate a smoother command plan compared to the baseline method. Furthermore, our method can reactively handle unexpected obstacles on the planned path and avoid them. Project page https://awesomericky.github.io/projects/FDM_ITS_navigation/.
summary: For autonomous quadruped robot navigation in various complex environments, a typical SOTA system is composed of four main modules -- mapper, global planner, local planner, and command-tracking controller -- in a hierarchical manner. In this paper, we build a robust and safe local planner which is designed to generate a velocity plan to track a coarsely planned path from the global planner. Previous works used waypoint-based methods (e.g. Proportional-Differential control and pure pursuit) which simplify the path tracking problem to local point-goal navigation. However, they suffer from frequent collisions in geometrically complex and narrow environments because of two reasons; the global planner uses a coarse and inaccurate model and the local planner is unable to track the global plan sufficiently well. Currently, deep learning methods are an appealing alternative because they can learn safety and path feasibility from experience more accurately. However, existing deep learning methods are not capable of planning for a long horizon. In this work, we propose a learning-based fully autonomous navigation framework composed of three innovative elements: a learned forward dynamics model (FDM), an online sampling-based model-predictive controller, and an informed trajectory sampler (ITS). Using our framework, a quadruped robot can autonomously navigate in various complex environments without a collision and generate a smoother command plan compared to the baseline method. Furthermore, our method can reactively handle unexpected obstacles on the planned path and avoid them. Project page https://awesomericky.github.io/projects/FDM_ITS_navigation/.
abstract_zh: 对于各种复杂环境下的自主四足机器人导航，典型的SOTA系统由四个主要模块分层组成：映射器、全局规划器、局部规划器和命令跟踪控制器。在本文中，我们构建了一个强大且安全的局部规划器，旨在生成速度规划以跟踪全局规划器的粗略规划路径。以前的工作使用基于航路点的方法（例如比例微分控制和纯追踪），将路径跟踪问题简化为局部点目标导航。然而，由于两个原因，它们在几何复杂且狭窄的环境中经常发生碰撞：全局规划器使用粗糙且不准确的模型，并且局部规划器无法充分跟踪全局规划。目前，深度学习方法是一种有吸引力的替代方案，因为它们可以更准确地从经验中学习安全性和路径可行性。然而，现有的深度学习方法无法进行长期规划。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于学习的完全自主导航框架，由三个创新元素组成：学习的前向动力学模型（FDM）、基于在线采样的模型预测控制器和知情轨迹采样器（ITS）。使用我们的框架，四足机器人可以在各种复杂环境中自主导航而不会发生碰撞，并生成比基线方法更平滑的命令计划。此外，我们的方法可以反应性地处理计划路径上的意外障碍并避开它们。项目页面 https://awesomericky.github.io/projects/FDM_ITS_navigation/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的四足机器人自主导航框架，通过学习前向动力学模型和轨迹采样器实现安全导航。
AI.motivation: 传统四足机器人导航系统在复杂环境中易发生碰撞，现有局部规划器无法有效跟踪全局路径，且深度学习方法难以处理长时序规划问题。
AI.method: 提出包含学习前向动力学模型（FDM）、在线采样模型预测控制器和知情轨迹采样器（ITS）的三要素框架，实现自主避障与平滑轨迹生成。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法可避免碰撞、生成更平滑指令，并能实时处理路径上的突发障碍物。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架在复杂环境中实现了安全高效的四足机器人自主导航，优于传统方法和现有深度学习方案。

search_text: Learning Forward Dynamics Model and Informed Trajectory Sampler for Safe Quadruped Navigation 用于安全四足动物导航的学习前向动力学模型和知情轨迹采样器 For autonomous quadruped robot navigation in various complex environments, a typical SOTA system is composed of four main modules -- mapper, global planner, local planner, and command-tracking controller -- in a hierarchical manner. In this paper, we build a robust and safe local planner which is designed to generate a velocity plan to track a coarsely planned path from the global planner. Previous works used waypoint-based methods (e.g. Proportional-Differential control and pure pursuit) which simplify the path tracking problem to local point-goal navigation. However, they suffer from frequent collisions in geometrically complex and narrow environments because of two reasons; the global planner uses a coarse and inaccurate model and the local planner is unable to track the global plan sufficiently well. Currently, deep learning methods are an appealing alternative because they can learn safety and path feasibility from experience more accurately. However, existing deep learning methods are not capable of planning for a long horizon. In this work, we propose a learning-based fully autonomous navigation framework composed of three innovative elements: a learned forward dynamics model (FDM), an online sampling-based model-predictive controller, and an informed trajectory sampler (ITS). Using our framework, a quadruped robot can autonomously navigate in various complex environments without a collision and generate a smoother command plan compared to the baseline method. Furthermore, our method can reactively handle unexpected obstacles on the planned path and avoid them.
